    const canonicalSchema={
      foods:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS foods (food_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, category TEXT, default_serving REAL, unit TEXT, calories REAL, protein REAL, carbs REAL, fiber REAL, fat REAL, saturated_fat REAL, sodium REAL, potassium REAL, notes TEXT)`,
        columns:{food_id:'TEXT',name:'TEXT',category:'TEXT',default_serving:'REAL',unit:'TEXT',calories:'REAL',protein:'REAL',carbs:'REAL',fiber:'REAL',fat:'REAL',saturated_fat:'REAL',sodium:'REAL',potassium:'REAL',notes:'TEXT',nutrition_known:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',archived:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',archived_at:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{name:['food','food_name']}
      },
      pantry:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, pantry_id TEXT, item TEXT, food_id TEXT, brand TEXT, on_hand TEXT, quantity REAL, unit TEXT, opened TEXT, opened_date TEXT, expiration TEXT, location TEXT, status TEXT, priority TEXT, category TEXT, notes TEXT)`,
        columns:{pantry_id:'TEXT',item:'TEXT',food_id:'TEXT',brand:'TEXT',on_hand:'TEXT',quantity:'REAL',unit:'TEXT',opened:'TEXT',opened_date:'TEXT',expiration:'TEXT',location:'TEXT',status:'TEXT',priority:'TEXT',category:'TEXT',notes:'TEXT',purchase_date:'TEXT',verified_at:'TEXT',storage_type:'TEXT',manufacturer_shelf_life_days:'REAL',opened_shelf_life_days:'REAL',freshness_observation:'TEXT',purchase_price:'REAL',retailer:'TEXT',original_servings:'REAL',quantity_accuracy:'TEXT',package_count:'REAL',package_type:'TEXT',container_size:'REAL',container_unit:'TEXT',unopened_packages:'REAL',partial_package_quantity:'REAL',freshness_status:'TEXT',source_recipe_id:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{item:['name','food','pantry_item'],food_id:['canonical_food_id'],expiration:['effective_expiry','best_by_expiration']}
      },
      recipes:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipes (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, recipe_id TEXT, recipe_name TEXT, ingredient_name TEXT, amount REAL, unit TEXT, ingredient_type TEXT, ingredient_id TEXT, inventory_status TEXT)`,
        columns:{recipe_id:'TEXT',recipe_name:'TEXT',ingredient_name:'TEXT',amount:'REAL',unit:'TEXT',ingredient_type:'TEXT',ingredient_id:'TEXT',inventory_status:'TEXT',archived:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',archived_at:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{recipe_name:['recipe','name'],ingredient_name:['ingredient','food_name']}
      },
      health_metrics:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS health_metrics (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, metric_type TEXT NOT NULL, value_primary REAL, value_secondary REAL, unit TEXT, measured_at TEXT NOT NULL, local_date TEXT NOT NULL, notes TEXT, source TEXT DEFAULT 'manual', created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL)`,

        aliases:{}

        columns:{imported_at:'TEXT',file_name:'TEXT',foods:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',pantry:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',recipes:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',warnings:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',status:"TEXT DEFAULT 'success'",duration_ms:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',error_message:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{}
      }

    function idbOpen(){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const req=indexedDB.open(STORAGE_DB,2);req.onupgradeneeded=()=>{if(!req.result.objectStoreNames.contains('files'))req.result.createObjectStore('files');if(!req.result.objectStoreNames.contains('backups'))req.result.createObjectStore('backups')};req.onerror=()=>reject(req.error);req.onsuccess=()=>resolve(req.result)})}
    async function saveBytes(bytes){const store=await idbOpen();return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=store.transaction('files','readwrite');tx.objectStore('files').put(bytes,DB_KEY);tx.oncomplete=()=>{store.close();resolve()};tx.onerror=()=>{store.close();reject(tx.error)}})}
    async function loadBytes(){const store=await idbOpen();return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=store.transaction('files','readonly');const get=tx.objectStore('files').get(DB_KEY);get.onsuccess=()=>{store.close();resolve(get.result||null)};get.onerror=()=>{store.close();reject(get.error)}})}
    async function saveSafetyBytes(bytes,key){const store=await idbOpen();return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=store.transaction('backups','readwrite');tx.objectStore('backups').put(bytes,key);tx.oncomplete=()=>{store.close();resolve()};tx.onerror=()=>{store.close();reject(tx.error)}})}
    export async function createSafetyBackup(reason='Safety backup'){
      if(!db)return null;
      const bytes=db.export();const key=`fizz-backup-${new Date().toISOString()}`;
      await saveSafetyBytes(bytes,key);
      try{db.run('INSERT INTO safety_backup_log(backup_key,reason,created_at,byte_size,status) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)',[key,reason,new Date().toISOString(),bytes.byteLength,'available']);await persist()}catch{}
      return key;
    }
    export function normalizeHistoricalMeals(){
      if(!hasTable('meals'))return {repaired:0};
      const before=Number(query("SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date IS NULL OR consumed_local_date='' OR consumed_local_date NOT LIKE '____-__-__'")[0]?.count||0);
      db.run(`UPDATE meals SET consumed_local_date=substr(eaten_at,1,10) WHERE (consumed_local_date IS NULL OR consumed_local_date='' OR consumed_local_date NOT LIKE '____-__-__') AND eaten_at IS NOT NULL`);
      db.run(`DELETE FROM meal_date_index`);
      db.run(`INSERT INTO meal_date_index(meal_date,consumed_count,planned_count,updated_at)
        SELECT d.meal_date,SUM(d.consumed_count),SUM(d.planned_count),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM (
          SELECT consumed_local_date meal_date,COUNT(*) consumed_count,0 planned_count FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY consumed_local_date
          UNION ALL SELECT planned_local_date,0,COUNT(*) FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' GROUP BY planned_local_date
        ) d WHERE d.meal_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.meal_date`);
      return {repaired:before};
    }
    function safeIdentifier(value){if(!/^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$/.test(value))throw new Error(`Unsafe SQL identifier: ${value}`);return value}
    function hasTable(name){return query("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name=?",[name]).length>0}
    function tableInfo(table){if(!hasTable(table))return [];return query(`PRAGMA table_info(${safeIdentifier(table)})`)}
    function tableColumns(table){return tableInfo(table).map(r=>String(r.name))}
    function columnExists(table,column){return tableColumns(table).includes(column)}
    
    
    function rebuildRecipesToCanonical(){
      if(!hasTable('recipes'))return {rebuilt:false,copied:0};
      const info=tableInfo('recipes');
      const cols=new Set(info.map(r=>String(r.name)));
      const hasLegacyRequired=info.some(r=>String(r.name)==='name'&&Number(r.notnull)===1);
      if(!hasLegacyRequired)return {rebuilt:false,copied:0};
      const pick=(...names)=>names.find(n=>cols.has(n));
      const expr=(names,fallback='NULL')=>{const n=pick(...names);return n?safeIdentifier(n):fallback};
      db.run('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS recipes_canonical_v6');
      db.run(`CREATE TABLE recipes_canonical_v6 (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        recipe_id TEXT, recipe_name TEXT, ingredient_name TEXT, amount REAL, unit TEXT,
        ingredient_type TEXT, ingredient_id TEXT, inventory_status TEXT
      )`);
      const count=Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM recipes')[0]?.count||0);
      if(count){
        db.run(`INSERT INTO recipes_canonical_v6(recipe_id,recipe_name,ingredient_name,amount,unit,ingredient_type,ingredient_id,inventory_status)
          SELECT ${expr(['recipe_id'])},
                 COALESCE(${expr(['recipe_name','name','recipe'],"''")},''),
                 COALESCE(${expr(['ingredient_name','ingredient','food_name'],"''")},''),
                 ${expr(['amount'])},${expr(['unit'])},${expr(['ingredient_type'])},${expr(['ingredient_id'])},${expr(['inventory_status'])}
          FROM recipes`);
      }
      db.run('DROP TABLE recipes');
      db.run('ALTER TABLE recipes_canonical_v6 RENAME TO recipes');
      db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_name ON recipes(recipe_name)');
      db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_id ON recipes(recipe_id)');
      return {rebuilt:true,copied:count};
    }
    
    export function reconcileImportSchema({apply=true}={}){
      const report={current:true,added:[],backfilled:[],tablesCreated:[],rebuilt:[],warnings:[]};
      if(apply){const recipeRepair=rebuildRecipesToCanonical();if(recipeRepair.rebuilt)report.rebuilt.push(`recipes (${recipeRepair.copied} rows preserved)`)}
      for(const [table,spec] of Object.entries(canonicalSchema)){
        if(!hasTable(table)){
          report.current=false;
          if(apply){db.run(spec.create);report.tablesCreated.push(table)}
          else report.warnings.push(`Missing table: ${table}`);
        }
        let columns=tableColumns(table);
        for(const [column,type] of Object.entries(spec.columns)){
          if(columns.includes(column))continue;
          report.current=false;
          if(apply){
            db.run(`ALTER TABLE ${safeIdentifier(table)} ADD COLUMN ${safeIdentifier(column)} ${type}`);
            report.added.push(`${table}.${column}`);
            columns.push(column);
          }else report.warnings.push(`Missing column: ${table}.${column}`);
        }
        if(apply){
          columns=tableColumns(table);
          for(const [target,aliases] of Object.entries(spec.aliases||{})){
            const source=aliases.find(alias=>columns.includes(alias));
            if(source&&columns.includes(target)){
              db.run(`UPDATE ${safeIdentifier(table)} SET ${safeIdentifier(target)}=${safeIdentifier(source)} WHERE (${safeIdentifier(target)} IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(${safeIdentifier(target)} AS TEXT))='') AND ${safeIdentifier(source)} IS NOT NULL`);
              report.backfilled.push(`${table}.${target} ← ${source}`);
            }
          }
        }
      }
      if(apply){
        db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_name ON recipes(recipe_name)');
        db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_id ON recipes(recipe_id)');
      }
      report.current=report.added.length===0&&report.tablesCreated.length===0&&report.rebuilt.length===0&&report.warnings.length===0;
      return report;
    }
    
    function splitSqlStatements(sql){
      const statements=[];
      let current='';
      let quote=null;
      for(let i=0;i<String(sql||'').length;i++){
        const char=sql[i];
        const next=sql[i+1];
        current+=char;
        if(quote){
          if(char===quote){
            // SQLite escapes quote characters by doubling them.
            if(next===quote){current+=next;i++}
            else quote=null;
          }
          continue;
        }
        if(char==="'"||char==='"'||char==='`'){quote=char;continue}
        if(char===';'){
          const statement=current.slice(0,-1).trim();
          if(statement)statements.push(statement);
          current='';
        }
      }
      const trailing=current.trim();
      if(trailing)statements.push(trailing);
      return statements;
    }
    function runMigrationSql(sql){
      const statements=splitSqlStatements(String(sql||''));
      for(const statement of statements){
        try{db.run(statement)}catch(error){
          const message=String(error?.message||error).toLowerCase();
          // Older builds sometimes added a column before recording the migration.
          // Treat those already-applied DDL operations as successful.
          if(message.includes('duplicate column name')||message.includes('already exists'))continue;
          throw error;
        }
      }
    }
    function repairFeatureSchema(){
      // Repair databases that recorded a release migration before every feature table/column was created.
      // All statements are idempotent; duplicate-column and existing-index errors are intentionally ignored.
      for(const migration of migrations.filter(item=>item.version>=34)){
        if(migration.sql.trim())runMigrationSql(migration.sql);
      }
    }
    async function migrate(onProgress=()=>{}){
      onProgress('Checking database structure…');
      if(!hasTable('schema_migrations'))db.run('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_migrations (version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, applied_at TEXT NOT NULL)');
      const applied=new Set(query('SELECT version FROM schema_migrations').map(r=>Number(r.version)));
      const pending=migrations.filter(migration=>!applied.has(migration.version));
      for(let index=0;index<pending.length;index++){
        const migration=pending[index];
        onProgress(`Updating health database ${index+1} of ${pending.length}…`);
        const backup=db.export();
        try{
          db.run('BEGIN');
          if(migration.sql.trim())runMigrationSql(migration.sql);
          db.run('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO schema_migrations(version,name,applied_at) VALUES (?,?,?)',[migration.version,migration.name,new Date().toISOString()]);
          db.run('COMMIT');
        }catch(error){
          try{db.run('ROLLBACK')}catch{}
          db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));
          throw new Error(`Database migration ${migration.version} failed: ${error.message}`);
        }
      }
      const repairMarker=`feature_schema_repaired_v${TARGET_SCHEMA_VERSION}`;
      const alreadyRepaired=hasTable('settings')&&query('SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key=?',[repairMarker])[0]?.value==='1';
      const needsRepair=pending.length===0&&!alreadyRepaired;
      const backup=db.export();
      try{
        onProgress('Finalizing database structure…');
        db.run('BEGIN');
        if(needsRepair)repairFeatureSchema();
        reconcileImportSchema({apply:true});
        if(hasTable('settings'))db.run('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO settings(key,value) VALUES (?,?)',[repairMarker,'1']);
        db.run('COMMIT');
      }catch(error){try{db.run('ROLLBACK')}catch{}db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));throw new Error(`Database schema reconciliation failed: ${error.message}`)}
      if(hasTable('meal_date_index')){onProgress('Indexing meal history…');normalizeHistoricalMeals()}
      onProgress('Saving database…');
      await persist();
    }
    export async function openDatabase({onProgress=()=>{}}={}){
      if(db){onProgress('Database ready');return db}
      onProgress('Loading database engine…');
      SQL=await initSqlJs({locateFile:()=>wasmUrl});
      onProgress('Opening saved health data…');
      const bytes=await loadBytes();
      db=bytes?new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(bytes)):new SQL.Database();
      await migrate(onProgress);
      onProgress('Database ready');
      return db;
    }
    export async function persist(){if(db)await saveBytes(db.export())}
    export async function resetDatabase(){db=new SQL.Database();await migrate();return db}
    const normalizeBindValue=value=>{
      if(value===undefined)return null;
      if(value===null||typeof value==='string'||typeof value==='number')return value;
      if(typeof value==='boolean')return value?1:0;
      if(value instanceof Date)return value.toISOString();
      return String(value);
    };
    const normalizeParams=params=>Array.isArray(params)?params.map(normalizeBindValue):params;
    export function query(sql,params=[]){const stmt=db.prepare(sql);stmt.bind(normalizeParams(params));const rows=[];while(stmt.step())rows.push(stmt.getAsObject());stmt.free();return rows}
    export async function run(sql,params=[]){db.run(sql,normalizeParams(params));await persist()}
    export async function transaction(callback){const backup=db.export();const savepoint=`fizz_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;try{db.run(`SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`);await callback({run:(sql,params=[])=>db.run(sql,normalizeParams(params)),query});db.run(`RELEASE SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`);await persist()}catch(error){try{db.run(`ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`);db.run(`RELEASE SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`)}catch{}db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));await persist();throw error}}
    export async function prepareWorkbookImport(){const backup=db.export();try{await createSafetyBackup('Before workbook import');const report=reconcileImportSchema({apply:true});if(hasTable('meal_date_index'))normalizeHistoricalMeals();await persist();return report}catch(error){db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));await persist();throw new Error(`Schema preparation failed: ${error.message}`)}}
    
    export async function recordImportFailure({fileName='',durationMs=0,errorMessage='' }={}){
      if(!db)return;
      try{
        reconcileImportSchema({apply:true});
        db.run('INSERT INTO import_history(imported_at,file_name,foods,pantry,recipes,warnings,status,duration_ms,error_message) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[
          new Date().toISOString(),fileName,0,0,0,0,'failed',Number(durationMs)||0,String(errorMessage||'Import failed')
        ]);
        await persist();
      }catch{}
    }
    
    export function exportDatabase(){return db.export()}
    export async function importDatabase(bytes){const candidate=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(bytes));const prior=db;db=candidate;try{await migrate()}catch(error){db=prior;throw error}await persist()}
    export function databaseStatus(){
      const count=table=>hasTable(table)?Number(query(`SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM ${safeIdentifier(table)}`)[0]?.count||0):0;
      const latest=hasTable('import_history')?query('SELECT * FROM import_history ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1')[0]||null:null;
      const version=hasTable('schema_migrations')?Number(query('SELECT MAX(version) AS version FROM schema_migrations')[0]?.version||0):0;
      const compatibility=reconcileImportSchema({apply:false});
      const foodsWithNutrition=hasTable('foods')?Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=1')[0]?.count||0):0;
      const foodsMissingNutrition=hasTable('foods')?Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=0')[0]?.count||0):0;
      const mealsPendingNutrition=hasTable('meals')?Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM meals WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=0')[0]?.count||0):0;
      const missingNutritionFoods=hasTable('foods')?query(`SELECT food_id,name,category,default_serving,unit FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=0 ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 50`):[];
      const nutritionCoverage=count('foods')?Math.round((foodsWithNutrition/count('foods'))*100):0;
      const pantryNutritionIssues=hasTable('pantry')&&hasTable('foods')?query(`SELECT p.pantry_id,p.item,p.food_id,f.name AS linked_food,
        COALESCE(f.nutrition_known,0) AS nutrition_known,COALESCE(f.calories,0) AS calories
        FROM pantry p LEFT JOIN foods f ON UPPER(f.food_id)=UPPER(p.food_id)
        WHERE p.on_hand='Yes' AND (f.food_id IS NULL OR COALESCE(f.nutrition_known,0)=0 OR
          (COALESCE(f.calories,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.protein,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.carbs,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.fat,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.fiber,0)=0))
        ORDER BY p.item COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 50`):[];
      const history=hasTable('meals')?query(`SELECT MIN(consumed_local_date) earliest,MAX(consumed_local_date) latest,COUNT(*) total_meals,COUNT(DISTINCT consumed_local_date) total_days FROM meals`)[0]||{}:{};
      const mealDates=hasTable('meal_date_index')?query('SELECT meal_date,consumed_count,planned_count FROM meal_date_index ORDER BY meal_date'):[];
      const safetyBackups=hasTable('safety_backup_log')?count('safety_backup_log'):0;
      return {schemaVersion:version,targetSchemaVersion:TARGET_SCHEMA_VERSION,foods:count('foods'),foodsWithNutrition,foodsMissingNutrition,missingNutritionFoods,nutritionCoverage,mealsPendingNutrition,pantry:count('pantry'),recipes:count('recipes'),meals:count('meals'),latest,compatibility,pantryNutritionIssues,history,mealDates,safetyBackups};
    }

        INSERT OR REPLACE INTO release_metadata(version,release_date,build_id,schema_version,title,created_at)
        VALUES ('1.4.11.19','2026-07-23','141319',53,'Restaurant Intelligence UX & Decision Dashboard','2026-07-24T01:30:00.000Z');
      `}

        VALUES ('1.4.11.20','2026-07-24','141320',54,'Restaurant Decision Dashboard Polish','2026-07-24T15:30:00.000Z');

    const canonicalSchema={
      foods:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS foods (food_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, category TEXT, default_serving REAL, unit TEXT, calories REAL, protein REAL, carbs REAL, fiber REAL, fat REAL, saturated_fat REAL, sodium REAL, potassium REAL, notes TEXT)`,
        columns:{food_id:'TEXT',name:'TEXT',category:'TEXT',default_serving:'REAL',unit:'TEXT',calories:'REAL',protein:'REAL',carbs:'REAL',fiber:'REAL',fat:'REAL',saturated_fat:'REAL',sodium:'REAL',potassium:'REAL',notes:'TEXT',nutrition_known:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',archived:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',archived_at:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{name:['food','food_name']}
      },
      pantry:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, pantry_id TEXT, item TEXT, food_id TEXT, brand TEXT, on_hand TEXT, quantity REAL, unit TEXT, opened TEXT, opened_date TEXT, expiration TEXT, location TEXT, status TEXT, priority TEXT, category TEXT, notes TEXT)`,
        columns:{pantry_id:'TEXT',item:'TEXT',food_id:'TEXT',brand:'TEXT',on_hand:'TEXT',quantity:'REAL',unit:'TEXT',opened:'TEXT',opened_date:'TEXT',expiration:'TEXT',location:'TEXT',status:'TEXT',priority:'TEXT',category:'TEXT',notes:'TEXT',purchase_date:'TEXT',verified_at:'TEXT',storage_type:'TEXT',manufacturer_shelf_life_days:'REAL',opened_shelf_life_days:'REAL',freshness_observation:'TEXT',purchase_price:'REAL',retailer:'TEXT',original_servings:'REAL',quantity_accuracy:'TEXT',package_count:'REAL',package_type:'TEXT',container_size:'REAL',container_unit:'TEXT',unopened_packages:'REAL',partial_package_quantity:'REAL',freshness_status:'TEXT',source_recipe_id:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{item:['name','food','pantry_item'],food_id:['canonical_food_id'],expiration:['effective_expiry','best_by_expiration']}
      },
      recipes:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipes (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, recipe_id TEXT, recipe_name TEXT, ingredient_name TEXT, amount REAL, unit TEXT, ingredient_type TEXT, ingredient_id TEXT, inventory_status TEXT)`,
        columns:{recipe_id:'TEXT',recipe_name:'TEXT',ingredient_name:'TEXT',amount:'REAL',unit:'TEXT',ingredient_type:'TEXT',ingredient_id:'TEXT',inventory_status:'TEXT',archived:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',archived_at:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{recipe_name:['recipe','name'],ingredient_name:['ingredient','food_name']}
      },
      health_metrics:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS health_metrics (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, metric_type TEXT NOT NULL, value_primary REAL, value_secondary REAL, unit TEXT, measured_at TEXT NOT NULL, local_date TEXT NOT NULL, notes TEXT, source TEXT DEFAULT 'manual', created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL)`,
        columns:{metric_type:'TEXT',value_primary:'REAL',value_secondary:'REAL',unit:'TEXT',measured_at:'TEXT',local_date:'TEXT',notes:'TEXT',source:"TEXT DEFAULT 'manual'",created_at:'TEXT',updated_at:'TEXT',source_record_id:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{}
      },
      import_history:{
        create:`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS import_history (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, imported_at TEXT, file_name TEXT, foods INTEGER DEFAULT 0, pantry INTEGER DEFAULT 0, recipes INTEGER DEFAULT 0, warnings INTEGER DEFAULT 0, status TEXT DEFAULT 'success', duration_ms INTEGER DEFAULT 0, error_message TEXT)`,
        columns:{imported_at:'TEXT',file_name:'TEXT',foods:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',pantry:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',recipes:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',warnings:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',status:"TEXT DEFAULT 'success'",duration_ms:'INTEGER DEFAULT 0',error_message:'TEXT'},
        aliases:{}
      }
    };
    
    function idbOpen(){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const req=indexedDB.open(STORAGE_DB,2);req.onupgradeneeded=()=>{if(!req.result.objectStoreNames.contains('files'))req.result.createObjectStore('files');if(!req.result.objectStoreNames.contains('backups'))req.result.createObjectStore('backups')};req.onerror=()=>reject(req.error);req.onsuccess=()=>resolve(req.result)})}
    async function saveBytes(bytes){const store=await idbOpen();return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=store.transaction('files','readwrite');tx.objectStore('files').put(bytes,DB_KEY);tx.oncomplete=()=>{store.close();resolve()};tx.onerror=()=>{store.close();reject(tx.error)}})}
    async function loadBytes(){const store=await idbOpen();return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=store.transaction('files','readonly');const get=tx.objectStore('files').get(DB_KEY);get.onsuccess=()=>{store.close();resolve(get.result||null)};get.onerror=()=>{store.close();reject(get.error)}})}
    async function saveSafetyBytes(bytes,key){const store=await idbOpen();return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const tx=store.transaction('backups','readwrite');tx.objectStore('backups').put(bytes,key);tx.oncomplete=()=>{store.close();resolve()};tx.onerror=()=>{store.close();reject(tx.error)}})}
    export async function createSafetyBackup(reason='Safety backup'){
      if(!db)return null;
      const bytes=db.export();const key=`fizz-backup-${new Date().toISOString()}`;
      await saveSafetyBytes(bytes,key);
      try{db.run('INSERT INTO safety_backup_log(backup_key,reason,created_at,byte_size,status) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)',[key,reason,new Date().toISOString(),bytes.byteLength,'available']);await persist()}catch{}
      return key;
    }
    export function normalizeHistoricalMeals(){
      if(!hasTable('meals'))return {repaired:0};
      const before=Number(query("SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date IS NULL OR consumed_local_date='' OR consumed_local_date NOT LIKE '____-__-__'")[0]?.count||0);
      db.run(`UPDATE meals SET consumed_local_date=substr(eaten_at,1,10) WHERE (consumed_local_date IS NULL OR consumed_local_date='' OR consumed_local_date NOT LIKE '____-__-__') AND eaten_at IS NOT NULL`);
      db.run(`DELETE FROM meal_date_index`);
      db.run(`INSERT INTO meal_date_index(meal_date,consumed_count,planned_count,updated_at)
        SELECT d.meal_date,SUM(d.consumed_count),SUM(d.planned_count),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM (
          SELECT consumed_local_date meal_date,COUNT(*) consumed_count,0 planned_count FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY consumed_local_date
          UNION ALL SELECT planned_local_date,0,COUNT(*) FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' GROUP BY planned_local_date
        ) d WHERE d.meal_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.meal_date`);
      return {repaired:before};
    }
    function safeIdentifier(value){if(!/^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$/.test(value))throw new Error(`Unsafe SQL identifier: ${value}`);return value}
    function hasTable(name){return query("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name=?",[name]).length>0}
    function tableInfo(table){if(!hasTable(table))return [];return query(`PRAGMA table_info(${safeIdentifier(table)})`)}
    function tableColumns(table){return tableInfo(table).map(r=>String(r.name))}
    function columnExists(table,column){return tableColumns(table).includes(column)}
    
    
    function rebuildRecipesToCanonical(){
      if(!hasTable('recipes'))return {rebuilt:false,copied:0};
      const info=tableInfo('recipes');
      const cols=new Set(info.map(r=>String(r.name)));
      const hasLegacyRequired=info.some(r=>String(r.name)==='name'&&Number(r.notnull)===1);
      if(!hasLegacyRequired)return {rebuilt:false,copied:0};
      const pick=(...names)=>names.find(n=>cols.has(n));
      const expr=(names,fallback='NULL')=>{const n=pick(...names);return n?safeIdentifier(n):fallback};
      db.run('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS recipes_canonical_v6');
      db.run(`CREATE TABLE recipes_canonical_v6 (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        recipe_id TEXT, recipe_name TEXT, ingredient_name TEXT, amount REAL, unit TEXT,
        ingredient_type TEXT, ingredient_id TEXT, inventory_status TEXT
      )`);
      const count=Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM recipes')[0]?.count||0);
      if(count){
        db.run(`INSERT INTO recipes_canonical_v6(recipe_id,recipe_name,ingredient_name,amount,unit,ingredient_type,ingredient_id,inventory_status)
          SELECT ${expr(['recipe_id'])},
                 COALESCE(${expr(['recipe_name','name','recipe'],"''")},''),
                 COALESCE(${expr(['ingredient_name','ingredient','food_name'],"''")},''),
                 ${expr(['amount'])},${expr(['unit'])},${expr(['ingredient_type'])},${expr(['ingredient_id'])},${expr(['inventory_status'])}
          FROM recipes`);
      }
      db.run('DROP TABLE recipes');
      db.run('ALTER TABLE recipes_canonical_v6 RENAME TO recipes');
      db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_name ON recipes(recipe_name)');
      db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_id ON recipes(recipe_id)');
      return {rebuilt:true,copied:count};
    }
    
    export function reconcileImportSchema({apply=true}={}){
      const report={current:true,added:[],backfilled:[],tablesCreated:[],rebuilt:[],warnings:[]};
      if(apply){const recipeRepair=rebuildRecipesToCanonical();if(recipeRepair.rebuilt)report.rebuilt.push(`recipes (${recipeRepair.copied} rows preserved)`)}
      for(const [table,spec] of Object.entries(canonicalSchema)){
        if(!hasTable(table)){
          report.current=false;
          if(apply){db.run(spec.create);report.tablesCreated.push(table)}
          else report.warnings.push(`Missing table: ${table}`);
        }
        let columns=tableColumns(table);
        for(const [column,type] of Object.entries(spec.columns)){
          if(columns.includes(column))continue;
          report.current=false;
          if(apply){
            db.run(`ALTER TABLE ${safeIdentifier(table)} ADD COLUMN ${safeIdentifier(column)} ${type}`);
            report.added.push(`${table}.${column}`);
            columns.push(column);
          }else report.warnings.push(`Missing column: ${table}.${column}`);
        }
        if(apply){
          columns=tableColumns(table);
          for(const [target,aliases] of Object.entries(spec.aliases||{})){
            const source=aliases.find(alias=>columns.includes(alias));
            if(source&&columns.includes(target)){
              db.run(`UPDATE ${safeIdentifier(table)} SET ${safeIdentifier(target)}=${safeIdentifier(source)} WHERE (${safeIdentifier(target)} IS NULL OR TRIM(CAST(${safeIdentifier(target)} AS TEXT))='') AND ${safeIdentifier(source)} IS NOT NULL`);
              report.backfilled.push(`${table}.${target} ← ${source}`);
            }
          }
        }
      }
      if(apply){
        db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_name ON recipes(recipe_name)');
        db.run('CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_id ON recipes(recipe_id)');
      }
      report.current=report.added.length===0&&report.tablesCreated.length===0&&report.rebuilt.length===0&&report.warnings.length===0;
      return report;
    }
    
    function splitSqlStatements(sql){
      const statements=[];
      let current='';
      let quote=null;
      for(let i=0;i<String(sql||'').length;i++){
        const char=sql[i];
        const next=sql[i+1];
        current+=char;
        if(quote){
          if(char===quote){
            // SQLite escapes quote characters by doubling them.
            if(next===quote){current+=next;i++}
            else quote=null;
          }
          continue;
        }
        if(char==="'"||char==='"'||char==='`'){quote=char;continue}
        if(char===';'){
          const statement=current.slice(0,-1).trim();
          if(statement)statements.push(statement);
          current='';
        }
      }
      const trailing=current.trim();
      if(trailing)statements.push(trailing);
      return statements;
    }
    function runMigrationSql(sql){
      const statements=splitSqlStatements(String(sql||''));
      for(const statement of statements){
        try{db.run(statement)}catch(error){
          const message=String(error?.message||error).toLowerCase();
          // Older builds sometimes added a column before recording the migration.
          // Treat those already-applied DDL operations as successful.
          if(message.includes('duplicate column name')||message.includes('already exists'))continue;
          throw error;
        }
      }
    }
    function repairFeatureSchema(){
      // Repair databases that recorded a release migration before every feature table/column was created.
      // All statements are idempotent; duplicate-column and existing-index errors are intentionally ignored.
      for(const migration of migrations.filter(item=>item.version>=34)){
        if(migration.sql.trim())runMigrationSql(migration.sql);
      }
    }
    async function migrate(onProgress=()=>{}){
      onProgress('Checking database structure…');
      if(!hasTable('schema_migrations'))db.run('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_migrations (version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, applied_at TEXT NOT NULL)');
      const applied=new Set(query('SELECT version FROM schema_migrations').map(r=>Number(r.version)));
      const pending=migrations.filter(migration=>!applied.has(migration.version));
      for(let index=0;index<pending.length;index++){
        const migration=pending[index];
        onProgress(`Updating health database ${index+1} of ${pending.length}…`);
        const backup=db.export();
        try{
          db.run('BEGIN');
          if(migration.sql.trim())runMigrationSql(migration.sql);
          db.run('INSERT OR IGNORE INTO schema_migrations(version,name,applied_at) VALUES (?,?,?)',[migration.version,migration.name,new Date().toISOString()]);
          db.run('COMMIT');
        }catch(error){
          try{db.run('ROLLBACK')}catch{}
          db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));
          throw new Error(`Database migration ${migration.version} failed: ${error.message}`);
        }
      }
      const repairMarker=`feature_schema_repaired_v${TARGET_SCHEMA_VERSION}`;
      const alreadyRepaired=hasTable('settings')&&query('SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key=?',[repairMarker])[0]?.value==='1';
      const needsRepair=pending.length===0&&!alreadyRepaired;
      const backup=db.export();
      try{
        onProgress('Finalizing database structure…');
        db.run('BEGIN');
        if(needsRepair)repairFeatureSchema();
        reconcileImportSchema({apply:true});
        if(hasTable('settings'))db.run('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO settings(key,value) VALUES (?,?)',[repairMarker,'1']);
        db.run('COMMIT');
      }catch(error){try{db.run('ROLLBACK')}catch{}db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));throw new Error(`Database schema reconciliation failed: ${error.message}`)}
      if(hasTable('meal_date_index')){onProgress('Indexing meal history…');normalizeHistoricalMeals()}
      onProgress('Saving database…');
      await persist();
    }
    export async function openDatabase({onProgress=()=>{}}={}){
      if(db){onProgress('Database ready');return db}
      onProgress('Loading database engine…');
      SQL=await initSqlJs({locateFile:()=>wasmUrl});
      onProgress('Opening saved health data…');
      const bytes=await loadBytes();
      db=bytes?new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(bytes)):new SQL.Database();
      await migrate(onProgress);
      onProgress('Database ready');
      return db;
    }
    export async function persist(){if(db)await saveBytes(db.export())}
    export async function resetDatabase(){db=new SQL.Database();await migrate();return db}
    const normalizeBindValue=value=>{
      if(value===undefined)return null;
      if(value===null||typeof value==='string'||typeof value==='number')return value;
      if(typeof value==='boolean')return value?1:0;
      if(value instanceof Date)return value.toISOString();
      return String(value);
    };
    const normalizeParams=params=>Array.isArray(params)?params.map(normalizeBindValue):params;
    export function query(sql,params=[]){const stmt=db.prepare(sql);stmt.bind(normalizeParams(params));const rows=[];while(stmt.step())rows.push(stmt.getAsObject());stmt.free();return rows}
    export async function run(sql,params=[]){db.run(sql,normalizeParams(params));await persist()}
    export async function transaction(callback){const backup=db.export();const savepoint=`fizz_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;try{db.run(`SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`);await callback({run:(sql,params=[])=>db.run(sql,normalizeParams(params)),query});db.run(`RELEASE SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`);await persist()}catch(error){try{db.run(`ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`);db.run(`RELEASE SAVEPOINT ${savepoint}`)}catch{}db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));await persist();throw error}}
    export async function prepareWorkbookImport(){const backup=db.export();try{await createSafetyBackup('Before workbook import');const report=reconcileImportSchema({apply:true});if(hasTable('meal_date_index'))normalizeHistoricalMeals();await persist();return report}catch(error){db=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(backup));await persist();throw new Error(`Schema preparation failed: ${error.message}`)}}
    
    export async function recordImportFailure({fileName='',durationMs=0,errorMessage='' }={}){
      if(!db)return;
      try{
        reconcileImportSchema({apply:true});
        db.run('INSERT INTO import_history(imported_at,file_name,foods,pantry,recipes,warnings,status,duration_ms,error_message) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[
          new Date().toISOString(),fileName,0,0,0,0,'failed',Number(durationMs)||0,String(errorMessage||'Import failed')
        ]);
        await persist();
      }catch{}
    }
    
    export function exportDatabase(){return db.export()}
    export async function importDatabase(bytes){const candidate=new SQL.Database(new Uint8Array(bytes));const prior=db;db=candidate;try{await migrate()}catch(error){db=prior;throw error}await persist()}
    export function databaseStatus(){
      const count=table=>hasTable(table)?Number(query(`SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM ${safeIdentifier(table)}`)[0]?.count||0):0;
      const latest=hasTable('import_history')?query('SELECT * FROM import_history ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1')[0]||null:null;
      const version=hasTable('schema_migrations')?Number(query('SELECT MAX(version) AS version FROM schema_migrations')[0]?.version||0):0;
      const compatibility=reconcileImportSchema({apply:false});
      const foodsWithNutrition=hasTable('foods')?Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=1')[0]?.count||0):0;
      const foodsMissingNutrition=hasTable('foods')?Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=0')[0]?.count||0):0;
      const mealsPendingNutrition=hasTable('meals')?Number(query('SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM meals WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=0')[0]?.count||0):0;
      const missingNutritionFoods=hasTable('foods')?query(`SELECT food_id,name,category,default_serving,unit FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(nutrition_known,0)=0 ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 50`):[];
      const nutritionCoverage=count('foods')?Math.round((foodsWithNutrition/count('foods'))*100):0;
      const pantryNutritionIssues=hasTable('pantry')&&hasTable('foods')?query(`SELECT p.pantry_id,p.item,p.food_id,f.name AS linked_food,
        COALESCE(f.nutrition_known,0) AS nutrition_known,COALESCE(f.calories,0) AS calories
        FROM pantry p LEFT JOIN foods f ON UPPER(f.food_id)=UPPER(p.food_id)
        WHERE p.on_hand='Yes' AND (f.food_id IS NULL OR COALESCE(f.nutrition_known,0)=0 OR
          (COALESCE(f.calories,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.protein,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.carbs,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.fat,0)=0 AND COALESCE(f.fiber,0)=0))
        ORDER BY p.item COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 50`):[];
      const history=hasTable('meals')?query(`SELECT MIN(consumed_local_date) earliest,MAX(consumed_local_date) latest,COUNT(*) total_meals,COUNT(DISTINCT consumed_local_date) total_days FROM meals`)[0]||{}:{};
      const mealDates=hasTable('meal_date_index')?query('SELECT meal_date,consumed_count,planned_count FROM meal_date_index ORDER BY meal_date'):[];
      const safetyBackups=hasTable('safety_backup_log')?count('safety_backup_log'):0;
      return {schemaVersion:version,targetSchemaVersion:TARGET_SCHEMA_VERSION,foods:count('foods'),foodsWithNutrition,foodsMissingNutrition,missingNutritionFoods,nutritionCoverage,mealsPendingNutrition,pantry:count('pantry'),recipes:count('recipes'),meals:count('meals'),latest,compatibility,pantryNutritionIssues,history,mealDates,safetyBackups};
    }

    const localDateKey=(date=new Date())=>{const y=date.getFullYear(),m=String(date.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'),d=String(date.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');return `${y}-${m}-${d}`};
    const today=()=>localDateKey();
    const toDateTimeLocal=(date=new Date())=>{const y=date.getFullYear(),m=String(date.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'),d=String(date.getDate()).padStart(2,'0'),h=String(date.getHours()).padStart(2,'0'),min=String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');return `${y}-${m}-${d}T${h}:${min}`};
    const storedDateTimeLocal=value=>{if(!value)return toDateTimeLocal();const parsed=new Date(value);return Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())?String(value).slice(0,16):toDateTimeLocal(parsed)};
    const PACKAGE_UNITS=new Set(['jar','bag','box','bottle','container','package','pack','carton','tub','can']);
    const normalizeUnit=u=>String(u||'').trim().toLowerCase().replace(/s$/,'');
    const isPackageUnit=u=>PACKAGE_UNITS.has(normalizeUnit(u));
    const optionalQuery=(sql,params=[])=>{try{return query(sql,params)}catch(error){console.warn('Optional dashboard data unavailable:',error);return []}};
    const quantityLabel=(amount,unit)=>{const n=Number(amount);if(!Number.isFinite(n))return `Quantity not recorded`;const u=unit||'serving';return `${n%1===0?n:n.toFixed(1)} ${u}${n===1?'':'s'}`};
    const canonicalIngredientIdentity=row=>{const rawId=row?.food_id??row?.food?.food_id??row?.ingredient_id;const id=String(rawId??'').trim().toLowerCase();if(id&&id!=='undefined'&&id!=='null')return `id:${id}`;const name=String(row?.food?.name??row?.ingredient_name??'').trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ');return name?`name:${name}`:''};
    const consumptionServing=food=>{const n=Number(food?.default_serving)||1;const u=normalizeUnit(food?.unit);if(u==='g'&&n<=1&&/(peanut|almond|cashew|pistachio|walnut|nut)/i.test(food?.name||''))return 34;return n};
    function resolvePantryFood(pantry){
     const pantryName=String(pantry.item||'').toLowerCase().replace(/^365\s+/,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();
     const rows=query(`SELECT * FROM foods WHERE UPPER(food_id)=UPPER(?) OR LOWER(name)=LOWER(?) OR LOWER(name)=LOWER(?) OR LOWER(name) LIKE ? ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 80`,[pantry.food_id||'',pantry.item||'',String(pantry.item||'').replace(/^365\s+/i,''),`%${pantryName.split(' ').filter(Boolean).slice(-1)[0]||pantryName}%`]);
     return evaluateDecision('pantry_match',{pantry,foods:rows})[0]?.food||null;
    }
    function Brand(){return <div className="brand-lockup"><img src="/icon-192.png" alt="Fizz Health"/><span>FIZZ HEALTH</span></div>}
    class ErrorBoundary extends Component{
     constructor(props){super(props);this.state={error:null}}
     static getDerivedStateFromError(error){return {error}}
     componentDidCatch(error,info){console.error('Fizz Health widget failed',error,info)}
     render(){if(!this.state.error)return this.props.children;return <div className="widget-error"><HeartPulse/><div><b>{this.props.label||'This section'} could not load</b><span>The rest of Fizz Health is still available.</span><button onClick={()=>this.setState({error:null})}>Try again</button></div></div>}
    }
    const finite=v=>Number.isFinite(Number(v))?Number(v):0;
    function insertRecord(db,table,record){const available=new Set(db.query(`PRAGMA table_info(${table})`).map(x=>x.name));const cols=Object.keys(record).filter(k=>available.has(k));if(!cols.length)throw new Error(`No valid columns for ${table}`);db.run(`INSERT INTO ${table}(${cols.join(',')}) VALUES (${cols.map(()=>'?').join(',')})`,cols.map(k=>record[k]??null));}
    function nutrientSnapshot(source={}){return Object.fromEntries(NUTRIENT_KEYS.map(k=>[k,source[k]===undefined?null:source[k]]));}
    const REQUIRED_NUTRITION_FIELDS=Object.freeze(['calories','protein','carbs','fiber','fat','saturated_fat','trans_fat','cholesterol','sodium','total_sugar','added_sugar']);
    function hasNutritionValue(value){return value!==null&&value!==undefined&&value!==''&&Number.isFinite(Number(value))&&Number(value)>=0}
    function nutritionCompletion(food={}){
     const missing=[];
     if(!(Number(food.default_serving)>0))missing.push({key:'default_serving',label:'Serving size'});
     if(!String(food.unit||'').trim())missing.push({key:'unit',label:'Serving unit'});
     for(const key of REQUIRED_NUTRITION_FIELDS){if(!hasNutritionValue(food[key]))missing.push({key,label:NUTRIENTS.find(n=>n.key===key)?.label||key})}
     return {complete:missing.length===0,missing,requiredCount:REQUIRED_NUTRITION_FIELDS.length+2,presentCount:REQUIRED_NUTRITION_FIELDS.length+2-missing.length};
    }
    
    function getTodayTotals(date=today()){
     const row=optionalQuery(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(calories),0) calories,COALESCE(SUM(protein),0) protein,COALESCE(SUM(carbs),0) carbs,COALESCE(SUM(fiber),0) fiber,COALESCE(SUM(fat),0) fat,COALESCE(SUM(saturated_fat),0) saturated_fat,COALESCE(SUM(sodium),0) sodium FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date=?`,[date])[0];
     return row||{calories:0,protein:0,carbs:0,fiber:0,fat:0,saturated_fat:0,sodium:0};
    }
    
    function getTargets(date=today()){
     const historical=query(`SELECT h.nutrient,h.target_value,h.max_value,h.unit,h.source,h.formula FROM target_history h JOIN (SELECT nutrient,MAX(effective_date) effective_date FROM target_history WHERE effective_date<=? GROUP BY nutrient) x ON x.nutrient=h.nutrient AND x.effective_date=h.effective_date`,[date]);
     const current=query('SELECT * FROM nutrition_targets');
     const historyMap=Object.fromEntries(historical.map(r=>[r.nutrient,r]));
     return Object.fromEntries(current.map(r=>{const h=historyMap[r.nutrient]||{};const useOverride=Number(r.derived)!==1;return [r.nutrient,{minimum:r.override_minimum!=null&&useOverride?Number(r.override_minimum):r.minimum_value==null?null:Number(r.minimum_value),target:r.override_target!=null&&useOverride?Number(r.override_target):Number(h.target_value??r.target_value)||0,max:r.override_max!=null&&useOverride?Number(r.override_max):(h.max_value??r.max_value)==null?null:Number(h.max_value??r.max_value),unit:r.unit||h.unit||'',source:r.source||h.source||'database',sourceCategory:r.source_category||'',formula:r.formula||h.formula||'',behavior:r.behavior_type||'goal',derived:Number(r.derived)===1,supportsDerived:Number(r.supports_derived)===1,notes:r.recommendation_notes||''}] }));
    }
    function calculateAge(dateOfBirth){if(!dateOfBirth)return null;const dob=new Date(`${dateOfBirth}T12:00:00`),now=new Date();if(Number.isNaN(dob.getTime()))return null;let age=now.getFullYear()-dob.getFullYear();const m=now.getMonth()-dob.getMonth();if(m<0||(m===0&&now.getDate()<dob.getDate()))age--;return age}
    function estimateMaintenance(){
     const weights=query("SELECT local_date,value_primary FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type='weight' ORDER BY local_date ASC");
     const mealDays=query("SELECT consumed_local_date AS local_date,SUM(calories) calories FROM meals WHERE nutrition_known=1 GROUP BY consumed_local_date ORDER BY consumed_local_date ASC");
     const stepDays=query("SELECT local_date,MAX(value_primary) steps FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type='steps' GROUP BY local_date ORDER BY local_date ASC");
     return evaluateDecision('maintenance_estimate',{weights,mealDays,stepDays});
    }
    function App(){
     const [ready,setReady]=useState(false),[bootError,setBootError]=useState(''),[bootStage,setBootStage]=useState('Preparing Fizz Health…'),[tab,setTab]=useState('today'),[tick,setTick]=useState(0),[pendingFood,setPendingFood]=useState(null);
     const boot=async()=>{
      setBootError('');setReady(false);setBootStage('Preparing Fizz Health…');
      try{
       await openDatabase({onProgress:setBootStage});
       setBootStage('Refreshing today’s health data…');
       await backfillCurrentRecipeMealsOnce();
       setBootStage('Ready');
       setReady(true);
      }catch(error){
       console.error('Fizz Health startup failed',error);
       setBootError(error?.message||String(error));
      }
     };
     useEffect(()=>{
      boot();
      if(!('serviceWorker'in navigator))return;
      let reloading=false;
      const onControllerChange=()=>{if(reloading)return;reloading=true;window.location.reload()};
      navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('controllerchange',onControllerChange);
      navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js').then(reg=>{
       const activate=worker=>worker?.postMessage({type:'SKIP_WAITING'});
       if(reg.waiting)activate(reg.waiting);
       reg.addEventListener('updatefound',()=>{const worker=reg.installing;worker?.addEventListener('statechange',()=>{if(worker.state==='installed'&&navigator.serviceWorker.controller)activate(worker)})});
       reg.update().catch(()=>{});
      }).catch(error=>console.warn('Service worker registration failed',error));
      const progressNotice=window.setTimeout(()=>{if(!document.querySelector('.app'))setBootStage(stage=>stage.includes('Still working')?stage:`${stage} Still working…`)},20000);
      return()=>{window.clearTimeout(progressNotice);navigator.serviceWorker.removeEventListener('controllerchange',onControllerChange)};
     },[]);
     useEffect(()=>{
      const viewport=window.visualViewport;
      let focusTimer=0;
      const keepFocusedControlVisible=()=>{
       clearTimeout(focusTimer);
       focusTimer=window.setTimeout(()=>{
        const active=document.activeElement;
        if(!active||!active.matches?.('input,textarea,select,[contenteditable=\"true\"]'))return;
        const scroller=active.closest('.editor-scroll,.health-form,.nutrition-scroll,.modal-backdrop>.panel,.modal-backdrop>form.panel');
        if(!scroller)return;
        const target=active.closest('label,.field-group,.chatgpt-handoff')||active;
        target.scrollIntoView({block:'center',inline:'nearest',behavior:'smooth'});
       },90);
      };
      const updateViewport=()=>{
       const height=Math.round(viewport?.height||window.innerHeight);
       const top=Math.max(0,Math.round(viewport?.offsetTop||0));
       const keyboardOpen=height<window.innerHeight-120;
       document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--visual-viewport-height',`${height}px`);
       document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--visual-viewport-top',`${top}px`);
       document.documentElement.classList.toggle('keyboard-open',keyboardOpen);
       if(keyboardOpen)keepFocusedControlVisible();
      };
      updateViewport();
      viewport?.addEventListener('resize',updateViewport);
      viewport?.addEventListener('scroll',updateViewport);
      window.addEventListener('orientationchange',updateViewport);
      document.addEventListener('focusin',keepFocusedControlVisible);
      return()=>{clearTimeout(focusTimer);viewport?.removeEventListener('resize',updateViewport);viewport?.removeEventListener('scroll',updateViewport);window.removeEventListener('orientationchange',updateViewport);document.removeEventListener('focusin',keepFocusedControlVisible);document.documentElement.classList.remove('keyboard-open')};
     },[]);
     const refresh=()=>setTick(x=>x+1);
     const visit=id=>{const usage=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('fizz-nav-usage')||'{}');usage[id]={count:Number(usage[id]?.count||0)+1,recent:Date.now()};localStorage.setItem('fizz-nav-usage',JSON.stringify(usage));setTab(id)};
     if(!ready)return <div className="splash">Fizz Health<br/><small>{bootError||bootStage}</small>{bootError&&<><span className="boot-diagnostic">Startup stage: {bootStage}</span><button className="retry-boot" onClick={boot}>Try again</button></>}</div>;
     const navItems=[{id:'today',I:Home,label:'Home'},{id:'food',I:UtensilsCrossed,label:'Food'},{id:'health',I:HeartPulse,label:'Health'},{id:'data',I:Settings,label:'Settings'}];
     const foodTabs=new Set(['food','food-intelligence','food-planner','food-recommendations','food-upcoming','pantry','shopping','restaurants','add']);
     const isNavActive=id=>id==='food'?foodTabs.has(tab):tab===id;
     return <main className="app"><section className="content">
      {tab==='today'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Today"><Today tick={tick} openGear={()=>visit('data')} onLogRecommendation={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}} navigate={visit}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='add'&&<AddMeal refresh={refresh} done={()=>visit('today')} onBack={()=>visit('food')} navigate={visit} initialFood={pendingFood} clearInitial={()=>setPendingFood(null)}/>} {tab==='food'&&<FoodHub navigate={visit}/>} {tab==='food-intelligence'&&<FoodIntelligencePage tick={tick} onBack={()=>visit('add')} onLogFood={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}}/>} {tab==='food-planner'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Meal planner"><FoodPlannerPage tick={tick} onBack={()=>visit('food')}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='food-recommendations'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Chef’s Recommendations"><FoodRecommendationsPage tick={tick} onBack={()=>visit('food')} onLog={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='food-upcoming'&&<UpcomingMealsPage onBack={()=>visit('food')} refresh={refresh}/>} {tab==='pantry'&&<Pantry tick={tick} onLogFood={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}}/>} {tab==='shopping'&&<ShoppingHub onBack={()=>visit('food')}/>} {tab==='health'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Health"><Health tick={tick} refresh={refresh}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='data'&&<Data refresh={refresh}/>} {tab==='restaurants'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Restaurants"><Restaurants refresh={refresh} done={()=>visit('food')} openData={()=>visit('data')}/></ErrorBoundary>} </section>
      {tab==='today'&&<button className="universal-fab" aria-label="Add food" onClick={()=>visit('add')}><Plus/></button>}
      <footer>Fizz Health v{VERSION}</footer><nav aria-label="Primary navigation">{navItems.map(({id,I,label})=><button key={id} className={isNavActive(id)?'active':''} aria-current={isNavActive(id)?'page':undefined} onClick={()=>visit(id)}><I/><span>{label}</span></button>)}</nav>
     </main>
    }

     const remaining=[
      {id:'food-recommendations',Icon:ChefHat,title:'Recommendations',description:'See goal-aware meals ranked from pantry foods and recipes.'},
      {id:'food-upcoming',Icon:ClipboardCopy,title:'Upcoming meals',description:'Review planned meals and restaurant commitments.'},

     ];
     const subsystems=[

      {id:'restaurants',Icon:UtensilsCrossed,title:'Restaurants',label:'Open restaurants'},

     ];
     return <><div className="standard-page-head food-page-head"><span></span><h2>Food</h2><button type="button" onClick={()=>navigate('add')} aria-label="Add food"><Plus/></button></div><header><Brand/><small>FOOD</small><h1>Food</h1><p>Choose where you want to work.</p></header>

     <section className="food-hub-grid">{remaining.map(({id,Icon,title,description})=><button key={id} onClick={()=>navigate(id)}><Icon/><div><b>{title}</b><span>{description}</span></div><ChevronRight/></button>)}</section></>
    }
    
    function FoodPlannerPage({tick,onBack}){
     const targets=getTargets();
     return <><div className="standard-form-header planner-standard-header"><button type="button" onClick={onBack} aria-label="Close Meal Planner"><X/></button><div><small>FOOD</small><h2>Meal Planner</h2></div><span aria-hidden="true"/></div><ForwardMealPlanner tick={tick} targets={targets}/></>
    }
    function FoodRecommendationsPage({tick,onBack,onLog}){
     const date=today(),targets=getTargets(date);
     const totals=optionalQuery(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(calories),0) calories,COALESCE(SUM(protein),0) protein,COALESCE(SUM(carbs),0) carbs,COALESCE(SUM(fiber),0) fiber,COALESCE(SUM(fat),0) fat,COALESCE(SUM(saturated_fat),0) saturated_fat FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date=?`,[date])[0]||{};
     return <PageShell eyebrow="FOOD" title="Chef’s Recommendations" description="Ranked for today’s remaining nutrition, pantry pressure, and preferences." onBack={onBack}><ChefRecommendations tick={tick} totals={totals} targets={targets} date={date} onLog={onLog}/></PageShell>
    }
    function UpcomingMealsPage({onBack,refresh}){
     const rows=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' AND planned_local_date>=? ORDER BY planned_at ASC LIMIT 250`,[today()]);
     async function cancel(row){if(!confirm(`Cancel ${row.food_name}?`))return;await run(`UPDATE planned_meals SET status='cancelled',updated_at=? WHERE id=?`,[new Date().toISOString(),row.id]);refresh()}
     return <PageShell eyebrow="FOOD" title="Upcoming Meals" description="Review future meals and restaurant commitments." onBack={onBack}><div className="list upcoming-meals">{rows.length?rows.map(row=><div className="item" key={row.id}><div><b>{row.restaurant_name?`${row.restaurant_name} · ${row.food_name}`:row.food_name}</b><span>{new Date(row.planned_at).toLocaleString([],{weekday:'short',month:'short',day:'numeric',hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'})} · {row.meal_type||'Meal'}</span></div><button className="secondary" onClick={()=>cancel(row)}>Cancel</button></div>):<div className="empty">No upcoming meals are planned.</div>}</div></PageShell>
    }
    
    function ShoppingHub({onBack}){
     return <PageShell eyebrow="FOOD" title="Shopping" description="Shopping tools will live here." onBack={onBack}><section className="shopping-placeholder"><Box/><h2>Shopping is ready for its next build.</h2><p>This placeholder keeps the new Food navigation complete without changing pantry or restaurant functionality.</p></section></PageShell>
    }
    
    function SwipeMealCard({row,onEdit,onDelete,onQuickAdd,timeLabel}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false),timer=useRef(null);
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>10||Math.abs(dy)>10)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-88,Math.min(88,dx)));};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const wasMoved=moved.current,left=offset<-45,right=offset>45;start.current=null;setOffset(left?-82:right?82:0);if(!wasMoved&&!left&&!right){clearTimeout(timer.current);timer.current=setTimeout(()=>onEdit(row),140)}};
     return <div className="timeline-entry"><div className="timeline-time">{timeLabel(row.eaten_at)}</div><div className="swipe-shell meal-swipe-shell"><button type="button" className="swipe-quick" aria-label={`Log ${row.food_name} again`} onClick={()=>onQuickAdd(row)}><Plus/><span>Log again</span></button><button type="button" className="swipe-delete" aria-label={`Delete ${row.food_name}`} onClick={()=>onDelete(row)}><Trash2/><span>Delete</span></button><div className="item meal-row swipe-card" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}><div className="meal-main"><b className="meal-title">{row.food_name}</b><em className={Number(row.nutrition_known)===1?'meal-calories':'meal-calories needs-nutrition'}>{Number(row.nutrition_known)===1?`${Math.round(row.calories)} kcal`:'Needs nutrition'}</em><strong className="quantity-badge">{quantityLabel(row.amount,row.unit)}</strong></div></div></div></div>
    }
    function SwipeArchiveCard({children,onOpen,onArchive,onQuickLog,label}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false);
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>8||Math.abs(dy)>8)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-92,Math.min(92,dx)));};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const movedNow=moved.current,left=offset<-45,right=offset>45;start.current=null;setOffset(left?-88:right?88:0);if(!movedNow&&!left&&!right)onOpen?.()};
     const open=offset!==0;
     return <div className={`swipe-shell discovery-swipe${open?' is-open':''}`}><div className="discovery-swipe-rail" aria-hidden={!open}><button type="button" className="swipe-quick" tabIndex={open?0:-1} aria-label={`Quick log ${label}`} onClick={()=>{setOffset(0);onQuickLog?.()}}><Plus/><span>Log</span></button><button type="button" className="swipe-delete" tabIndex={open?0:-1} aria-label={`Archive ${label}`} onClick={()=>{setOffset(0);onArchive?.()}}><Archive/><span>Archive</span></button></div><div className="swipe-card" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}>{children}</div></div>
    }
    const UNIT_GROUPS={mass:['g','oz','lb'],volume:['ml','l','cup','tbsp','tsp'],count:['serving','item','link','bar','container','package']};
    function unitOptions(base){const u=normalizeUnit(base);if(['g','oz','lb'].includes(u))return UNIT_GROUPS.mass;if(['ml','l','cup','tbsp','tsp'].includes(u))return UNIT_GROUPS.volume;return Array.from(new Set([base||'serving',...UNIT_GROUPS.count]));}
    function convertAmount(amount,from,to){const n=finite(amount),f=normalizeUnit(from),t=normalizeUnit(to);if(f===t)return n;const mass={g:1,oz:28.349523125,lb:453.59237},volume={ml:1,l:1000,cup:236.588,tbsp:14.7868,tsp:4.92892};if(mass[f]&&mass[t])return n*mass[f]/mass[t];if(volume[f]&&volume[t])return n*volume[f]/volume[t];return null;}
    function SummaryRing({label,value,sub,state='green',icon:Icon=HeartPulse,index=0,redrawKey=0,onClick}){
     const [drawn,setDrawn]=useState(0),pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,finite(value)));
     useEffect(()=>{setDrawn(0);const t=setTimeout(()=>setDrawn(pct),160+index*150);return()=>clearTimeout(t)},[pct,index,redrawKey]);
     return <button type="button" className={`summary-ring ${state} ${onClick?'tappable':''}`} onClick={onClick}><div className="summary-ring-visual" style={{'--ring-progress':`${drawn*3.6}deg`}}><Icon/><strong>{Math.round(pct)}%</strong></div><b>{label}</b><span>{sub}</span>{onClick&&<small className="tap-hint">Tap for details</small>}</button>
    }
    function DecisionDetails({title,decision,onClose,children}){
     const [showRaw,setShowRaw]=useState(false),[showTechnical,setShowTechnical]=useState(false);
     if(!decision)return null;
     const validation=validateDecisionTrace(decision,{throwOnError:false});
     if(!validation.valid)return <div className="decision-page" role="alertdialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>DECISION TRACE ERROR</small><h2>{title}</h2></div><button type="button" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close decision details"><X/></button></header><section className="decision-block warning"><h3>Unable to display explanation</h3><p>{validation.errors.join('; ')}</p></section></div></div>;
     const factors=decision.factors||[], dataUsed=decision.dataUsed||[], audit=buildDecisionAudit(decision), explanation=buildDecisionExplanation(decision);
     const formatValue=v=>v==null?'—':typeof v==='object'?JSON.stringify(v):String(v);
     const signed=v=>`${Number(v)>=0?'+':''}${v}`;
     return <div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label={`${title} decision details`}><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>WHY THIS DECISION?</small><h2>{title}</h2><p>{audit.decisionType} · {audit.status}{audit.rank?` · Rank #${audit.rank}`:''}</p></div><button type="button" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close decision details"><X/></button></header>
     <section className="decision-hero"><div><span>Score</span><strong>{decision.score ?? '—'}</strong></div><div><span>Confidence</span><strong>{decision.confidence ?? '—'}%</strong></div><p>{explanation.summary}</p></section>
     <section className="decision-block decision-explanation"><h3>What drove the result</h3><div className="driver-grid"><div><span>Largest positive</span><b className="positive">{explanation.strongestPositive?`${explanation.strongestPositive.label} (+${explanation.strongestPositive.impact})`:'None recorded'}</b></div><div><span>Largest negative</span><b className="negative">{explanation.strongestNegative?`${explanation.strongestNegative.label} (${explanation.strongestNegative.impact})`:'None recorded'}</b></div></div><div className="next-best-action"><span>Best next action</span><strong>{explanation.improvement}</strong></div></section>
     <section className="decision-block confidence-explanation"><h3>How certain is this?</h3><p>{explanation.confidenceSummary}</p><p className={audit.missingCount?'negative':'positive'}>{explanation.completeness}</p></section>
     {explanation.projections.length>0&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Expected effect</h3><div className="projection-list">{explanation.projections.map(row=><div key={row.key}><span>{row.label}</span>{row.kind==='change'?<b>{row.before} <em>→</em> {row.after}</b>:<b>{row.value}</b>}</div>)}</div></section>}
     {explanation.comparison&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Why this rank?</h3><p>{explanation.comparison}</p></section>}
     {children}
     <section className="decision-block action"><h3>Recommended action</h3><p>{decision.action||'Maintain the current plan.'}</p></section>
     <section className="decision-block technical-disclosure"><button type="button" className="trace-toggle" onClick={()=>setShowTechnical(value=>!value)}>{showTechnical?<ChevronUp/>:<ChevronDown/>}{showTechnical?'Hide':'Show'} technical details</button>{showTechnical&&<div className="technical-content">
      {decision.methodology&&<section><h3>Decision method</h3><p>{decision.methodology}</p></section>}
      <div className="trace-audit-strip" aria-label="Decision audit summary"><div><span>Factors</span><b>{audit.factorCount}</b></div><div><span>Sources</span><b>{audit.dataSourceCount}</b></div><div><span>Missing</span><b className={audit.missingCount?'negative':'positive'}>{audit.missingCount}</b></div><div><span>Net factor impact</span><b className={audit.factorImpact>=0?'positive':'negative'}>{signed(audit.factorImpact)}</b></div></div>
      {factors.length>0&&<section><h3>Score audit</h3><div className="score-equation"><span>Inferred starting point <b>{audit.inferredBaseline}</b></span><span>Factor adjustments <b className={audit.factorImpact>=0?'positive':'negative'}>{signed(audit.factorImpact)}</b></span><span>Displayed score <b>{audit.displayedScore}</b></span></div><p className="audit-note">The engine caps the final score between 0 and 100. The starting point is inferred from the saved trace so every recorded adjustment remains visible.</p>{audit.groups.map(group=><div className="factor-group" key={group.category}><header><b>{group.label}</b><strong className={group.netImpact>=0?'positive':'negative'}>{signed(group.netImpact)}</strong></header><div className="factor-list">{group.factors.map((f,i)=><div key={`${f.label}-${i}`}><span>{f.label}</span><b className={Number(f.impact)>0?'positive':Number(f.impact)<0?'negative':'neutral'}>{signed(f.impact)}</b></div>)}</div></div>)}</section>}
      {decision.positive?.length>0&&<section><h3>What helped</h3>{decision.positive.map(x=><p key={x}>✓ {x}</p>)}</section>}{decision.negative?.length>0&&<section><h3>What hurt</h3>{decision.negative.map(x=><p key={x}>− {x}</p>)}</section>}
      {dataUsed.length>0&&<section><h3>Evidence used</h3>{dataUsed.map(x=><p key={x}>• {x}</p>)}</section>}
      <section><h3>Evaluated inputs</h3><div className="decision-data">{Object.entries(decision.inputs||{}).map(([k,v])=><div key={k}><span>{k.replaceAll('_',' ')}</span><b>{formatValue(v)}</b></div>)}</div></section>
      {decision.missing?.length>0&&<section className="technical-warning"><h3>Missing information</h3>{decision.missing.map(x=><p key={x}>{x}</p>)}</section>}
     </div>}</section>
     <section className="decision-block trace-raw"><button type="button" className="trace-toggle" onClick={()=>setShowRaw(value=>!value)}>{showRaw?<ChevronUp/>:<ChevronDown/>}{showRaw?'Hide':'Show'} raw decision trace</button>{showRaw&&<pre>{serializeDecisionTrace(decision)}</pre>}</section>
     <footer className="decision-meta">Subject {String(decision.subjectId)} · Calculated {new Date(decision.evaluatedAt||Date.now()).toLocaleString()} · Engine {decision.engineVersion||VERSION} · Rules {decision.rulesVersion||'not recorded'}</footer></div></div>
    }
    
    function DecisionSimulator({totals,plannedTotals,targets,definitions,steps,coverage,onClose}){
     const nutrientFields=[['calories','Calories','kcal'],['protein','Protein','g'],['carbs','Carbohydrates','g'],['fat','Fat','g'],['fiber','Fiber','g'],['saturated_fat','Saturated fat','g'],['sodium','Sodium','mg'],['added_sugar','Added sugar','g'],['alcohol','Alcohol','servings']];
     const emptyNutrition=()=>Object.fromEntries(nutrientFields.map(([key])=>[key,'0']));
     const defaultMeal=(label,values={})=>({id:`option-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,label,nutrition:{...emptyNutrition(),...values}});
     const [mode,setMode]=useState('meal'),[form,setForm]=useState({label:'Hypothetical meal',additionalSteps:'0',add:{...emptyNutrition(),calories:'400',protein:'30',fiber:'8',saturated_fat:'3'},remove:emptyNutrition()}),[options,setOptions]=useState([defaultMeal('Option A',{calories:'500',protein:'35',fiber:'8',saturated_fat:'4'}),defaultMeal('Option B',{calories:'650',protein:'30',fiber:'4',saturated_fat:'9'})]),[result,setResult]=useState(null),[memoryNotice,setMemoryNotice]=useState(null),[memoryCount,setMemoryCount]=useState(()=>readDecisionMemory().length);
     const set=(group,key,value)=>setForm(x=>group?({...x,[group]:{...x[group],[key]:value}}):({...x,[key]:value}));
     const selectMode=next=>{setMode(next);setResult(null);setForm(x=>({...x,label:next==='steps'?'Additional walk':next==='substitution'?'Meal substitution':'Hypothetical meal',additionalSteps:next==='steps'?'3000':'0'}))};
     const nutritionFrom=group=>Object.fromEntries(nutrientFields.map(([key])=>[key,finite(form[group][key])]));
     const optionNutrition=option=>Object.fromEntries(nutrientFields.map(([key])=>[key,finite(option.nutrition[key])]));
     const updateOption=(index,key,value)=>setOptions(list=>list.map((option,i)=>i===index?(key==='label'?{...option,label:value}:{...option,nutrition:{...option.nutrition,[key]:value}}):option));
     const addOption=()=>setOptions(list=>list.length>=4?list:[...list,defaultMeal(`Option ${String.fromCharCode(65+list.length)}`,{calories:'400',protein:'25',fiber:'6',saturated_fat:'4'})]);
     const removeOption=index=>setOptions(list=>list.length<=2?list:list.filter((_,i)=>i!==index));
     const runSimulation=()=>{const next=mode==='compare'?evaluateDecision('comparison',{scenarios:options.map(option=>({id:option.id,label:option.label||'Unnamed option',mode:'meal',nutritionDelta:optionNutrition(option)})),totals,plannedTotals,targets,definitions,steps,coverage}):evaluateDecision('simulation',{scenario:{id:`simulation-${Date.now()}`,mode,label:form.label||'Hypothetical scenario',nutritionDelta:mode==='steps'?{}:nutritionFrom('add'),removeNutrition:mode==='substitution'?nutritionFrom('remove'):{},additionalSteps:finite(form.additionalSteps)},totals,plannedTotals,targets,definitions,steps,coverage});const trace=mode==='compare'?next.trace:next.trace;const remembered=rememberDecision(trace,{source:mode==='compare'?'meal_comparison':'simulation'});setMemoryNotice(remembered.match);setMemoryCount(remembered.records.length);setResult(next)};
     const metricClass=value=>value>0?'positive':value<0?'negative':'neutral'; const signed=value=>`${value>0?'+':''}${Math.round(value*10)/10}`;
     const NutritionInputs=({group,title})=><fieldset className="simulation-fieldset"><legend>{title}</legend><div className="simulation-grid expanded">{nutrientFields.map(([key,label,unit])=><label key={`${group}-${key}`}>{label} ({unit})<input type="number" step="any" inputMode="decimal" value={form[group][key]} onChange={e=>set(group,key,e.target.value)}/></label>)}</div></fieldset>;
     return <div className="decision-page simulation-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Decision Simulator"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>SIMULATION — NOT LOGGED</small><h2>What if?</h2><p>Preview, compare, or improve choices before changing your log.</p></div><button type="button" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close simulation"><X/></button></header><div className="simulation-tabs four"><button className={mode==='meal'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('meal')}>Add meal</button><button className={mode==='substitution'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('substitution')}>Substitute</button><button className={mode==='compare'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('compare')}>Compare</button><button className={mode==='steps'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('steps')}>Walk more</button></div>{mode==='compare'?<section className="comparison-options">{options.map((option,index)=><fieldset className="comparison-option" key={option.id}><legend>Option {index+1}</legend><div className="comparison-option-head"><label>Meal name<input value={option.label} onChange={e=>updateOption(index,'label',e.target.value)}/></label>{options.length>2&&<button type="button" onClick={()=>removeOption(index)} aria-label={`Remove ${option.label}`}><Trash2/></button>}</div><div className="simulation-grid expanded">{nutrientFields.map(([key,label,unit])=><label key={`${option.id}-${key}`}>{label} ({unit})<input type="number" step="any" inputMode="decimal" value={option.nutrition[key]} onChange={e=>updateOption(index,key,e.target.value)}/></label>)}</div></fieldset>)}{options.length<4&&<button type="button" className="add-comparison" onClick={addOption}><Plus/> Add option</button>}</section>:<section className="simulation-form"><label>Scenario name<input value={form.label} onChange={e=>set(null,'label',e.target.value)}/></label>{mode==='meal'&&<NutritionInputs group="add" title="Meal nutrition"/>}{mode==='substitution'&&<><NutritionInputs group="remove" title="Remove from current plan"/><NutritionInputs group="add" title="Add instead"/></>}{mode==='steps'&&<label>Additional steps<input type="number" inputMode="numeric" value={form.additionalSteps} onChange={e=>set(null,'additionalSteps',e.target.value)}/></label>}{mode!=='steps'&&<label className="optional-steps">Optional additional steps<input type="number" inputMode="numeric" value={form.additionalSteps} onChange={e=>set(null,'additionalSteps',e.target.value)}/></label>}</section>}<button className="primary simulation-run" onClick={runSimulation}>{mode==='compare'?'Compare meals':'Run simulation'}</button><section className="decision-memory-bar"><div><b>Decision memory</b><span>{memoryCount} saved decision{memoryCount===1?'':'s'} on this device</span></div>{memoryCount>0&&<button type="button" onClick={()=>{clearDecisionMemory();setMemoryCount(0);setMemoryNotice(null)}}>Clear</button>}</section>{memoryNotice&&<section className={`decision-memory-notice ${memoryNotice.stale?'stale':memoryNotice.match}`}><b>{memoryNotice.match==='exact'?'Previously evaluated':memoryNotice.match==='context'?'What changed':'New decision'}</b><span>{memoryNotice.summary}</span>{memoryNotice.record&&<small>Prior score {memoryNotice.record.trace.score} · {new Date(memoryNotice.record.recordedAt).toLocaleString()}</small>}</section>}{result&&mode==='compare'&&<><section className="simulation-banner"><b>Comparison only</b><span>No option was logged or added to your plan.</span></section><section className="comparison-winner"><span>Best overall choice</span><strong>{result.winner.scenario.label}</strong><p>{result.trace.comparison.summary}</p></section><section className="comparison-ranking">{result.ranked.map(entry=><article className={entry.rank===1?'winner':''} key={entry.scenario.id}><b>#{entry.rank} {entry.scenario.label}</b><div><span>Score <strong>{entry.score}</strong></span><span>LDL <strong>{entry.ldl}</strong></span><span>Limits exceeded <strong>{entry.exceeded}</strong></span></div>{entry.rank>1&&<small>{result.winner.score-entry.score} points behind winner</small>}</article>)}</section><section className="comparison-metrics"><h3>Metric-by-metric</h3>{nutrientFields.map(([key,label,unit])=><div key={key}><span>{label}</span>{result.ranked.map(entry=>{const row=entry.simulation.nutrientImpacts.find(x=>x.key===key);const value=row?.after??finite(totals[key])+finite(plannedTotals[key]);return <b key={entry.scenario.id}>{Math.round(value*10)/10} {unit}</b>})}</div>)}</section><DecisionDetails title={result.winner.scenario.label} decision={result.trace} onClose={()=>setResult(null)}/></>}{result&&mode!=='compare'&&<><section className="simulation-banner"><b>Simulation only</b><span>No meals, steps, pantry quantities, or health records were changed.</span></section><section className="simulation-summary"><div className="metric-card"><span>Decision score</span><strong>{result.trace.score}</strong><em>{result.trace.status}</em></div><div className="metric-card"><span>LDL Support</span><strong>{result.after.ldl.score}</strong><em className={metricClass(result.delta.ldl)}>{signed(result.delta.ldl)}</em></div><div className="metric-card"><span>Step likelihood</span><strong>{result.after.steps.score}%</strong><em className={metricClass(result.delta.stepsLikelihood)}>{signed(result.delta.stepsLikelihood)}</em></div></section>{result.nutrientImpacts.length>0&&<section className="decision-block simulation-impact"><h3>Projected daily totals</h3><div className="impact-table">{result.nutrientImpacts.map(row=><div key={row.key}><span>{row.label}</span><b>{Math.round(row.before*10)/10} → {Math.round(row.after*10)/10} {row.unit}</b><em className={metricClass(row.behavior==='limit'?-row.delta:row.delta)}>{signed(row.delta)}</em><small className={row.status==='exceeded'?'negative':row.status==='goal_met'?'positive':'neutral'}>{row.status.replaceAll('_',' ')}</small></div>)}</div></section>}{result.suggestions.length>0&&<section className="decision-block simulation-suggestions"><h3>Best improvements</h3>{result.suggestions.map((item,index)=><p key={item}><b>{index+1}</b>{item}</p>)}</section>}<section className="before-after"><div><span>Top priority</span><b>{result.before.nutrients[0]?.definition?.label||'—'} → {result.after.nutrients[0]?.definition?.label||'—'}</b></div></section><DecisionDetails title={result.scenario.label} decision={result.trace} onClose={()=>setResult(null)}/></>}</div></div>
    }
    function recipeSnapshotFrom(runQuery,recipeId){
     const recipeRows=runQuery(`SELECT * FROM recipes WHERE recipe_id=? OR recipe_name=(SELECT recipe_name FROM recipes WHERE recipe_id=? LIMIT 1) ORDER BY id`,[recipeId,recipeId]);
     if(!recipeRows.length)return null;
     const foods=runQuery('SELECT * FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY food_id');
     return buildRecipeSnapshot(recipeRows,foods);
    }
    async function backfillCurrentRecipeMealsOnce(){
     const flag='recipe_nutrient_backfill_141037',todayKey=today(),now=new Date().toISOString();
