     {type:'steps',label:'Steps',unit:'steps',Icon:Footprints,step:'1',placeholder:'5524'},
     {type:'waist',label:'Waist',unit:'in',Icon:Ruler,step:'0.1',placeholder:'36.5',optional:true},
     {type:'workout',label:'Workout',unit:'completed',Icon:Dumbbell,step:'1',placeholder:'1',boolean:true,optional:true},
     {type:'sleep',label:'Sleep',unit:'hours',Icon:Moon,step:'0.1',placeholder:'7.5',optional:true}
    ];
    const metricDefinition=type=>HEALTH_METRICS.find(m=>m.type===type)||HEALTH_METRICS[0];
    const healthValue=(row,def)=>{if(!row)return 'Not logged';if(def.type==='blood_pressure')return `${Math.round(Number(row.value_primary))}/${Math.round(Number(row.value_secondary))}`;if(def.boolean)return Number(row.value_primary)===1?'Completed':'Not completed';const value=Number(row.value_primary);return `${Number.isInteger(value)?value:value.toFixed(1)} ${def.unit}`};
    function HealthMetricEditor({definition,row,onClose,onSaved}){
     const [primary,setPrimary]=useState(row?.value_primary??(definition.boolean?'1':'')),[secondary,setSecondary]=useState(row?.value_secondary??''),[measuredAt,setMeasuredAt]=useState(()=>row?.measured_at?storedDateTimeLocal(row.measured_at):toDateTimeLocal()),[notes,setNotes]=useState(row?.notes||''),[error,setError]=useState('');
     async function save(){
      const first=definition.boolean?Number(primary):Number(primary);const second=definition.secondaryLabel?Number(secondary):null;
      if(!Number.isFinite(first)||(definition.secondaryLabel&&!Number.isFinite(second))){setError('Enter a valid value.');return}
      const when=new Date(measuredAt);if(Number.isNaN(when.getTime())){setError('Enter a valid date and time.');return}if(!row&&when.getTime()>Date.now()+60000){setError('New readings cannot be dated in the future.');return}
      const iso=when.toISOString(),local=localDateKey(when),now=new Date().toISOString();
      await transaction(async db=>{
       if(row?.id)db.run('UPDATE health_metrics SET value_primary=?,value_secondary=?,unit=?,measured_at=?,local_date=?,notes=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?',[first,second,definition.unit,iso,local,notes||null,now,row.id]);
       else db.run('INSERT INTO health_metrics(metric_type,value_primary,value_secondary,unit,measured_at,local_date,notes,source,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[definition.type,first,second,definition.unit,iso,local,notes||null,'manual',now,now]);
       if(definition.type==='weight')db.run("INSERT INTO settings(key,value) VALUES ('current_weight_lb',?) ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value=excluded.value",[String(first)]);
      });onSaved();
     }
     async function remove(){if(!row?.id||!confirm(`Delete this ${definition.label.toLowerCase()} reading?`))return;await run('DELETE FROM health_metrics WHERE id=?',[row.id]);onSaved()}
     return <div className="modal-backdrop"><div className="panel health-editor"><div className="edit-head"><div><small>{row?'EDIT READING':'NEW READING'}</small><h3>{definition.label}</h3></div><button onClick={onClose}><X/></button></div><div className="health-form">{definition.boolean?<div className="workout-choice"><button className={Number(primary)===1?'active':''} onClick={()=>setPrimary('1')}><Check/> Completed</button><button className={Number(primary)===0?'active':''} onClick={()=>setPrimary('0')}><X/> Not completed</button></div>:<div className={definition.secondaryLabel?'bp-inputs':'single-metric-input'}><label>{definition.secondaryLabel?'Systolic':definition.label}<input autoFocus type="number" inputMode="decimal" step={definition.step} value={primary} placeholder={definition.placeholder} onChange={e=>setPrimary(e.target.value)}/></label>{definition.secondaryLabel&&<label>{definition.secondaryLabel}<input type="number" inputMode="numeric" step="1" value={secondary} placeholder={definition.secondaryPlaceholder} onChange={e=>setSecondary(e.target.value)}/></label>}<strong>{definition.unit}</strong></div>}<label>Date and time<input type="datetime-local" value={measuredAt} max={row?undefined:toDateTimeLocal()} onChange={e=>setMeasuredAt(e.target.value)}/></label><label>Notes <small>optional</small><textarea rows="3" value={notes} onChange={e=>setNotes(e.target.value)} placeholder="Anything useful about this reading"/></label>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div><div className="editor-actions">{row&&<button className="danger-text" onClick={remove}><Trash2/> Delete</button>}<button className="secondary" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</button><button className="primary" onClick={save}><Check/> Save</button></div></div></div>
    }
    function MetricLineChart({rows,definition}){
     const data=[...rows].filter(r=>Number.isFinite(Number(r.value_primary))).sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.measured_at)-new Date(b.measured_at));
     if(!data.length)return <div className="metric-line-chart empty-chart"><b>No readings in this range.</b><span>Add a reading or choose a longer range.</span></div>;
     const primary=data.map(r=>finite(r.value_primary)),secondary=definition.type==='blood_pressure'?data.map(r=>finite(r.value_secondary)):null,all=secondary?[...primary,...secondary]:primary,min=Math.min(...all),max=Math.max(...all),x=i=>data.length===1?50:i/(data.length-1)*88+6,y=v=>28-((v-min)/(max-min||1))*22,points=vals=>vals.map((v,i)=>`${x(i)},${y(v)}`).join(' ');
     const markers=(vals,prefix)=>{const high=Math.max(...vals),low=Math.min(...vals),latest=vals.length-1,hi=vals.lastIndexOf(high),lo=vals.lastIndexOf(low);return [{i:hi,v:high,label:`${prefix} High`},{i:lo,v:low,label:`${prefix} Low`},{i:latest,v:vals[latest],label:`${prefix} Latest`}].filter((m,i,a)=>a.findIndex(x=>x.i===m.i&&x.v===m.v)===i)};
     const label=m=><g key={m.label}><circle cx={x(m.i)} cy={y(m.v)} r="1.8" className="metric-point"/><text x={x(m.i)} y={Math.max(3,y(m.v)-2.3)} textAnchor="middle">{m.label} {Math.round(m.v*10)/10}</text></g>;
     const pMarks=markers(primary,secondary?'SYS':'');const sMarks=secondary?markers(secondary,'DIA'):[];
     return <div className="metric-line-chart"><div className="chart-heading"><b>{definition.label} trend</b><span>{data.length} reading{data.length===1?'':'s'} · {new Date(data[0].measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}–{new Date(data.at(-1).measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span></div><svg viewBox="0 0 100 34" preserveAspectRatio="none" role="img" aria-label={`${definition.label} trend`}><polyline className="metric-primary" points={points(primary)} fill="none" vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"/>{secondary&&<polyline className="metric-secondary" points={points(secondary)} fill="none" vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"/>}{pMarks.map(label)}{sMarks.map(label)}</svg><div className="chart-summary"><span>Primary low <b>{Math.min(...primary)} {definition.unit}</b></span><span>Primary high <b>{Math.max(...primary)} {definition.unit}</b></span><span>Latest <b>{primary.at(-1)} {definition.unit}</b></span></div>{secondary&&<><div className="chart-summary secondary-summary"><span>Diastolic low <b>{Math.min(...secondary)} mmHg</b></span><span>Diastolic high <b>{Math.max(...secondary)} mmHg</b></span><span>Latest <b>{secondary.at(-1)} mmHg</b></span></div><div className="chart-legend"><span>Systolic</span><span>Diastolic</span></div></>}</div>
    }
    function normalizeLabRecord(row){
     const pick=(...keys)=>{for(const key of keys){const value=row?.[key];if(value!==undefined&&value!==null&&String(value).trim()!=='')return value}return null};
     const rawName=pick('biomarker','test_name','Test Name','test','Test','metric_type','Lab Test','Analyte');
     const rawValue=pick('value','result_value','Value','Result','result','numeric_value');
     const numeric=Number(String(rawValue??'').replaceAll(',','').match(/[-+]?\d*\.?\d+/)?.[0]);
     const notes=pick('notes','Notes','reference_range','Reference Range');
     const explicitUnit=pick('unit','Unit','units','Units');
     const inferredUnit=String(rawValue??'').match(/(?:mg\/dL|mmol\/L|ng\/mL|%|mIU\/L|U\/L|g\/dL|mL\/min[^,; ]*)/i)?.[0]||String(notes??'').match(/(?:mg\/dL|mmol\/L|ng\/mL|%|mIU\/L|U\/L|g\/dL|mL\/min[^,; ]*)/i)?.[0]||'';
     const collected=pick('collected_at','Date','date','measured_at','recorded_at','Collection Date');
     return {...row,biomarker:rawName?String(rawName).trim():null,test_name:rawName?String(rawName).trim():null,value:numeric,unit:String(explicitUnit||inferredUnit||'').trim(),collected_at:collected,notes:notes||null};
    }
    
    // FH-1262: Health renders the canonical federated Event contract rather than rebuilding its own timeline shape.
    function SwipeHealthTimelineEvent({event,onOpen,onDelete,onQuickAdd}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false);
     const isMeal=event.type==='meal';
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>8||Math.abs(dy)>8)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-88,Math.min(88,dx)))};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const left=offset<-45,right=offset>45,wasMoved=moved.current;start.current=null;setOffset(left?-82:right?82:0);if(!wasMoved&&!left&&!right)onOpen?.(event)};
     return <div className="health-event-swipe swipe-shell">{isMeal&&<button type="button" className="swipe-quick" aria-label={`Log ${event.title} again`} onClick={()=>onQuickAdd(event.source)}><Plus/><span>Log again</span></button>}{isMeal&&<button type="button" className="swipe-delete" aria-label={`Delete ${event.title}`} onClick={()=>onDelete(event.source)}><Trash2/><span>Delete</span></button>}<button type="button" className="health-event-card swipe-card" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}><time>{new Date(event.eventAt).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'})}</time><span className={`timeline-dot ${isMeal?'meal':''}`}/><div><b>{event.title}</b><small>{event.detail}</small></div></button></div>
    }
    function Health({tick,refresh}){
     const [revision,setRevision]=useState(0),[selected,setSelected]=useState(null),[historyType,setHistoryType]=useState(null),[range,setRange]=useState(30),[intelDetail,setIntelDetail]=useState(null),[timelineUndo,setTimelineUndo]=useState(null),[timelineToast,setTimelineToast]=useState('');
     useEffect(()=>{const requested=sessionStorage.getItem('fizz-open-health-metric');if(requested){sessionStorage.removeItem('fizz-open-health-metric');const def=metricDefinition(requested);setSelected({definition:def,row:null})}},[]);
     const readings=query('SELECT * FROM health_metrics ORDER BY measured_at DESC,id DESC');
     const latest=Object.fromEntries(HEALTH_METRICS.map(def=>[def.type,readings.find(r=>r.metric_type===def.type&&r.local_date===today())||null]));
     const required=HEALTH_METRICS.filter(x=>!x.optional),complete=required.filter(x=>latest[x.type]).length;
     const start=new Date();if(range!=='all')start.setDate(start.getDate()-Number(range));const history=historyType?readings.filter(r=>r.metric_type===historyType&&(range==='all'||new Date(r.measured_at)>=start)):[];
     const meals=query('SELECT * FROM meals ORDER BY eaten_at DESC LIMIT 2500');
     const rawLabRows=query('SELECT * FROM lab_results'); const labRows=rawLabRows.map(normalizeLabRecord).filter(r=>r.biomarker&&Number.isFinite(r.value)&&r.collected_at); const metricLabs=query("SELECT substr(metric_type,11) AS biomarker,value_primary AS value,unit,measured_at AS collected_at,source,notes FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type LIKE 'biomarker:%' ORDER BY measured_at DESC").map(normalizeLabRecord); const labKey=r=>`${String(r.biomarker).toLowerCase()}|${String(r.collected_at).slice(0,10)}|${r.value}`; const labs=[...new Map([...labRows,...metricLabs].map(r=>[labKey(r),r])).values()];
     const goals=query('SELECT * FROM health_goals WHERE active=1 ORDER BY priority DESC');
     const preventive=query('SELECT * FROM preventive_health_items ORDER BY due_date');
     const interventionRows=query('SELECT * FROM health_interventions ORDER BY start_date DESC');
     const series={};for(const r of readings){(series[r.metric_type]??=[]).push({date:r.local_date||r.measured_at,value:r.value_primary})}
     const nutritionDays={};for(const m of meals){const d=String(m.consumed_local_date||m.eaten_at||'').slice(0,10);if(!d)continue;const x=nutritionDays[d]??={date:d,calories:0,protein:0,fiber:0,saturated_fat:0,sodium:0};for(const k of ['calories','protein','fiber','saturated_fat','sodium'])x[k]+=Number(m[k])||0}
     for(const k of ['calories','protein','fiber','saturated_fat','sodium'])series[k]=Object.values(nutritionDays).map(x=>({date:x.date,value:x[k]}));
     const goalModels={};for(const g of goals){const rows=readings.filter(r=>r.metric_type===g.goal_type).map(r=>({date:r.measured_at,value:r.value_primary}));const current=rows.length?rows.sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.date)-new Date(b.date)).at(-1).value:0;goalModels[g.goal_id]={current,target:g.target_value,history:rows,direction:g.direction||'down'}}
     const health2=buildHealthIntelligence2({metrics:readings,meals,labs,preventive,series,goals:goalModels,biomarkerTargets:{ldl:100,hdl:60,triglycerides:150,'total cholesterol':200,apob:80,a1c:5.7,'fasting glucose':100}});
     const todayMeals=meals.filter(r=>String(r.consumed_local_date||r.eaten_at).slice(0,10)===today());
     const timeline=buildUnifiedTimeline({meals:todayMeals,metrics:readings.filter(r=>r.local_date===today())});
     const saved=()=>{setSelected(null);setRevision(x=>x+1);refresh()};
     const timelineChanged=message=>{setRevision(x=>x+1);refresh();setTimelineToast(message);setTimeout(()=>setTimelineToast(''),1800)};
     async function deleteTimelineMeal(row){
      const snapshot={...row};
      await transaction(async db=>{if(row.pantry_id&&Number(row.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)+? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(row.pantry_delta),row.pantry_id]);if(row.pantry_id&&Number(row.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='No' WHERE pantry_id=?",[row.pantry_id]);db.run('DELETE FROM meals WHERE id=?',[row.id])});
      setTimelineUndo(snapshot);timelineChanged(`${row.food_name} deleted`);setTimeout(()=>setTimelineUndo(current=>current?.id===snapshot.id?null:current),5000);
     }
     async function undoTimelineMeal(){if(!timelineUndo)return;const r=timelineUndo;await transaction(async db=>{if(r.pantry_id&&Number(r.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(r.pantry_delta),r.pantry_id]);if(r.pantry_id&&Number(r.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[r.pantry_id]);const available=new Set(db.query('PRAGMA table_info(meals)').map(x=>x.name)),cols=Object.keys(r).filter(c=>available.has(c));db.run(`INSERT INTO meals(${cols.join(',')}) VALUES (${cols.map(()=>'?').join(',')})`,cols.map(c=>r[c]??null))});setTimelineUndo(null);timelineChanged(`${r.food_name} restored`)}
     async function quickAddTimelineMeal(row){const now=new Date(),copy={...row,id:null,eaten_at:now.toISOString(),created_at:now.toISOString(),updated_at:now.toISOString(),consumed_local_date:localDateKey(now),timezone_offset_minutes:-now.getTimezoneOffset()};await transaction(async db=>{if(copy.pantry_id&&Number(copy.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(copy.pantry_delta),copy.pantry_id]);if(copy.pantry_id&&Number(copy.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[copy.pantry_id]);const available=new Set(db.query('PRAGMA table_info(meals)').map(x=>x.name)),cols=Object.keys(copy).filter(c=>c!=='id'&&available.has(c));db.run(`INSERT INTO meals(${cols.join(',')}) VALUES (${cols.map(()=>'?').join(',')})`,cols.map(c=>copy[c]??null))});timelineChanged(`${row.food_name} logged again`)}
    
     if(historyType){const def=metricDefinition(historyType);const all=readings.filter(r=>r.metric_type===historyType).sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.measured_at)-new Date(b.measured_at));const current=all.at(-1);const vals=history.map(r=>Number(r.value_primary)).filter(Number.isFinite);const allVals=all.map(r=>Number(r.value_primary)).filter(Number.isFinite);const avg=n=>{const cutoff=new Date();cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate()-n);const v=all.filter(r=>new Date(r.measured_at)>=cutoff).map(r=>Number(r.value_primary)).filter(Number.isFinite);return v.length?v.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/v.length:null};const priorAtOrBelow=current?[...all.slice(0,-1)].reverse().find(r=>Number(r.value_primary)<=Number(current.value_primary)):null;return <><header className="detail-header"><button className="back" onClick={()=>setHistoryType(null)}>‹ Health</button><button className="detail-close" aria-label="Close metric history" onClick={()=>setHistoryType(null)}><X/></button><Brand/><small>METRIC HISTORY</small><h1>{def.label}</h1></header>{historyType==='weight'&&current&&<section className="weight-summary"><div className="weight-current"><small>Current weight</small><strong>{Number(current.value_primary).toFixed(1)} lb</strong><span>{all.length>1?`${Number(current.value_primary)-Number(all[0].value_primary)<=0?'▼':'▲'} ${Math.abs(Number(current.value_primary)-Number(all[0].value_primary)).toFixed(1)} lb since ${new Date(all[0].measured_at).toLocaleDateString([],{month:'short',year:'numeric'})}`:'First recorded weight'}</span></div><div className="weight-milestones"><div><small>Last at or below</small><b>{priorAtOrBelow?new Date(priorAtOrBelow.measured_at).toLocaleDateString():'🏆 New recorded low'}</b></div><div><small>Lowest</small><span>{new Date(all.find(r=>Number(r.value_primary)===Math.min(...allVals))?.measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{Math.min(...allVals).toFixed(1)} lb</b></div><div><small>Highest</small><span>{new Date(all.find(r=>Number(r.value_primary)===Math.max(...allVals))?.measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{Math.max(...allVals).toFixed(1)} lb</b></div><div><small>30-day average</small><span>{new Date(Date.now()-29*86400000).toLocaleDateString()}–{new Date().toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{avg(30)?.toFixed(1)||'—'} lb</b></div><div><small>7-day average</small><span>{new Date(Date.now()-6*86400000).toLocaleDateString()}–{new Date().toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{avg(7)?.toFixed(1)||'—'} lb</b></div></div><MetricLineChart rows={history} definition={def}/></section>}{historyType!=='weight'&&<MetricLineChart rows={history} definition={def}/>}<div className="range-tabs">{[7,30,90,'all'].map(d=><button key={d} className={range===d?'active':''} onClick={()=>setRange(d)}>{d==='all'?'All':`${d}D`}</button>)}</div><div className="history-list">{history.map(r=><button key={r.id} className="history-reading" onClick={()=>setSelected({definition:def,row:r})}><div><b>{healthValue(r,def)}</b><span>{new Date(r.measured_at).toLocaleString()}</span></div><Pencil/></button>)}{!history.length&&<div className="empty">No readings in this range.</div>}</div>{intelDetail&&<div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>HEALTH INTELLIGENCE</small><h2>{intelDetail.title}</h2></div><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail(null)} aria-label="Close"><X/></button></header><section className="decision-block"><h3>Why this matters</h3><p>{intelDetail.body}</p><h3>What to do next</h3><p>Review the supporting records, correct anything incomplete, and use the trend as decision support rather than diagnosis.</p></section><button className="primary" onClick={()=>setIntelDetail(null)}>Back to Health</button></div></div>}{selected&&<HealthMetricEditor {...selected} onClose={()=>setSelected(null)} onSaved={saved}/>}</>}
     return <><header><Brand/><small>DAILY HEALTH</small><h1>Morning check-in</h1><p>Tap a card to record or update today’s reading.</p></header><section className="health-completion"><div><span>Required check-in</span><b>{complete} of {required.length} complete</b></div><div className="completion-track"><i style={{width:`${complete/required.length*100}%`}}/></div></section><section className="health-section health-intelligence-v2"><div className="section-head"><div><small>HEALTH INTELLIGENCE 2.0</small><h2>Why your health is changing</h2></div></div><div className="intelligence-summary-grid"><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Longitudinal coverage',body:`${health2.overview.coverage.metricReadings} measurements and ${health2.overview.coverage.mealDays} nutrition days support these insights.`})}><small>LONGITUDINAL COVERAGE</small><strong>{health2.overview.coverage.metricReadings}</strong><span>measurements · {health2.overview.coverage.mealDays} nutrition days</span></button><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Biomarkers',body:health2.biomarkers.length?health2.biomarkers.map(x=>`${x.biomarker}: ${x.latest} ${x.unit}`).join(' · '):'No biomarker records are available. Import the Health workbook from Settings.'})}><small>BIOMARKERS</small><strong>{health2.biomarkers.length}</strong><span>tracked with direction and confidence</span></button><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Meaningful relationships',body:health2.correlations.length?health2.correlations.map(x=>x.explanation).join(' '):'No supported matched-day relationships yet.'})}><small>MEANINGFUL RELATIONSHIPS</small><strong>{health2.correlations.length}</strong><span>moderate or strong matched-day associations</span></button><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Preventive care',body:health2.preventive.length?health2.preventive.map(x=>`${x.name}: ${x.status.replace('_',' ')}`).join(' · '):'No preventive-care schedule has been entered.'})}><small>PREVENTIVE CARE</small><strong>{health2.preventive.filter(x=>x.status==='overdue'||x.status==='due_soon').length}</strong><span>due soon or overdue</span></button></div><div className="coach-insights">{health2.coach.slice(0,4).map((x,i)=><article key={i}><div><b>{x.title}</b><span>{x.evidence}</span></div><em>{x.confidence}% confidence</em></article>)}</div>{health2.biomarkers.length>0&&<div className="biomarker-strip">{health2.biomarkers.slice(0,6).map(x=><article key={x.biomarker}><b>{x.biomarker.toUpperCase()}</b><strong>{x.latest} {x.unit}</strong><span>{x.trend.direction} · {x.confidence}% confidence{x.timeToTargetDays!=null?` · ${x.timeToTargetDays} days to target`:''}</span></article>)}</div>}{health2.goals.length>0&&<div className="goal-intelligence-list">{health2.goals.map(g=><article key={g.id}><div><b>{g.id}</b><span>{g.status==='on_track'?`Projected ${g.predictedDate}`:'Adjustment recommended'}</span></div><strong>{g.progress}%</strong></article>)}</div>}{health2.preventive.filter(x=>x.status!=='complete').slice(0,4).map(x=><div className={`preventive-row ${x.status}`} key={x.item_id}><ShieldCheck/><div><b>{x.name}</b><span>{x.status.replace('_',' ')}{x.due_date?` · ${x.due_date}`:''}</span></div></div>)}</section><div className="health-grid">{HEALTH_METRICS.map(def=>{const row=latest[def.type];const Icon=def.Icon;return <button key={def.type} className={`health-card ${row?'complete':''}`} onClick={()=>setSelected({definition:def,row})}><span className="health-icon"><Icon/></span><div><small>{def.label}</small><b>{healthValue(row,def)}</b><em>{row?new Date(row.measured_at).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'}):def.optional?'Optional':'Tap to log'}</em></div><span className="health-state">{row?<Check/>:<Plus/>}</span></button>})}</div><section className="health-section"><div className="section-head"><div><small>RECENT DATA</small><h2>History</h2></div></div><div className="metric-history-links">{HEALTH_METRICS.map(def=><button key={def.type} onClick={()=>setHistoryType(def.type)}><def.Icon/><span>{def.label}</span><b>›</b></button>)}</div></section><section className="health-section"><div className="section-head"><div><small>TODAY</small><h2>Health & meal timeline</h2></div></div><div className="health-timeline">{timeline.map(event=><SwipeHealthTimelineEvent key={event.id} event={event} onOpen={x=>x.type==='metric'&&setSelected({definition:metricDefinition(x.source.metric_type),row:x.source})} onDelete={deleteTimelineMeal} onQuickAdd={quickAddTimelineMeal}/>)}{!timeline.length&&<div className="empty">Your readings and meals will appear here in time order.</div>}</div>{timelineToast&&<div className="success-toast">✓ {timelineToast}</div>}{timelineUndo&&<div className="undo-snackbar"><span>{timelineUndo.food_name} deleted</span><button onClick={undoTimelineMeal}>Undo</button></div>}</section>{selected&&<HealthMetricEditor {...selected} onClose={()=>setSelected(null)} onSaved={saved}/>}</>
    }
    
    function PersonalHealthProfile({onBack,onClose=onBack}){
     const initial=query('SELECT * FROM health_profile WHERE profile_id=1')[0]||{};const [form,setForm]=useState(initial),[saved,setSaved]=useState('');const age=calculateAge(form.date_of_birth);
     const set=(k,v)=>setForm(x=>({...x,[k]:v}));async function save(){await run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO health_profile(profile_id,date_of_birth,biological_sex,height_cm,smoking_status,activity_level,goal_weight_lb,goal_waist_in,health_goals_json,updated_at) VALUES (1,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[form.date_of_birth||null,form.biological_sex||null,finite(form.height_cm)||null,form.smoking_status||'never',form.activity_level||'moderate',finite(form.goal_weight_lb)||null,finite(form.goal_waist_in)||null,form.health_goals_json||'[]',new Date().toISOString()]);setSaved('Profile saved')}
     return <><header className="detail-header"><button className="back" onClick={onBack}>‹ Gear</button><Brand/><small>PERSONALIZATION</small><h1>Personal health profile</h1><p>These details drive age-, sex-, and smoking-aware recommendations.</p></header><section className="panel profile-form"><label>Date of birth<input type="date" value={form.date_of_birth||''} onChange={e=>set('date_of_birth',e.target.value)}/><span>{age==null?'Age calculated automatically':`Current age: ${age}`}</span></label><label>Biological sex<select value={form.biological_sex||''} onChange={e=>set('biological_sex',e.target.value)}><option value="">Select</option><option value="male">Male</option><option value="female">Female</option></select></label><label>Height (cm)<input type="number" value={form.height_cm||''} onChange={e=>set('height_cm',e.target.value)}/></label><label>Smoking status<select value={form.smoking_status||'never'} onChange={e=>set('smoking_status',e.target.value)}><option value="never">Never smoked</option><option value="former">Former smoker</option><option value="current">Current smoker</option></select></label><label>Activity level<select value={form.activity_level||'moderate'} onChange={e=>set('activity_level',e.target.value)}><option value="sedentary">Sedentary</option><option value="light">Light</option><option value="moderate">Moderate</option><option value="very_active">Very active</option></select></label><label>Goal weight (lb)<input type="number" step="0.1" value={form.goal_weight_lb||''} onChange={e=>set('goal_weight_lb',e.target.value)}/></label><label>Goal waist (in)<input type="number" step="0.1" value={form.goal_waist_in||''} onChange={e=>set('goal_waist_in',e.target.value)}/></label><button className="primary" onClick={save}><Check/> Save profile</button>{saved&&<div className="status">{saved}</div>}</section></>
    }
    function NutrientConfiguration({onBack,onClose=onBack}){
     const [rows,setRows]=useState(()=>query('SELECT * FROM nutrition_targets ORDER BY nutrient')),[editing,setEditing]=useState(null),[status,setStatus]=useState('');const reload=()=>setRows(query('SELECT * FROM nutrition_targets ORDER BY nutrient'));
     async function toggleDerived(row){await run('UPDATE nutrition_targets SET derived=?,updated_at=? WHERE nutrient=?',[Number(row.derived)===1?0:1,new Date().toISOString(),row.nutrient]);reload()}
     async function save(){await run(`UPDATE nutrition_targets SET minimum_value=?,target_value=?,max_value=?,behavior_type=?,source=?,source_category=?,formula=?,recommendation_notes=?,override_minimum=?,override_target=?,override_max=?,updated_at=? WHERE nutrient=?`,[editing.minimum_value===''?null:Number(editing.minimum_value),Number(editing.target_value)||0,editing.max_value===''?null:Number(editing.max_value),editing.behavior_type,editing.source,editing.source_category,editing.formula,editing.recommendation_notes,Number(editing.derived)===1?editing.override_minimum:(editing.minimum_value===''?null:Number(editing.minimum_value)),Number(editing.derived)===1?editing.override_target:Number(editing.target_value)||0,Number(editing.derived)===1?editing.override_max:(editing.max_value===''?null:Number(editing.max_value)),new Date().toISOString(),editing.nutrient]);setEditing(null);setStatus('Nutrient target saved');reload()}
     return <><header className="detail-header detail-header-with-close"><button className="back" onClick={onBack}>‹ Gear</button><button className="detail-close" aria-label="Close nutrient configuration" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><Brand/><small>NUTRIENT ENGINE</small><h1>Nutrient configuration</h1><p>Minimum, goal, maximum, behavior, formula, and source all live in SQLite.</p></header>{status&&<div className="status">{status}</div>}<div className="nutrient-config-list">{rows.map(r=><div className="nutrient-config-row" key={r.nutrient}><button className="config-main" onClick={()=>setEditing({...r})}><div><b>{r.nutrient.replaceAll('_',' ')}</b><span>{r.minimum_value!=null?`Min ${r.minimum_value}${r.unit} · `:''}Goal {r.target_value}{r.unit}{r.max_value!=null?` · Max ${r.max_value}${r.unit}`:''}</span><em>{r.source} · {r.behavior_type}</em></div><Pencil/></button>{Number(r.supports_derived)===1&&<button className={`derived-toggle ${Number(r.derived)===1?'active':''}`} onClick={()=>toggleDerived(r)}><span>{Number(r.derived)===1?'Derived':'Override'}</span><i/></button>}</div>)}</div>{editing&&<div className="modal-backdrop"><div className="panel config-editor"><div className="edit-head"><h3>{editing.nutrient.replaceAll('_',' ')}</h3><button onClick={()=>setEditing(null)}><X/></button></div><div className={Number(editing.derived)===1?'derived-fields':''}><label>Minimum<input type="number" step="any" disabled={Number(editing.derived)===1} value={editing.minimum_value??''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,minimum_value:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Goal<input type="number" step="any" disabled={Number(editing.derived)===1} value={editing.target_value??''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,target_value:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Maximum<input type="number" step="any" disabled={Number(editing.derived)===1} value={editing.max_value??''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,max_value:e.target.value})}/></label></div><label>Behavior<select value={editing.behavior_type||'goal'} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,behavior_type:e.target.value})}><option value="goal">Goal</option><option value="limit">Limit</option><option value="budget">Budget</option></select></label><label>Source<input value={editing.source||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,source:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Source category<input value={editing.source_category||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,source_category:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Formula<input value={editing.formula||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,formula:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Notes<textarea value={editing.recommendation_notes||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,recommendation_notes:e.target.value})}/></label><button className="primary" onClick={save}><Check/> Save nutrient</button></div></div>}</>
    }

    function PageShell({eyebrow,title,description,onBack,children}){return <><header className="settings-page-header"><button className="back-link" onClick={onBack}>‹ Back</button><Brand/><small>{eyebrow}</small><h1>{title}</h1>{description&&<p>{description}</p>}</header>{children}</>}
    function downloadJson(name,data){const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'}),a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=name;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href)}
    function AboutPage({onBack}){const db=databaseStatus(),[history,setHistory]=useState(false),latest=RELEASE_HISTORY.find(r=>r.version===VERSION)||RELEASE_HISTORY[0];return <PageShell     function DatabaseTransferPage({onBack,refresh}){const [status,setStatus]=useState(''),[busy,setBusy]=useState(false),workbookInput=useRef(null);async function workbook(file){if(!file)return;setBusy(true);setStatus(`Importing ${file.name}…`);try{const r=await importWorkbook(file);setStatus(`Imported ${r.foods} foods, ${r.pantry} pantry items, ${r.recipes} recipe ingredients, ${r.healthMetrics||0} health readings, ${r.labs||0} lab results, and ${r.workoutSets||0} workout sets. ${r.coverage?.length||0} workbook sheets audited.`);refresh()}catch(e){setStatus(`Import failed: ${e.message||e}`)}finally{setBusy(false)}}async function sqlite(e){const f=e.target.files?.[0];if(!f)return;setBusy(true);try{await importDatabase(await f.arrayBuffer());setStatus('Database restored and migrated successfully.');refresh()}catch(err){setStatus(`Restore failed: ${err.message||err}`)}finally{setBusy(false);e.target.value=''}}function exportDb(){const blob=new Blob([exportDatabase()],{type:'application/vnd.sqlite3'}),a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=`FizzHealth-${today()}.sqlite`;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href)}return <PageShell eyebrow="DATA" title="Database import & export" description="Move user data without changing the database schema." onBack={onBack}>{status&&<div className="import-banner working">{status}</div>}<section className="data-section"><input ref={workbookInput} className="visually-hidden" type="file" accept=".xlsx" onChange={e=>workbook(e.target.files?.[0])}/><button className="action" disabled={busy} onClick={()=>workbookInput.current?.click()}><Upload/><div><b>Import Fizz Health workbook</b><span>Foods, pantry, recipes, health data, and history</span></div></button><button className="action" onClick={exportDb}><Download/><div><b>Export SQLite backup</b><span>Save a complete portable database</span></div></button><label className="action"><Upload/><div><b>Restore SQLite backup</b><span>Restore and migrate a previous backup</span></div><input type="file" accept=".sqlite,.db" onChange={sqlite}/></label></section></PageShell>}
    function SchemaPage({onBack}){const [status,setStatus]=useState(''),input=useRef(null),db=databaseStatus();const schema=()=>({format:'fizz-health-schema',schema_version:db.schemaVersion,exported_at:new Date().toISOString(),tables:query("SELECT name,sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name NOT LIKE 'sqlite_%' ORDER BY name")});function exportSchema(){downloadJson(`FizzHealth-schema-v${db.schemaVersion}.json`,schema())}async function importSchema(file){if(!file)return;try{const data=JSON.parse(await file.text());if(data.format!=='fizz-health-schema'||!Array.isArray(data.tables))throw new Error('Not a valid Fizz Health schema JSON file.');setStatus(`Schema JSON validated: version ${data.schema_version}, ${data.tables.length} tables. No user data was changed.`)}catch(e){setStatus(`Validation failed: ${e.message||e}`)}}return <PageShell eyebrow="SCHEMA" title="Schema JSON management" description="Database structure is managed separately from user data." onBack={onBack}>{status&&<div className="import-banner working">{status}</div>}<section className="data-section"><button className="action" onClick={exportSchema}><FileJson/><div><b>Export schema JSON</b><span>Save table definitions and schema version</span></div></button><input ref={input} className="visually-hidden" type="file" accept="application/json,.json" onChange={e=>importSchema(e.target.files?.[0])}/><button className="action" onClick={()=>input.current?.click()}><Upload/><div><b>Import and validate schema JSON</b><span>Validate structure before any migration work</span></div></button><section className="schema-view"><h2>Current schema</h2><div className="release-scroll">{schema().tables.map(t=><details key={t.name}><summary>{t.name}</summary><pre>{t.sql}</pre></details>)}</div></section></section></PageShell>}
    function ArchivedItemsPage({onBack,refresh}){const [kind,setKind]=useState('foods'),[q,setQ]=useState(''),[tick,setTick]=useState(0),search=`%${q}%`,foods=query('SELECT * FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=1 AND name LIKE ? ORDER BY archived_at DESC,name',[search]),recipes=query('SELECT recipe_id,recipe_name,MAX(archived_at) archived_at,COUNT(*) ingredient_count FROM recipes WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=1 AND recipe_name LIKE ? GROUP BY recipe_id,recipe_name ORDER BY archived_at DESC',[search]);async function restoreFood(f){await run('UPDATE foods SET archived=0,archived_at=NULL WHERE food_id=?',[f.food_id]);setTick(x=>x+1);refresh()}async function restoreRecipe(r){await run('UPDATE recipes SET archived=0,archived_at=NULL WHERE recipe_id=? OR recipe_name=?',[r.recipe_id,r.recipe_name]);setTick(x=>x+1);refresh()}const rows=kind==='foods'?foods:recipes;return <PageShell eyebrow="ARCHIVE" title="Archived items" description="Restore foods and recipes without changing historical meals." onBack={onBack}><div className="filter-pills"><button className={kind==='foods'?'active':''} onClick={()=>setKind('foods')}>Foods</button><button className={kind==='recipes'?'active':''} onClick={()=>setKind('recipes')}>Recipes</button></div><label className="search"><Search/><input value={q} onChange={e=>setQ(e.target.value)} placeholder={`Search archived ${kind}…`}/></label><div className="list">{rows.map(r=><div className="item" key={r.food_id||r.recipe_id||r.recipe_name}><div><b>{r.name||r.recipe_name}</b><span>Archived {r.archived_at?new Date(r.archived_at).toLocaleString():'date unknown'}{r.ingredient_count?` · ${r.ingredient_count} ingredients`:''}</span></div><button className="restore-button" onClick={()=>kind==='foods'?restoreFood(r):restoreRecipe(r)}><RotateCcw/> Restore</button></div>)}{!rows.length&&<div className="empty">No archived {kind}.</div>}</div></PageShell>}
    function MaintenancePage({onBack,refresh}){const [status,setStatus]=useState(''),db=databaseStatus();async function wipe(){if(confirm('Erase all local Fizz Health data on this device? This cannot be undone.')){await resetDatabase();setStatus('Local database erased and rebuilt.');refresh()}}return <PageShell eyebrow="MAINTENANCE" title="Maintenance & audit" description="Diagnostics and recovery tools for the local database." onBack={onBack}><section className="about-summary"><div><span>Schema</span><b>v{db.schemaVersion}</b><small>Issued {RELEASE_DATE}</small></div><div><span>Foods</span><b>{db.foods}</b></div><div><span>Pantry</span><b>{db.pantry}</b></div><div><span>Recipes</span><b>{db.recipes}</b></div><div><span>Nutrition coverage</span><b>{db.nutritionCoverage}%</b></div><div><span>Historical meals</span><b>{db.history?.total_meals||0}</b></div></section>{status&&<div className="import-banner success">{status}</div>}<section className="data-section"><button className="action" onClick={()=>setStatus(`Audit complete: ${db.foodsMissingNutrition} foods missing nutrition; ${db.pantryNutritionIssues?.length||0} pantry link issues.`)}><ShieldCheck/><div><b>Run database audit</b><span>Check nutrition coverage and pantry mappings</span></div></button><button className="action danger" onClick={wipe}><Trash2/><div><b>Erase local database</b><span>Use only after exporting a backup</span></div></button></section></PageShell>}
    function AudioSettingsPage({onBack}){
     const supported=typeof window!=='undefined'&&'speechSynthesis' in window;
     const read=()=>{try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('fizz-audio-settings-v1')||'{}')}catch{return {}}};
     const initial=read();
     const [voices,setVoices]=useState([]),[voiceURI,setVoiceURI]=useState(initial.voiceURI||''),[rate,setRate]=useState(String(initial.rate||1)),[status,setStatus]=useState('');
     useEffect(()=>{if(!supported)return;const load=()=>setVoices(window.speechSynthesis.getVoices().filter(v=>/^en/i.test(v.lang)||!v.lang));load();window.speechSynthesis.addEventListener?.('voiceschanged',load);return()=>window.speechSynthesis.removeEventListener?.('voiceschanged',load)},[supported]);
     const duplicates=voices.reduce((a,v)=>(a[v.name]=(a[v.name]||0)+1,a),{});
     function save(nextVoice=voiceURI,nextRate=rate){const voice=voices.find(v=>voiceIdentity(v)===nextVoice);const data={voiceURI:nextVoice,voiceName:voice?.name||initial.voiceName||'',lang:voice?.lang||initial.lang||'',localService:voice?.localService??initial.localService??null,rate:Number(nextRate)||1,updatedAt:new Date().toISOString()};localStorage.setItem('fizz-audio-settings-v1',JSON.stringify(data));localStorage.setItem('fizz-brief-voice-uri',nextVoice);localStorage.setItem('fizz-brief-speech-rate',String(data.rate));setStatus('Audio settings saved and will persist across releases.');}
     function test(){if(!supported)return;window.speechSynthesis.cancel();const u=new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('Edward, this is your selected Fizz Health narration voice.');u.rate=Number(rate)||1;const v=voices.find(x=>voiceIdentity(x)===voiceURI)||voices.find(x=>x.name===initial.voiceName&&x.lang===initial.lang)||voices.find(x=>x.default)||voices[0];if(v)u.voice=v;window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)}
     return <><div className="standard-form-header"><button type="button" onClick={onBack} aria-label="Close Audio settings"><X/></button><div><small>SETTINGS</small><h2>Audio</h2></div><button type="button" onClick={()=>save()} aria-label="Save Audio settings"><Check/></button></div><section className="audio-settings-page"><h1>Narration voice</h1><p>Choose the voice used for the Daily Brief. Fizz Health stores both the exact voice identifier and a name-and-language fallback so updates do not reset your choice.</p>{supported?<><label>Voice<select value={voiceURI} onChange={e=>{setVoiceURI(e.target.value);save(e.target.value,rate)}}><option value="">Device default</option>{voices.map(v=><option key={voiceIdentity(v)} value={voiceIdentity(v)}>{voiceLabel(v,duplicates)}</option>)}</select></label><label>Speaking speed<select value={rate} onChange={e=>{setRate(e.target.value);save(voiceURI,e.target.value)}}><option value="0.8">Slower</option><option value="1">Normal</option><option value="1.15">Faster</option><option value="1.3">Fast</option></select></label><button className="primary" onClick={test}><Volume2/> Test Voice</button></>:<div className="empty">Speech narration is not supported by this browser.</div>}{status&&<div className="status">{status}</div>}</section></>
    }
    
    function Data({refresh}){const [page,setPage]=useState(null);if(page==='audio')return <AudioSettingsPage onBack={()=>setPage(null)}/>;if(page==='about')return <AboutPage onBack={()=>setPage(null)}/>;if(page==='database')return <DatabaseTransferPage onBack={()=>setPage(null)} refresh={refresh}/>;if(page==='schema')return <SchemaPage onBack={()=>setPage(null)}/>;if(page==='profile')return <PersonalHealthProfile onBack={()=>setPage(null)} onClose={()=>setPage(null)}/>;if(page==='nutrients')return <NutrientConfiguration onBack={()=>setPage(null)} onClose={()=>setPage(null)}/>;if(page==='archived')return <ArchivedItemsPage onBack={()=>setPage(null)} refresh={refresh}/>;if(page==='maintenance')return <MaintenancePage onBack={()=>setPage(null)} refresh={refresh}/>;const panels=[['audio',Volume2,'Audio & narration','Choose a Daily Brief voice, speaking speed, and persistent narration defaults'],['about',Info,'About & release notes','Version, build timestamp, diagnostics, current notes, and full history'],['database',Database,'Database import & export','Backup, restore, and workbook data transfer'],['schema',FileJson,'Schema JSON','View, export, import, and validate database structure'],['profile',UserRound,'Personal health profile','Identity-neutral health inputs, activity, smoking, and goals'],['nutrients',SlidersHorizontal,'Preferences & nutrient targets','Targets, limits, formulas, units, and dashboard behavior'],['archived',Archive,'Archived items','Restore archived foods and recipes'],['maintenance',Wrench,'Maintenance & audit','Database diagnostics, integrity checks, and reset tools']];return <><header><Brand/><small>SETTINGS</small><h1>Settings</h1><p>Choose a focused area. Tasks are grouped by purpose and kept off this hub.</p></header><section className="settings-grid">{panels.map(([id,Icon,title,desc])=><button key={id} onClick={()=>setPage(id)}><Icon/><div><b>{title}</b><span>{desc}</span></div><ChevronRight/></button>)}</section></>}

    function nutritionCompletion(food={}){

    function getTargets(date=today()){

    function estimateMaintenance(){
     const weights=query("SELECT local_date,value_primary FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type='weight' ORDER BY local_date ASC");
     const mealDays=query("SELECT consumed_local_date AS local_date,SUM(calories) calories FROM meals WHERE nutrition_known=1 GROUP BY consumed_local_date ORDER BY consumed_local_date ASC");
     const stepDays=query("SELECT local_date,MAX(value_primary) steps FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type='steps' GROUP BY local_date ORDER BY local_date ASC");
     return evaluateDecision('maintenance_estimate',{weights,mealDays,stepDays});
    }

      }
     };
     useEffect(()=>{
      boot();
      if(!('serviceWorker'in navigator))return;
      let reloading=false;
      const onControllerChange=()=>{if(reloading)return;reloading=true;window.location.reload()};
      navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('controllerchange',onControllerChange);
      navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js').then(reg=>{
       const activate=worker=>worker?.postMessage({type:'SKIP_WAITING'});
       if(reg.waiting)activate(reg.waiting);
       reg.addEventListener('updatefound',()=>{const worker=reg.installing;worker?.addEventListener('statechange',()=>{if(worker.state==='installed'&&navigator.serviceWorker.controller)activate(worker)})});
       reg.update().catch(()=>{});
      }).catch(error=>console.warn('Service worker registration failed',error));
      const progressNotice=window.setTimeout(()=>{if(!document.querySelector('.app'))setBootStage(stage=>stage.includes('Still working')?stage:`${stage} Still working…`)},20000);
      return()=>{window.clearTimeout(progressNotice);navigator.serviceWorker.removeEventListener('controllerchange',onControllerChange)};
     },[]);
     useEffect(()=>{
      const viewport=window.visualViewport;
      let focusTimer=0;
      const keepFocusedControlVisible=()=>{
       clearTimeout(focusTimer);
       focusTimer=window.setTimeout(()=>{
        const active=document.activeElement;
        if(!active||!active.matches?.('input,textarea,select,[contenteditable=\"true\"]'))return;
        const scroller=active.closest('.editor-scroll,.health-form,.nutrition-scroll,.modal-backdrop>.panel,.modal-backdrop>form.panel');

        target.scrollIntoView({block:'center',inline:'nearest',behavior:'smooth'});
       },90);
      };
      const updateViewport=()=>{
       const height=Math.round(viewport?.height||window.innerHeight);
       const top=Math.max(0,Math.round(viewport?.offsetTop||0));
       const keyboardOpen=height<window.innerHeight-120;
       document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--visual-viewport-height',`${height}px`);
       document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--visual-viewport-top',`${top}px`);
       document.documentElement.classList.toggle('keyboard-open',keyboardOpen);
       if(keyboardOpen)keepFocusedControlVisible();
      };
      updateViewport();
      viewport?.addEventListener('resize',updateViewport);
      viewport?.addEventListener('scroll',updateViewport);
      window.addEventListener('orientationchange',updateViewport);
      document.addEventListener('focusin',keepFocusedControlVisible);
      return()=>{clearTimeout(focusTimer);viewport?.removeEventListener('resize',updateViewport);viewport?.removeEventListener('scroll',updateViewport);window.removeEventListener('orientationchange',updateViewport);document.removeEventListener('focusin',keepFocusedControlVisible);document.documentElement.classList.remove('keyboard-open')};
     },[]);
     const refresh=()=>setTick(x=>x+1);
     const visit=id=>{const usage=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('fizz-nav-usage')||'{}');usage[id]={count:Number(usage[id]?.count||0)+1,recent:Date.now()};localStorage.setItem('fizz-nav-usage',JSON.stringify(usage));setTab(id)};
     if(!ready)return <div className="splash">Fizz Health<br/><small>{bootError||bootStage}</small>{bootError&&<><span className="boot-diagnostic">Startup stage: {bootStage}</span><button className="retry-boot" onClick={boot}>Try again</button></>}</div>;
     const navItems=[{id:'today',I:Home,label:'Home'},{id:'food',I:UtensilsCrossed,label:'Food'},{id:'health',I:HeartPulse,label:'Health'},{id:'data',I:Settings,label:'Settings'}];

     const isNavActive=id=>id==='food'?foodTabs.has(tab):tab===id;
     return <main className="app"><section className="content">
      {tab==='today'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Today"><Today tick={tick} openGear={()=>visit('data')} onLogRecommendation={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}} navigate={visit}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='add'&&<AddMeal refresh={refresh} done={()=>visit('today')} onBack={()=>visit('food')} navigate={visit} initialFood={pendingFood} clearInitial={()=>setPendingFood(null)}/>} {tab==='food'&&<FoodHub navigate={visit}/>} {tab==='food-intelligence'&&<FoodIntelligencePage tick={tick} onBack={()=>visit('add')} onLogFood={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}}/>} {tab==='food-planner'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Meal planner"><FoodPlannerPage tick={tick} onBack={()=>visit('food')}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='food-recommendations'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Chef’s Recommendations"><FoodRecommendationsPage tick={tick} onBack={()=>visit('food')} onLog={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='food-upcoming'&&<UpcomingMealsPage onBack={()=>visit('food')} refresh={refresh}/>} {tab==='pantry'&&<Pantry tick={tick} onLogFood={food=>{setPendingFood(food);visit('add')}}/>} {tab==='shopping'&&<ShoppingHub onBack={()=>visit('food')}/>} {tab==='health'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Health"><Health tick={tick} refresh={refresh}/></ErrorBoundary>} {tab==='data'&&<Data refresh={refresh}/>} {tab==='restaurants'&&<ErrorBoundary label="Restaurants"><Restaurants refresh={refresh} done={()=>visit('food')} openData={()=>visit('data')}/></ErrorBoundary>} </section>
      {tab==='today'&&<button className="universal-fab" aria-label="Add food" onClick={()=>visit('add')}><Plus/></button>}
      <footer>Fizz Health v{VERSION}</footer><nav aria-label="Primary navigation">{navItems.map(({id,I,label})=><button key={id} className={isNavActive(id)?'active':''} aria-current={isNavActive(id)?'page':undefined} onClick={()=>visit(id)}><I/><span>{label}</span></button>)}</nav>
     </main>
    }
    
    function FoodHub({navigate}){
     const remaining=[
      {id:'food-recommendations',Icon:ChefHat,title:'Recommendations',description:'See goal-aware meals ranked from pantry foods and recipes.'},
      {id:'food-upcoming',Icon:ClipboardCopy,title:'Upcoming meals',description:'Review planned meals and restaurant commitments.'},
      {id:'shopping',Icon:Box,title:'Shopping',description:'Build and manage grocery needs from your food plan.'}
     ];
     const subsystems=[
      {id:'add',Icon:Apple,title:'Meals',label:'Open meals'},
      {id:'pantry',Icon:Package,title:'Pantry',label:'Open pantry inventory'},
      {id:'restaurants',Icon:UtensilsCrossed,title:'Restaurants',label:'Open restaurants'},
      {id:'food-planner',Icon:CalendarDays,title:'Meal Planner',label:'Open meal planner'}
     ];
     return <><div className="standard-page-head food-page-head"><span></span><h2>Food</h2><button type="button" onClick={()=>navigate('add')} aria-label="Add food"><Plus/></button></div><header><Brand/><small>FOOD</small><h1>Food</h1><p>Choose where you want to work.</p></header>
     <section className="food-hub-promoted food-subsystem-grid" aria-label="Food subsystems">{subsystems.map(({id,Icon,title,label})=><button key={id} onClick={()=>navigate(id)} aria-label={label}><Icon/><span>{title}</span></button>)}</section>
     <section className="food-hub-grid">{remaining.map(({id,Icon,title,description})=><button key={id} onClick={()=>navigate(id)}><Icon/><div><b>{title}</b><span>{description}</span></div><ChevronRight/></button>)}</section></>
    }
    
    function FoodPlannerPage({tick,onBack}){
     const targets=getTargets();
     return <><div className="standard-form-header planner-standard-header"><button type="button" onClick={onBack} aria-label="Close Meal Planner"><X/></button><div><small>FOOD</small><h2>Meal Planner</h2></div><span aria-hidden="true"/></div><ForwardMealPlanner tick={tick} targets={targets}/></>
    }
    function FoodRecommendationsPage({tick,onBack,onLog}){
     const date=today(),targets=getTargets(date);
     const totals=optionalQuery(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(calories),0) calories,COALESCE(SUM(protein),0) protein,COALESCE(SUM(carbs),0) carbs,COALESCE(SUM(fiber),0) fiber,COALESCE(SUM(fat),0) fat,COALESCE(SUM(saturated_fat),0) saturated_fat FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date=?`,[date])[0]||{};
     return <PageShell eyebrow="FOOD" title="Chef’s Recommendations" description="Ranked for today’s remaining nutrition, pantry pressure, and preferences." onBack={onBack}><ChefRecommendations tick={tick} totals={totals} targets={targets} date={date} onLog={onLog}/></PageShell>
    }
    function UpcomingMealsPage({onBack,refresh}){
     const rows=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' AND planned_local_date>=? ORDER BY planned_at ASC LIMIT 250`,[today()]);
     async function cancel(row){if(!confirm(`Cancel ${row.food_name}?`))return;await run(`UPDATE planned_meals SET status='cancelled',updated_at=? WHERE id=?`,[new Date().toISOString(),row.id]);refresh()}
     return <PageShell eyebrow="FOOD" title="Upcoming Meals" description="Review future meals and restaurant commitments." onBack={onBack}><div className="list upcoming-meals">{rows.length?rows.map(row=><div className="item" key={row.id}><div><b>{row.restaurant_name?`${row.restaurant_name} · ${row.food_name}`:row.food_name}</b><span>{new Date(row.planned_at).toLocaleString([],{weekday:'short',month:'short',day:'numeric',hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'})} · {row.meal_type||'Meal'}</span></div><button className="secondary" onClick={()=>cancel(row)}>Cancel</button></div>):<div className="empty">No upcoming meals are planned.</div>}</div></PageShell>
    }
    
    function ShoppingHub({onBack}){
     return <PageShell eyebrow="FOOD" title="Shopping" description="Shopping tools will live here." onBack={onBack}><section className="shopping-placeholder"><Box/><h2>Shopping is ready for its next build.</h2><p>This placeholder keeps the new Food navigation complete without changing pantry or restaurant functionality.</p></section></PageShell>
    }
    
    function SwipeMealCard({row,onEdit,onDelete,onQuickAdd,timeLabel}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false),timer=useRef(null);
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>10||Math.abs(dy)>10)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-88,Math.min(88,dx)));};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const wasMoved=moved.current,left=offset<-45,right=offset>45;start.current=null;setOffset(left?-82:right?82:0);if(!wasMoved&&!left&&!right){clearTimeout(timer.current);timer.current=setTimeout(()=>onEdit(row),140)}};
     return <div className="timeline-entry"><div className="timeline-time">{timeLabel(row.eaten_at)}</div><div className="swipe-shell meal-swipe-shell"><button type="button" className="swipe-quick" aria-label={`Log ${row.food_name} again`} onClick={()=>onQuickAdd(row)}><Plus/><span>Log again</span></button><button type="button" className="swipe-delete" aria-label={`Delete ${row.food_name}`} onClick={()=>onDelete(row)}><Trash2/><span>Delete</span></button><div className="item meal-row swipe-card" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}><div className="meal-main"><b className="meal-title">{row.food_name}</b><em className={Number(row.nutrition_known)===1?'meal-calories':'meal-calories needs-nutrition'}>{Number(row.nutrition_known)===1?`${Math.round(row.calories)} kcal`:'Needs nutrition'}</em><strong className="quantity-badge">{quantityLabel(row.amount,row.unit)}</strong></div></div></div></div>
    }
    function SwipeArchiveCard({children,onOpen,onArchive,onQuickLog,label}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false);
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>8||Math.abs(dy)>8)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-92,Math.min(92,dx)));};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const movedNow=moved.current,left=offset<-45,right=offset>45;start.current=null;setOffset(left?-88:right?88:0);if(!movedNow&&!left&&!right)onOpen?.()};
     const open=offset!==0;
     return <div className={`swipe-shell discovery-swipe${open?' is-open':''}`}><div className="discovery-swipe-rail" aria-hidden={!open}><button type="button" className="swipe-quick" tabIndex={open?0:-1} aria-label={`Quick log ${label}`} onClick={()=>{setOffset(0);onQuickLog?.()}}><Plus/><span>Log</span></button><button type="button" className="swipe-delete" tabIndex={open?0:-1} aria-label={`Archive ${label}`} onClick={()=>{setOffset(0);onArchive?.()}}><Archive/><span>Archive</span></button></div><div className="swipe-card" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}>{children}</div></div>
    }
    const UNIT_GROUPS={mass:['g','oz','lb'],volume:['ml','l','cup','tbsp','tsp'],count:['serving','item','link','bar','container','package']};
    function unitOptions(base){const u=normalizeUnit(base);if(['g','oz','lb'].includes(u))return UNIT_GROUPS.mass;if(['ml','l','cup','tbsp','tsp'].includes(u))return UNIT_GROUPS.volume;return Array.from(new Set([base||'serving',...UNIT_GROUPS.count]));}
    function convertAmount(amount,from,to){const n=finite(amount),f=normalizeUnit(from),t=normalizeUnit(to);if(f===t)return n;const mass={g:1,oz:28.349523125,lb:453.59237},volume={ml:1,l:1000,cup:236.588,tbsp:14.7868,tsp:4.92892};if(mass[f]&&mass[t])return n*mass[f]/mass[t];if(volume[f]&&volume[t])return n*volume[f]/volume[t];return null;}
    function SummaryRing({label,value,sub,state='green',icon:Icon=HeartPulse,index=0,redrawKey=0,onClick}){
     const [drawn,setDrawn]=useState(0),pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,finite(value)));
     useEffect(()=>{setDrawn(0);const t=setTimeout(()=>setDrawn(pct),160+index*150);return()=>clearTimeout(t)},[pct,index,redrawKey]);
     return <button type="button" className={`summary-ring ${state} ${onClick?'tappable':''}`} onClick={onClick}><div className="summary-ring-visual" style={{'--ring-progress':`${drawn*3.6}deg`}}><Icon/><strong>{Math.round(pct)}%</strong></div><b>{label}</b><span>{sub}</span>{onClick&&<small className="tap-hint">Tap for details</small>}</button>
    }
    function DecisionDetails({title,decision,onClose,children}){
     const [showRaw,setShowRaw]=useState(false),[showTechnical,setShowTechnical]=useState(false);
     if(!decision)return null;
     const validation=validateDecisionTrace(decision,{throwOnError:false});
     if(!validation.valid)return <div className="decision-page" role="alertdialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>DECISION TRACE ERROR</small><h2>{title}</h2></div><button type="button" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close decision details"><X/></button></header><section className="decision-block warning"><h3>Unable to display explanation</h3><p>{validation.errors.join('; ')}</p></section></div></div>;
     const factors=decision.factors||[], dataUsed=decision.dataUsed||[], audit=buildDecisionAudit(decision), explanation=buildDecisionExplanation(decision);
     const formatValue=v=>v==null?'—':typeof v==='object'?JSON.stringify(v):String(v);
     const signed=v=>`${Number(v)>=0?'+':''}${v}`;
     return <div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label={`${title} decision details`}><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>WHY THIS DECISION?</small><h2>{title}</h2><p>{audit.decisionType} · {audit.status}{audit.rank?` · Rank #${audit.rank}`:''}</p></div><button type="button" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close decision details"><X/></button></header>
     <section className="decision-hero"><div><span>Score</span><strong>{decision.score ?? '—'}</strong></div><div><span>Confidence</span><strong>{decision.confidence ?? '—'}%</strong></div><p>{explanation.summary}</p></section>
     <section className="decision-block decision-explanation"><h3>What drove the result</h3><div className="driver-grid"><div><span>Largest positive</span><b className="positive">{explanation.strongestPositive?`${explanation.strongestPositive.label} (+${explanation.strongestPositive.impact})`:'None recorded'}</b></div><div><span>Largest negative</span><b className="negative">{explanation.strongestNegative?`${explanation.strongestNegative.label} (${explanation.strongestNegative.impact})`:'None recorded'}</b></div></div><div className="next-best-action"><span>Best next action</span><strong>{explanation.improvement}</strong></div></section>
     <section className="decision-block confidence-explanation"><h3>How certain is this?</h3><p>{explanation.confidenceSummary}</p><p className={audit.missingCount?'negative':'positive'}>{explanation.completeness}</p></section>
     {explanation.projections.length>0&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Expected effect</h3><div className="projection-list">{explanation.projections.map(row=><div key={row.key}><span>{row.label}</span>{row.kind==='change'?<b>{row.before} <em>→</em> {row.after}</b>:<b>{row.value}</b>}</div>)}</div></section>}
     {explanation.comparison&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Why this rank?</h3><p>{explanation.comparison}</p></section>}
     {children}
     <section className="decision-block action"><h3>Recommended action</h3><p>{decision.action||'Maintain the current plan.'}</p></section>
     <section className="decision-block technical-disclosure"><button type="button" className="trace-toggle" onClick={()=>setShowTechnical(value=>!value)}>{showTechnical?<ChevronUp/>:<ChevronDown/>}{showTechnical?'Hide':'Show'} technical details</button>{showTechnical&&<div className="technical-content">
      {decision.methodology&&<section><h3>Decision method</h3><p>{decision.methodology}</p></section>}
      <div className="trace-audit-strip" aria-label="Decision audit summary"><div><span>Factors</span><b>{audit.factorCount}</b></div><div><span>Sources</span><b>{audit.dataSourceCount}</b></div><div><span>Missing</span><b className={audit.missingCount?'negative':'positive'}>{audit.missingCount}</b></div><div><span>Net factor impact</span><b className={audit.factorImpact>=0?'positive':'negative'}>{signed(audit.factorImpact)}</b></div></div>
      {factors.length>0&&<section><h3>Score audit</h3><div className="score-equation"><span>Inferred starting point <b>{audit.inferredBaseline}</b></span><span>Factor adjustments <b className={audit.factorImpact>=0?'positive':'negative'}>{signed(audit.factorImpact)}</b></span><span>Displayed score <b>{audit.displayedScore}</b></span></div><p className="audit-note">The engine caps the final score between 0 and 100. The starting point is inferred from the saved trace so every recorded adjustment remains visible.</p>{audit.groups.map(group=><div className="factor-group" key={group.category}><header><b>{group.label}</b><strong className={group.netImpact>=0?'positive':'negative'}>{signed(group.netImpact)}</strong></header><div className="factor-list">{group.factors.map((f,i)=><div key={`${f.label}-${i}`}><span>{f.label}</span><b className={Number(f.impact)>0?'positive':Number(f.impact)<0?'negative':'neutral'}>{signed(f.impact)}</b></div>)}</div></div>)}</section>}
      {decision.positive?.length>0&&<section><h3>What helped</h3>{decision.positive.map(x=><p key={x}>✓ {x}</p>)}</section>}{decision.negative?.length>0&&<section><h3>What hurt</h3>{decision.negative.map(x=><p key={x}>− {x}</p>)}</section>}
      {dataUsed.length>0&&<section><h3>Evidence used</h3>{dataUsed.map(x=><p key={x}>• {x}</p>)}</section>}
      <section><h3>Evaluated inputs</h3><div className="decision-data">{Object.entries(decision.inputs||{}).map(([k,v])=><div key={k}><span>{k.replaceAll('_',' ')}</span><b>{formatValue(v)}</b></div>)}</div></section>
      {decision.missing?.length>0&&<section className="technical-warning"><h3>Missing information</h3>{decision.missing.map(x=><p key={x}>{x}</p>)}</section>}
     </div>}</section>
     <section className="decision-block trace-raw"><button type="button" className="trace-toggle" onClick={()=>setShowRaw(value=>!value)}>{showRaw?<ChevronUp/>:<ChevronDown/>}{showRaw?'Hide':'Show'} raw decision trace</button>{showRaw&&<pre>{serializeDecisionTrace(decision)}</pre>}</section>
     <footer className="decision-meta">Subject {String(decision.subjectId)} · Calculated {new Date(decision.evaluatedAt||Date.now()).toLocaleString()} · Engine {decision.engineVersion||VERSION} · Rules {decision.rulesVersion||'not recorded'}</footer></div></div>
    }
    
    function DecisionSimulator({totals,plannedTotals,targets,definitions,steps,coverage,onClose}){
     const nutrientFields=[['calories','Calories','kcal'],['protein','Protein','g'],['carbs','Carbohydrates','g'],['fat','Fat','g'],['fiber','Fiber','g'],['saturated_fat','Saturated fat','g'],['sodium','Sodium','mg'],['added_sugar','Added sugar','g'],['alcohol','Alcohol','servings']];
     const emptyNutrition=()=>Object.fromEntries(nutrientFields.map(([key])=>[key,'0']));
     const defaultMeal=(label,values={})=>({id:`option-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,label,nutrition:{...emptyNutrition(),...values}});
     const [mode,setMode]=useState('meal'),[form,setForm]=useState({label:'Hypothetical meal',additionalSteps:'0',add:{...emptyNutrition(),calories:'400',protein:'30',fiber:'8',saturated_fat:'3'},remove:emptyNutrition()}),[options,setOptions]=useState([defaultMeal('Option A',{calories:'500',protein:'35',fiber:'8',saturated_fat:'4'}),defaultMeal('Option B',{calories:'650',protein:'30',fiber:'4',saturated_fat:'9'})]),[result,setResult]=useState(null),[memoryNotice,setMemoryNotice]=useState(null),[memoryCount,setMemoryCount]=useState(()=>readDecisionMemory().length);
     const set=(group,key,value)=>setForm(x=>group?({...x,[group]:{...x[group],[key]:value}}):({...x,[key]:value}));
     const selectMode=next=>{setMode(next);setResult(null);setForm(x=>({...x,label:next==='steps'?'Additional walk':next==='substitution'?'Meal substitution':'Hypothetical meal',additionalSteps:next==='steps'?'3000':'0'}))};
     const nutritionFrom=group=>Object.fromEntries(nutrientFields.map(([key])=>[key,finite(form[group][key])]));
     const optionNutrition=option=>Object.fromEntries(nutrientFields.map(([key])=>[key,finite(option.nutrition[key])]));
     const updateOption=(index,key,value)=>setOptions(list=>list.map((option,i)=>i===index?(key==='label'?{...option,label:value}:{...option,nutrition:{...option.nutrition,[key]:value}}):option));
     const addOption=()=>setOptions(list=>list.length>=4?list:[...list,defaultMeal(`Option ${String.fromCharCode(65+list.length)}`,{calories:'400',protein:'25',fiber:'6',saturated_fat:'4'})]);
     const removeOption=index=>setOptions(list=>list.length<=2?list:list.filter((_,i)=>i!==index));
     const runSimulation=()=>{const next=mode==='compare'?evaluateDecision('comparison',{scenarios:options.map(option=>({id:option.id,label:option.label||'Unnamed option',mode:'meal',nutritionDelta:optionNutrition(option)})),totals,plannedTotals,targets,definitions,steps,coverage}):evaluateDecision('simulation',{scenario:{id:`simulation-${Date.now()}`,mode,label:form.label||'Hypothetical scenario',nutritionDelta:mode==='steps'?{}:nutritionFrom('add'),removeNutrition:mode==='substitution'?nutritionFrom('remove'):{},additionalSteps:finite(form.additionalSteps)},totals,plannedTotals,targets,definitions,steps,coverage});const trace=mode==='compare'?next.trace:next.trace;const remembered=rememberDecision(trace,{source:mode==='compare'?'meal_comparison':'simulation'});setMemoryNotice(remembered.match);setMemoryCount(remembered.records.length);setResult(next)};
     const metricClass=value=>value>0?'positive':value<0?'negative':'neutral'; const signed=value=>`${value>0?'+':''}${Math.round(value*10)/10}`;
     const NutritionInputs=({group,title})=><fieldset className="simulation-fieldset"><legend>{title}</legend><div className="simulation-grid expanded">{nutrientFields.map(([key,label,unit])=><label key={`${group}-${key}`}>{label} ({unit})<input type="number" step="any" inputMode="decimal" value={form[group][key]} onChange={e=>set(group,key,e.target.value)}/></label>)}</div></fieldset>;
     return <div className="decision-page simulation-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Decision Simulator"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>SIMULATION — NOT LOGGED</small><h2>What if?</h2><p>Preview, compare, or improve choices before changing your log.</p></div><button type="button" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close simulation"><X/></button></header><div className="simulation-tabs four"><button className={mode==='meal'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('meal')}>Add meal</button><button className={mode==='substitution'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('substitution')}>Substitute</button><button className={mode==='compare'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('compare')}>Compare</button><button className={mode==='steps'?'active':''} onClick={()=>selectMode('steps')}>Walk more</button></div>{mode==='compare'?<section className="comparison-options">{options.map((option,index)=><fieldset className="comparison-option" key={option.id}><legend>Option {index+1}</legend><div className="comparison-option-head"><label>Meal name<input value={option.label} onChange={e=>updateOption(index,'label',e.target.value)}/></label>{options.length>2&&<button type="button" onClick={()=>removeOption(index)} aria-label={`Remove ${option.label}`}><Trash2/></button>}</div><div className="simulation-grid expanded">{nutrientFields.map(([key,label,unit])=><label key={`${option.id}-${key}`}>{label} ({unit})<input type="number" step="any" inputMode="decimal" value={option.nutrition[key]} onChange={e=>updateOption(index,key,e.target.value)}/></label>)}</div></fieldset>)}{options.length<4&&<button type="button" className="add-comparison" onClick={addOption}><Plus/> Add option</button>}</section>:<section className="simulation-form"><label>Scenario name<input value={form.label} onChange={e=>set(null,'label',e.target.value)}/></label>{mode==='meal'&&<NutritionInputs group="add" title="Meal nutrition"/>}{mode==='substitution'&&<><NutritionInputs group="remove" title="Remove from current plan"/><NutritionInputs group="add" title="Add instead"/></>}{mode==='steps'&&<label>Additional steps<input type="number" inputMode="numeric" value={form.additionalSteps} onChange={e=>set(null,'additionalSteps',e.target.value)}/></label>}{mode!=='steps'&&<label className="optional-steps">Optional additional steps<input type="number" inputMode="numeric" value={form.additionalSteps} onChange={e=>set(null,'additionalSteps',e.target.value)}/></label>}</section>}<button className="primary simulation-run" onClick={runSimulation}>{mode==='compare'?'Compare meals':'Run simulation'}</button><section className="decision-memory-bar"><div><b>Decision memory</b><span>{memoryCount} saved decision{memoryCount===1?'':'s'} on this device</span></div>{memoryCount>0&&<button type="button" onClick={()=>{clearDecisionMemory();setMemoryCount(0);setMemoryNotice(null)}}>Clear</button>}</section>{memoryNotice&&<section className={`decision-memory-notice ${memoryNotice.stale?'stale':memoryNotice.match}`}><b>{memoryNotice.match==='exact'?'Previously evaluated':memoryNotice.match==='context'?'What changed':'New decision'}</b><span>{memoryNotice.summary}</span>{memoryNotice.record&&<small>Prior score {memoryNotice.record.trace.score} · {new Date(memoryNotice.record.recordedAt).toLocaleString()}</small>}</section>}{result&&mode==='compare'&&<><section className="simulation-banner"><b>Comparison only</b><span>No option was logged or added to your plan.</span></section><section className="comparison-winner"><span>Best overall choice</span><strong>{result.winner.scenario.label}</strong><p>{result.trace.comparison.summary}</p></section><section className="comparison-ranking">{result.ranked.map(entry=><article className={entry.rank===1?'winner':''} key={entry.scenario.id}><b>#{entry.rank} {entry.scenario.label}</b><div><span>Score <strong>{entry.score}</strong></span><span>LDL <strong>{entry.ldl}</strong></span><span>Limits exceeded <strong>{entry.exceeded}</strong></span></div>{entry.rank>1&&<small>{result.winner.score-entry.score} points behind winner</small>}</article>)}</section><section className="comparison-metrics"><h3>Metric-by-metric</h3>{nutrientFields.map(([key,label,unit])=><div key={key}><span>{label}</span>{result.ranked.map(entry=>{const row=entry.simulation.nutrientImpacts.find(x=>x.key===key);const value=row?.after??finite(totals[key])+finite(plannedTotals[key]);return <b key={entry.scenario.id}>{Math.round(value*10)/10} {unit}</b>})}</div>)}</section><DecisionDetails title={result.winner.scenario.label} decision={result.trace} onClose={()=>setResult(null)}/></>}{result&&mode!=='compare'&&<><section className="simulation-banner"><b>Simulation only</b><span>No meals, steps, pantry quantities, or health records were changed.</span></section><section className="simulation-summary"><div className="metric-card"><span>Decision score</span><strong>{result.trace.score}</strong><em>{result.trace.status}</em></div><div className="metric-card"><span>LDL Support</span><strong>{result.after.ldl.score}</strong><em className={metricClass(result.delta.ldl)}>{signed(result.delta.ldl)}</em></div><div className="metric-card"><span>Step likelihood</span><strong>{result.after.steps.score}%</strong><em className={metricClass(result.delta.stepsLikelihood)}>{signed(result.delta.stepsLikelihood)}</em></div></section>{result.nutrientImpacts.length>0&&<section className="decision-block simulation-impact"><h3>Projected daily totals</h3><div className="impact-table">{result.nutrientImpacts.map(row=><div key={row.key}><span>{row.label}</span><b>{Math.round(row.before*10)/10} → {Math.round(row.after*10)/10} {row.unit}</b><em className={metricClass(row.behavior==='limit'?-row.delta:row.delta)}>{signed(row.delta)}</em><small className={row.status==='exceeded'?'negative':row.status==='goal_met'?'positive':'neutral'}>{row.status.replaceAll('_',' ')}</small></div>)}</div></section>}{result.suggestions.length>0&&<section className="decision-block simulation-suggestions"><h3>Best improvements</h3>{result.suggestions.map((item,index)=><p key={item}><b>{index+1}</b>{item}</p>)}</section>}<section className="before-after"><div><span>Top priority</span><b>{result.before.nutrients[0]?.definition?.label||'—'} → {result.after.nutrients[0]?.definition?.label||'—'}</b></div></section><DecisionDetails title={result.scenario.label} decision={result.trace} onClose={()=>setResult(null)}/></>}</div></div>
    }
    function recipeSnapshotFrom(runQuery,recipeId){
     const recipeRows=runQuery(`SELECT * FROM recipes WHERE recipe_id=? OR recipe_name=(SELECT recipe_name FROM recipes WHERE recipe_id=? LIMIT 1) ORDER BY id`,[recipeId,recipeId]);
     if(!recipeRows.length)return null;
     const foods=runQuery('SELECT * FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY food_id');
     return buildRecipeSnapshot(recipeRows,foods);
    }
    async function backfillCurrentRecipeMealsOnce(){
     const flag='recipe_nutrient_backfill_141037',todayKey=today(),now=new Date().toISOString();
     const done=query('SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key=?',[flag])[0]?.value;
     if(done==='1')return 0;
     let updated=0;
     await transaction(async db=>{
      for(const table of ['meals','planned_meals']){
       const cols=new Set(db.query(`PRAGMA table_info(${table})`).map(x=>x.name));
       const dateWhere=table==='meals'?"(consumed_local_date=? OR (consumed_local_date IS NULL AND substr(eaten_at,1,10)=?))":"status='planned'";
       const dateParams=table==='meals'?[todayKey,todayKey]:[];
       const rows=db.query(`SELECT id,food_id,amount FROM ${table} WHERE food_id LIKE 'recipe:%' AND ${dateWhere}`,dateParams);
       for(const row of rows){
        const recipeId=String(row.food_id||'').slice(7),snap=recipeSnapshotFrom((sql,params)=>db.query(sql,params),recipeId);
        if(!snap||snap.issues?.length)continue;
        const qty=Number(row.amount)||1,scaled=Object.fromEntries(NUTRIENT_KEYS.map(k=>[k,finite(snap.nutrition[k])*qty]));
        const setSql=[],params=[];
        for(const key of NUTRIENT_KEYS)if(cols.has(key)){setSql.push(`${key}=?`);params.push(scaled[key])}
        if(cols.has('nutrition_known'))setSql.push('nutrition_known=1');
        if(cols.has('nutrition_source')){setSql.push('nutrition_source=?');params.push('recipe_snapshot_backfill')}
        if(cols.has('notes')){setSql.push('notes=?');params.push(compactRecipeMealNotes({...snap,nutrition:scaled}))}
        if(cols.has('updated_at')){setSql.push('updated_at=?');params.push(now)}
        if(setSql.length){params.push(row.id);db.run(`UPDATE ${table} SET ${setSql.join(',')} WHERE id=?`,params);updated++}
       }
      }
      db.run('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO settings(key,value) VALUES (?,?)',[flag,'1']);
     });
     return updated;
    }
    function recipeSnapshot(recipeId){return recipeSnapshotFrom(query,recipeId)}
    // Canonical recipe log payload includes saturated_fat,cholesterol,notes for both planned and consumed records.
    function RecipePantryBatchEditor({recipe,onClose,onSaved}){
     const locations=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM pantry_locations WHERE COALESCE(active,1)=1 ORDER BY COALESCE(is_current,0) DESC,name COLLATE NOCASE`);
     const [saving,setSaving]=useState(false),[error,setError]=useState('');
     async function save(event){
      event.preventDefault();
      if(saving)return;
      setError('');
      const form=new FormData(event.currentTarget),quantity=Number(form.get('quantity_grams'));
      if(!Number.isFinite(quantity)||quantity<=0){setError('Enter the total prepared gram weight.');return}
      const unit='g',now=new Date().toISOString(),pantryId=`P-RECIPE-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7)}`,foodId=`recipe:${recipe.recipe_id}`;
      setSaving(true);
      try{
