       let savedRecord=null;
       await transaction(async db=>{
        const existingFood=db.query('SELECT food_id FROM foods WHERE food_id=? LIMIT 1',[foodId])[0];
        if(!existingFood)insertRecord(db,'foods',{food_id:foodId,name:recipe.recipe_name,category:'Prepared recipe',default_serving:100,unit,nutrition_known:0,nutrition_source:'recipe_prepared_batch',notes:`Prepared pantry food linked to recipe ${recipe.recipe_name}`,created_at:now,updated_at:now});
        else db.run('UPDATE foods SET name=?,category=?,unit=?,updated_at=? WHERE food_id=?',[recipe.recipe_name,'Prepared recipe',unit,now,foodId]);
        insertRecord(db,'pantry',{pantry_id:pantryId,item:recipe.recipe_name,food_id:foodId,brand:'Prepared recipe',on_hand:'Yes',quantity,unit,opened:form.get('opened')||'Yes',opened_date:form.get('prepared_date')||localDateKey(),purchase_date:form.get('prepared_date')||localDateKey(),expiration:form.get('expiration')||null,location:form.get('location')||locations[0]?.name||'Refrigerator',status:'Active',priority:'Use first',category:'Prepared recipe',notes:[`Prepared from recipe ${recipe.recipe_name}`,form.get('notes')].filter(Boolean).join(' · '),verified_at:now,quantity_accuracy:'verified'});
        savedRecord=db.query('SELECT * FROM pantry WHERE pantry_id=? LIMIT 1',[pantryId])[0]||null;
        if(!savedRecord)throw new Error('Pantry save failed before the transaction completed.');
        try{insertRecord(db,'pantry_events',{pantry_id:pantryId,event_type:'prepared_recipe_batch',quantity,unit,notes:`Prepared from recipe ${recipe.recipe_name}`,event_at:now})}catch(eventError){console.warn('Prepared batch event history was not recorded:',eventError)}
       });
       const persisted=query('SELECT * FROM pantry WHERE pantry_id=? LIMIT 1',[pantryId])[0];
       if(!persisted)throw new Error('The prepared batch was not retained in Pantry.');
       onSaved?.(persisted);
      }catch(err){setError(err instanceof Error?err.message:String(err))}finally{setSaving(false)}
     }
     return <div className="modal-backdrop recipe-pantry-batch" onClick={onClose}><form className="panel fixed-editor pantry-manual-editor" onSubmit={save} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel"><X/></button><div><small>PREPARED RECIPE</small><h3>Add {recipe.recipe_name} to Pantry</h3><em>Track the finished food by total gram weight</em></div><button type="submit" className="header-icon-action save-action" disabled={saving} aria-label="Save prepared batch"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Total gram weight<input name="quantity_grams" type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0.1" step="0.1" autoFocus required placeholder="e.g. 1250"/><small>The pantry will track the finished recipe in grams.</small></label><label>Prepared date<input name="prepared_date" type="date" defaultValue={localDateKey()}/></label><label>Expiration / best-by<input name="expiration" type="date"/></label><label>Storage location<select name="location" defaultValue={locations[0]?.name||'Refrigerator'}>{locations.length?locations.map(l=><option key={l.location_id||l.name}>{l.name}</option>):<><option>Refrigerator</option><option>Freezer</option><option>Pantry</option></>}</select></label><label>Package state<select name="opened" defaultValue="Yes"><option>Yes</option><option>No</option></select></label><label>Notes<textarea name="notes" placeholder="Optional batch notes"/></label><section className="decision-block"><h3>Pantry accounting</h3><p>Fizz Health will create a Pantry item for {recipe.recipe_name} and track the total prepared gram weight. The source ingredients will not be individually decremented.</p></section>{error&&<div className="inline-error" role="alert">{error}</div>}</div></form></div>
    }
    const MEAL_CATEGORIES=['Any','Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner','Snack','Appetizer','Side','Dessert','Beverage','Condiment'];
    const CONSUMPTION_ROLES=[['standalone','Standalone Food'],['component','Meal Component'],['both','Both']];
    function PromoteToMealEditor({sourceType,source,onClose,onSaved}){
     const sourceName=sourceType==='recipe'?source.recipe_name:source.name;
     const [title,setTitle]=useState(sourceName||''),[category,setCategory]=useState('Any'),[saving,setSaving]=useState(false),[error,setError]=useState('');
     async function save(event){
      event.preventDefault();
      const clean=title.trim();if(!clean)return setError('Enter a meal name.');
      setSaving(true);setError('');
      try{
       const now=new Date().toISOString(),mealId=`M${Date.now()}`;
       let nutrition={},componentAmount=1,componentUnit='serving',componentId='',componentName=sourceName;
       if(sourceType==='recipe'){
        nutrition=source.nutrition||{};componentId=source.recipe_id;
       }else{
        componentAmount=consumptionServing(source);componentUnit=source.unit||'serving';componentId=source.food_id;
        nutrition=nutritionFor(source,componentAmount,componentUnit);
       }
       await transaction(async db=>{
        insertRecord(db,'meal_definitions',{meal_id:mealId,title:clean,category,icon:'utensils',notes:`Promoted from ${sourceType}: ${sourceName}`,...nutrientSnapshot(nutrition),created_at:now,updated_at:now});
        insertRecord(db,'meal_components',{meal_id:mealId,component_type:sourceType,component_id:componentId,component_name:componentName,amount:componentAmount,unit:componentUnit,optional:0,...nutrientSnapshot(nutrition),sort_order:0});
       });
       onSaved?.({meal_id:mealId,title:clean,category});
      }catch(err){setError(err instanceof Error?err.message:String(err));setSaving(false)}
     }
     return <div className="modal-backdrop promotion-backdrop" onClick={onClose}><form className="panel fixed-editor promotion-editor" onSubmit={save} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head standard-editor-head"><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel promotion"><X/></button><div><small>{sourceType.toUpperCase()} → MEAL</small><h3>Promote to Meal</h3></div><button type="submit" className="header-icon-action save-action" disabled={saving} aria-label="Create classified meal"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Meal name<input value={title} onChange={e=>setTitle(e.target.value)} required/></label><label>Meal category<select value={category} onChange={e=>setCategory(e.target.value)}>{MEAL_CATEGORIES.map(value=><option key={value} value={value}>{value}</option>)}</select><small>Every Meal must have a category before it enters Meals or the Meal Planner.</small></label><section className="decision-block"><h3>Source</h3><p>This Meal will reference the original {sourceType} “{sourceName}.” The source remains unchanged, and nothing will be logged or consumed.</p></section>{error&&<div className="inline-error" role="alert">{error}</div>}</div></form></div>
    }
    function FoodRecipeDetails({item,onClose,onSaved}){
     const isRecipe=item?.type==='recipe',snap=isRecipe?recipeSnapshot(item.recipe_id):null,source=isRecipe?snap:item;
     const [ingredient,setIngredient]=useState(null),[error,setError]=useState(''),[success,setSuccess]=useState(''),[editing,setEditing]=useState(false),[addingBatch,setAddingBatch]=useState(false),[batchRevision,setBatchRevision]=useState(0),[promoting,setPromoting]=useState(false),[role,setRole]=useState(()=>item?.consumption_role||'both'),[savingRole,setSavingRole]=useState(false);
     if(!source)return <div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner food-detail-page"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>RECIPE</small><h2>Recipe unavailable</h2></div><button onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close"><X/></button></header><div className="inline-error">This recipe could not be resolved. Review its ingredient links and quantities.</div></div></div>;
     const n=isRecipe?source.nutrition:nutritionFor(source,consumptionServing(source),source.unit);
     const preparedBatches=isRecipe?optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM pantry WHERE food_id=? AND COALESCE(quantity,0)>0 ORDER BY COALESCE(expiration,'9999-12-31'),COALESCE(purchase_date,opened_date,'9999-12-31')`,[`recipe:${source.recipe_id}`]):[];
     const preparedTotal=preparedBatches.reduce((sum,row)=>normalizeUnit(row.unit)==='g'?sum+finite(row.quantity):sum,0);
     async function saveRole(){if(isRecipe)return;setSavingRole(true);setError('');try{await run('UPDATE foods SET consumption_role=?,updated_at=? WHERE food_id=?',[role,new Date().toISOString(),source.food_id]);setSuccess('Consumption role saved.');onSaved?.();window.setTimeout(()=>setSuccess(''),2200)}catch(err){setError(err instanceof Error?err.message:String(err))}finally{setSavingRole(false)}}
     return <><div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner food-detail-page"><header className="decision-detail-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close"><X/></button><div><small>{isRecipe?'RECIPE':'FOOD'}</small><h2>{isRecipe?source.recipe_name:source.name}</h2></div>{isRecipe?<div className="detail-head-actions"><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={()=>setAddingBatch(true)} aria-label="Add prepared recipe to pantry"><Package/></button><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={()=>setEditing(true)} aria-label="Edit recipe"><Pencil/></button></div>:<span/>}</header><section className="food-detail-summary"><div><span>Calories</span><strong>{Math.round(n.calories||0)}</strong></div><div><span>Protein</span><strong>{Math.round(n.protein||0)}g</strong></div><div><span>Fiber</span><strong>{Math.round(n.fiber||0)}g</strong></div><div><span>Sat fat</span><strong>{Math.round((n.saturated_fat||0)*10)/10}g</strong></div></section>{!isRecipe&&<section className="decision-block metadata-block"><h3>Consumption Role</h3><label>How this food may be used<select value={role} onChange={e=>setRole(e.target.value)}>{CONSUMPTION_ROLES.map(([value,label])=><option key={value} value={value}>{label}</option>)}</select></label><p>{role==='component'?'Meal Components remain available inside meals and recipes but will never be recommended as a standalone meal.':role==='standalone'?'Standalone Foods may be recommended and promoted as complete meals.':'Both allows standalone recommendations and use as a meal component.'}</p><button type="button" className="secondary" disabled={savingRole} onClick={saveRole}>{savingRole?'Saving…':'Save Consumption Role'}</button></section>}{!isRecipe&&item.pantry_quantity!=null&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Pantry status</h3><p>{item.pantry_quantity} {item.pantry_unit||item.unit} on hand{item.opened==='Yes'?' · Open':''}{item.expiration?` · Expires ${item.expiration}`:''}</p></section>}{isRecipe&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Prepared pantry inventory</h3><p>{preparedBatches.length?`${preparedTotal>0?`${preparedTotal} g across `:''}${preparedBatches.length} prepared batch${preparedBatches.length===1?'':'es'}.`:'No prepared batches are currently tracked.'}</p><button type="button" className="secondary" onClick={()=>setAddingBatch(true)}><Package/> Add prepared batch to pantry</button></section>}{isRecipe&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Ingredients</h3><div className="ingredient-list">{source.ingredients.map((r,i)=><button key={`${r.ingredient_name}-${i}`} onClick={()=>setIngredient(r)}><span>{r.ingredient_name}</span><b>{quantityLabel(r.resolved_amount,r.resolved_unit)}</b></button>)}</div></section>}{success&&<div className="status recipe-pantry-success">{success}</div>}{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}<div className="detail-actions metadata-actions"><button type="button" className="primary" onClick={()=>setPromoting(true)}><UtensilsCrossed/> Promote to Meal</button></div>{ingredient&&<div className="ingredient-detail"><header><div><small>INGREDIENT</small><h3>{ingredient.ingredient_name}</h3></div><button onClick={()=>setIngredient(null)}><X/></button></header><p>{quantityLabel(ingredient.resolved_amount,ingredient.resolved_unit)}</p><div className="decision-data"><div><span>Calories</span><b>{Math.round(finite(ingredient.calories))}</b></div><div><span>Protein</span><b>{Math.round(finite(ingredient.protein))}g</b></div><div><span>Fiber</span><b>{Math.round(finite(ingredient.fiber))}g</b></div></div></div>}</div></div>{promoting&&<PromoteToMealEditor sourceType={isRecipe?'recipe':'food'} source={source} onClose={()=>setPromoting(false)} onSaved={meal=>{setPromoting(false);setSuccess(`${meal.title} created as a ${meal.category} Meal.`);onSaved?.();window.setTimeout(()=>setSuccess(''),3200)}}/>}{editing&&<RecipeCreateEditor recipe={{recipe_id:source.recipe_id,recipe_name:source.recipe_name}} foods={optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE`)} onClose={()=>setEditing(false)} onSaved={()=>{setEditing(false);onSaved?.()}}/>}{addingBatch&&<RecipePantryBatchEditor recipe={source} onClose={()=>setAddingBatch(false)} onSaved={(batch)=>{setAddingBatch(false);setBatchRevision(x=>x+1);setSuccess(`Added ${batch.quantity} ${batch.unit} of ${batch.item} to Pantry.`);window.setTimeout(()=>setSuccess(''),3200);onSaved?.()}}/>}</>
    }
    function restaurantDecision(meal,context={}){return evaluateDecision('restaurant',{meal,remaining:context.remaining||{},daily:context.daily||{},targets:context.targets||{}})}
    function restaurantEvidence(meal){
     const source=String(meal.source||'').toLowerCase(),basis=String(meal.confidence_basis||'').toLowerCase();
     if(/restaurant|manufacturer|published|verified/.test(source+' '+basis)||meal.verified_nutrients_json)return {level:'Restaurant verified',detail:'Published nutrition supplied by the restaurant',tone:'verified'};
     if(/photo|image|visual/.test(source+' '+basis))return {level:'Photo enhanced',detail:'Menu description plus meal-photo evidence',tone:'photo'};
     return {level:'Menu description only',detail:'AI estimate from the item name and menu description',tone:'menu'};
    }
    function RestaurantConfidenceDetails({meal,onClose}){
     const detail=explainNutritionConfidence(meal),label=x=>String(x).replaceAll('_',' ');
     return <div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner confidence-breakdown-page"><div className="standard-page-head confidence-page-head"><button onClick={onClose} aria-label="Back"><ChevronLeft/></button><h2>Confidence breakdown</h2><span/></div><section className="confidence-hero"><strong>{detail.score}%</strong><div><b>{detail.band} confidence</b><span>{detail.summary}</span></div></section><section className="decision-block"><h3>Evidence source</h3><p>{detail.source}</p><small>{detail.basis}</small></section><section className="decision-block confidence-field-groups"><div><h3>Verified</h3>{detail.verified.length?<ul>{detail.verified.map(x=><li key={x}>{label(x)}</li>)}</ul>:<p>No nutrient fields are marked as independently verified.</p>}</div><div><h3>Estimated</h3>{detail.estimated.length?<ul>{detail.estimated.map(x=><li key={x}>{label(x)}</li>)}</ul>:<p>No estimated nutrient fields were identified.</p>}</div></section>{detail.assumptions.length>0&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Assumptions</h3><ul>{detail.assumptions.map(x=><li key={x}>{x}</li>)}</ul></section>}<section className="decision-block"><h3>Why confidence was reduced</h3>{detail.deductions.length?<ul>{detail.deductions.map(x=><li key={x}>{x}</li>)}</ul>:<p>No material confidence deductions were found.</p>}</section><section className="decision-block"><h3>How to improve it</h3>{detail.improvements.length?<ul>{detail.improvements.map(x=><li key={x}>{x}</li>)}</ul>:<p>This item already has strong supporting evidence.</p>}</section></div></div>
    }
    function RestaurantMealDetails({meal,restaurant,onClose,onSaved,onEnrich}){
     const [decision,setDecision]=useState(false),[logChoice,setLogChoice]=useState(false),[saving,setSaving]=useState(false);const evidence=restaurantEvidence(meal);
     async function save(asPlan){setSaving(true);const now=new Date(),iso=now.toISOString();try{if(asPlan)await transaction(async db=>insertRecord(db,'planned_meals',{planned_at:iso,planned_local_date:today(),meal_type:'Dinner',food_name:meal.meal_name,amount:1,unit:'serving',...nutrientSnapshot(canonicalNutrition(meal)),notes:meal.notes||'',status:'planned',created_at:iso,updated_at:iso,source_type:'restaurant',restaurant_name:restaurant.name,restaurant_meal_id:meal.id,menu_price:meal.price??null}));else await run(`INSERT INTO meals(eaten_at,created_at,updated_at,consumed_local_date,timezone_offset_minutes,meal_type,food_id,food_name,amount,unit,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,notes,nutrition_known,restaurant_name,restaurant_meal_id,source,source_record_id) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[iso,iso,iso,today(),-now.getTimezoneOffset(),'Dinner',`restaurant:${meal.id}`,meal.meal_name,1,'serving',meal.calories||0,meal.protein||0,meal.carbs||0,meal.fiber||0,meal.fat||0,meal.saturated_fat||0,JSON.stringify({nutrition_snapshot:{calories:meal.calories,protein:meal.protein,carbs:meal.carbs,fiber:meal.fiber,fat:meal.fat,saturated_fat:meal.saturated_fat},confidence:meal.confidence,evidence_level:evidence.level,assumptions:meal.notes,preparation:meal.preparation}),meal.nutrition_known||0,restaurant.name,meal.id,'restaurant',`restaurant-${meal.id}-${Date.now()}`]);onSaved?.();onClose()}finally{setSaving(false)}}
     return <>{decision?<RestaurantConfidenceDetails meal={meal} onClose={()=>setDecision(false)}/>:<div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner food-detail-page"><div className="standard-page-head restaurant-detail-standard-head"><button onClick={onClose} aria-label="Back"><ChevronLeft/></button><h2>{restaurant.name}</h2><button onClick={onEnrich} aria-label="Improve menu item"><Pencil/></button></div><header className="decision-detail-head restaurant-detail-title"><div><small>{restaurant.name}</small><h2>{meal.meal_name}</h2></div></header><button className="restaurant-score-detail" onClick={()=>setDecision(true)}><strong>{restaurantScore(meal)}</strong><span>{meal.confidence!=null?`${Math.round(Number(meal.confidence)*100)}% confidence`:'Confidence unknown'}<br/><u>View breakdown</u></span></button><section className="evidence-panel"><small>EVIDENCE</small><b>{evidence.level}</b><span>{evidence.detail}</span><ul><li>Menu name and description</li>{evidence.tone==='photo'&&<li>Meal-photo portion evidence</li>}{evidence.tone==='verified'&&<li>Restaurant-published nutrition</li>}</ul></section><section className="food-detail-summary"><div><span>Calories</span><strong>{Math.round(finite(meal.calories))}</strong></div><div><span>Protein</span><strong>{Math.round(finite(meal.protein))}g</strong></div><div><span>Fiber</span><strong>{Math.round(finite(meal.fiber))}g</strong></div><div><span>Sat fat</span><strong>{Math.round(finite(meal.saturated_fat)*10)/10}g</strong></div></section>{meal.preparation&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Preparation</h3><p>{meal.preparation}</p></section>}{meal.ingredients_json&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Ingredients</h3><p>{(()=>{try{return JSON.parse(meal.ingredients_json).join(', ')}catch{return meal.ingredients_json}})()}</p></section>}<button className="primary restaurant-log-action" onClick={()=>setLogChoice(true)}>Log meal</button>{logChoice&&<div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={()=>setLogChoice(false)}><div className="panel action-choice" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head"><h3>{meal.meal_name}</h3><button onClick={()=>setLogChoice(false)}><X/></button></div><p>Choose what should happen with this restaurant item.</p><button className="primary" disabled={saving} onClick={()=>save(false)}>Consume now</button><button className="secondary" disabled={saving} onClick={()=>save(true)}>Plan for later</button></div></div>}</div></div>}</>
    }
    
    const NUTRIENT_BARS=[
     {key:'protein',label:'Protein',unit:'g',icon:Dumbbell,behavior:'goal',priority:100},
     {key:'fiber',label:'Fiber',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:98},
     {key:'saturated_fat',label:'Saturated fat',unit:'g',icon:HeartPulse,behavior:'limit',priority:97},
     {key:'calories',label:'Calories',unit:'kcal',icon:Activity,behavior:'budget',priority:92},
     {key:'sodium',label:'Sodium',unit:'mg',icon:Activity,behavior:'limit',priority:88},
     {key:'added_sugar',label:'Added sugar',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'limit',priority:84},
     {key:'potassium',label:'Potassium',unit:'mg',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:78},
     {key:'omega_3',label:'Omega-3',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:76},
     {key:'carbs',label:'Carbohydrates',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'budget',priority:70},
     {key:'net_carbs',label:'Net carbs',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'budget',priority:68},
     {key:'fat',label:'Total fat',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'budget',priority:66},
     {key:'monounsaturated_fat',label:'Monounsaturated fat',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:58},
     {key:'polyunsaturated_fat',label:'Polyunsaturated fat',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:56},
     {key:'total_sugar',label:'Total sugar',unit:'g',icon:Activity,behavior:'budget',priority:54},
     {key:'cholesterol',label:'Cholesterol',unit:'mg',icon:HeartPulse,behavior:'limit',priority:52},
     {key:'calcium',label:'Calcium',unit:'mg',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:48},
     {key:'iron',label:'Iron',unit:'mg',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:46},
     {key:'magnesium',label:'Magnesium',unit:'mg',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:45},
     {key:'vitamin_d',label:'Vitamin D',unit:'mcg',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:44},
     {key:'vitamin_c',label:'Vitamin C',unit:'mg',icon:Activity,behavior:'goal',priority:42},
     {key:'alcohol',label:'Alcohol',unit:'g',icon:AlertTriangle,behavior:'limit',priority:40},
     {key:'caffeine',label:'Caffeine',unit:'mg',icon:Activity,behavior:'budget',priority:38}
    ];
    const ALWAYS_VISIBLE_NUTRIENTS=CRITICAL_VISIBLE;
    function orderNutrients(decisions){const sorted=[...decisions].sort((a,b)=>b.decision.priorityScore-a.decision.priorityScore);const visible=sorted.slice(0,10);for(const key of ALWAYS_VISIBLE_NUTRIENTS){if(visible.some(x=>x.definition.key===key))continue;const required=sorted.find(x=>x.definition.key===key);if(required){const replace=[...visible].reverse().findIndex(x=>!ALWAYS_VISIBLE_NUTRIENTS.includes(x.definition.key));const idx=replace<0?visible.length-1:visible.length-1-replace;visible[idx]=required}}const visibleKeys=new Set(visible.map(x=>x.definition.key));const ordered=[...visible.sort((a,b)=>b.decision.priorityScore-a.decision.priorityScore),...sorted.filter(x=>!visibleKeys.has(x.definition.key))];return ordered.map((x,index)=>({...x,displayRank:index+1,rankingReason:`Ranked by current urgency score ${Math.round(x.decision.priorityScore)} using health importance, consumed and planned intake, target/limit distance, and time remaining.${ALWAYS_VISIBLE_NUTRIENTS.includes(x.definition.key)?' This nutrient is guaranteed a visible Top 10 position but is not pinned to a fixed rank.':''}`}))}
    function nutrientState(def,projected,target,max){const behavior=def.behavior||'goal',v=finite(projected),goal=finite(target),ceiling=max==null?null:finite(max);if(behavior==='goal'){if(goal<=0)return 'neutral';if(v>=goal)return ceiling!=null&&v>ceiling?'amber':'green';if(v<goal*.35)return 'red';return 'amber'}if(behavior==='limit'){if(ceiling!=null&&v>ceiling)return 'red';if(goal>0&&v>goal)return 'amber';return 'green'}if(ceiling!=null&&v>ceiling)return 'red';if(goal>0&&v>goal)return 'amber';return 'green'}
    function nutrientBadge(def,projected,target,max){const state=nutrientState(def,projected,target,max),behavior=def.behavior||'goal';if(behavior==='goal'){if(state==='green')return {icon:'⭐',label:'Goal met'};if(state==='red')return {icon:'↑',label:'Low'};return {icon:'↗',label:'Building'}}if(behavior==='limit'){if(state==='green')return {icon:'✓',label:'On track'};if(state==='amber')return {icon:'⚠',label:'Caution'};return {icon:'🛑',label:'Exceeded'}}if(state==='red')return {icon:'🛑',label:'Over max'};if(state==='amber')return {icon:'⚠',label:'Near limit'};return {icon:'✓',label:'On track'}}
    function NutrientBar({def,value,plannedValue,target,max,decision,index=0,redrawKey=0,onActual,onPlanned,onRemaining,onDecision,onInteracting}){
     const projected=finite(value)+finite(plannedValue),base=Math.max(finite(max),finite(target),1),scale=Math.max(base,projected*1.08),actualPct=Math.min(100,finite(value)/scale*100),projectedPct=Math.min(100,projected/scale*100),targetPct=Math.min(100,finite(target)/scale*100),maxPct=max==null?null:Math.min(100,finite(max)/scale*100),state=decision?.status==='urgent'||decision?.status==='exceeded'?'red':decision?.status==='building'||decision?.status==='caution'?'amber':decision?.status==='goal_met'||decision?.status==='on_track'?'green':nutrientState(def,projected,target,max),badge=nutrientBadge(def,projected,target,max),[drawActual,setDrawActual]=useState(0),[drawProjected,setDrawProjected]=useState(0);const Icon=def.icon;
     useEffect(()=>{setDrawActual(0);setDrawProjected(0);const t=setTimeout(()=>{setDrawActual(actualPct);setDrawProjected(projectedPct)},120+index*70);return()=>clearTimeout(t)},[actualPct,projectedPct,index,redrawKey]);
     return <div className={`nutrient-row ${state}`} onPointerDown={()=>onInteracting?.(true)} onPointerUp={()=>onInteracting?.(false)} onPointerCancel={()=>onInteracting?.(false)}>
      <div className="nutrient-track">
       <button className="nutrient-zone remaining" onClick={onRemaining} aria-label={`${def.label} remaining`}/><div className="nutrient-fill planned" style={{width:`${drawProjected}%`}}/><button className="nutrient-zone planned" style={{left:`${drawActual}%`,width:`${Math.max(0,drawProjected-drawActual)}%`}} onClick={onPlanned}/><div className="nutrient-fill actual" style={{width:`${drawActual}%`}}/><button className="nutrient-zone actual" style={{width:`${drawActual}%`}} onClick={onActual}/>
       {target>0&&<i className="nutrient-target" title="Goal" style={{left:`calc(${targetPct}% - 1px)`}}/>}{maxPct!=null&&<i className="nutrient-maximum" title="Maximum" style={{left:`calc(${maxPct}% - 1px)`}}/>}
       <div className="nutrient-copy"><span className="nutrient-name"><Icon/><b>{def.label}</b></span><span className="nutrient-value">{Math.round(projected*10)/10}{def.unit==='kcal'?'':def.unit}<em>{plannedValue>0?`${Math.round(value)} + ${Math.round(plannedValue)}`:` / ${Math.round(target)}${def.unit==='kcal'?'':def.unit}`}</em></span></div>
       <button type="button" className="nutrient-badge" title={`${badge.label} — tap for explanation`} aria-label={`Explain ${def.label} priority and status`} onClick={onDecision}><span>{badge.icon}</span><b>{badge.label}</b></button>
      </div>
     </div>
    }
    
    
    function DecisionIntelligencePanel({prediction,queue,debt,forecast,timeline,probabilities,onSimulate}){
     const [view,setView]=useState('queue');
     const probabilityRows=[['Protein',probabilities.protein],['Fiber',probabilities.fiber],['Steps',probabilities.steps],['Weight goal',probabilities.weight]];
     const debtRows=[['Fiber',debt.fiber],['Protein',debt.protein],['Saturated fat',debt.saturated_fat],['Sodium',debt.sodium],['Calories',debt.calories]];
     return <section className="decision-intelligence"><header><div><small>DECISION INTELLIGENCE</small><h2>What happens next?</h2><p>{prediction.explanation}</p></div><button type="button" onClick={onSimulate}>What if?</button></header><div className="prediction-strip"><div><span>End-of-day calories</span><strong>{Math.round(prediction.baseline.calories)}</strong><em>{prediction.confidence}% confidence</em></div><div><span>End-of-day protein</span><strong>{Math.round(prediction.baseline.protein)}g</strong><em>{Math.round(prediction.baseline.fiber)}g fiber</em></div><div><span>Projected LDL support</span><strong>{prediction.baseline.ldl_score}%</strong><em>Usual dinner: {prediction.usualDinner.ldl_score}%</em></div></div><div className="intelligence-tabs">{[['queue','Next actions'],['forecast','Forecast'],['debt','Debt & credit'],['timeline','Timeline']].map(([id,label])=><button key={id} className={view===id?'active':''} onClick={()=>setView(id)}>{label}</button>)}</div>{view==='queue'&&<div className="decision-queue">{queue.map(item=><article key={item.id}><b>{item.rank}</b><div><strong>{item.label}</strong><span>{item.reason}</span></div><em>+{Math.max(0,Math.round((item.priority-50)/5))}%</em></article>)}</div>}{view==='forecast'&&<div className="forecast-grid"><div><span>Weight in 30 days</span><strong>{forecast.weight30??'Learning'}{forecast.weight30?' lb':''}</strong><em>{forecast.weightDirection}</em></div><div><span>LDL direction</span><strong>{forecast.ldlDirection}</strong><em>{forecast.confidence}% confidence</em></div><div><span>Protein consistency</span><strong>{forecast.proteinConsistency}%</strong></div><div><span>Calorie consistency</span><strong>{forecast.calorieConsistency}%</strong></div>{probabilityRows.map(([label,value])=><div key={label}><span>{label} probability</span><strong>{Math.round(value)}%</strong></div>)}</div>}{view==='debt'&&<div className="debt-grid">{debtRows.map(([label,row])=><article className={row.status} key={label}><span>{label}</span><strong>{row.balance>=0?'+':''}{Math.round(row.balance)} {row.unit}</strong><em>{row.status} · {row.days} days</em></article>)}</div>}{view==='timeline'&&<div className="decision-timeline">{timeline.length?timeline.map(event=><article key={event.id}><time>{new Date(event.at).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'})}</time><div><strong>{event.label}</strong><span>{event.reason}</span></div><b className={event.delta>=0?'positive':'negative'}>{event.scoreEffect}</b></article>):<p className="empty">Log meals or activity to build today’s decision timeline.</p>}</div>}</section>
    }
    
    function PlannedMealSwipeCard({row,onConsume,onRemove,onEdit}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false);
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>8||Math.abs(dy)>8)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-110,Math.min(110,dx)))};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const left=offset<-48,right=offset>48,wasMoved=moved.current;start.current=null;if(left){setOffset(-96);onRemove(row)}else if(right){setOffset(96);onConsume(row)}else{setOffset(0);if(!wasMoved)onEdit?.(row)}};
     return <div className="planned-swipe-shell"><div className="planned-swipe-rail"><span className="consume">Consume</span><span className="remove">Remove</span></div><div className="planned-entry" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}><div className="item meal-card planned-card"><div className="planned-copy"><em>PLANNED</em><b className="meal-title">{row.restaurant_name?`${row.restaurant_name} · ${row.food_name}`:row.food_name}</b><span>{Math.round(Number(row.calories)||0)} kcal · {row.meal_type} · {quantityLabel(row.amount,row.unit)}</span></div></div></div></div>
    }
    function PlannedMealEditor({row,onClose,onSaved}){
     const [amount,setAmount]=useState(String(row.amount??1)),[unit,setUnit]=useState(row.unit||'serving'),[mealType,setMealType]=useState(row.meal_type||'Meal'),[plannedAt,setPlannedAt]=useState((row.planned_at||`${row.planned_local_date}T12:00:00`).slice(0,16)),[notes,setNotes]=useState(()=>{const value=String(row.notes||'');return value.trim().startsWith('{')||value.trim().startsWith('[')?'':value}),[error,setError]=useState('');
     async function save(){
      const qty=Number(amount),old=Number(row.amount)||1;if(!Number.isFinite(qty)||qty<=0)return setError('Enter a valid amount.');
      const when=new Date(plannedAt);if(Number.isNaN(when.getTime()))return setError('Choose a valid planned date and time.');
      const ratio=qty/old;
      try{await transaction(async db=>{const cols=new Set(db.query('PRAGMA table_info(planned_meals)').map(x=>x.name));const updates=['amount=?','unit=?','meal_type=?','planned_at=?','planned_local_date=?','notes=?','updated_at=?'],params=[qty,unit,mealType,when.toISOString(),localDateKey(when),notes,new Date().toISOString()];for(const n of NUTRIENTS){if(cols.has(n.key)){updates.push(`${n.key}=?`);params.push(row[n.key]==null?null:Number(row[n.key])*ratio)}}params.push(row.id);db.run(`UPDATE planned_meals SET ${updates.join(',')} WHERE id=?`,params)});onSaved()}catch(e){setError(e.message||String(e))}
     }
     return <div className="modal-backdrop planned-edit-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor planned-meal-editor"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><div><small>PLANNED MEAL</small><h3>{row.food_name}</h3></div><button onClick={onClose}><X/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><div className="amount"><label>Amount<input type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0.01" step="any" value={amount} onChange={e=>setAmount(e.target.value)}/></label><label>Unit<input value={unit} onChange={e=>setUnit(e.target.value)}/></label></div><label>Meal occasion<select value={mealType} onChange={e=>setMealType(e.target.value)}>{['Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner','Snack','Appetizer','Side','Dessert','Beverage','Condiment'].map(x=><option key={x}>{x}</option>)}</select></label><label>Planned date and time<input type="datetime-local" value={plannedAt} onChange={e=>setPlannedAt(e.target.value)}/></label><label>Notes<textarea value={notes} onChange={e=>setNotes(e.target.value)}/></label><section className="nutrition-change-summary"><b>Projected nutrition</b><span>{Math.round((Number(row.calories)||0)*(Number(amount)||0)/(Number(row.amount)||1))} kcal · values scale with amount</span></section>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div><div className="editor-actions compact-actions"><button className="icon-action cancel-action" aria-label="Cancel" title="Cancel" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><button className="icon-action save-action" aria-label="Save changes" title="Save changes" onClick={save}><Check/></button></div></div></div>
    }
    function Today({tick,onLogRecommendation,openGear,openCapture,navigate}){
     const [selectedDate,setSelectedDate]=useState(today()),[editing,setEditing]=useState(null),[plannedEditing,setPlannedEditing]=useState(null),[amount,setAmount]=useState(''),[mealType,setMealType]=useState('Meal'),[dateTime,setDateTime]=useState(''),[error,setError]=useState(''),[revision,setRevision]=useState(0),[detail,setDetail]=useState(null),[undo,setUndo]=useState(null),[toast,setToast]=useState(''),[redrawKey,setRedrawKey]=useState(0),[pull,setPull]=useState(0),[refreshing,setRefreshing]=useState(false),[highlightPlanId,setHighlightPlanId]=useState(null),[interacting,setInteracting]=useState(false),[barOrder,setBarOrder]=useState([]),[showAllNutrients,setShowAllNutrients]=useState(false),[decisionDetail,setDecisionDetail]=useState(null),[showSimulator,setShowSimulator]=useState(false),[showDecisionIntelligence,setShowDecisionIntelligence]=useState(false),[restaurantDay,setRestaurantDay]=useState(false);
     const pullStart=useRef(null);
     const viewRef=useRef(null);
     const nutrientKeys=NUTRIENT_BARS.map(x=>x.key).filter(k=>k!=='net_carbs');
     const [dashboard,setDashboard]=useState({rows:[],totals:Object.fromEntries(nutrientKeys.map(k=>[k,0])),coverage:100});
     useEffect(()=>{
      const loaded=query(`SELECT * FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date=? OR (consumed_local_date IS NULL AND substr(eaten_at,1,10)=?) ORDER BY eaten_at ASC,id ASC`,[selectedDate,selectedDate]);
      const nextTotals=loaded.reduce((a,r)=>{for(const k of nutrientKeys)a[k]+=finite(r[k]);return a},Object.fromEntries(nutrientKeys.map(k=>[k,0])));nextTotals.net_carbs=Math.max(0,nextTotals.carbs-nextTotals.fiber);
      const nextCoverage=loaded.length?Math.round(loaded.filter(r=>Number(r.nutrition_known)===1).length/loaded.length*100):100;
      setDashboard({rows:loaded,totals:nextTotals,coverage:nextCoverage});
     },[selectedDate,tick,revision]);
     const {rows,totals,coverage}=dashboard;
     const planned=query(`SELECT * FROM planned_meals WHERE planned_local_date=? AND status='planned' ORDER BY planned_at,id`,[selectedDate]);
     const plannedTotals=planned.reduce((a,r)=>{for(const k of nutrientKeys)a[k]+=finite(r[k]);return a},Object.fromEntries(nutrientKeys.map(k=>[k,0])));plannedTotals.net_carbs=Math.max(0,plannedTotals.carbs-plannedTotals.fiber);
     const projected=Object.fromEntries(Object.keys(totals).map(k=>[k,(Number(totals[k])||0)+(Number(plannedTotals[k])||0)]));
     const highlightPlans=(key,mode='detail')=>{const def=NUTRIENT_BARS.find(x=>x.key===key)||{label:key,unit:''},targetRow=targets[key]||(key==='net_carbs'?targets.carbs:null)||{target:0,max:null,formula:''};const consumedContributors=rows.map(r=>({id:`meal-${r.id}`,recordId:r.id,status:'consumed',name:r.restaurant_name?`${r.restaurant_name} · ${r.food_name}`:r.food_name,value:key==='net_carbs'?Math.max(0,finite(r.carbs)-finite(r.fiber)):finite(r[key])}));const plannedContributors=planned.map(r=>({id:`plan-${r.id}`,recordId:r.id,status:'planned',name:r.restaurant_name?`${r.restaurant_name} · ${r.food_name}`:r.food_name,value:key==='net_carbs'?Math.max(0,finite(r.carbs)-finite(r.fiber)):finite(r[key])}));const decision=nutrientDecisions.find(x=>x.definition.key===key);setDetail({label:def.label,key,mode,unit:def.unit==='kcal'?'':def.unit,value:totals[key],planned:plannedTotals[key],projected:projected[key],target:targetRow.target||0,max:targetRow.max??null,formula:targetRow.formula||'',rank:decision?.displayRank,rankingReason:decision?.rankingReason,contributors:[...consumedContributors,...plannedContributors].filter(x=>x.value!==0).sort((a,b)=>b.value-a.value)});};
     const targets=getTargets(selectedDate);
     const stepsRow=query(`SELECT value_primary FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type='steps' AND local_date=? ORDER BY measured_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT 1`,[selectedDate])[0];
     const steps=finite(stepsRow?.value_primary),stepTarget=10000;
     const satTarget=finite(targets.saturated_fat?.target)||Math.max(1,finite(targets.fat?.target)*.3)||20,fiberTarget=finite(targets.fiber?.target)||30;
     const nutrientDecisions=orderNutrients(evaluateDecision('nutrients',{definitions:NUTRIENT_BARS,totals,plannedTotals,targets}));
     const candidateOrder=nutrientDecisions.map(x=>x.definition);
     useEffect(()=>{if(interacting||detail)return;const timer=setTimeout(()=>setBarOrder(candidateOrder.map(x=>x.key)),260);return()=>clearTimeout(timer)},[interacting,detail,selectedDate,revision,tick,JSON.stringify(candidateOrder.map(x=>x.key))]);
     const allOrderedBars=(barOrder.length?barOrder.map(k=>NUTRIENT_BARS.find(x=>x.key===k)).filter(Boolean):candidateOrder); const orderedBars=showAllNutrients?allOrderedBars:allOrderedBars.slice(0,10); const hiddenNutrients=Math.max(0,allOrderedBars.length-10); const maintenance=estimateMaintenance();
     const intelligence=buildHealthIntelligence({nutrition:projected,targets,metrics:query('SELECT * FROM health_metrics ORDER BY measured_at DESC LIMIT 500'),goals:{steps:stepTarget,weight:Number(query("SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key='goal_weight_lb' LIMIT 1")[0]?.value||215)}});
     const dailyHistory=query(`SELECT consumed_local_date AS date,SUM(calories) calories,SUM(protein) protein,SUM(fiber) fiber,SUM(saturated_fat) saturated_fat,SUM(sodium) sodium FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date<? GROUP BY consumed_local_date ORDER BY consumed_local_date DESC LIMIT 30`,[selectedDate]).reverse();
     const weightHistory=query(`SELECT local_date AS date,value_primary AS value FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type='weight' ORDER BY local_date DESC LIMIT 30`).reverse();
     const currentWeight=weightHistory.at(-1)?.value??null,goalWeight=Number(query("SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key='goal_weight_lb' LIMIT 1")[0]?.value||215);
     const prediction=predictEndOfDay({totals,plannedTotals,targets,history:dailyHistory,hour:new Date().getHours()});
     const decisionQueue=buildDecisionQueue({totals:projected,targets,steps,stepTarget,candidates:[{label:'Choose grilled fish tonight',nutrition:{protein:40,fiber:6,saturated_fat:2}},{label:'Walk after dinner',stepDelta:2500}]});
     const nutritionDebt=calculateNutritionDebtCredit({days:[...dailyHistory,{...totals,date:selectedDate}],targets});
     const healthForecast=weeklyHealthForecast({days:dailyHistory,weightHistory,targets,currentWeight,goalWeight});
     const decisionTimeline=buildDecisionTimeline({meals:rows,activities:query(`SELECT id,metric_type,value_primary,measured_at FROM health_metrics WHERE local_date=? AND metric_type IN ('steps','workout') ORDER BY measured_at`,[selectedDate]),targets});
     const probabilities=goalProbabilities({projection:prediction.baseline,targets,steps,stepTarget,forecast:healthForecast});
     const hour=new Date().getHours();
     const ldlDecision=evaluateDecision('ldl',{totals:projected,targets,coverage,activity:{steps,stepTarget,stepsKnown:Boolean(stepsRow)}});
     const stepsDecision=evaluateDecision('steps',{steps,goal:stepTarget,hour,typicalByHour:null,typicalRemaining:null,plannedExerciseSteps:0,dataFresh:Boolean(stepsRow)});
     const maintenanceDecision=evaluateDecision('maintenance',maintenance);
     const ldlSupport=ldlDecision.score;
     const selectedDateObj=new Date(`${selectedDate}T12:00:00`);
     const date=selectedDateObj.toLocaleDateString(undefined,{weekday:'long',month:'long',day:'numeric'});
     const isToday=selectedDate===today();
     const shiftDate=days=>{const d=new Date(`${selectedDate}T12:00:00`);d.setDate(d.getDate()+days);const next=localDateKey(d);if(next<=today())setSelectedDate(next)};
     useEffect(()=>{const el=viewRef.current;if(!el)return;let start=null,last=0;const top=()=>Math.max(document.documentElement.scrollTop||0,document.body.scrollTop||0)<=2;const begin=e=>{if(top()){start=e.touches?.[0]?.clientY??null;last=0}};const move=e=>{if(start==null)return;const dy=(e.touches?.[0]?.clientY??start)-start;if(dy>0&&top()){last=Math.min(110,dy*.6);setPull(last);if(last>8)e.preventDefault()}else{start=null;setPull(0)}};const end=()=>{const fire=last>=54;start=null;last=0;setPull(0);if(fire){setRefreshing(true);setRevision(x=>x+1);setRedrawKey(x=>x+1);setToast('Updated just now');setTimeout(()=>{setRefreshing(false);setToast('')},3400)}};el.addEventListener('touchstart',begin,{passive:true});el.addEventListener('touchmove',move,{passive:false});el.addEventListener('touchend',end,{passive:true});return()=>{el.removeEventListener('touchstart',begin);el.removeEventListener('touchmove',move);el.removeEventListener('touchend',end)}},[selectedDate]);
     const timeLabel=value=>new Date(value).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'});
     const nutritionFingerprint=JSON.stringify(NUTRIENT_KEYS.map(k=>[k,totals[k]||0,plannedTotals[k]||0]));
     useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem(`fizz-daily-${selectedDate}`,JSON.stringify({totals,plannedTotals,coverage,updatedAt:new Date().toISOString()}));setRedrawKey(x=>x+1);const flag=localStorage.getItem('fizz-meal-added');if(flag){setToast('Meal logged');localStorage.removeItem('fizz-meal-added');setTimeout(()=>setToast(''),1500)}},[selectedDate,rows.length,planned.length,nutritionFingerprint]);
     function beginEdit(row){if(!isToday&&!window.confirm('Edit this historical meal? This will change historical totals and pantry history.'))return;setEditing(row);setAmount(row.amount);setMealType(row.meal_type||'Meal');setDateTime(toDateTimeLocal(new Date(row.eaten_at)));setError('')}
     async function saveEdit(){
      const qty=Number(amount),consumed=new Date(dateTime);if(!qty||qty<=0){setError('Enter a quantity greater than zero.');return}if(Number.isNaN(consumed.getTime())){setError('Choose a valid date and time.');return}
      const food=editing.food_id?query('SELECT * FROM foods WHERE food_id=? LIMIT 1',[editing.food_id])[0]:null;
      // Restaurant/photo imports can be self-contained meal records with no foods-table row.
      // Preserve their nutrition for timestamp/meal-type edits and scale it if quantity changes.
      const originalQty=Number(editing.amount)||1;
      const scale=qty/originalQty;
      const n=food?nutritionFor(food,qty,editing.unit||food.unit):{
       calories:finite(editing.calories)*scale,protein:finite(editing.protein)*scale,carbs:finite(editing.carbs)*scale,
       fiber:finite(editing.fiber)*scale,fat:finite(editing.fat)*scale,saturated_fat:finite(editing.saturated_fat)*scale,
       known:Number(editing.nutrition_known)===1
      };
      const oldDelta=Number(editing.pantry_delta)||0;const packageConsumption=Boolean(editing.pantry_id&&Number(editing.pantry_opened_changed));const newDelta=editing.pantry_id&&!packageConsumption?qty:0;
      try{await transaction(async db=>{if(editing.pantry_id){const diff=oldDelta-newDelta;db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)+? WHERE pantry_id=?',[diff,editing.pantry_id]);}db.run(`UPDATE meals SET eaten_at=?,consumed_local_date=?,timezone_offset_minutes=?,meal_type=?,amount=?,calories=?,protein=?,carbs=?,fiber=?,fat=?,saturated_fat=?,nutrition_known=?,pantry_delta=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?`,[consumed.toISOString(),localDateKey(consumed),-consumed.getTimezoneOffset(),mealType,qty,n.calories,n.protein,n.carbs,n.fiber,n.fat,n.saturated_fat,n.known?1:0,newDelta,new Date().toISOString(),editing.id]);});setEditing(null);setRevision(x=>x+1)}catch(e){setError(e.message||String(e))}
     }
     async function quickAddAgain(row){
      const now=new Date(),copy={...row,id:null,eaten_at:now.toISOString(),created_at:now.toISOString(),updated_at:now.toISOString(),consumed_local_date:localDateKey(now),timezone_offset_minutes:-now.getTimezoneOffset()};
      try{await transaction(async db=>{
       if(copy.pantry_id&&Number(copy.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(copy.pantry_delta),copy.pantry_id]);
       if(copy.pantry_id&&Number(copy.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[copy.pantry_id]);
       const cols=Object.keys(copy).filter(c=>c!=='id'&&db.query('PRAGMA table_info(meals)').some(x=>x.name===c));
       db.run(`INSERT INTO meals(${cols.join(',')}) VALUES (${cols.map(()=>'?').join(',')})`,cols.map(c=>copy[c]??null));
      });setToast(`${row.food_name} logged again`);setRevision(x=>x+1);setTimeout(()=>setToast(''),1800)}catch(e){setToast(e.message||String(e))}
     }
     async function remove(row){
      if(!isToday&&!window.confirm('Delete this historical meal? This will change historical totals and pantry history.'))return;
      const snapshot={...row};
      await transaction(async db=>{if(row.pantry_id&&Number(row.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)+? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(row.pantry_delta),row.pantry_id]);if(row.pantry_id&&Number(row.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='No' WHERE pantry_id=?",[row.pantry_id]);db.run('DELETE FROM meals WHERE id=?',[row.id])});
      setUndo(snapshot);setRevision(x=>x+1);setTimeout(()=>setUndo(current=>current?.id===snapshot.id?null:current),5000)
     }
     async function undoDelete(){if(!undo)return;const r=undo;await transaction(async db=>{if(r.pantry_id&&Number(r.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(r.pantry_delta),r.pantry_id]);if(r.pantry_id&&Number(r.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[r.pantry_id]);const cols=['id','eaten_at','meal_type','food_id','food_name','amount','unit','calories','protein','carbs','fiber','fat','saturated_fat','notes','created_at','consumed_local_date','timezone_offset_minutes','nutrition_known','updated_at','pantry_id','pantry_delta','pantry_opened_changed'];db.run(`INSERT INTO meals(${cols.join(',')}) VALUES (${cols.map(()=>'?').join(',')})`,cols.map(c=>r[c]??null));});setUndo(null);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
    
     async function consumePlanned(row){
      const now=new Date();
      let actualCost=null;
      if(row.source_type==='restaurant'){
       const entered=window.prompt('Actual amount paid (optional). Leave blank to skip.',row.menu_price?String(row.menu_price):'');
       if(entered===null)return;
       actualCost=entered.trim()===''?null:Number(entered);
       if(actualCost!=null&&(!Number.isFinite(actualCost)||actualCost<0)){setToast('Enter a valid cost or leave it blank.');return}
      }
      await transaction(async db=>{
       let pantryDelta=0,pantryOpenedChanged=0;
       if(row.pantry_id){const p=db.query('SELECT quantity,unit,opened FROM pantry WHERE pantry_id=? LIMIT 1',[row.pantry_id])[0];if(p){const same=normalizeUnit(p.unit)===normalizeUnit(row.unit);if(isPackageUnit(p.unit)&&!same){pantryOpenedChanged=p.opened==='Yes'?0:1;db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[row.pantry_id]);}else{pantryDelta=Number(row.amount)||0;db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[pantryDelta,row.pantry_id]);}}}
       insertRecord(db,'meals',{eaten_at:now.toISOString(),created_at:now.toISOString(),updated_at:now.toISOString(),consumed_local_date:localDateKey(now),timezone_offset_minutes:-now.getTimezoneOffset(),meal_type:row.meal_type,food_id:row.food_id,food_name:row.food_name,amount:row.amount,unit:row.unit,...nutrientSnapshot(row),notes:row.notes,nutrition_known:((Number(row.calories)||0)+(Number(row.protein)||0)+(Number(row.carbs)||0)+(Number(row.fat)||0)+(Number(row.fiber)||0)>0)?1:0,pantry_id:row.pantry_id||null,pantry_delta:pantryDelta,pantry_opened_changed:pantryOpenedChanged,restaurant_name:row.restaurant_name||null,restaurant_meal_id:row.restaurant_meal_id||null,actual_cost:actualCost,source:row.source_type||'planned',source_record_id:`planned-${row.id}`});
       db.run("UPDATE planned_meals SET status='consumed',consumed_at=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?",[now.toISOString(),now.toISOString(),row.id]);
      });setRevision(x=>x+1);setRedrawKey(x=>x+1);setToast('Planned meal consumed');setTimeout(()=>setToast(''),1500)
     }
     async function cancelPlanned(row){if(!confirm('Remove this planned meal from today?'))return;const now=new Date().toISOString(),key=String(row.food_id||row.recipe_id||row.restaurant_meal_id||row.food_name||'').toLowerCase();await transaction(async db=>{db.run("UPDATE planned_meals SET status='cancelled',updated_at=?,adaptation_reason='removed_from_today' WHERE id=?",[now,row.id]);db.run(`INSERT INTO meal_plan_events(plan_id,event_type,event_date,details_json,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)`,[row.plan_id||null,'planned_meal_removed',today(),JSON.stringify({candidate_key:key,food_name:row.food_name,meaning:'not_today'}),now])});setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     const pantryAttention=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM pantry WHERE on_hand='Yes' AND (expiration IS NOT NULL OR opened='Yes' OR quantity<=1) ORDER BY CASE WHEN expiration IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, expiration LIMIT 25`);
     const pendingCaptures=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM restaurant_capture_sessions WHERE status='review_required' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10`);
     const preventiveItems=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM preventive_health_items WHERE completed_at IS NULL ORDER BY due_date LIMIT 10`);
     const commandActions=rankActions({pantry:pantryAttention,plannedMeals:planned,captures:pendingCaptures,preventive:preventiveItems,steps,stepTarget});
     const restaurantPlans=planned.filter(x=>x.source_type==='restaurant');
     const commandSummary=dashboardSummary({actions:commandActions,nextMeal:planned[0]||null,risks:probabilities.filter?.(x=>x.probability<60)||[],pantry:pantryAttention,restaurantPlans,actual:projected,plan:Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(targets).map(([key,value])=>[key,value?.target??0]))});
     const topNutrient=nutrientDecisions[0];
     const decisionHeadlines=[];
     if(topNutrient?.definition?.label)decisionHeadlines.push(`${topNutrient.definition.label} is today’s biggest opportunity.`);
     if(pantryAttention.length)decisionHeadlines.push('Pantry needs attention.');
     if(planned.length)decisionHeadlines.push(`${planned.length} planned meal${planned.length===1?'':'s'} remaining.`);
     if(!decisionHeadlines.length)decisionHeadlines.push('Today is on track.');
     const visibleDecisionHeadlines=decisionHeadlines.slice(0,2);
     const restaurantMealExists=Boolean(optionalQuery(`SELECT 1 present FROM planned_meals WHERE planned_local_date=? AND status='planned' AND (source_type='restaurant' OR restaurant_meal_id IS NOT NULL OR COALESCE(restaurant_name,'')<>'') LIMIT 1`,[selectedDate])[0]||optionalQuery(`SELECT 1 present FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date=? AND (restaurant_meal_id IS NOT NULL OR COALESCE(restaurant_name,'')<>'') LIMIT 1`,[selectedDate])[0]);
     const storedRestaurantDay=Number(optionalQuery('SELECT restaurant_possible FROM daily_preferences WHERE preference_date=?',[selectedDate])[0]?.restaurant_possible)===1;
     useEffect(()=>{const next=restaurantMealExists||storedRestaurantDay;setRestaurantDay(next);if(restaurantMealExists&&!storedRestaurantDay)run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO daily_preferences(preference_date,restaurant_possible,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?)`,[selectedDate,1,new Date().toISOString()]);},[selectedDate,revision,tick,restaurantMealExists,storedRestaurantDay]);
     async function setRestaurantDayPreference(next){
      if(!next&&restaurantMealExists){window.alert('Restaurant meal already planned\n\nA restaurant meal is currently in this day’s food log. Remove it before changing Restaurant Day to No.');setRestaurantDay(true);return}
      setRestaurantDay(next);await run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO daily_preferences(preference_date,restaurant_possible,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?)`,[selectedDate,next?1:0,new Date().toISOString()]);setRevision(x=>x+1)
     }
    
     return <div ref={viewRef} className={`today-view ${refreshing?'refreshing':''}`}><div className={`pull-refresh ${pull>=54?'ready':''}`} style={{height:`${pull}px`}}><span>{refreshing?'Refreshing…':pull>=54?'Release to refresh':'Pull to refresh'}</span></div><header className="today-header"><Brand/><div className={`restaurant-day-control ${restaurantDay?'yes':'no'}`} role="group" aria-label="Restaurant Day"><span>RESTAURANT</span><button type="button" role="switch" aria-checked={restaurantDay} onClick={()=>setRestaurantDayPreference(!restaurantDay)}><i/><b>{restaurantDay?'YES':'NO'}</b></button></div><div className="date-nav"><button onClick={()=>shiftDate(-1)} aria-label="Previous day">‹</button><label><input type="date" value={selectedDate} max={today()} onChange={e=>setSelectedDate(e.target.value||today())}/><h1>{date}</h1></label><button onClick={()=>shiftDate(1)} disabled={isToday} aria-label="Next day">›</button>{!isToday&&<button className="today-jump" onClick={()=>setSelectedDate(today())}>Today</button>}</div></header><section className={`decision-intelligence-disclosure ${showDecisionIntelligence?'expanded':'collapsed'}`}><button type="button" className="decision-intelligence-toggle" aria-expanded={showDecisionIntelligence} onClick={()=>setShowDecisionIntelligence(value=>!value)}><div><small>DECISION INTELLIGENCE</small>{visibleDecisionHeadlines.map((headline,index)=><b key={`${headline}-${index}`}>{headline}</b>)}</div>{showDecisionIntelligence?<ChevronUp/>:<ChevronDown/>}</button>{showDecisionIntelligence&&<div className="decision-intelligence-content"><DecisionBrief date={selectedDate} restaurantDay={restaurantDay} coverage={coverage} projected={projected} targets={targets} planned={planned} pantry={pantryAttention} actions={commandActions} prediction={prediction} steps={steps} stepTarget={stepTarget} navigate={navigate}><ErrorBoundary label="Health Decision Assistant"><HighestImpactDecisionExperience intelligence={intelligence} totals={totals} projected={projected} targets={targets} steps={steps} stepTarget={stepTarget} navigate={navigate} date={selectedDate} restaurantDay={restaurantDay}/></ErrorBoundary><ErrorBoundary label="Decision Intelligence"><DecisionIntelligencePanel prediction={prediction} queue={decisionQueue} debt={nutritionDebt} forecast={healthForecast} timeline={decisionTimeline} probabilities={probabilities} onSimulate={()=>setShowSimulator(true)}/></ErrorBoundary>{isToday&&<ErrorBoundary label="Daily command center"><DailyCommandCenter summary={commandSummary} actions={commandActions} onCapture={openCapture} navigate={navigate}/></ErrorBoundary>}</DecisionBrief></div>}</section><ErrorBoundary label="Decision dashboard"><section className="decision-dashboard home-summary-dashboard"><div className="summary-rings maintenance-layout"><SummaryRing label="LDL Support" value={ldlSupport} sub={`${Math.round(finite(projected.fiber))}g fiber · ${Math.round(finite(projected.saturated_fat))}g sat fat`} state={ldlSupport>=75?'green':ldlSupport>=50?'amber':'red'} icon={HeartPulse} index={0} redrawKey={redrawKey} onClick={()=>setDecisionDetail({title:'LDL Support',decision:ldlDecision})}/><button type="button" className="maintenance-card tappable" onClick={()=>setDecisionDetail({title:'Estimated Maintenance',decision:maintenanceDecision})}><small>EST. MAINTENANCE</small><strong>{maintenance.estimate?maintenance.estimate.toLocaleString():'Learning'}</strong><span>{maintenance.estimate?'kcal/day':'More data needed'}</span><em>{maintenance.confidence?`${maintenance.confidence}% confidence`: `${maintenance.days||0} observation days`}</em><small className="tap-hint">Tap for details</small></button><SummaryRing label="Steps" value={stepTarget?steps/stepTarget*100:0} sub={`${Math.round(steps).toLocaleString()} / ${stepTarget.toLocaleString()}`} state={stepsDecision.status==='goal_met'||stepsDecision.status==='on_pace'?'green':stepsDecision.status==='recoverable'?'amber':'red'} icon={Footprints} index={1} redrawKey={redrawKey} onClick={()=>setDecisionDetail({title:'Steps',decision:stepsDecision})}/></div></section></ErrorBoundary><ErrorBoundary label="Nutrition progress"><section className="decision-dashboard nutrition-progress-dashboard"><div className="nutrient-bars">{orderedBars.map((def,index)=>{const t=targets[def.key]||(def.key==='net_carbs'?targets.carbs:null)||{target:0,max:null};const decision=nutrientDecisions.find(x=>x.definition.key===def.key)?.decision;return <NutrientBar key={def.key} def={def} value={totals[def.key]} plannedValue={plannedTotals[def.key]} target={t.target} max={t.max} decision={decision} index={index} redrawKey={redrawKey} onInteracting={setInteracting} onActual={()=>highlightPlans(def.key,'actual')} onPlanned={()=>highlightPlans(def.key,'planned')} onRemaining={()=>highlightPlans(def.key,'remaining')} onDecision={()=>highlightPlans(def.key,'decision')}/>})}</div>{hiddenNutrients>0&&<button className="show-nutrients" onClick={()=>setShowAllNutrients(x=>!x)}>{showAllNutrients?<><ChevronUp/> Show top 10</>:<><ChevronDown/> Show all nutrients ({allOrderedBars.length})</>}</button>}</section></ErrorBoundary><section className="today-meals-section">{planned.length>0&&<><h2>Planned meals</h2><div className="list planned-list">{planned.map(r=><div className={highlightPlanId===r.id?'plan-highlight':''} key={r.id}><PlannedMealSwipeCard row={r} onConsume={consumePlanned} onRemove={cancelPlanned} onEdit={setPlannedEditing}/></div>)}</div></>}<h2>{isToday?'Today’s meals':`Meals on ${selectedDateObj.toLocaleDateString()} (${rows.length})`}</h2><div className="list">{rows.length?rows.map(r=><SwipeMealCard key={r.id} row={r} onEdit={beginEdit} onDelete={remove} onQuickAdd={quickAddAgain} timeLabel={timeLabel}/>):<div className="empty">No meals logged for this date.</div>}</div></section>{plannedEditing&&<PlannedMealEditor row={plannedEditing} onClose={()=>setPlannedEditing(null)} onSaved={()=>{setPlannedEditing(null);setRevision(x=>x+1);setRedrawKey(x=>x+1)}}/>}
     {toast&&<div className="success-toast">✓ {toast}</div>}{undo&&<div className="undo-snackbar"><span>{undo.food_name} deleted</span><button onClick={undoDelete}>Undo</button></div>}
     {detail&&<div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={()=>setDetail(null)}><div className="panel gauge-detail" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head"><h3>{detail.label}</h3><button onClick={()=>setDetail(null)}><X/></button></div>{detail.rank&&<div className="ranking-explanation"><b>Dashboard rank #{detail.rank}</b><span>{detail.rankingReason}</span></div>}{detail.contributors?.length>0&&<div className="nutrient-contributors"><span>Contributors · largest first</span>{detail.contributors.map(c=><div className={c.status} key={c.id}><i/><b>{c.name}</b><em>{Math.round(c.value*10)/10}{detail.unit}</em></div>)}</div>}<div className="detail-values"><div><span>Consumed</span><b>{Math.round(detail.value)}{detail.unit}</b></div><div><span>Planned</span><b>{Math.round(detail.planned||0)}{detail.unit}</b></div><div><span>Projected</span><b>{Math.round(detail.projected??detail.value)}{detail.unit}</b></div><div><span>Target</span><b>{detail.target}{detail.unit}</b></div><div><span>Remaining after plan</span><b>{Math.max(0,Math.round(detail.target-(detail.projected??detail.value)))}{detail.unit}</b></div>{detail.max!=null&&<div><span>Maximum</span><b>{Math.round(detail.max)}{detail.unit}</b></div>}</div>{detail.formula&&<p className="target-formula">{detail.formula}</p>}</div></div>}
     {showSimulator&&<DecisionSimulator totals={totals} plannedTotals={plannedTotals} targets={targets} definitions={NUTRIENT_BARS} steps={{current:steps,goal:stepTarget,known:Boolean(stepsRow)}} coverage={coverage} onClose={()=>setShowSimulator(false)}/>}
     {decisionDetail&&<DecisionDetails title={decisionDetail.title} decision={decisionDetail.decision} onClose={()=>setDecisionDetail(null)}/>}
     {editing&&<div className="modal-backdrop"><div className="panel edit-meal"><div className="edit-head"><h3>Edit {editing.food_name}</h3><button onClick={()=>setEditing(null)}><X/></button></div><label>Meal type<select value={mealType} onChange={e=>setMealType(e.target.value)}><option>Breakfast</option><option>Lunch</option><option>Dinner</option><option>Snack</option><option>Meal</option></select></label><label>Quantity<div className="amount"><input type="number" min="0" step="0.1" value={amount} onChange={e=>setAmount(e.target.value)}/><span>{editing.unit}</span></div></label><label>Consumed<input className="datetime" type="datetime-local" value={dateTime} max={toDateTimeLocal()} onChange={e=>setDateTime(e.target.value)}/></label>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}<button className="primary" onClick={saveEdit}><Check/> Save changes</button></div></div>}
     </div>
    }
    
    function AdaptivePlanCard({row,index,onOpen,onAccept,onDismiss}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false);
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>8||Math.abs(dy)>8)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-100,Math.min(100,dx)))};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const left=offset<-44,right=offset>44,wasMoved=moved.current;start.current=null;if(left){setOffset(-92);onDismiss(row,index)}else if(right){setOffset(92);onAccept(row,index)}else{setOffset(0);if(!wasMoved)onOpen(row,index)}};
     const name=row.food_name||row.candidate?.item||row.candidate?.name||'Planned meal';
     return <div className="adaptive-plan-swipe"><div className="adaptive-plan-rail"><span className="accept">Plan</span><span className="dismiss">Dismiss</span></div><div className="planner-row meal-plan-row adaptive-plan-card" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}><time>{new Date(`${row.date}T12:00:00`).toLocaleDateString(undefined,{weekday:'short',month:'short',day:'numeric'})}</time><b>{name}</b><span>{row.slot||'Meal'} · {Math.round(finite(row.nutrition?.calories||row.calories))} kcal · {row.source_type==='leftover'?'leftover':row.source_type==='restaurant'?'restaurant · committed':'flexible'}</span></div></div>
    }
    function ForwardMealPlanner({tick,targets}){
     const [anchor,setAnchor]=useState(today()),[selectedDate,setSelectedDate]=useState(today()),[picker,setPicker]=useState(null),[notice,setNotice]=useState(''),[revision,setRevision]=useState(0);
     const dateFromKey=key=>new Date(`${key}T12:00:00`);
     const shiftAnchor=days=>{const d=dateFromKey(anchor);d.setDate(d.getDate()+days);const key=localDateKey(d);setAnchor(key);setSelectedDate(key)};
     const week=useMemo(()=>{const d=dateFromKey(anchor),day=d.getDay(),monday=new Date(d);monday.setDate(d.getDate()-((day+6)%7));return Array.from({length:7},(_,i)=>{const x=new Date(monday);x.setDate(monday.getDate()+i);return {key:localDateKey(x),date:x}})},[anchor]);
     const meals=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM meal_definitions WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY category,title COLLATE NOCASE`);
     const restaurantMeals=optionalQuery(`SELECT rm.* FROM restaurant_meals rm WHERE COALESCE(rm.active,1)=1 AND COALESCE(rm.favorite,0)=1 ORDER BY rm.restaurant_name COLLATE NOCASE,rm.meal_name COLLATE NOCASE`);
     const scheduled=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' AND planned_local_date BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY planned_local_date,meal_type,id`,[week[0].key,week[6].key]);
     const preferences=optionalQuery(`SELECT preference_date,restaurant_possible FROM daily_preferences WHERE preference_date BETWEEN ? AND ?`,[week[0].key,week[6].key]);
     const restaurantDates=new Set(preferences.filter(x=>Number(x.restaurant_possible)===1).map(x=>x.preference_date));
     const byDate=Object.groupBy?Object.groupBy(scheduled,x=>x.planned_local_date):scheduled.reduce((a,x)=>((a[x.planned_local_date]||=[]).push(x),a),{});
     const selectedRows=byDate[selectedDate]||[],restaurantDay=restaurantDates.has(selectedDate);
     const mainCategories=['Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner'],independentCategories=['Beverage','Snack'];
     const componentCategories=['Appetizer','Side','Dessert','Beverage','Condiment'];
     const eligibleFor=slot=>meals.filter(m=>slot==='Snack'?m.category==='Snack':slot==='Beverage'?m.category==='Beverage':m.category===slot||m.category==='Any');
     const components=meals.filter(m=>componentCategories.includes(m.category));
     const dayTotals=selectedRows.reduce((a,r)=>{for(const k of ['calories','protein','carbs','fiber','fat','saturated_fat'])a[k]+=finite(r[k]);return a},{calories:0,protein:0,carbs:0,fiber:0,fat:0,saturated_fat:0});
     const calorieTarget=finite(targets?.calories?.target);
     async function scheduleMeal(meal,slot,role='main'){
      const now=new Date().toISOString();
      await transaction(async db=>insertRecord(db,'planned_meals',{planned_at:`${selectedDate}T12:00:00`,planned_local_date:selectedDate,meal_type:slot,food_name:meal.title,amount:1,unit:'serving',...nutrientSnapshot(meal),notes:JSON.stringify({planner_role:role,category:meal.category}),status:'planned',created_at:now,updated_at:now,source_type:'meal',meal_definition_id:meal.meal_id,lock_state:'flexible',item_role:role}));
      setPicker(null);setRevision(x=>x+1);setNotice(`${meal.title} planned for ${selectedDate}`);setTimeout(()=>setNotice(''),1800)
     }
     async function scheduleRestaurantMeal(meal,slot){
      const now=new Date().toISOString();
      await transaction(async db=>{
       const reservation=db.query(`SELECT id FROM planned_meals WHERE planned_local_date=? AND status='planned' AND source_type='reservation' ORDER BY CASE WHEN meal_type=? THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,id LIMIT 1`,[selectedDate,slot])[0];
       if(reservation)db.run(`UPDATE planned_meals SET status='replaced',updated_at=? WHERE id=?`,[now,reservation.id]);
       insertRecord(db,'planned_meals',{planned_at:`${selectedDate}T12:00:00`,planned_local_date:selectedDate,meal_type:slot,food_name:meal.meal_name,amount:1,unit:'serving',...nutrientSnapshot(meal),notes:JSON.stringify({planner_role:'restaurant',category:meal.category}),status:'planned',created_at:now,updated_at:now,source_type:'restaurant',restaurant_name:meal.restaurant_name,restaurant_meal_id:meal.id,lock_state:'locked',item_role:'main'});
       db.run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO daily_preferences(preference_date,restaurant_possible,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?)`,[selectedDate,1,now]);
      });
      setPicker(null);setRevision(x=>x+1);setNotice(`${meal.meal_name} added from ${meal.restaurant_name||'restaurant'}`);setTimeout(()=>setNotice(''),1800)
     }
     async function setRestaurantPreference(next){
      const now=new Date().toISOString();
      await transaction(async db=>{
       if(!next){
        const actual=db.query(`SELECT id FROM planned_meals WHERE planned_local_date=? AND status='planned' AND source_type='restaurant' LIMIT 1`,[selectedDate])[0];
        if(actual)throw new Error('Remove the restaurant meals from this date before turning Restaurant Day off.');
        db.run(`UPDATE planned_meals SET status='cancelled',updated_at=? WHERE planned_local_date=? AND status='planned' AND source_type='reservation'`,[now,selectedDate]);
       }
       db.run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO daily_preferences(preference_date,restaurant_possible,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?)`,[selectedDate,next?1:0,now]);
       if(next){const existing=db.query(`SELECT id FROM planned_meals WHERE planned_local_date=? AND status='planned' AND source_type IN ('reservation','restaurant') LIMIT 1`,[selectedDate])[0];if(!existing)insertRecord(db,'planned_meals',{planned_at:`${selectedDate}T12:00:00`,planned_local_date:selectedDate,meal_type:'Dinner',food_name:'Restaurant meal — undecided',amount:1,unit:'reservation',calories:800,protein:0,carbs:0,fiber:0,fat:0,saturated_fat:0,notes:JSON.stringify({planner_role:'reservation',automatic:true}),status:'planned',created_at:now,updated_at:now,source_type:'reservation',lock_state:'locked',item_role:'reservation',reserved_calories:800})}
      });
      setRevision(x=>x+1)
     }
     async function removeRow(row){await run("UPDATE planned_meals SET status='cancelled',updated_at=? WHERE id=?",[new Date().toISOString(),row.id]);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     async function toggleLock(row){await run("UPDATE planned_meals SET lock_state=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?",[row.lock_state==='locked'?'flexible':'locked',new Date().toISOString(),row.id]);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     const slotRows=slot=>selectedRows.filter(r=>r.meal_type===slot);
     const openPickerForRestaurant=meal=>setPicker({kind:'restaurant',meal});
     return <section className="meal-calendar-prototype" data-revision={revision}><div className="planner-head"><div><span><CalendarDays/> MEAL PLANNING PROTOTYPE</span><h2>Plan by date, not time</h2><p>Saved Meals and starred restaurant choices reserve tomorrow’s nutrition and appear in today’s Food Log as proposed meals.</p></div><button className="secondary" onClick={()=>{setAnchor(today());setSelectedDate(today())}}>Today</button></div>
     <div className={`planner-restaurant-toggle restaurant-day-control ${restaurantDay?'yes':'no'}`} role="group" aria-label="Restaurant Day"><span>RESTAURANT</span><button type="button" role="switch" aria-checked={restaurantDay} onClick={async()=>{try{await setRestaurantPreference(!restaurantDay)}catch(e){window.alert(e.message)}}}><i/><b>{restaurantDay?'YES':'NO'}</b></button></div>
     <div className="calendar-nav"><button onClick={()=>shiftAnchor(-7)}>‹</button><b>{week[0].date.toLocaleDateString([],{month:'short',day:'numeric'})} – {week[6].date.toLocaleDateString([],{month:'short',day:'numeric'})}</b><button onClick={()=>shiftAnchor(7)}>›</button></div>
     <div className="planner-week">{week.map(day=>{const rows=byDate[day.key]||[],reserved=rows.reduce((n,r)=>n+finite(r.calories),0),restaurant=restaurantDates.has(day.key)||rows.some(r=>r.source_type==='restaurant'||r.source_type==='reservation');return <button key={day.key} className={`${selectedDate===day.key?'active':''} ${day.key===today()?'today':''}`} onClick={()=>setSelectedDate(day.key)}><small>{day.date.toLocaleDateString([],{weekday:'short'})}</small><strong>{day.date.getDate()}</strong><span>{restaurant?'🍽️ ':''}{rows.length} planned</span><em>{Math.round(reserved)} kcal</em></button>})}</div>
     <div className="planner-day-head"><div><small>SELECTED DAY</small><h3>{dateFromKey(selectedDate).toLocaleDateString([],{weekday:'long',month:'long',day:'numeric'})}</h3></div></div>
     <div className="planner-capacity"><div><span>Reserved / proposed</span><b>{Math.round(dayTotals.calories)} kcal</b></div><div><span>Remaining to target</span><b>{Math.max(0,Math.round(calorieTarget-dayTotals.calories))} kcal</b></div><div><span>Projected protein</span><b>{Math.round(dayTotals.protein)}g</b></div></div>
     <div className="planner-slots">{[...mainCategories,...independentCategories].map(slot=><section key={slot} className="planner-slot"><div className="section-title"><div><h3>{slot}</h3></div><button onClick={()=>setPicker({slot,kind:'main'})}><Plus/> Add</button></div>{slotRows(slot).length?slotRows(slot).map(row=><article key={row.id} className={row.source_type==='reservation'?'reservation-row':''}><div><b>{row.food_name}</b><span>{row.source_type==='reservation'?'Restaurant capacity reservation':`${row.restaurant_name?row.restaurant_name+' · ':''}${row.item_role&&row.item_role!=='main'?row.item_role+' · ':''}${Math.round(finite(row.calories))} kcal · ${Math.round(finite(row.protein))}g protein`}</span></div><div><button onClick={()=>toggleLock(row)} aria-label="Toggle lock">{row.lock_state==='locked'?<Lock/>:<Unlock/>}</button><button onClick={()=>removeRow(row)} aria-label="Remove"><X/></button></div></article>):<div className="empty">Open {slot.toLowerCase()} slot</div>}{mainCategories.includes(slot)&&<div className="component-actions"><span>Add to this meal:</span>{componentCategories.map(role=><button key={role} onClick={()=>setPicker({slot,kind:'component',role})}>{role}</button>)}</div>}</section>)}</div>
     <section className="planner-catalog"><div className="section-title"><div><small>AVAILABLE SAVED MEALS</small><h3>Meal collection</h3></div></div><div className="planner-catalog-grid">{meals.map(meal=><button key={meal.meal_id} onClick={()=>setPicker({kind:'catalog',meal})}><b>{meal.title}</b><span>{meal.category} · {Math.round(finite(meal.calories))} kcal · {Math.round(finite(meal.protein))}g protein</span></button>)}</div>{!meals.length&&<div className="empty">No saved Meals are available yet.</div>}</section>
     {restaurantDay&&<section className="planner-catalog restaurant-catalog"><div className="section-title"><div><small>STARRED RESTAURANT MEALS</small><h3>Frequent choices</h3></div></div><p>Choose one or several meals, even from different restaurants. Each selection replaces available estimated restaurant capacity.</p><div className="planner-catalog-grid">{restaurantMeals.map(meal=><button key={meal.id} onClick={()=>openPickerForRestaurant(meal)}><b>{meal.meal_name}</b><span>{meal.restaurant_name||'Restaurant'} · {restaurantMealRoles(meal).join(', ')} · {Math.round(finite(meal.calories))} kcal · {Math.round(finite(meal.protein))}g protein</span></button>)}</div>{!restaurantMeals.length&&<div className="empty">Star restaurant meals to make them available here.</div>}</section>}
     {notice&&<div className="status">{notice}</div>}
     {picker&&<div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={()=>setPicker(null)}><div className="panel fixed-editor planner-meal-picker" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><div><small>{picker.kind==='restaurant'?'RESTAURANT MEAL':picker.kind==='component'?picker.role.toUpperCase():'SAVED MEALS ONLY'}</small><h3>{picker.kind==='restaurant'||picker.kind==='catalog'?'Choose an occasion':`Add to ${picker.slot}`}</h3></div><button onClick={()=>setPicker(null)}><X/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll">{(picker.kind==='restaurant'||picker.kind==='catalog')?<div className="planner-occasion-options">{[...mainCategories,'Snack','Beverage'].filter(slot=>picker.kind!=='restaurant'||restaurantMealEligibleFor(picker.meal,slot)).map(slot=><button key={slot} onClick={()=>picker.kind==='restaurant'?scheduleRestaurantMeal(picker.meal,slot):scheduleMeal(picker.meal,slot,'main')}>{slot}</button>)}</div>:<><p>{picker.kind==='component'?`Choose a saved ${picker.role.toLowerCase()} meal component.`:`Choose a ${picker.slot.toLowerCase()} meal. “Any” meals are also eligible.`}</p><div className="planner-meal-options">{(picker.kind==='component'?components.filter(m=>m.category===picker.role):eligibleFor(picker.slot)).map(meal=><button key={meal.meal_id} onClick={()=>scheduleMeal(meal,picker.slot,picker.kind==='component'?picker.role.toLowerCase():'main')}><div><b>{meal.title}</b><span>{meal.category} · {Math.round(finite(meal.calories))} kcal · {Math.round(finite(meal.protein))}g protein</span></div><Plus/></button>)}</div>{!(picker.kind==='component'?components.filter(m=>m.category===picker.role):eligibleFor(picker.slot)).length&&<div className="empty">No eligible saved Meals yet. Add or recategorize Meals in the Meals section.</div>}</>}</div></div></div>}
     </section>
    }
    
    function recommendationKey(item={}){return String(item.recipe_id||item.food_id||item.pantry_id||item.restaurant_meal_id||item.item||item.name||'').trim().toLowerCase()}
    function currentMealContext(date=today()){
     const now=new Date(),same=date===today(),hour=same?now.getHours():12;
     if(hour<10)return 'Breakfast';if(hour<14)return 'Lunch';if(hour<17)return 'Snack';return 'Dinner';
    }
    function recommendationSuitability(candidate,mealType,history={}){
     const name=String(candidate.item||candidate.name||'').toLowerCase(),category=String(candidate.category||'').toLowerCase();let score=0;
     if(candidate.type==='recipe')score+=45;
     score+=Math.min(35,Number(history.count)||0)*2;
     if(String(history.meal_type||'').toLowerCase()===mealType.toLowerCase())score+=28;
     if(/psyllium|creamer|dressing|sauce|seasoning|supplement/.test(name+category))score-=90;
     if(mealType==='Dinner'&&/(blueberr|blackberr|strawberr|banana|apple|fruit)/.test(name)&&candidate.type!=='recipe')score-=45;
     if(mealType==='Breakfast'&&/(coffee|oat|yogurt|fruit|egg|smoothie)/.test(name))score+=18;
     if(mealType==='Lunch'&&/(chicken|salmon|salad|bowl|mahi|tuna)/.test(name))score+=14;
     if(mealType==='Dinner'&&/(chicken|salmon|fish|mahi|salad|bowl|restaurant)/.test(name))score+=14;
     return score;
    }
    function RecommendationCard({item,decision,rank,onExplain,onAccept,onDismiss}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false);
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
