WHERE restaurant_id=?',[menuVersion,now,rest.restaurant_id||restaurantId]);
        } else if(!menuVersion)menuVersion=1;
        for(const item of items){if(!item.meal_name)continue;const n=item.nutrition||{},price=typeof item.price==='number'?{amount:item.price}:item.price||{};
          db.run(`INSERT INTO restaurant_meals(restaurant_id,restaurant_name,meal_name,category,serving_description,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,sodium,notes,nutrition_known,source,confidence,created_at,updated_at,menu_version,active,price,currency,price_observed_date,meal_period,ingredients_json,preparation,recommendation_tier) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[rest.restaurant_id||restaurantId,rest.name||restaurant.name,item.meal_name,item.category||null,item.serving_description||null,n.calories??null,n.protein_g??null,n.carbohydrate_g??null,n.fiber_g??null,n.total_fat_g??null,n.saturated_fat_g??null,n.sodium_mg??null,item.evidence_notes||item.assumptions?.join('; ')||null,n.calories!=null?1:0,'ai_exchange',item.confidence??null,now,now,menuVersion,1,price.amount??null,price.currency||'USD',price.observed_date||null,price.meal_period||null,JSON.stringify(item.ingredients||[]),item.preparation||null,item.recommendation_tier||null]);
          const inserted=db.query('SELECT last_insert_rowid() id')[0]?.id;
          if(preview.request_type==='restaurant_meal_analysis'&&preview.destination==='planned')db.run(`INSERT INTO planned_meals(planned_at,planned_local_date,meal_type,food_name,amount,unit,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,notes,status,created_at,updated_at,source_type,restaurant_name,restaurant_meal_id,menu_price) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[now,today(),'Dinner',item.meal_name,1,'serving',n.calories||0,n.protein_g||0,n.carbohydrate_g||0,n.fiber_g||0,n.total_fat_g||0,n.saturated_fat_g||0,item.evidence_notes||'AI meal estimate','planned',now,now,'restaurant',rest.name||restaurant.name,inserted||null,price.amount??null]);
        }
       }
       db.run('INSERT INTO ai_exchange_history(exchange_type,record_key,direction,status,payload,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)',[preview.request_type,preview.request_id||'', 'import','approved',JSON.stringify(preview),now]);
      });setMessage('AI exchange applied successfully.');setPreview(null);setResponse('');setNormalized(false);onApplied()}
     return <section className="ai-exchange"><div className="audit-head"><div><span>AI Exchange</span><b>Copy JSON → ChatGPT + photos → paste JSON</b></div><strong>FH-X v1</strong></div><label>Request type<select value={type} onChange={e=>{setType(e.target.value);setRequest('');setPreview(null)}}><option value="product_enrichment">Product enrichment</option><option value="restaurant_menu_enrichment">Restaurant menu replacement</option><option value="restaurant_meal_analysis">Restaurant meal photo</option></select></label>{type==='product_enrichment'?<label>Food<select value={foodId} onChange={e=>setFoodId(e.target.value)}>{foods.map(f=><option key={f.food_id} value={f.food_id}>{f.name}</option>)}</select></label>:<label>Restaurant<select value={restaurantId} onChange={e=>setRestaurantId(e.target.value)}>{restaurants.map(r=><option key={r.restaurant_id} value={r.restaurant_id}>{r.name}</option>)}</select></label>}<div className="exchange-actions"><button onClick={generate}><FileJson/> Create JSON</button><button onClick={copy}><ClipboardCopy/> Copy JSON</button></div>{request&&<textarea className="json-box" value={request} readOnly/>}<label>Paste enriched JSON<textarea className="json-box response" value={response} onChange={e=>{setResponse(e.target.value);setPreview(null)}} placeholder="Paste JSON returned by ChatGPT here…"/></label><div className="exchange-actions"><button onClick={paste}>Paste from Clipboard</button><button className="secondary" onClick={clear} disabled={!response&&!preview}>Clear</button><button onClick={review} disabled={!response}>Validate & review</button>{preview&&<button className="primary" onClick={apply}><Check/> Apply</button>}</div>{preview&&<div className="exchange-preview"><b>Validated {preview.request_type.replaceAll('_',' ')}</b><span>{preview.request_type==='product_enrichment'?(preview.record?.product?.name||'New product'):`${preview.restaurant?.name||restaurant.name} · ${(preview.menu_items||[preview.meal]).filter(Boolean).length} item(s)`}</span>{preview.request_type==='restaurant_menu_enrichment'&&<em>This will replace the restaurant’s current active menu.</em>}</div>}{normalized&&<div className="exchange-message ok">Clipboard punctuation normalized automatically.</div>}{message&&<div className="exchange-message">{message}</div>}</section>
    }
    function restaurantScore(meal){return restaurantDecision(meal).score}
    function RestaurantExchangeWorkspace({restaurant,meal,operation,onClose,onApplied}){
     const [response,setResponse]=useState(''),[status,setStatus]=useState(''),[busy,setBusy]=useState(false),[preview,setPreview]=useState(null),[applied,setApplied]=useState(null);
     const targetId=meal?.id||restaurant?.restaurant_id||null;
     const request=useMemo(()=>JSON.stringify({format:'fizz-health-exchange',schema_version:3,request_type:'universal_exchange',request_id:`restaurant-${operation}-${Date.now()}`,operation,target:{type:meal?'restaurant_menu_item':'restaurant',id:targetId,create_if_missing:operation==='create_restaurant'},instructions:{purpose:operation==='replace_menu'?'Replace or enrich this restaurant menu from attached evidence.':operation==='append_menu_items'?'Add or update menu items without removing existing items.':operation==='enrich_menu_item'?'Enrich this specific restaurant menu item from attached evidence.':'Create and enrich this restaurant profile and menu from attached evidence.',rules:['Return exactly one raw JSON object and nothing else.','Use only the ASCII double quotation mark U+0022 (") for every JSON key and string delimiter. Never use curly or typographic quotation marks.','Do not add markdown, commentary, labels, or code fences.','Preserve format, schema_version, request_type, request_id, operation, and target exactly.','For restaurant menus, return proposed_record.menu.sections, with each section containing an items array.','Return arrays as JSON arrays and objects as JSON objects. Do not encode arrays or objects as strings, including fields whose names end in _json.','Use null for unknown values. Do not substitute zero for unknown nutrition.','Do not embed or return photos, PDFs, or binary data.','Include confidence and concise evidence notes.','Before returning, verify that the response can be parsed by JSON.parse without repair.']},existing_record:{restaurant,menu_item:meal||null},proposed_record:operation==='enrich_menu_item'?{menu:{sections:[{name:meal?.category||'Menu',items:[{...meal,ingredients_json:(()=>{try{return JSON.parse(meal?.ingredients_json||'null')}catch{return meal?.ingredients_json||null}})()}]}]}}:{restaurant:{name:restaurant?.name||null,cuisine:restaurant?.cuisine||null,website:restaurant?.website||null,phone:restaurant?.phone||null,address:restaurant?.address||null,price_level:restaurant?.price_level||null,notes:restaurant?.notes||null},menu:{sections:[{name:null,items:[]}]}},analysis:{},review:{requires_user_approval:true}},null,2),[restaurant,meal,operation,targetId]);
     function inspect(text){
      const parsed=parseExchangeJson(text);validateRestaurantExchange(parsed.payload,{operation,targetId});
      const items=restaurantMenuItems(parsed.payload),proposed=parsed.payload.proposed_record||parsed.payload.proposed||{};
      const sections=[...new Set(items.map(x=>x.category).filter(Boolean))];
      setResponse(parsed.normalized);setPreview({payload:parsed.payload,items,sections,restaurant:proposed.restaurant||null,repaired:parsed.repaired});
      setStatus(parsed.repaired?`JSON syntax repaired automatically${parsed.repairs?.length?`: ${parsed.repairs.join(', ')}`:''}. Schema verified. Review the import below.`:'JSON parsed and exchange schema verified. Review the import below.');
     }
     async function copy(){try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(request);setStatus('Request copied. Add the menu photos in ChatGPT, then paste the completed JSON response here.')}catch{setStatus('Clipboard access was blocked. Press and hold the request text below to copy it manually.')}}
     async function paste(){try{const text=await navigator.clipboard.readText();inspect(text)}catch(error){setPreview(null);setStatus(error.message||'Clipboard does not contain valid JSON.')}}
     function review(){try{inspect(response)}catch(error){setPreview(null);setStatus(error.message)}}
     async function apply(){
      if(!preview){review();return}
      setBusy(true);setStatus('Importing menu…');
      try{
       const payload=preview.payload,proposed=payload.proposed_record||payload.proposed||payload,now=new Date().toISOString();
       if(operation==='replace_menu'||operation==='append_menu_items'){
        const items=restaurantMenuItems(payload);if(!items.length)throw new Error('No menu items were returned.');
        const profile=proposed.restaurant||{};
        await transaction(async db=>{
         if(operation==='replace_menu')db.run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET active=0,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?',[now,restaurant.restaurant_id]);
         if(Object.keys(profile).length)db.run(`UPDATE restaurants SET name=COALESCE(?,name),cuisine=COALESCE(?,cuisine),website=COALESCE(?,website),phone=COALESCE(?,phone),address=COALESCE(?,address),price_level=COALESCE(?,price_level),notes=COALESCE(?,notes),updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?`,[profile.name??null,profile.cuisine??null,profile.website??null,profile.phone??null,profile.address??null,profile.price_level??null,profile.notes??null,now,restaurant.restaurant_id]);
         for(const item of items){
          const values=[profile.name||restaurant.name,item.meal_name,item.category||null,item.serving_description||null,item.calories??null,item.protein??null,item.carbs??null,item.fiber??null,item.fat??null,item.saturated_fat??null,item.sodium??null,item.notes||item.evidence_notes||null,item.calories!=null?1:0,'ai_exchange',Number(item.confidence)>1?Number(item.confidence)/100:Number(item.confidence)||null,now,1,JSON.stringify(item.ingredients||item.ingredients_json||[]),item.preparation||null,item.confidence_basis||item.evidence_level||item.evidence_type||'menu_description',item.price??null,item.currency||'USD'];
          const exact=item.id?db.query('SELECT id FROM restaurant_meals WHERE id=? AND restaurant_id=?',[item.id,restaurant.restaurant_id])[0]:null;
          const identity=exact||db.query(`SELECT id FROM restaurant_meals WHERE restaurant_id=? AND lower(trim(meal_name))=lower(trim(?)) AND lower(trim(COALESCE(category,'')))=lower(trim(COALESCE(?,''))) ORDER BY active DESC,id DESC LIMIT 1`,[restaurant.restaurant_id,item.meal_name,item.category||null])[0];
          if(operation==='append_menu_items'&&identity)db.run(`UPDATE restaurant_meals SET restaurant_name=?,meal_name=?,category=?,serving_description=?,calories=?,protein=?,carbs=?,fiber=?,fat=?,saturated_fat=?,sodium=?,notes=?,nutrition_known=?,source=?,confidence=?,updated_at=?,active=?,ingredients_json=?,preparation=?,confidence_basis=?,price=?,currency=? WHERE id=?`,[...values,identity.id]);
          else db.run(`INSERT INTO restaurant_meals(restaurant_id,restaurant_name,meal_name,category,serving_description,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,sodium,notes,nutrition_known,source,confidence,created_at,updated_at,active,ingredients_json,preparation,confidence_basis,price,currency) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[restaurant.restaurant_id,...values.slice(0,16),now,...values.slice(16)]);
         }
         db.run('INSERT INTO ai_exchange_history(exchange_type,record_key,direction,status,payload,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)',['restaurant_menu_enrichment',payload.request_id||'', 'import','approved',JSON.stringify(payload),now]);
        });
        setApplied({count:items.length,sections:preview.sections.length});
       }else if(operation==='enrich_menu_item'){
        const raw=(proposed.menu_item||restaurantMenuItems(payload)[0]||proposed),item=serializeJsonBackedFields(raw),nutrition=item.nutrition||{};
        const mapped={...item,meal_name:item.meal_name||item.name||meal.meal_name,category:item.category??meal.category,serving_description:item.serving_description??item.serving??item.description??meal.serving_description,calories:item.calories??nutrition.calories??meal.calories,protein:item.protein??nutrition.protein_g??meal.protein,carbs:item.carbs??nutrition.carbohydrate_g??meal.carbs,fiber:item.fiber??nutrition.fiber_g??meal.fiber,fat:item.fat??nutrition.total_fat_g??meal.fat,saturated_fat:item.saturated_fat??nutrition.saturated_fat_g??meal.saturated_fat,sodium:item.sodium??nutrition.sodium_mg??meal.sodium,notes:item.notes??item.evidence_notes??meal.notes,nutrition_known:(item.calories??nutrition.calories??meal.calories)!=null?1:0,source:'ai_exchange',confidence:Number(item.confidence)>1?Number(item.confidence)/100:Number(item.confidence)||meal.confidence,ingredients_json:item.ingredients_json??(item.ingredients?JSON.stringify(item.ingredients):meal.ingredients_json),preparation:item.preparation??meal.preparation,confidence_basis:item.confidence_basis||item.evidence_level||item.evidence_type||meal.confidence_basis||'restaurant_estimate',price:typeof item.price==='object'?item.price?.amount:item.price??meal.price,updated_at:now};
        const cols=new Set(query('PRAGMA table_info(restaurant_meals)').map(x=>x.name)),entries=Object.entries(mapped).filter(([key,value])=>cols.has(key)&&key!=='id'&&value!==undefined),assignments=entries.map(([key])=>`${key}=?`),values=entries.map(([,value])=>value);
        await run(`UPDATE restaurant_meals SET ${assignments.join(',')} WHERE id=?`,[...values,meal.id]);
        setApplied({count:1,sections:1});
       }
       setStatus('Import completed successfully.');onApplied?.();
      }catch(error){setStatus(`Import failed: ${error.message}`)}finally{setBusy(false)}
     }
     if(applied)return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-workspace exchange-success"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><div><small>AI EXCHANGE</small><h3>Import complete</h3></div><span/></div><div className="exchange-success-body"><ShieldCheck/><h2>Menu imported</h2><p>{applied.count} menu item{applied.count===1?'':'s'} across {applied.sections} section{applied.sections===1?'':'s'} were saved for {restaurant.name}.</p><button className="primary" onClick={onClose}>Done</button></div></div></div>;
     return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-workspace"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><div><small>AI EXCHANGE</small><h3>{operation==='replace_menu'?'Replace menu':operation==='append_menu_items'?'Add/update menu items':operation==='enrich_menu_item'?'Improve menu item':'New restaurant'}</h3></div><button className="header-icon-action" disabled={!preview||busy} onClick={apply} aria-label="Apply validated import"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll exchange-workspace-scroll"><section className="exchange-step"><small>STEP 1</small><h3>Copy the request</h3><button className="primary" onClick={copy}><ClipboardCopy/> Copy request</button><details><summary>View request JSON</summary><textarea className="json-box" value={request} readOnly/></details></section><section className="exchange-step"><small>STEP 2</small><h3>Paste the response</h3><button className="secondary" onClick={paste}><ClipboardCopy/> Paste from clipboard</button><textarea className="json-box response" value={response} onChange={e=>{setResponse(e.target.value);setPreview(null);setStatus('')}} placeholder="Paste the JSON returned by ChatGPT here…"/><button onClick={review} disabled={!response}>Validate & review</button></section>{preview&&<section className="exchange-review"><div className="exchange-review-head"><ShieldCheck/><div><small>VALIDATED IMPORT</small><h3>{preview.restaurant?.name||restaurant.name}</h3></div></div><div className="exchange-review-stats"><div><b>{preview.items.length}</b><span>menu items</span></div><div><b>{preview.sections.length}</b><span>sections</span></div></div>{operation==='replace_menu'&&<p className="exchange-warning"><AlertTriangle/> This replaces the current active menu. Existing historical records remain preserved.</p>}{operation==='append_menu_items'&&<p className="exchange-append-note"><ShieldCheck/> Existing menu items remain active. Matching names and sections will be updated; new items will be added.</p>}<div className="exchange-section-list">{preview.sections.map(section=><div key={section}><b>{section}</b><span>{preview.items.filter(item=>item.category===section).length} items</span></div>)}</div><details><summary>Preview imported items</summary><ol>{preview.items.slice(0,20).map((item,index)=><li key={`${item.meal_name}-${index}`}><b>{item.meal_name}</b><span>{item.category||'Uncategorized'}{item.price!=null?` · $${Number(item.price).toFixed(2)}`:''}</span></li>)}</ol>{preview.items.length>20&&<p>Plus {preview.items.length-20} more items.</p>}</details><button className="primary exchange-apply" disabled={busy} onClick={apply}><Check/> {busy?'Importing…':`Import ${preview.items.length} item${preview.items.length===1?'':'s'}`}</button></section>}{status&&<p className={`capture-message ${preview?'ok':''}`}>{status}</p>}</div></div></div>
    }
    const RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES=['Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner','Any','Snack','Appetizer','Side','Dessert','Beverage','Condiment'];
    function restaurantMealRoles(meal){
     let roles=[];try{const parsed=JSON.parse(meal.eligible_categories_json||'[]');if(Array.isArray(parsed))roles=parsed}catch{}
     const primary=meal.primary_category||meal.meal_period||'';
     if(primary&&!roles.includes(primary))roles.unshift(primary);
     if(!roles.length){const category=String(meal.category||'').toLowerCase();if(category.includes('breakfast'))roles=['Breakfast'];else if(/coffee|drink|beverage|margarita|cocktail|juice|smoothie/.test(category+' '+String(meal.meal_name||'').toLowerCase()))roles=['Beverage'];else roles=['Any']}
     return [...new Set(roles.filter(role=>RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES.includes(role)))];
    }
    function restaurantMealEligibleFor(meal,slot){const roles=restaurantMealRoles(meal);return roles.includes(slot)||(roles.includes('Any')&&['Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner'].includes(slot))}
    function RestaurantMealClassificationEditor({meal,onClose,onSaved}){
     const current=restaurantMealRoles(meal),[primary,setPrimary]=useState(meal.primary_category||current[0]||'Any'),[eligible,setEligible]=useState(current),[favorite,setFavorite]=useState(Number(meal.favorite)===1),[active,setActive]=useState(Number(meal.active)!==0),[price,setPrice]=useState(meal.price??'');
     function toggle(role){setEligible(rows=>rows.includes(role)?rows.filter(x=>x!==role):[...rows,role])}
     async function save(){const roles=[...new Set([primary,...eligible])];await run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET primary_category=?,eligible_categories_json=?,meal_period=?,favorite=?,active=?,price=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?',[primary,JSON.stringify(roles),primary,favorite?1:0,active?1:0,price===''?null:Number(price),new Date().toISOString(),meal.id]);onSaved?.();onClose()}
     return <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={onClose}><div className="panel fixed-editor restaurant-classification-editor" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel"><X/></button><div><small>RESTAURANT MEAL</small><h3>Classify {meal.meal_name}</h3></div><button onClick={save} aria-label="Save classification"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Primary category<select value={primary} onChange={e=>{setPrimary(e.target.value);setEligible(rows=>rows.includes(e.target.value)?rows:[...rows,e.target.value])}}>{RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES.map(role=><option key={role}>{role}</option>)}</select></label><fieldset className="restaurant-role-picker"><legend>Eligible categories</legend><p>Choose every place this item can appear in Restaurant Intelligence and Meal Planning.</p><div>{RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES.map(role=><button type="button" key={role} className={eligible.includes(role)?'active':''} onClick={()=>toggle(role)}>{eligible.includes(role)?<Check/>:<Plus/>}{role}</button>)}</div></fieldset><label>Price<input type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.01" value={price} onChange={e=>setPrice(e.target.value)}/></label><label className="check-row"><input type="checkbox" checked={favorite} onChange={e=>setFavorite(e.target.checked)}/> Starred favorite</label><label className="check-row"><input type="checkbox" checked={active} onChange={e=>setActive(e.target.checked)}/> Active menu item</label></div></div></div>
    }
    function restaurantDishDescription(meal){
     const candidates=[meal.serving_description,meal.preparation,meal.notes];
     return candidates.map(value=>String(value||'').trim()).find(value=>value&&!/estimated from|confidence|nutrition/i.test(value))||'Dish description not yet available.';
    }
    function restaurantRankReason(meal,decision,rank){
     const positives=[...(decision.positive||[])],negatives=[...(decision.negative||[])];
     const factors=[...(decision.factors||[])].sort((a,b)=>Math.abs(Number(b.impact)||0)-Math.abs(Number(a.impact)||0));
     const best=factors.find(f=>Number(f.impact)>0),worst=factors.find(f=>Number(f.impact)<0);
     const protein=Number(meal.protein)||0,sat=Number(meal.saturated_fat)||0,chol=Number(meal.cholesterol)||0,cal=Number(meal.calories)||0;
     if(!positives.length&&protein>=25)positives.push('strong protein');
     if(!negatives.length&&sat>=8)negatives.push('high saturated fat');
     if(!negatives.length&&chol>=250)negatives.push('high cholesterol');
     if(!negatives.length&&cal>=700)negatives.push('high calories');
     const strength=positives[0]||best?.label;const tradeoff=negatives[0]||worst?.label;
     if(strength&&tradeoff)return `${strength.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+strength.slice(1)}, but ${tradeoff.charAt(0).toLowerCase()+tradeoff.slice(1)} keeps it from ranking higher.`;
     if(strength)return `${strength.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+strength.slice(1)} supports its #${rank} ranking today.`;
     if(tradeoff)return `${tradeoff.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+tradeoff.slice(1)} is the main reason it ranks #${rank}.`;
     return `Ranked #${rank} from today's calorie, protein, fiber, saturated-fat, and confidence factors.`;
    }
    function nutrientStatus(type,value){
     const v=Number(value)||0;
     if(type==='protein')return v>=30?['Excellent','good']:v>=20?['Good','good']:v>=10?['Fair','moderate']:['Low','warning'];
     if(type==='sat')return v<=3?['Low','good']:v<=7?['Moderate','moderate']:['High','danger'];
     return v<=100?['Low','good']:v<=250?['Moderate','moderate']:['High','danger'];
    }
    function RestaurantMetric({type,label,value,unit}){const [status,tone]=nutrientStatus(type,value);return <div className={`restaurant-metric ${tone}`}><span>{label}</span><strong>{Math.round(Number(value)||0)}{unit}</strong><em>{status}</em></div>}
    function RestaurantSwipeCard({meal,decision,rank,onOpen,onExplain,onFavorite,onEnrich,onRetire,onLog}){
     const [startX,setStartX]=useState(null),[dx,setDx]=useState(0);function end(){if(dx>70)onLog();else if(dx<-70)onRetire();setStartX(null);setDx(0)}
     const confidence=decision.confidence?.score??Math.round((meal.confidence||0)*100),description=restaurantDishDescription(meal),reason=restaurantRankReason(meal,decision,rank);
     const swipeOffset=Math.max(-90,Math.min(90,dx));
     const swipeStyle={transform:'translateX('+swipeOffset+'px)'};
     return <article className={`restaurant-rank-card restaurant-decision-card restaurant-decision-card-final ${rank===1?'winner':''}`} onTouchStart={e=>setStartX(e.touches[0].clientX)} onTouchMove={e=>startX!=null&&setDx(e.touches[0].clientX-startX)} onTouchEnd={end} style={swipeStyle}>
      <div className="restaurant-card-content">
       <div className="restaurant-card-topline"><em className="restaurant-rank-circle">#{rank}</em><span className={`restaurant-price-badge ${meal.price==null?'unknown':''}`}>{meal.price==null?'Price unknown':`${meal.currency&&meal.currency!=='USD'?meal.currency+' ': '$'}${Number(meal.price).toFixed(2)}`}</span><button className={`favorite-star ${Number(meal.favorite)===1?'active':''}`} onClick={onFavorite} aria-label="Toggle favorite"><Star fill={Number(meal.favorite)===1?'currentColor':'none'}/></button><button className="item-pencil" onClick={onEnrich} aria-label="Improve menu item"><Pencil/></button></div>
       <button className="restaurant-card-main" onClick={onOpen}><b>{meal.meal_name}</b><span>{meal.primary_category||meal.meal_period||meal.category||'Meal'} · {Math.round(meal.calories||0)} kcal · {Math.round(meal.protein||0)}g prot</span><p>{description}</p><small><strong>WHY IT RANKS #{rank}</strong>{reason}</small></button>
      </div>
      <aside className="restaurant-card-metrics" aria-label="Confidence and goal metrics"><button className="score-circle" onClick={onExplain} aria-label={`Explain ${confidence} percent confidence`}><span>{confidence}%</span></button><RestaurantMetric type="protein" label="Prot" value={meal.protein} unit="g"/><RestaurantMetric type="sat" label="Sat Fat" value={meal.saturated_fat} unit="g"/><RestaurantMetric type="chol" label="Chol" value={meal.cholesterol} unit="mg"/></aside>
     </article>
    }
    function Restaurants({refresh,done}){
     const [selectedId,setSelectedId]=useState(null),[showArchived,setShowArchived]=useState(false),[revision,setRevision]=useState(0),[editingProfile,setEditingProfile]=useState(false),[creating,setCreating]=useState(false),[selectedMeal,setSelectedMeal]=useState(null),[decisionMeal,setDecisionMeal]=useState(null),[classifyMeal,setClassifyMeal]=useState(null),[menuFilter,setMenuFilter]=useState('All'),[exchange,setExchange]=useState(null);
     const restaurants=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=? ORDER BY COALESCE(favorite,0) DESC,name COLLATE NOCASE`,[showArchived?1:0]);const selected=selectedId?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE restaurant_id=?',[selectedId])[0]:null;const meals=selected?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM restaurant_meals WHERE restaurant_id=? AND COALESCE(active,1)=1 ORDER BY favorite DESC,meal_name COLLATE NOCASE',[selected.restaurant_id]):[];const visits=selected?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM restaurant_visits WHERE restaurant_id=? ORDER BY visited_at DESC',[selected.restaurant_id]):[];const totals=getTodayTotals();let ranked=[];if(selected){try{const visible=menuFilter==='Favorites'?meals.filter(m=>Number(m.favorite)===1):menuFilter==='All'?meals:meals.filter(m=>restaurantMealEligibleFor(m,menuFilter));ranked=rankRestaurantMenu({meals:visible,totals,targets:getTargets(),limit:null})}catch(error){console.error(error)}}const profile=selected?restaurantProfileSummary({restaurant:selected,visits,meals}):null;
     async function favoriteMeal(e,meal){e.stopPropagation();await run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET favorite=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?',[Number(meal.favorite)===1?0:1,new Date().toISOString(),meal.id]);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     async function favoriteRestaurant(){await run('UPDATE restaurants SET favorite=?,status=?,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?',[profile.favorite?0:1,profile.favorite?'Saved':'Favorite',new Date().toISOString(),selected.restaurant_id]);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     async function saveProfile(e){e.preventDefault();const f=new FormData(e.currentTarget),now=new Date().toISOString();if(creating){const id=`R${Date.now()}`;await run('INSERT INTO restaurants(restaurant_id,name,location,status,notes,updated_at,cuisine,website,phone,address,price_level,archived,favorite) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[id,f.get('name'),'','Active',f.get('notes'),now,f.get('cuisine'),f.get('website'),f.get('phone'),f.get('address'),f.get('price_level'),0,0]);setCreating(false);setSelectedId(id);setExchange({operation:'replace_menu',restaurant:{restaurant_id:id,name:f.get('name'),cuisine:f.get('cuisine'),website:f.get('website'),phone:f.get('phone'),address:f.get('address'),price_level:f.get('price_level'),notes:f.get('notes')}})}else{await run('UPDATE restaurants SET name=?,cuisine=?,website=?,phone=?,address=?,price_level=?,notes=?,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?',[f.get('name'),f.get('cuisine'),f.get('website'),f.get('phone'),f.get('address'),f.get('price_level'),f.get('notes'),now,selected.restaurant_id]);setEditingProfile(false);setRevision(x=>x+1)}}
     async function archive(){const next=Number(selected.archived)!==1;if(!window.confirm(`${next?'Archive':'Restore'} ${selected.name}? Historical meals will be preserved.`))return;await run('UPDATE restaurants SET archived=?,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?',[next?1:0,new Date().toISOString(),selected.restaurant_id]);setSelectedId(null);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     async function retireMeal(meal){if(!window.confirm(`Retire ${meal.meal_name} from the active menu?`))return;await run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET active=0,updated_at=? WHERE id=?',[new Date().toISOString(),meal.id]);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     const editor=(creating||editingProfile)&&<div className="modal-backdrop"><form className="panel restaurant-profile-editor fixed-editor" onSubmit={saveProfile}><div className="edit-head sticky-head restaurant-editor-head"><button type="button" aria-label="Cancel restaurant editor" onClick={()=>{setCreating(false);setEditingProfile(false)}}><X/></button><h3>{creating?'New restaurant':'Restaurant profile'}</h3><button type="submit" aria-label={creating?'Save new restaurant':'Save restaurant profile'}><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Name<input name="name" required defaultValue={creating?'':selected?.name||''}/></label><label>Cuisine<input name="cuisine" defaultValue={creating?'':selected?.cuisine||''}/></label><label>Website<input name="website" defaultValue={creating?'':selected?.website||''}/></label><label>Phone<input name="phone" defaultValue={creating?'':selected?.phone||''}/></label><label>Address<input name="address" defaultValue={creating?'':selected?.address||selected?.location||''}/></label><label>Price level<select name="price_level" defaultValue={creating?'':selected?.price_level||''}><option value="">Not specified</option><option>$</option><option>$$</option><option>$$$</option><option>$$$$</option></select></label><label>Notes<textarea name="notes" defaultValue={creating?'':selected?.notes||''}/></label></div></form></div>;
     if(selected)return <><div className="standard-page-head"><button onClick={()=>setSelectedId(null)} aria-label="Close restaurant"><X/></button><h2>{selected.name}</h2><button onClick={()=>setEditingProfile(true)} aria-label="Edit restaurant"><Pencil/></button></div><header><Brand/><small>RESTAURANT INTELLIGENCE</small><h1>{selected.name}</h1><p><MapPin/> {selected.address||selected.location||'Location not specified'}</p></header><section className="restaurant-profile-card"><div><span>{profile.cuisine}</span><b>{profile.visitCount} recorded visit{profile.visitCount===1?'':'s'}</b><small>{profile.favoriteMeals.length?`Favorite dishes: ${profile.favoriteMeals.join(', ')}`:'No favorite dishes yet'}</small></div><button onClick={favoriteRestaurant}><Star fill={profile.favorite?'currentColor':'none'}/>{profile.favorite?'Favorite':'Add favorite'}</button></section><div className="restaurant-admin restaurant-admin-clean"><button onClick={()=>setEditingProfile(true)}>Edit profile</button><button onClick={()=>setExchange({operation:'replace_menu',restaurant:selected})}>Replace menu</button><button onClick={()=>setExchange({operation:'append_menu_items',restaurant:selected})}>Add menu items</button><button onClick={archive}>{Number(selected.archived)===1?'Restore':'Archive'}</button></div><section className="decision-mode-head"><div><small>WHAT SHOULD I ORDER?</small><h2>Ranked for today</h2><p>Scores use today’s calories, protein, fiber, saturated-fat room, menu evidence, and confidence.</p></div>{ranked[0]&&<strong>Best: {ranked[0].meal.meal_name}</strong>}</section><div className="restaurant-menu-filters" role="tablist" aria-label="Restaurant menu categories">{['All','Favorites',...RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES].map(filter=><button key={filter} className={menuFilter===filter?'active':''} onClick={()=>setMenuFilter(filter)}>{filter}</button>)}</div>{ranked.length?<div className="restaurant-ranking">{ranked.map(({meal,decision,rank})=><RestaurantSwipeCard key={meal.id} meal={meal} decision={decision} rank={rank} onOpen={()=>setSelectedMeal(meal)} onExplain={()=>setDecisionMeal(meal)} onFavorite={e=>favoriteMeal(e,meal)} onEnrich={()=>setClassifyMeal(meal)} onRetire={()=>retireMeal(meal)} onLog={()=>setSelectedMeal(meal)}/>)}</div>:<div className="empty">No active menu items. Use Replace menu to add one.</div>}{editor}{selectedMeal&&<RestaurantMealDetails meal={selectedMeal} restaurant={selected} onClose={()=>setSelectedMeal(null)} onEnrich={()=>{setSelectedMeal(null);setExchange({operation:'enrich_menu_item',restaurant:selected,meal:selectedMeal})}} onSaved={()=>{refresh();setRevision(x=>x+1)}}/>}{decisionMeal&&<RestaurantConfidenceDetails meal={decisionMeal} onClose={()=>setDecisionMeal(null)}/>} {classifyMeal&&<RestaurantMealClassificationEditor meal={classifyMeal} onClose={()=>setClassifyMeal(null)} onSaved={()=>{refresh();setRevision(x=>x+1)}}/>} {exchange&&<RestaurantExchangeWorkspace {...exchange} onClose={()=>setExchange(null)} onApplied={()=>{refresh();setRevision(x=>x+1)}}/>}</>;
     return <><div className="standard-page-head"><button onClick={done} aria-label="Close restaurants"><X/></button><h2>Restaurants</h2><button onClick={()=>setCreating(true)} aria-label="Add restaurant"><Plus/></button></div><header><Brand/><small>RESTAURANT INTELLIGENCE</small><h1>Restaurants</h1><p>{restaurants.length} {showArchived?'archived':'active'} profiles</p></header><button className="archive-toggle" onClick={()=>setShowArchived(x=>!x)}>{showArchived?'Show active restaurants':'Show archived restaurants'}</button><div className="list restaurant-list">{restaurants.map(r=><button className="item" key={r.restaurant_id} onClick={()=>{setSelectedId(r.restaurant_id);setMenuFilter('All')}}><div><b>{r.name}</b><span>{r.cuisine||'Cuisine not specified'} · {r.location||r.address||'Location not specified'}{Number(r.favorite)===1?' · Favorite':''}</span></div><UtensilsCrossed/></button>)}</div>{!restaurants.length&&<div className="empty">{showArchived?'No archived restaurants.':'Tap + to add a restaurant.'}</div>}{editor}</>
    }
    
    const HEALTH_METRICS=[
     {type:'weight',label:'Body weight',unit:'lb',Icon:Scale,step:'0.1',placeholder:'227.1'},
     {type:'blood_pressure',label:'Blood pressure',unit:'mmHg',Icon:HeartPulse,step:'1',placeholder:'121',secondaryLabel:'Diastolic',secondaryPlaceholder:'79'},
     {type:'resting_heart_rate',label:'Resting heart rate',unit:'bpm',Icon:Activity,step:'1',placeholder:'47'},
     {type:'steps',label:'Steps',unit:'steps',Icon:Footprints,step:'1',placeholder:'5524'},
     {type:'waist',label:'Waist',unit:'in',Icon:Ruler,step:'0.1',placeholder:'36.5',optional:true},
     {type:'workout',label:'Workout',unit:'completed',Icon:Dumbbell,step:'1',placeholder:'1',boolean:true,optional:true},
     {type:'sleep',label:'Sleep',unit:'hours',Icon:Moon,step:'0.1',placeholder:'7.5',optional:true}
    ];
    const metricDefinition=type=>HEALTH_METRICS.find(m=>m.type===type)||HEALTH_METRICS[0];
    const healthValue=(row,def)=>{if(!row)return 'Not logged';if(def.type==='blood_pressure')return `${Math.round(Number(row.value_primary))}/${Math.round(Number(row.value_secondary))}`;if(def.boolean)return Number(row.value_primary)===1?'Completed':'Not completed';const value=Number(row.value_primary);return `${Number.isInteger(value)?value:value.toFixed(1)} ${def.unit}`};
    function HealthMetricEditor({definition,row,onClose,onSaved}){
     const [primary,setPrimary]=useState(row?.value_primary??(definition.boolean?'1':'')),[secondary,setSecondary]=useState(row?.value_secondary??''),[measuredAt,setMeasuredAt]=useState(()=>row?.measured_at?storedDateTimeLocal(row.measured_at):toDateTimeLocal()),[notes,setNotes]=useState(row?.notes||''),[error,setError]=useState('');
     async function save(){
      const first=definition.boolean?Number(primary):Number(primary);const second=definition.secondaryLabel?Number(secondary):null;
      if(!Number.isFinite(first)||(definition.secondaryLabel&&!Number.isFinite(second))){setError('Enter a valid value.');return}
      const when=new Date(measuredAt);if(Number.isNaN(when.getTime())){setError('Enter a valid date and time.');return}if(!row&&when.getTime()>Date.now()+60000){setError('New readings cannot be dated in the future.');return}
      const iso=when.toISOString(),local=localDateKey(when),now=new Date().toISOString();
      await transaction(async db=>{
       if(row?.id)db.run('UPDATE health_metrics SET value_primary=?,value_secondary=?,unit=?,measured_at=?,local_date=?,notes=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?',[first,second,definition.unit,iso,local,notes||null,now,row.id]);
       else db.run('INSERT INTO health_metrics(metric_type,value_primary,value_secondary,unit,measured_at,local_date,notes,source,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[definition.type,first,second,definition.unit,iso,local,notes||null,'manual',now,now]);
       if(definition.type==='weight')db.run("INSERT INTO settings(key,value) VALUES ('current_weight_lb',?) ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value=excluded.value",[String(first)]);
      });onSaved();
     }
     async function remove(){if(!row?.id||!confirm(`Delete this ${definition.label.toLowerCase()} reading?`))return;await run('DELETE FROM health_metrics WHERE id=?',[row.id]);onSaved()}
     return <div className="modal-backdrop"><div className="panel health-editor"><div className="edit-head"><div><small>{row?'EDIT READING':'NEW READING'}</small><h3>{definition.label}</h3></div><button onClick={onClose}><X/></button></div><div className="health-form">{definition.boolean?<div className="workout-choice"><button className={Number(primary)===1?'active':''} onClick={()=>setPrimary('1')}><Check/> Completed</button><button className={Number(primary)===0?'active':''} onClick={()=>setPrimary('0')}><X/> Not completed</button></div>:<div className={definition.secondaryLabel?'bp-inputs':'single-metric-input'}><label>{definition.secondaryLabel?'Systolic':definition.label}<input autoFocus type="number" inputMode="decimal" step={definition.step} value={primary} placeholder={definition.placeholder} onChange={e=>setPrimary(e.target.value)}/></label>{definition.secondaryLabel&&<label>{definition.secondaryLabel}<input type="number" inputMode="numeric" step="1" value={secondary} placeholder={definition.secondaryPlaceholder} onChange={e=>setSecondary(e.target.value)}/></label>}<strong>{definition.unit}</strong></div>}<label>Date and time<input type="datetime-local" value={measuredAt} max={row?undefined:toDateTimeLocal()} onChange={e=>setMeasuredAt(e.target.value)}/></label><label>Notes <small>optional</small><textarea rows="3" value={notes} onChange={e=>setNotes(e.target.value)} placeholder="Anything useful about this reading"/></label>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div><div className="editor-actions">{row&&<button className="danger-text" onClick={remove}><Trash2/> Delete</button>}<button className="secondary" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</button><button className="primary" onClick={save}><Check/> Save</button></div></div></div>
    }
    function MetricLineChart({rows,definition}){
     const data=[...rows].filter(r=>Number.isFinite(Number(r.value_primary))).sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.measured_at)-new Date(b.measured_at));
     if(!data.length)return <div className="metric-line-chart empty-chart"><b>No readings in this range.</b><span>Add a reading or choose a longer range.</span></div>;
     const primary=data.map(r=>finite(r.value_primary)),secondary=definition.type==='blood_pressure'?data.map(r=>finite(r.value_secondary)):null,all=secondary?[...primary,...secondary]:primary,min=Math.min(...all),max=Math.max(...all),x=i=>data.length===1?50:i/(data.length-1)*88+6,y=v=>28-((v-min)/(max-min||1))*22,points=vals=>vals.map((v,i)=>`${x(i)},${y(v)}`).join(' ');
     const markers=(vals,prefix)=>{const high=Math.max(...vals),low=Math.min(...vals),latest=vals.length-1,hi=vals.lastIndexOf(high),lo=vals.lastIndexOf(low);return [{i:hi,v:high,label:`${prefix} High`},{i:lo,v:low,label:`${prefix} Low`},{i:latest,v:vals[latest],label:`${prefix} Latest`}].filter((m,i,a)=>a.findIndex(x=>x.i===m.i&&x.v===m.v)===i)};
     const label=m=><g key={m.label}><circle cx={x(m.i)} cy={y(m.v)} r="1.8" className="metric-point"/><text x={x(m.i)} y={Math.max(3,y(m.v)-2.3)} textAnchor="middle">{m.label} {Math.round(m.v*10)/10}</text></g>;
     const pMarks=markers(primary,secondary?'SYS':'');const sMarks=secondary?markers(secondary,'DIA'):[];
     return <div className="metric-line-chart"><div className="chart-heading"><b>{definition.label} trend</b><span>{data.length} reading{data.length===1?'':'s'} · {new Date(data[0].measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}–{new Date(data.at(-1).measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span></div><svg viewBox="0 0 100 34" preserveAspectRatio="none" role="img" aria-label={`${definition.label} trend`}><polyline className="metric-primary" points={points(primary)} fill="none" vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"/>{secondary&&<polyline className="metric-secondary" points={points(secondary)} fill="none" vectorEffect="non-scaling-stroke"/>}{pMarks.map(label)}{sMarks.map(label)}</svg><div className="chart-summary"><span>Primary low <b>{Math.min(...primary)} {definition.unit}</b></span><span>Primary high <b>{Math.max(...primary)} {definition.unit}</b></span><span>Latest <b>{primary.at(-1)} {definition.unit}</b></span></div>{secondary&&<><div className="chart-summary secondary-summary"><span>Diastolic low <b>{Math.min(...secondary)} mmHg</b></span><span>Diastolic high <b>{Math.max(...secondary)} mmHg</b></span><span>Latest <b>{secondary.at(-1)} mmHg</b></span></div><div className="chart-legend"><span>Systolic</span><span>Diastolic</span></div></>}</div>
    }
    function normalizeLabRecord(row){
     const pick=(...keys)=>{for(const key of keys){const value=row?.[key];if(value!==undefined&&value!==null&&String(value).trim()!=='')return value}return null};
     const rawName=pick('biomarker','test_name','Test Name','test','Test','metric_type','Lab Test','Analyte');
     const rawValue=pick('value','result_value','Value','Result','result','numeric_value');
     const numeric=Number(String(rawValue??'').replaceAll(',','').match(/[-+]?\d*\.?\d+/)?.[0]);
     const notes=pick('notes','Notes','reference_range','Reference Range');
     const explicitUnit=pick('unit','Unit','units','Units');
     const inferredUnit=String(rawValue??'').match(/(?:mg\/dL|mmol\/L|ng\/mL|%|mIU\/L|U\/L|g\/dL|mL\/min[^,; ]*)/i)?.[0]||String(notes??'').match(/(?:mg\/dL|mmol\/L|ng\/mL|%|mIU\/L|U\/L|g\/dL|mL\/min[^,; ]*)/i)?.[0]||'';
     const collected=pick('collected_at','Date','date','measured_at','recorded_at','Collection Date');
     return {...row,biomarker:rawName?String(rawName).trim():null,test_name:rawName?String(rawName).trim():null,value:numeric,unit:String(explicitUnit||inferredUnit||'').trim(),collected_at:collected,notes:notes||null};
    }
    
    // FH-1262: Health renders the canonical federated Event contract rather than rebuilding its own timeline shape.
    function SwipeHealthTimelineEvent({event,onOpen,onDelete,onQuickAdd}){
     const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0),start=useRef(null),moved=useRef(false);
     const isMeal=event.type==='meal';
     const down=e=>{start.current={x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY};moved.current=false;e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture?.(e.pointerId)};
     const move=e=>{if(!start.current)return;const dx=e.clientX-start.current.x,dy=e.clientY-start.current.y;if(Math.abs(dx)>8||Math.abs(dy)>8)moved.current=true;if(Math.abs(dx)>Math.abs(dy))setOffset(Math.max(-88,Math.min(88,dx)))};
     const up=()=>{if(!start.current)return;const left=offset<-45,right=offset>45,wasMoved=moved.current;start.current=null;setOffset(left?-82:right?82:0);if(!wasMoved&&!left&&!right)onOpen?.(event)};
     return <div className="health-event-swipe swipe-shell">{isMeal&&<button type="button" className="swipe-quick" aria-label={`Log ${event.title} again`} onClick={()=>onQuickAdd(event.source)}><Plus/><span>Log again</span></button>}{isMeal&&<button type="button" className="swipe-delete" aria-label={`Delete ${event.title}`} onClick={()=>onDelete(event.source)}><Trash2/><span>Delete</span></button>}<button type="button" className="health-event-card swipe-card" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={down} onPointerMove={move} onPointerUp={up} onPointerCancel={()=>{start.current=null;setOffset(0)}}><time>{new Date(event.eventAt).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'})}</time><span className={`timeline-dot ${isMeal?'meal':''}`}/><div><b>{event.title}</b><small>{event.detail}</small></div></button></div>
    }
    function Health({tick,refresh}){
     const [revision,setRevision]=useState(0),[selected,setSelected]=useState(null),[historyType,setHistoryType]=useState(null),[range,setRange]=useState(30),[intelDetail,setIntelDetail]=useState(null),[timelineUndo,setTimelineUndo]=useState(null),[timelineToast,setTimelineToast]=useState('');
     useEffect(()=>{const requested=sessionStorage.getItem('fizz-open-health-metric');if(requested){sessionStorage.removeItem('fizz-open-health-metric');const def=metricDefinition(requested);setSelected({definition:def,row:null})}},[]);
     const readings=query('SELECT * FROM health_metrics ORDER BY measured_at DESC,id DESC');
     const latest=Object.fromEntries(HEALTH_METRICS.map(def=>[def.type,readings.find(r=>r.metric_type===def.type&&r.local_date===today())||null]));
     const required=HEALTH_METRICS.filter(x=>!x.optional),complete=required.filter(x=>latest[x.type]).length;
     const start=new Date();if(range!=='all')start.setDate(start.getDate()-Number(range));const history=historyType?readings.filter(r=>r.metric_type===historyType&&(range==='all'||new Date(r.measured_at)>=start)):[];
     const meals=query('SELECT * FROM meals ORDER BY eaten_at DESC LIMIT 2500');
     const rawLabRows=query('SELECT * FROM lab_results'); const labRows=rawLabRows.map(normalizeLabRecord).filter(r=>r.biomarker&&Number.isFinite(r.value)&&r.collected_at); const metricLabs=query("SELECT substr(metric_type,11) AS biomarker,value_primary AS value,unit,measured_at AS collected_at,source,notes FROM health_metrics WHERE metric_type LIKE 'biomarker:%' ORDER BY measured_at DESC").map(normalizeLabRecord); const labKey=r=>`${String(r.biomarker).toLowerCase()}|${String(r.collected_at).slice(0,10)}|${r.value}`; const labs=[...new Map([...labRows,...metricLabs].map(r=>[labKey(r),r])).values()];
     const goals=query('SELECT * FROM health_goals WHERE active=1 ORDER BY priority DESC');
     const preventive=query('SELECT * FROM preventive_health_items ORDER BY due_date');
     const interventionRows=query('SELECT * FROM health_interventions ORDER BY start_date DESC');
     const series={};for(const r of readings){(series[r.metric_type]??=[]).push({date:r.local_date||r.measured_at,value:r.value_primary})}
     const nutritionDays={};for(const m of meals){const d=String(m.consumed_local_date||m.eaten_at||'').slice(0,10);if(!d)continue;const x=nutritionDays[d]??={date:d,calories:0,protein:0,fiber:0,saturated_fat:0,sodium:0};for(const k of ['calories','protein','fiber','saturated_fat','sodium'])x[k]+=Number(m[k])||0}
     for(const k of ['calories','protein','fiber','saturated_fat','sodium'])series[k]=Object.values(nutritionDays).map(x=>({date:x.date,value:x[k]}));
     const goalModels={};for(const g of goals){const rows=readings.filter(r=>r.metric_type===g.goal_type).map(r=>({date:r.measured_at,value:r.value_primary}));const current=rows.length?rows.sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.date)-new Date(b.date)).at(-1).value:0;goalModels[g.goal_id]={current,target:g.target_value,history:rows,direction:g.direction||'down'}}
     const health2=buildHealthIntelligence2({metrics:readings,meals,labs,preventive,series,goals:goalModels,biomarkerTargets:{ldl:100,hdl:60,triglycerides:150,'total cholesterol':200,apob:80,a1c:5.7,'fasting glucose':100}});
     const todayMeals=meals.filter(r=>String(r.consumed_local_date||r.eaten_at).slice(0,10)===today());
     const timeline=buildUnifiedTimeline({meals:todayMeals,metrics:readings.filter(r=>r.local_date===today())});
     const saved=()=>{setSelected(null);setRevision(x=>x+1);refresh()};
     const timelineChanged=message=>{setRevision(x=>x+1);refresh();setTimelineToast(message);setTimeout(()=>setTimelineToast(''),1800)};
     async function deleteTimelineMeal(row){
      const snapshot={...row};
      await transaction(async db=>{if(row.pantry_id&&Number(row.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)+? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(row.pantry_delta),row.pantry_id]);if(row.pantry_id&&Number(row.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='No' WHERE pantry_id=?",[row.pantry_id]);db.run('DELETE FROM meals WHERE id=?',[row.id])});
      setTimelineUndo(snapshot);timelineChanged(`${row.food_name} deleted`);setTimeout(()=>setTimelineUndo(current=>current?.id===snapshot.id?null:current),5000);
     }
     async function undoTimelineMeal(){if(!timelineUndo)return;const r=timelineUndo;await transaction(async db=>{if(r.pantry_id&&Number(r.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(r.pantry_delta),r.pantry_id]);if(r.pantry_id&&Number(r.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[r.pantry_id]);const available=new Set(db.query('PRAGMA table_info(meals)').map(x=>x.name)),cols=Object.keys(r).filter(c=>available.has(c));db.run(`INSERT INTO meals(${cols.join(',')}) VALUES (${cols.map(()=>'?').join(',')})`,cols.map(c=>r[c]??null))});setTimelineUndo(null);timelineChanged(`${r.food_name} restored`)}
     async function quickAddTimelineMeal(row){const now=new Date(),copy={...row,id:null,eaten_at:now.toISOString(),created_at:now.toISOString(),updated_at:now.toISOString(),consumed_local_date:localDateKey(now),timezone_offset_minutes:-now.getTimezoneOffset()};await transaction(async db=>{if(copy.pantry_id&&Number(copy.pantry_delta))db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[Number(copy.pantry_delta),copy.pantry_id]);if(copy.pantry_id&&Number(copy.pantry_opened_changed))db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[copy.pantry_id]);const available=new Set(db.query('PRAGMA table_info(meals)').map(x=>x.name)),cols=Object.keys(copy).filter(c=>c!=='id'&&available.has(c));db.run(`INSERT INTO meals(${cols.join(',')}) VALUES (${cols.map(()=>'?').join(',')})`,cols.map(c=>copy[c]??null))});timelineChanged(`${row.food_name} logged again`)}
    
     if(historyType){const def=metricDefinition(historyType);const all=readings.filter(r=>r.metric_type===historyType).sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.measured_at)-new Date(b.measured_at));const current=all.at(-1);const vals=history.map(r=>Number(r.value_primary)).filter(Number.isFinite);const allVals=all.map(r=>Number(r.value_primary)).filter(Number.isFinite);const avg=n=>{const cutoff=new Date();cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate()-n);const v=all.filter(r=>new Date(r.measured_at)>=cutoff).map(r=>Number(r.value_primary)).filter(Number.isFinite);return v.length?v.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/v.length:null};const priorAtOrBelow=current?[...all.slice(0,-1)].reverse().find(r=>Number(r.value_primary)<=Number(current.value_primary)):null;return <><header className="detail-header"><button className="back" onClick={()=>setHistoryType(null)}>‹ Health</button><button className="detail-close" aria-label="Close metric history" onClick={()=>setHistoryType(null)}><X/></button><Brand/><small>METRIC HISTORY</small><h1>{def.label}</h1></header>{historyType==='weight'&&current&&<section className="weight-summary"><div className="weight-current"><small>Current weight</small><strong>{Number(current.value_primary).toFixed(1)} lb</strong><span>{all.length>1?`${Number(current.value_primary)-Number(all[0].value_primary)<=0?'▼':'▲'} ${Math.abs(Number(current.value_primary)-Number(all[0].value_primary)).toFixed(1)} lb since ${new Date(all[0].measured_at).toLocaleDateString([],{month:'short',year:'numeric'})}`:'First recorded weight'}</span></div><div className="weight-milestones"><div><small>Last at or below</small><b>{priorAtOrBelow?new Date(priorAtOrBelow.measured_at).toLocaleDateString():'🏆 New recorded low'}</b></div><div><small>Lowest</small><span>{new Date(all.find(r=>Number(r.value_primary)===Math.min(...allVals))?.measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{Math.min(...allVals).toFixed(1)} lb</b></div><div><small>Highest</small><span>{new Date(all.find(r=>Number(r.value_primary)===Math.max(...allVals))?.measured_at).toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{Math.max(...allVals).toFixed(1)} lb</b></div><div><small>30-day average</small><span>{new Date(Date.now()-29*86400000).toLocaleDateString()}–{new Date().toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{avg(30)?.toFixed(1)||'—'} lb</b></div><div><small>7-day average</small><span>{new Date(Date.now()-6*86400000).toLocaleDateString()}–{new Date().toLocaleDateString()}</span><b>{avg(7)?.toFixed(1)||'—'} lb</b></div></div><MetricLineChart rows={history} definition={def}/></section>}{historyType!=='weight'&&<MetricLineChart rows={history} definition={def}/>}<div className="range-tabs">{[7,30,90,'all'].map(d=><button key={d} className={range===d?'active':''} onClick={()=>setRange(d)}>{d==='all'?'All':`${d}D`}</button>)}</div><div className="history-list">{history.map(r=><button key={r.id} className="history-reading" onClick={()=>setSelected({definition:def,row:r})}><div><b>{healthValue(r,def)}</b><span>{new Date(r.measured_at).toLocaleString()}</span></div><Pencil/></button>)}{!history.length&&<div className="empty">No readings in this range.</div>}</div>{intelDetail&&<div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>HEALTH INTELLIGENCE</small><h2>{intelDetail.title}</h2></div><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail(null)} aria-label="Close"><X/></button></header><section className="decision-block"><h3>Why this matters</h3><p>{intelDetail.body}</p><h3>What to do next</h3><p>Review the supporting records, correct anything incomplete, and use the trend as decision support rather than diagnosis.</p></section><button className="primary" onClick={()=>setIntelDetail(null)}>Back to Health</button></div></div>}{selected&&<HealthMetricEditor {...selected} onClose={()=>setSelected(null)} onSaved={saved}/>}</>}
     return <><header><Brand/><small>DAILY HEALTH</small><h1>Morning check-in</h1><p>Tap a card to record or update today’s reading.</p></header><section className="health-completion"><div><span>Required check-in</span><b>{complete} of {required.length} complete</b></div><div className="completion-track"><i style={{width:`${complete/required.length*100}%`}}/></div></section><section className="health-section health-intelligence-v2"><div className="section-head"><div><small>HEALTH INTELLIGENCE 2.0</small><h2>Why your health is changing</h2></div></div><div className="intelligence-summary-grid"><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Longitudinal coverage',body:`${health2.overview.coverage.metricReadings} measurements and ${health2.overview.coverage.mealDays} nutrition days support these insights.`})}><small>LONGITUDINAL COVERAGE</small><strong>{health2.overview.coverage.metricReadings}</strong><span>measurements · {health2.overview.coverage.mealDays} nutrition days</span></button><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Biomarkers',body:health2.biomarkers.length?health2.biomarkers.map(x=>`${x.biomarker}: ${x.latest} ${x.unit}`).join(' · '):'No biomarker records are available. Import the Health workbook from Settings.'})}><small>BIOMARKERS</small><strong>{health2.biomarkers.length}</strong><span>tracked with direction and confidence</span></button><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Meaningful relationships',body:health2.correlations.length?health2.correlations.map(x=>x.explanation).join(' '):'No supported matched-day relationships yet.'})}><small>MEANINGFUL RELATIONSHIPS</small><strong>{health2.correlations.length}</strong><span>moderate or strong matched-day associations</span></button><button onClick={()=>setIntelDetail({title:'Preventive care',body:health2.preventive.length?health2.preventive.map(x=>`${x.name}: ${x.status.replace('_',' ')}`).join(' · '):'No preventive-care schedule has been entered.'})}><small>PREVENTIVE CARE</small><strong>{health2.preventive.filter(x=>x.status==='overdue'||x.status==='due_soon').length}</strong><span>due soon or overdue</span></button></div><div className="coach-insights">{health2.coach.slice(0,4).map((x,i)=><article key={i}><div><b>{x.title}</b><span>{x.evidence}</span></div><em>{x.confidence}% confidence</em></article>)}</div>{health2.biomarkers.length>0&&<div className="biomarker-strip">{health2.biomarkers.slice(0,6).map(x=><article key={x.biomarker}><b>{x.biomarker.toUpperCase()}</b><strong>{x.latest} {x.unit}</strong><span>{x.trend.direction} · {x.confidence}% confidence{x.timeToTargetDays!=null?` · ${x.timeToTargetDays} days to target`:''}</span></article>)}</div>}{health2.goals.length>0&&<div className="goal-intelligence-list">{health2.goals.map(g=><article key={g.id}><div><b>{g.id}</b><span>{g.status==='on_track'?`Projected ${g.predictedDate}`:'Adjustment recommended'}</span></div><strong>{g.progress}%</strong></article>)}</div>}{health2.preventive.filter(x=>x.status!=='complete').slice(0,4).map(x=><div className={`preventive-row ${x.status}`} key={x.item_id}><ShieldCheck/><div><b>{x.name}</b><span>{x.status.replace('_',' ')}{x.due_date?` · ${x.due_date}`:''}</span></div></div>)}</section><div className="health-grid">{HEALTH_METRICS.map(def=>{const row=latest[def.type];const Icon=def.Icon;return <button key={def.type} className={`health-card ${row?'complete':''}`} onClick={()=>setSelected({definition:def,row})}><span className="health-icon"><Icon/></span><div><small>{def.label}</small><b>{healthValue(row,def)}</b><em>{row?new Date(row.measured_at).toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'}):def.optional?'Optional':'Tap to log'}</em></div><span className="health-state">{row?<Check/>:<Plus/>}</span></button>})}</div><section className="health-section"><div className="section-head"><div><small>RECENT DATA</small><h2>History</h2></div></div><div className="metric-history-links">{HEALTH_METRICS.map(def=><button key={def.type} onClick={()=>setHistoryType(def.type)}><def.Icon/><span>{def.label}</span><b>›</b></button>)}</div></section><section className="health-section"><div className="section-head"><div><small>TODAY</small><h2>Health & meal timeline</h2></div></div><div className="health-timeline">{timeline.map(event=><SwipeHealthTimelineEvent key={event.id} event={event} onOpen={x=>x.type==='metric'&&setSelected({definition:metricDefinition(x.source.metric_type),row:x.source})} onDelete={deleteTimelineMeal} onQuickAdd={quickAddTimelineMeal}/>)}{!timeline.length&&<div className="empty">Your readings and meals will appear here in time order.</div>}</div>{timelineToast&&<div className="success-toast">✓ {timelineToast}</div>}{timelineUndo&&<div className="undo-snackbar"><span>{timelineUndo.food_name} deleted</span><button onClick={undoTimelineMeal}>Undo</button></div>}</section>{selected&&<HealthMetricEditor {...selected} onClose={()=>setSelected(null)} onSaved={saved}/>}</>
    }
    
    function PersonalHealthProfile({onBack,onClose=onBack}){
     const initial=query('SELECT * FROM health_profile WHERE profile_id=1')[0]||{};const [form,setForm]=useState(initial),[saved,setSaved]=useState('');const age=calculateAge(form.date_of_birth);
     const set=(k,v)=>setForm(x=>({...x,[k]:v}));async function save(){await run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO health_profile(profile_id,date_of_birth,biological_sex,height_cm,smoking_status,activity_level,goal_weight_lb,goal_waist_in,health_goals_json,updated_at) VALUES (1,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[form.date_of_birth||null,form.biological_sex||null,finite(form.height_cm)||null,form.smoking_status||'never',form.activity_level||'moderate',finite(form.goal_weight_lb)||null,finite(form.goal_waist_in)||null,form.health_goals_json||'[]',new Date().toISOString()]);setSaved('Profile saved')}
     return <><header className="detail-header"><button className="back" onClick={onBack}>‹ Gear</button><Brand/><small>PERSONALIZATION</small><h1>Personal health profile</h1><p>These details drive age-, sex-, and smoking-aware recommendations.</p></header><section className="panel profile-form"><label>Date of birth<input type="date" value={form.date_of_birth||''} onChange={e=>set('date_of_birth',e.target.value)}/><span>{age==null?'Age calculated automatically':`Current age: ${age}`}</span></label><label>Biological sex<select value={form.biological_sex||''} onChange={e=>set('biological_sex',e.target.value)}><option value="">Select</option><option value="male">Male</option><option value="female">Female</option></select></label><label>Height (cm)<input type="number" value={form.height_cm||''} onChange={e=>set('height_cm',e.target.value)}/></label><label>Smoking status<select value={form.smoking_status||'never'} onChange={e=>set('smoking_status',e.target.value)}><option value="never">Never smoked</option><option value="former">Former smoker</option><option value="current">Current smoker</option></select></label><label>Activity level<select value={form.activity_level||'moderate'} onChange={e=>set('activity_level',e.target.value)}><option value="sedentary">Sedentary</option><option value="light">Light</option><option value="moderate">Moderate</option><option value="very_active">Very active</option></select></label><label>Goal weight (lb)<input type="number" step="0.1" value={form.goal_weight_lb||''} onChange={e=>set('goal_weight_lb',e.target.value)}/></label><label>Goal waist (in)<input type="number" step="0.1" value={form.goal_waist_in||''} onChange={e=>set('goal_waist_in',e.target.value)}/></label><button className="primary" onClick={save}><Check/> Save profile</button>{saved&&<div className="status">{saved}</div>}</section></>
    }
    function NutrientConfiguration({onBack,onClose=onBack}){
     const [rows,setRows]=useState(()=>query('SELECT * FROM nutrition_targets ORDER BY nutrient')),[editing,setEditing]=useState(null),[status,setStatus]=useState('');const reload=()=>setRows(query('SELECT * FROM nutrition_targets ORDER BY nutrient'));
     async function toggleDerived(row){await run('UPDATE nutrition_targets SET derived=?,updated_at=? WHERE nutrient=?',[Number(row.derived)===1?0:1,new Date().toISOString(),row.nutrient]);reload()}
     async function save(){await run(`UPDATE nutrition_targets SET minimum_value=?,target_value=?,max_value=?,behavior_type=?,source=?,source_category=?,formula=?,recommendation_notes=?,override_minimum=?,override_target=?,override_max=?,updated_at=? WHERE nutrient=?`,[editing.minimum_value===''?null:Number(editing.minimum_value),Number(editing.target_value)||0,editing.max_value===''?null:Number(editing.max_value),editing.behavior_type,editing.source,editing.source_category,editing.formula,editing.recommendation_notes,Number(editing.derived)===1?editing.override_minimum:(editing.minimum_value===''?null:Number(editing.minimum_value)),Number(editing.derived)===1?editing.override_target:Number(editing.target_value)||0,Number(editing.derived)===1?editing.override_max:(editing.max_value===''?null:Number(editing.max_value)),new Date().toISOString(),editing.nutrient]);setEditing(null);setStatus('Nutrient target saved');reload()}
     return <><header className="detail-header detail-header-with-close"><button className="back" onClick={onBack}>‹ Gear</button><button className="detail-close" aria-label="Close nutrient configuration" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><Brand/><small>NUTRIENT ENGINE</small><h1>Nutrient configuration</h1><p>Minimum, goal, maximum, behavior, formula, and source all live in SQLite.</p></header>{status&&<div className="status">{status}</div>}<div className="nutrient-config-list">{rows.map(r=><div className="nutrient-config-row" key={r.nutrient}><button className="config-main" onClick={()=>setEditing({...r})}><div><b>{r.nutrient.replaceAll('_',' ')}</b><span>{r.minimum_value!=null?`Min ${r.minimum_value}${r.unit} · `:''}Goal {r.target_value}{r.unit}{r.max_value!=null?` · Max ${r.max_value}${r.unit}`:''}</span><em>{r.source} · {r.behavior_type}</em></div><Pencil/></button>{Number(r.supports_derived)===1&&<button className={`derived-toggle ${Number(r.derived)===1?'active':''}`} onClick={()=>toggleDerived(r)}><span>{Number(r.derived)===1?'Derived':'Override'}</span><i/></button>}</div>)}</div>{editing&&<div className="modal-backdrop"><div className="panel config-editor"><div className="edit-head"><h3>{editing.nutrient.replaceAll('_',' ')}</h3><button onClick={()=>setEditing(null)}><X/></button></div><div className={Number(editing.derived)===1?'derived-fields':''}><label>Minimum<input type="number" step="any" disabled={Number(editing.derived)===1} value={editing.minimum_value??''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,minimum_value:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Goal<input type="number" step="any" disabled={Number(editing.derived)===1} value={editing.target_value??''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,target_value:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Maximum<input type="number" step="any" disabled={Number(editing.derived)===1} value={editing.max_value??''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,max_value:e.target.value})}/></label></div><label>Behavior<select value={editing.behavior_type||'goal'} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,behavior_type:e.target.value})}><option value="goal">Goal</option><option value="limit">Limit</option><option value="budget">Budget</option></select></label><label>Source<input value={editing.source||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,source:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Source category<input value={editing.source_category||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,source_category:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Formula<input value={editing.formula||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,formula:e.target.value})}/></label><label>Notes<textarea value={editing.recommendation_notes||''} onChange={e=>setEditing({...editing,recommendation_notes:e.target.value})}/></label><button className="primary" onClick={save}><Check/> Save nutrient</button></div></div>}</>
    }

    function PageShell({eyebrow,title,description,onBack,children}){return <><header className="settings-page-header"><button className="back-link" onClick={onBack}>‹ Back</button><Brand/><small>{eyebrow}</small><h1>{title}</h1>{description&&<p>{description}</p>}</header>{children}</>}
    function downloadJson(name,data){const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'}),a=document.createElement('a');a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.download=name;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href)}
    function AboutPage({onBack}){const db=databaseStatus(),[history,setHistory]=useState(false),latest=RELEASE_HISTORY.find(r=>r.version===VERSION)||RELEASE_HISTORY[0];return <PageShell version</span><b>{VERSION}</b><small>Issued {RELEASE_DATE}</small></div><div><span>Build identifier</span><b>{BUILD_ID}</b></div><div><span>Deployment</span><b>{DEPLOYMENT_ID}</b></div><div><span>Created</span><b>{new {RELEASE_DATE}</small></div><div><span>Release ID</span><b>{DEPLOYMENT_ID}</b></div><div><span>Storage</span><b>Local SQLite</b></div></section><section className="release-notes-panel"><small>WHAT’S
