      <section className="brief-story lead-story"><p className="brief-kicker">{stories[0].category.toUpperCase()} · TOP STORY</p><h1>{stories[0].title}</h1><p className="brief-deck">{stories[0].summary}</p><p className="brief-benefit">{stories[0].benefit}</p><button className="brief-story-action" onClick={stories[0].action}>Take action <ChevronRight/></button><details><summary>Why this is first</summary><div className="brief-detail"><p>{stories[0].why}</p><p><b>Data used:</b> {stories[0].data}</p><p><b>Expected benefit:</b> {stories[0].benefit}.</p><p><b>If ignored:</b> The issue may remain unresolved and could reduce today’s projected outcome.</p></div></details></section>
      {stories.slice(1).map((story,index)=><section className="brief-story secondary-story" key={story.id}><p className="brief-kicker">{story.category.toUpperCase()}</p><h2>{story.title}</h2><p>{story.summary}</p><button className="brief-text-action" onClick={story.action}>Act on this <ChevronRight/></button><details><summary>Read the rationale</summary><div className="brief-detail"><p><b>Why it appears:</b> {story.why}</p><p><b>Data used:</b> {story.data}</p><p><b>Expected benefit:</b> {story.benefit}.</p></div></details></section>)}
      <section className="brief-story outlook-story"><p className="brief-kicker">TODAY’S OUTLOOK</p><h2>{calorieVariance>=0?'The day remains on course':'A small correction would improve the finish'}</h2><p>{prediction?.explanation||outlook}</p><div className="brief-inline-metrics"><span><b>{Math.round(finite(projected?.calories))}</b> calories</span><span><b>{Math.round(finite(projected?.protein))}g</b> protein</span><span><b>{Math.round(finite(projected?.fiber))}g</b> fiber</span><span><b>{Math.round(finite(steps)).toLocaleString()}</b> steps</span></div></section>
      {expired.length>0&&<section className="brief-story breaking-story"><p className="brief-kicker">PANTRY ALERT</p><h2>Expired food needs attention</h2>{expired.slice(0,5).map(item=><details key={item.pantry_id||item.item}><summary>{item.item} · {item.urgencyLabel}</summary><div className="brief-detail"><p>Expiration: {item.expiration}</p><p>Quantity: {item.quantity??'Unknown'} {item.unit||''}</p><p>Location: {item.location||'Unknown'}</p><button onClick={()=>navigate('pantry')}>Remove, correct date, or mark out of stock</button></div></details>)}</section>}
      <section className="brief-story chef-story"><p className="brief-kicker">CHEF’S KITCHEN</p><h2>{chefSuggestion?`${chefSuggestion} deserves a place in today’s menu`:'Today’s menu remains flexible'}</h2><p>{chefSuggestion?`${useFirst[0]?useFirst[0].urgencyLabel+'. ':''}Choose meals that close the fiber and protein gaps without exceeding saturated fat.`:'No verified pantry recommendation is urgent. Build the next meal around today’s largest nutrition gap.'}</p><button className="brief-text-action" onClick={()=>navigate('add')}>Plan a meal <ChevronRight/></button></section>
      <section className="brief-story momentum-story"><p className="brief-kicker">MOMENTUM</p><h2>{coverage===100?'Today’s data foundation is complete':'Better data will sharpen the forecast'}</h2><p>{coverage===100?'Every logged meal used in today’s brief has complete nutrition coverage.':`${coverage}% of today’s nutrition is fully covered. Completing missing records will improve future coaching.`}</p></section>
      <section className="brief-story ahead-story"><p className="brief-kicker">LOOKING AHEAD</p><h2>{planned?.length?`${planned.length} planned meal${planned.length===1?' is':'s are'} already shaping the day`:'The next meals are not yet committed'}</h2><p>{planned?.length?'The brief includes planned meals in its projected totals so today’s advice reflects what is likely to happen next.':'Planning the next meal will make calorie and nutrition forecasts more reliable.'}</p></section>
      <section className="brief-story wins-story"><p className="brief-kicker">TODAY’S WIN</p><h2>{calorieVariance>=0?'You still have room to make a strong finish':'The problem is visible early enough to correct'}</h2><p>{calorieVariance>=0?`${Math.round(calorieVariance)} calories remain within the current target projection.`:'Fizz Health identified the projected overage before the day was finished.'}</p></section>
      <section className="brief-story outlook-close"><p className="brief-kicker">FINAL OUTLOOK</p><h2>{calorieVariance>=0?'A manageable day with clear next steps':'One deliberate adjustment can improve the outcome'}</h2><p>{expired.length?'First address the expired pantry inventory. ':''}{fiberGap>1?`Then add about ${Math.round(fiberGap)} grams of fiber. `:''}{stepGap>0?`A walk of ${Math.round(stepGap).toLocaleString()} steps would complete the activity target.`:'Activity is on target.'}</p></section>
      <section className="brief-more"><button className="brief-more-toggle" onClick={()=>setMoreOpen(x=>!x)} aria-expanded={moreOpen}><div><b>Research desk</b><span>Detailed alternatives, forecasts, timeline, and supporting modules</span></div>{moreOpen?<ChevronUp/>:<ChevronDown/>}</button>{moreOpen&&<div className="brief-legacy">{children}</div>}</section>
     </article>
    }
    function HighestImpactDecisionExperience({intelligence,totals,projected,targets,steps,stepTarget,navigate,date=today(),restaurantDay=false}){
     const [open,setOpen]=useState(false),[selected,setSelected]=useState(null);
     const current={calories:finite(totals?.calories),protein:finite(totals?.protein),fiber:finite(totals?.fiber),saturated_fat:finite(totals?.saturated_fat)};
     const pantry=optionalQuery(`SELECT p.pantry_id,p.item,p.quantity,p.unit,p.opened,p.expiration,p.priority,f.food_id,f.calories,f.protein,f.fiber,f.saturated_fat FROM pantry p JOIN foods f ON UPPER(f.food_id)=UPPER(p.food_id) WHERE p.on_hand='Yes' AND COALESCE(p.quantity,0)>0 AND COALESCE(f.nutrition_known,0)=1 ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.expiration IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,p.expiration LIMIT 30`);
     const planned=optionalQuery(`SELECT id,food_name,calories,protein,fiber,saturated_fat,meal_type,planned_at,source_type FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' AND planned_local_date=? ORDER BY planned_at LIMIT 10`,[date]);
     const restaurants=restaurantDay?optionalQuery(`SELECT rm.id,rm.meal_name,rm.restaurant_name,rm.calories,rm.protein,rm.fiber,rm.saturated_fat,rm.confidence FROM restaurant_meals rm WHERE COALESCE(rm.active,1)=1 AND COALESCE(rm.nutrition_known,0)=1 ORDER BY COALESCE(rm.fiber,0) DESC,COALESCE(rm.saturated_fat,999) ASC LIMIT 8`):[];
     const fiberGap=Math.max(0,finite(targets?.fiber?.target)-finite(projected?.fiber));
     const proteinGap=Math.max(0,finite(targets?.protein?.target)-finite(projected?.protein));
     const calorieRoom=Math.max(0,finite(targets?.calories?.target)-finite(projected?.calories));
     const scoreFood=x=>finite(x.fiber)*8+finite(x.protein)*1.5-finite(x.saturated_fat)*7+(x.opened==='Yes'?18:0)+(x.expiration?20:0)+finite(x.priority)*3-(finite(x.calories)>calorieRoom&&calorieRoom>0?20:0);
     const pantryOptions=[...pantry].sort((a,b)=>scoreFood(b)-scoreFood(a)).slice(0,3).map((x,i)=>({id:`pantry-${x.pantry_id}`,kind:'Pantry',title:x.item,description:`${x.opened==='Yes'?'Open · ':''}${x.expiration?'Expiration pressure · ':''}${Math.round(finite(x.fiber))}g fiber, ${Math.round(finite(x.protein))}g protein`,nutrition:x,impact:Math.max(1,Math.round(scoreFood(x)/8)),reason:`Ranks highly because it improves ${fiberGap>proteinGap?'fiber':'today’s nutrition gap'} while considering inventory pressure, expiration, and open status.`,action:'pantry'}));
     const plannedOptions=planned.slice(0,2).map(x=>({id:`planned-${x.id}`,kind:'Planned meal',title:x.food_name,description:`Already planned · ${Math.round(finite(x.calories))} kcal`,nutrition:x,impact:18,reason:'This option is already committed to today, so it minimizes friction and preserves the existing plan.',action:'plan'}));
     const restaurantOptions=restaurants.slice(0,3).map(x=>({id:`restaurant-${x.id}`,kind:'Restaurant',title:`${x.meal_name}${x.restaurant_name?` · ${x.restaurant_name}`:''}`,description:`${Math.round(finite(x.calories))} kcal · ${Math.round(finite(x.protein))}g protein · ${Math.round(finite(x.fiber))}g fiber`,nutrition:x,impact:Math.max(1,Math.round(finite(x.fiber)*6+finite(x.protein)-finite(x.saturated_fat)*5)),reason:'Shown because eating out may be practical and this item best balances fiber, protein, calories, and saturated fat among known restaurant choices.',action:'restaurant'}));
     const activity={id:'activity-steps',kind:'Activity',title:'Walk another 2,000 steps',description:`${Math.round(finite(steps)).toLocaleString()} current → ${Math.round(finite(steps)+2000).toLocaleString()} projected`,nutrition:{},impact:Math.max(5,Math.round((Math.max(0,finite(stepTarget)-finite(steps))/Math.max(1,finite(stepTarget)))*20)),reason:'Walking improves activity support without adding calories and is competitive when nutrition is already close to target.',action:'steps'};
     const delay={id:'delay-meal',kind:'Timing',title:'Delay eating until the planned meal',description:`Preserves approximately ${Math.round(calorieRoom)} kcal of today’s target`,nutrition:{},impact:Math.max(4,Math.round((finite(projected?.calories)/Math.max(1,finite(targets?.calories?.target)))*12)),reason:'This option ranks when another unplanned meal would reduce calorie flexibility before the next committed meal.',action:'plan'};
     let options=[...pantryOptions,...plannedOptions,activity,delay,...(restaurantDay?restaurantOptions:[])];
     options=options.sort((a,b)=>b.impact-a.impact).slice(0,8).map((x,i)=>({...x,rank:i+1}));
     const top=options[0];
     const metricRows=option=>{const n=option?.nutrition||{};return [
      ['Fiber','g',current.fiber,current.fiber+finite(n.fiber)],['Protein','g',current.protein,current.protein+finite(n.protein)],['Calories','',current.calories,current.calories+finite(n.calories)],['Saturated fat','g',current.saturated_fat,current.saturated_fat+finite(n.saturated_fat)]
     ].filter(([label,unit,a,b])=>label==='Calories'||Math.abs(b-a)>.01).slice(0,4)};
     function takeAction(option){setOpen(false);if(option.action==='pantry')navigate('pantry');else if(option.action==='restaurant')navigate('restaurants');else if(option.action==='steps'){sessionStorage.setItem('fizz-open-health-metric','steps');navigate('health')}else{localStorage.setItem('fizz-open-meal-planner','1');navigate('add')}}
     return <><button type="button" className="health-assistant-card highest-impact-trigger" onClick={()=>setOpen(true)} aria-haspopup="dialog"><div className="assistant-score"><HeartPulse/><strong>{intelligence.score.overall}</strong><span>Daily Health Score</span></div><div className="assistant-action"><small>HIGHEST-IMPACT NEXT ACTION</small><h2>{top?.title||intelligence.decision.label}</h2><p>{top?.reason||intelligence.decision.whyNow}</p><div><b>{top?`#1 · ${top.impact} impact`:(intelligence.decision.expectedBenefit||'Highest priority')}</b><span>{intelligence.score.confidence}% confidence · Tap for options</span></div></div><ChevronRight className="highest-impact-chevron"/></button>{open&&<div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={()=>setOpen(false)}><div className="panel highest-impact-panel" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Highest Impact Next Action" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><div><small>DECISION SUPPORT</small><h3>Highest Impact Next Action</h3></div><button onClick={()=>setOpen(false)} aria-label="Close"><X/></button></div><section className="impact-rationale"><b>Why #{top?.rank||1} is first</b><p>{top?.reason||intelligence.decision.whyNow}</p><div className="impact-tags"><span>Primary goal: {fiberGap>0?'Fiber / LDL support':proteinGap>0?'Protein':'Daily balance'}</span><span>Expected impact: {top?.impact||intelligence.decision.expectedBenefit}</span><span>Confidence: {intelligence.score.confidence}%</span></div><p className="comparison-copy">It outranks the alternatives because it has the strongest combined score for current nutrition gaps, expected benefit, effort, pantry pressure, and suitability for today.</p></section><div className="impact-options">{options.map(option=><button key={option.id} className={`impact-option ${selected?.id===option.id?'selected':''}`} onClick={()=>setSelected(option)}><span className="impact-rank">#{option.rank}</span><div><small>{option.kind}</small><b>{option.title}</b><span>{option.description}</span><em>{option.reason}</em></div><strong>{option.impact}</strong></button>)}</div>{selected&&<section className="predicted-outcome"><div className="section-title"><b>Predicted outcome</b><span>Before you commit</span></div>{metricRows(selected).map(([label,unit,a,b])=><div className="outcome-row" key={label}><span>{label}</span><div><small>Current</small><b>{Math.round(a)}{unit}</b></div><ChevronRight/><div><small>Projected</small><b>{Math.round(b)}{unit}</b></div></div>)}<section className="option-transparency"><h4>Why am I seeing this?</h4><p>{selected.reason}</p><h4>Data that influenced it</h4><p>Today’s consumed and planned nutrition, configured goals, pantry status and expiration, planned meals, current steps, time-of-day context, and restaurant nutrition only when Restaurant Day is enabled.</p><h4>Why isn’t another option first?</h4><p>Options below it provide less expected benefit, require more effort, add more saturated fat or calories, or do less to reduce inventory pressure.</p></section><button className="primary" onClick={()=>takeAction(selected)}>Choose this option</button></section>} {!selected&&<p className="impact-select-hint">Select an option to compare its projected outcome and full rationale.</p>}</div></div>}</>
    }
    
    function DailyCommandCenter({summary,actions,onCapture,navigate}){
     const [detail,setDetail]=useState(null),[timelineOpen,setTimelineOpen]=useState(false);
     const timeline=timelineOpen?buildUnifiedTimeline({meals:query('SELECT * FROM meals ORDER BY eaten_at DESC LIMIT 60'),metrics:query('SELECT * FROM health_metrics ORDER BY measured_at DESC LIMIT 60'),pantryEvents:query('SELECT * FROM pantry_events ORDER BY event_at DESC LIMIT 60'),healthEvents:query('SELECT * FROM health_event_timeline ORDER BY event_at DESC LIMIT 60')}):[];
     return <section className="command-center"><div className="command-head"><div><small>TODAY’S FOCUS</small><h2>{summary.nextAction?.title||'You are caught up'}</h2><p>{summary.nextAction?.why||'No urgent action is waiting.'}</p></div></div><div className="command-grid"><button onClick={()=>summary.nextMeal?setDetail({title:'Next meal',why:`${summary.nextMeal.food_name} is planned next.`,confidence:100,priority:80,type:'meal_plan',engines:['Meal planner'],evidence:[summary.nextMeal.planned_at||'Today']}):(()=>{localStorage.setItem('fizz-open-meal-planner','1');navigate('add')})()}><span>Next meal</span><b>{summary.nextMeal?.food_name||'Not planned'}</b><small>Tap to choose and plan</small></button><button onClick={()=>{sessionStorage.setItem('fizz-pantry-attention',JSON.stringify(summary.pantryAttention.map(x=>x.pantry_id||x.id)));navigate('pantry')}}><span>Pantry attention</span><b>{summary.pantryAttention.length}</b><small>View these items</small></button><button onClick={()=>navigate('restaurants')}><span>Restaurant plans</span><b>{summary.restaurantPlans.length}</b><small>Tap for plans</small></button><button onClick={()=>setDetail({title:'Calories remaining',why:summary.variance.calories>0?`${Math.round(summary.variance.calories)} calories remain before today’s target.`:`You are ${Math.abs(Math.round(summary.variance.calories))} calories above today’s target.`,confidence:100,priority:70,type:'calories',engines:['Daily nutrition'],evidence:[`${Math.round(summary.actualCalories||0)} consumed and planned · ${Math.round(summary.targetCalories||0)} target`]})}><span>Calories remaining</span><b>{Math.round(summary.variance.calories)}</b><small>Tap for details</small></button></div><div className="action-center"><div className="section-title"><b>Smart Action Center</b><button onClick={()=>setTimelineOpen(x=>!x)}>{timelineOpen?'Actions':'Timeline'}</button></div>{timelineOpen?<div className="playback-list">{timeline.slice(0,20).map(e=><div key={e.id}><time>{new Date(e.eventAt).toLocaleString([],{month:'short',day:'numeric',hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit'})}</time><b>{e.title}</b><span>{e.detail}</span></div>)}</div>:actions.length?actions.slice(0,4).map(a=><button className="smart-action" key={a.id} onClick={()=>setDetail(/step/i.test(a.title||'')?{...a,type:'steps'}:a)}><div><b>{a.title}</b><span>{a.why}</span></div><em>{Math.round(a.confidence)}%</em></button>):<div className="empty">Nothing needs immediate attention.</div>}</div>{detail&&<div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={()=>setDetail(null)}><div className="panel explain-panel" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head"><h3>{detail.title}</h3><button onClick={()=>setDetail(null)}><X/></button></div>{(()=>{const x=explainRecommendation(detail);return <><p>{x.why}</p><div className="detail-values"><div><span>Confidence</span><b>{x.confidence}%</b></div><div><span>Priority</span><b>{Math.round(detail.priority)}</b></div></div><h4>Contributing engines</h4><p>{x.engines.join(' · ')}</p><h4>Supporting evidence</h4><p>{x.evidence.join(' · ')||'Current recorded state'}</p></>})()}<button className="primary" onClick={()=>{setDetail(null);if(detail.type==='pantry')navigate('pantry');else if(detail.type==='review')navigate('restaurants');else if(detail.type==='preventive')navigate('health');else if(detail.type==='calories'||detail.type==='meal_plan'){localStorage.setItem('fizz-open-meal-planner','1');navigate('add')}else if(detail.type==='steps'){sessionStorage.setItem('fizz-open-health-metric','steps');navigate('health')}else onCapture()}}>Take action</button></div></div>}</section>
    }
    
    function ComponentPicker({mode='recipe',foods,recipes=[],initial=null,onClose,onAdd}){
     const [tab,setTab]=useState(initial?.type||'food'),[q,setQ]=useState(''),[selected,setSelected]=useState(initial?.item||null),[amount,setAmount]=useState(String(initial?.amount||'1')),[unit,setUnit]=useState(initial?.unit||'serving'),[error,setError]=useState('');
     const allowed=mode==='meal'?['food','recipe']:['food'];
     useEffect(()=>{if(!allowed.includes(tab))setTab('food')},[mode]);
     const source=tab==='food'?foods:recipes;
     const filtered=source.filter(item=>String(item.name||item.recipe_name||'').toLowerCase().includes(q.trim().toLowerCase())).slice(0,100);
     function choose(item){setSelected(item);if(tab==='food'){setAmount(String(item.default_serving||1));setUnit(item.unit||'serving')}else{setAmount('1');setUnit('serving')}}
     function submit(){setError('');const n=Number(amount);if(!selected)return setError(`Choose a ${tab}.`);if(!n||n<=0)return setError('Enter a quantity greater than zero.');onAdd({type:tab,item:selected,amount:n,unit});onClose()}
     const preview=selected?(tab==='food'?nutritionFor(selected,Number(amount)||0,unit):(buildRecipeSnapshot(selected.recipe_id)?.nutrition||{})):null;
     const scaled=tab==='recipe'&&preview?Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(preview).map(([k,v])=>[k,finite(v)*(Number(amount)||0)])):preview;
     return <div className="modal-backdrop component-picker-backdrop" onClick={onClose}><div className="panel fixed-editor component-picker-panel" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label={mode==='meal'?'Add meal component':'Add recipe ingredient'} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel"><X/></button><div><small>{mode==='meal'?'MEAL CONTENTS':'RECIPE INGREDIENT'}</small><h3>Add {tab==='recipe'?'Recipe':'Food'}</h3></div><button type="button" className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={submit} disabled={!selected} aria-label="Add selected component"><Check/></button></div><div className="component-picker-body"><div className="component-picker-search"><Search/><input autoFocus value={q} onChange={e=>{setQ(e.target.value);setSelected(null)}} placeholder={tab==='food'?'Search foods…':'Search recipes…'}/></div>{allowed.length>1&&<div className="component-picker-tabs" role="tablist">{allowed.map(type=><button type="button" role="tab" aria-selected={tab===type} className={tab===type?'active':''} key={type} onClick={()=>{setTab(type);setQ('');setSelected(null)}}>{type==='food'?'Foods':'Recipes'}</button>)}</div>}<div className="component-picker-results" aria-label="Search results">{filtered.length?filtered.map(item=>{const id=item.food_id||item.recipe_id,name=item.name||item.recipe_name;return <button type="button" key={id} className={selected&&(selected.food_id||selected.recipe_id)===id?'selected':''} onClick={()=>choose(item)}><div><b>{name}</b><span>{tab==='food'?`${item.default_serving||1} ${item.unit||'serving'}`:'Complete recipe'}</span></div>{selected&&(selected.food_id||selected.recipe_id)===id&&<Check/>}</button>}):<div className="empty">No matching {tab==='food'?'foods':'recipes'}.</div>}</div>{selected&&<div className="component-picker-config"><div className="amount unit-amount"><label>{tab==='recipe'?'Servings':'Quantity'}<input type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0.01" step="0.01" value={amount} onChange={e=>setAmount(e.target.value)}/></label>{tab==='food'?<label>Unit<select value={unit} onChange={e=>setUnit(e.target.value)}>{unitOptions(selected.unit).map(u=><option key={u} value={u}>{u}</option>)}</select></label>:<label>Unit<input value="serving" readOnly/></label>}</div>{scaled&&<div className="nutrition-preview compact"><b>{Math.round(finite(scaled.calories))} kcal</b><span>{Math.round(finite(scaled.protein))}g protein · {Math.round(finite(scaled.carbs))}g carbs · {Math.round(finite(scaled.fat))}g fat · {Math.round(finite(scaled.fiber))}g fiber</span></div>}</div>}{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div><div className="editor-actions"><button type="button" className="secondary" onClick={onClose}>Cancel</button><button type="button" className="primary" onClick={submit} disabled={!selected}><Plus/> Add</button></div></div></div>
    }
    
    function RecipeCreateEditor({foods,recipe=null,onClose,onSaved}){
     const initialRows=recipe?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM recipes WHERE recipe_id=? AND COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY rowid',[recipe.recipe_id]).map((r,i)=>{const food=foods.find(f=>String(f.food_id).toUpperCase()===String(r.ingredient_id||'').toUpperCase())||foods.find(f=>String(f.name).toLowerCase()===String(r.ingredient_name).toLowerCase())||{food_id:r.ingredient_id,name:r.ingredient_name,unit:r.unit};return {key:`existing-${i}`,food_id:food.food_id,food,amount:Number(r.amount)||'',unit:r.unit||food.unit||'serving'}}):[];
     const [name,setName]=useState(recipe?.recipe_name||''),[ingredients,setIngredients]=useState(initialRows),[picker,setPicker]=useState(false),[editingRow,setEditingRow]=useState(null),[error,setError]=useState(''),[saving,setSaving]=useState(false);
     function addIngredient({item,amount,unit}){if(editingRow){setIngredients(rows=>rows.map(r=>r.key===editingRow.key?{...r,food_id:item.food_id,food:item,amount,unit}:r));setEditingRow(null)}else setIngredients(rows=>[...rows,{key:`ingredient-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7)}`,food_id:item.food_id,food:item,amount,unit}])}
     async function save(){
      if(saving)return;
      setError('');
      const recipeName=name.trim();
      if(!recipeName)return setError('Enter a recipe name.');
      if(!ingredients.length)return setError('Add at least one ingredient.');
      if(ingredients.some(row=>!Number.isFinite(Number(row.amount))||Number(row.amount)<=0))return setError('Every ingredient needs a quantity greater than zero.');
      const seenIngredients=new Map();
      const duplicateIngredient=ingredients.find(row=>{const identity=canonicalIngredientIdentity(row);if(!identity)return false;if(seenIngredients.has(identity))return true;seenIngredients.set(identity,row);return false});
      if(duplicateIngredient)return setError(`${duplicateIngredient.food?.name||duplicateIngredient.ingredient_name||'This ingredient'} can appear only once.`);
      if(!recipe&&query('SELECT 1 FROM recipes WHERE LOWER(recipe_name)=LOWER(?) AND COALESCE(archived,0)=0 LIMIT 1',[recipeName]).length)return setError('A recipe with this name already exists.');
      const recipeId=recipe?.recipe_id||`R${Date.now()}`;
      setSaving(true);
      try{
        await transaction(async db=>{
          db.run('DELETE FROM recipes WHERE recipe_id=?',[recipeId]);
          for(const row of ingredients){
            insertRecord(db,'recipes',{recipe_id:recipeId,recipe_name:recipeName,ingredient_name:row.food.name,amount:Number(row.amount),unit:row.unit||row.food.unit||'serving',ingredient_type:'food',ingredient_id:row.food?.food_id||row.food_id||null,inventory_status:'linked',archived:0,archived_at:null});
          }
        });
        onSaved?.(recipeName,recipeId);
      }catch(err){
        console.error('Recipe save failed',err);
        setError(`Recipe could not be saved: ${err instanceof Error?err.message:String(err)}`);
      }finally{setSaving(false)}
     }
     return <><div className="modal-backdrop recipe-create-modal" onClick={onClose}><div className="panel fixed-editor recipe-create-editor" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel recipe editing"><X/></button><div><small>{recipe?'EDIT RECIPE':'RECIPE'}</small><h3>{recipe?recipe.recipe_name:'New Recipe'}</h3><em>Build a reusable recipe from foods</em></div><button type="button" className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={save} disabled={saving} aria-label="Save recipe">{saving?'…':<Check/>}</button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Recipe name<input autoFocus={!recipe} value={name} onChange={e=>setName(e.target.value)} placeholder="Example: Salmon Power Salad"/></label><section className="recipe-ingredient-editor"><div className="section-title"><b>Ingredients</b><button type="button" onClick={()=>{setEditingRow(null);setPicker(true)}}><Plus/> Add ingredient</button></div>{ingredients.length?ingredients.map((row,index)=><SwipeDeleteIngredient key={row.key} label={row.food.name} onDelete={()=>setIngredients(rows=>rows.filter(x=>x.key!==row.key))}><article className="recipe-ingredient-row compact-row editable" onClick={()=>{setEditingRow(row);setPicker(true)}}><div className="recipe-ingredient-number">{index+1}</div><div className="recipe-ingredient-fields"><b>{row.food.name}</b><span>{quantityLabel(row.amount,row.unit)} · {Math.round(finite(nutritionFor(row.food,row.amount,row.unit).calories))} kcal</span></div><Pencil/></article></SwipeDeleteIngredient>):<button type="button" className="empty component-empty-action" onClick={()=>setPicker(true)}>Search and add the first ingredient</button>}</section>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div></div></div>{picker&&<ComponentPicker mode="recipe" foods={foods} initial={editingRow?{type:'food',item:editingRow.food,amount:editingRow.amount,unit:editingRow.unit}:null} onClose={()=>{setPicker(false);setEditingRow(null)}} onAdd={addIngredient}/>}</>;
    }
    function SwipeDeleteIngredient({children,label,onDelete}){const start=useRef(null);const [offset,setOffset]=useState(0);return <div className="swipe-delete-row"><button type="button" className="swipe-delete-action" onClick={()=>confirm(`Remove ${label} from this recipe?`)&&onDelete()}><Trash2/><span>Delete</span></button><div className="swipe-delete-content" style={{transform:`translateX(${offset}px)`}} onPointerDown={e=>{start.current=e.clientX}} onPointerMove={e=>{if(start.current!=null)setOffset(Math.max(-96,Math.min(0,e.clientX-start.current)))}} onPointerUp={()=>{setOffset(offset<-45?-90:0);start.current=null}} onPointerCancel={()=>{setOffset(0);start.current=null}}>{children}</div></div>}
    
    const mealCategoryIcon=category=>({Breakfast:'🌅',Lunch:'☀️',Dinner:'🌙',Snack:'🍎',Any:'↻'}[category]||'🍽️');
    function MealDefinitionEditor({meal,onClose,onSaved}){
     const foods=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 500`);
     const recipes=optionalQuery(`SELECT recipe_id,recipe_name FROM recipes WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 GROUP BY recipe_id,recipe_name ORDER BY recipe_name LIMIT 250`);
     const existing=meal?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM meal_components WHERE meal_id=? ORDER BY sort_order,id',[meal.meal_id]):[];
     const [title,setTitle]=useState(meal?.title||''),[category,setCategory]=useState(meal?.category||'Any'),[notes,setNotes]=useState(meal?.notes||''),[components,setComponents]=useState(existing),[picker,setPicker]=useState(false),[error,setError]=useState(''),[saving,setSaving]=useState(false);
     function addComponent({type,item,amount,unit}){let snap={};if(type==='food')snap=nutritionFor(item,amount,unit);else{const nutrition=buildRecipeSnapshot(item.recipe_id)?.nutrition||{};snap=Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(nutrition).map(([k,v])=>[k,finite(v)*amount]))}setComponents(list=>[...list,{component_type:type,component_id:type==='food'?item.food_id:item.recipe_id,component_name:type==='food'?item.name:item.recipe_name,amount,unit:type==='food'?unit:'serving',optional:0,...snap,sort_order:list.length}])}
     async function save(){if(!title.trim())return setError('Enter a meal title.');if(!components.length)return setError('Add at least one food or recipe.');setSaving(true);const id=meal?.meal_id||`M${Date.now()}`;const totals=['calories','protein','carbs','fiber','fat','saturated_fat'].reduce((a,k)=>(a[k]=components.reduce((n,c)=>n+finite(c[k]),0),a),{});try{await transaction(async db=>{if(meal)db.run(`UPDATE meal_definitions SET title=?,category=?,notes=?,${Object.keys(totals).map(k=>`${k}=?`).join(',')},updated_at=? WHERE meal_id=?`,[title.trim(),category,notes,...Object.values(totals),new Date().toISOString(),id]);else insertRecord(db,'meal_definitions',{meal_id:id,title:title.trim(),category,icon:'utensils',notes,...totals,created_at:new Date().toISOString(),updated_at:new Date().toISOString()});db.run('DELETE FROM meal_components WHERE meal_id=?',[id]);components.forEach((c,i)=>insertRecord(db,'meal_components',{...c,meal_id:id,sort_order:i}))});onSaved()}catch(e){setError(e.message)}finally{setSaving(false)}}
     async function removeMeal(){if(!meal||!confirm(`Delete ${meal.title}? Historical logs will remain.`))return;await transaction(async db=>{db.run('UPDATE meal_definitions SET archived=1,updated_at=? WHERE meal_id=?',[new Date().toISOString(),meal.meal_id])});onSaved()}
     return <><div className="modal-backdrop"><div className="panel fixed-editor meal-definition-editor"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel"><X/></button><div><small>{meal?'EDIT MEAL':'CREATE MEAL'}</small><h3>{meal?.title||'New Meal'}</h3></div><div className="editor-header-actions">{meal&&<button className="header-icon-action danger-icon" onClick={removeMeal} aria-label="Delete meal"><Trash2/></button>}<button className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={save} disabled={saving} aria-label="Save meal"><Check/></button></div></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Meal title<input value={title} onChange={e=>setTitle(e.target.value)} autoFocus/></label><label>When is this meal appropriate?<select value={category} onChange={e=>setCategory(e.target.value)}>{MEAL_CATEGORIES.map(x=><option key={x}>{x}</option>)}</select></label><section className="meal-component-picker"><div className="section-title"><h3>Meal contents</h3><button type="button" onClick={()=>setPicker(true)}><Plus/> Add food or recipe</button></div><p>Foods use quantities and units. Recipes are added by serving.</p></section><div className="meal-components">{components.length?components.map((c,i)=><article key={`${c.component_type}-${c.component_id}-${i}`}><div><b>{c.component_name}</b><span>{c.amount} {c.unit} · {c.component_type==='recipe'?'Recipe · ':''}{Math.round(finite(c.calories))} kcal</span></div><button type="button" onClick={()=>setComponents(x=>x.filter((_,n)=>n!==i))} aria-label={`Remove ${c.component_name}`}><X/></button></article>):<button type="button" className="empty component-empty-action" onClick={()=>setPicker(true)}>Search foods and recipes to build this meal</button>}</div><label>Notes<textarea value={notes} onChange={e=>setNotes(e.target.value)}/></label>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div></div></div>{picker&&<ComponentPicker mode="meal" foods={foods} recipes={recipes} onClose={()=>setPicker(false)} onAdd={addComponent}/>}</>
    }
    function UniversalLogPanel({item,sourceType='meal',initialStatus='consumed',initialServings='1',onClose,onSaved}){
     const [status,setStatus]=useState(initialStatus),[when,setWhen]=useState(toDateTimeLocal()),[servings,setServings]=useState(String(initialServings||'1')),[occasion,setOccasion]=useState(item.category==='Any'?'Meal':item.category||'Meal'),[error,setError]=useState(''),[saving,setSaving]=useState(false);
     async function save(){const date=new Date(when),qty=Number(servings);if(Number.isNaN(date.getTime())||qty<=0)return setError('Choose a valid date, time, and serving quantity.');if(status==='consumed'&&date.getTime()>Date.now()+60000)return setError('A consumed item cannot be dated in the future. Choose Planned instead.');setSaving(true);try{const n={};for(const k of NUTRIENT_KEYS)n[k]=finite(item[k])*qty;await transaction(async db=>{if(status==='planned')insertRecord(db,'planned_meals',{planned_at:date.toISOString(),planned_local_date:localDateKey(date),meal_type:occasion,food_id:sourceType==='food'?item.food_id:null,food_name:item.title||item.name||item.recipe_name,amount:qty,unit:'serving',...n,status:'planned',created_at:new Date().toISOString(),updated_at:new Date().toISOString(),source_type:sourceType,meal_definition_id:sourceType==='meal'?item.meal_id:null});else insertRecord(db,'meals',{eaten_at:date.toISOString(),consumed_local_date:localDateKey(date),timezone_offset_minutes:-date.getTimezoneOffset(),meal_type:occasion,food_id:sourceType==='food'?item.food_id:sourceType==='recipe'?`recipe:${item.recipe_id}`:null,food_name:item.title||item.name||item.recipe_name,amount:qty,unit:'serving',...n,nutrition_known:1,source_type:sourceType,meal_definition_id:sourceType==='meal'?item.meal_id:null,created_at:new Date().toISOString(),updated_at:new Date().toISOString()})});onSaved?.();onClose?.()}catch(e){setError(e.message)}finally{setSaving(false)}}
     return <div className="modal-backdrop universal-log-backdrop" onClick={onClose}><div className="panel fixed-editor universal-log-panel" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><div><small>ADD TO FOOD LOG</small><h3>{item.title||item.name||item.recipe_name}</h3></div><button className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={save} disabled={saving}><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><fieldset className="when-picker"><legend>Status</legend>{[['consumed','Consumed'],['planned','Planned']].map(([id,label])=><label key={id} className={status===id?'selected':''}><input type="radio" checked={status===id} onChange={()=>setStatus(id)}/><div><b>{label}</b><span>{id==='consumed'?'Already eaten':'Today or any future date'}</span></div></label>)}</fieldset><label>Date and time<input type="datetime-local" value={when} onChange={e=>setWhen(e.target.value)}/></label><label>Meal occasion<select value={occasion} onChange={e=>setOccasion(e.target.value)}>{['Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner','Snack','Appetizer','Side','Dessert','Beverage','Condiment'].map(x=><option key={x}>{x}</option>)}</select></label><label>Servings<input type="number" min="0.1" step="0.1" value={servings} onChange={e=>setServings(e.target.value)}/></label><section className="nutrition-preview"><b>{Math.round(finite(item.calories)*Number(servings||0))} kcal</b><span>{Math.round(finite(item.protein)*Number(servings||0))}g protein · {Math.round(finite(item.fiber)*Number(servings||0))}g fiber</span></section>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div></div></div>
    }
    
    function AddMeal({refresh,done,onBack,initialFood,clearInitial,navigate}){
     useEffect(()=>{document.body.classList.add('food-library-active');return()=>document.body.classList.remove('food-library-active')},[]);
     const [q,setQ]=useState(''),[selected,setSelected]=useState(null),[amount,setAmount]=useState(''),[selectedUnit,setSelectedUnit]=useState('serving'),[meal,setMeal]=useState('Meal'),[notes,setNotes]=useState(''),[view,setView]=useState(()=>localStorage.getItem('fizz-open-meal-planner')==='1'?'pantry':'meals'),[localTick,setLocalTick]=useState(0),[whenMode,setWhenMode]=useState('now'),[pastDateTime,setPastDateTime]=useState(toDateTimeLocal()),[saving,setSaving]=useState(false),[error,setError]=useState(''),[recipeDetail,setRecipeDetail]=useState(null),[quickItem,setQuickItem]=useState(null),[toast,setToast]=useState(''),[showLogOnce,setShowLogOnce]=useState(false),[logOnceError,setLogOnceError]=useState(''),[logOnceSaving,setLogOnceSaving]=useState(false),[nutritionFood,setNutritionFood]=useState(null),[aiExchange,setAiExchange]=useState(null),[entryDestination,setEntryDestination]=useState('consumed'),[showRecipeCreate,setShowRecipeCreate]=useState(false),[mealEditor,setMealEditor]=useState(null),[mealLog,setMealLog]=useState(null);
     useEffect(()=>{if(localStorage.getItem('fizz-open-meal-planner')==='1')localStorage.removeItem('fizz-open-meal-planner');if(initialFood){setSelected(initialFood);setAmount(String(consumptionServing(initialFood)));setSelectedUnit(initialFood.unit||'serving');setError('');clearInitial?.()}},[initialFood]);
     const search=`%${q}%`; let foods=[],recipes=[],mealDefs=[];
     const recipeSearch=()=>optionalQuery(`SELECT recipe_id,recipe_name,COUNT(*) ingredient_count FROM recipes WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 AND recipe_name LIKE ? GROUP BY recipe_id,recipe_name ORDER BY recipe_name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 100`,[search]);
     if(view==='meals')mealDefs=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM meal_definitions WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 AND title LIKE ? ORDER BY title COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 100`,[search]);
     else if(view==='recipes')recipes=recipeSearch();
     else if(view==='favorites'){ foods=optionalQuery(`SELECT f.* FROM foods f JOIN favorite_foods x ON x.food_id=f.food_id WHERE COALESCE(f.archived,0)=0 AND f.name LIKE ? ORDER BY f.name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 100`,[search]); recipes=optionalQuery(`SELECT r.recipe_id,r.recipe_name,COUNT(*) ingredient_count FROM recipes r JOIN favorite_recipes x ON x.recipe_id=r.recipe_id WHERE COALESCE(r.archived,0)=0 AND r.recipe_name LIKE ? GROUP BY r.recipe_id,r.recipe_name ORDER BY r.recipe_name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 100`,[search]);}
     else if(view==='recent'){ foods=optionalQuery(`SELECT f.*, MAX(m.eaten_at) AS last_used FROM foods f JOIN meals m ON m.food_id=f.food_id WHERE COALESCE(f.archived,0)=0 AND f.name LIKE ? GROUP BY f.food_id ORDER BY last_used DESC LIMIT 50`,[search]); recipes=optionalQuery(`SELECT r.recipe_id,r.recipe_name,COUNT(*) ingredient_count,MAX(m.eaten_at) last_used FROM recipes r JOIN meals m ON m.food_id='recipe:'||r.recipe_id WHERE COALESCE(r.archived,0)=0 AND r.recipe_name LIKE ? GROUP BY r.recipe_id,r.recipe_name ORDER BY last_used DESC LIMIT 50`,[search]);}
     else if(view==='pantry') foods=optionalQuery(`SELECT f.*, p.quantity AS pantry_quantity, p.unit AS pantry_unit,p.pantry_id FROM foods f JOIN pantry p ON UPPER(p.food_id)=UPPER(f.food_id) WHERE COALESCE(f.archived,0)=0 AND p.on_hand='Yes' AND f.name LIKE ? GROUP BY f.food_id ORDER BY f.name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 100`,[search]);
     else { foods=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 AND name LIKE ? ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE LIMIT 100`,[search]); recipes=recipeSearch(); }
     const favoriteIds=new Set(query('SELECT food_id FROM favorite_foods').map(r=>r.food_id)); const favoriteRecipeIds=new Set(query('SELECT recipe_id FROM favorite_recipes').map(r=>r.recipe_id));
     const targets=getTargets(); const todayTotals=query(`SELECT COALESCE(SUM(calories),0) calories,COALESCE(SUM(protein),0) protein,COALESCE(SUM(carbs),0) carbs,COALESCE(SUM(fat),0) fat FROM meals WHERE consumed_local_date=?`,[today()])[0]||{};
     async function toggleFavorite(e,food){e.stopPropagation();if(favoriteIds.has(food.food_id))await run('DELETE FROM favorite_foods WHERE food_id=?',[food.food_id]);else await run('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO favorite_foods(food_id,created_at) VALUES (?,?)',[food.food_id,new Date().toISOString()]);setLocalTick(x=>x+1)}
    
     async function toggleRecipeFavorite(e,recipe){e.stopPropagation();if(favoriteRecipeIds.has(recipe.recipe_id))await run('DELETE FROM favorite_recipes WHERE recipe_id=?',[recipe.recipe_id]);else await run('INSERT OR REPLACE INTO favorite_recipes(recipe_id,created_at) VALUES (?,?)',[recipe.recipe_id,new Date().toISOString()]);setLocalTick(x=>x+1)}
     function chooseFood(f,destination='consumed'){setEntryDestination(destination);setSelected(f);setAmount(String(consumptionServing(f)));setSelectedUnit(f.unit||'serving');setError('')}
     async function archiveFood(f){if(!confirm(`Archive ${f.name}?\n\nIt will be removed from future food selections. Historical meal records will remain unchanged, including nutrition snapshots. You can restore it later from Settings → Archived Items.`))return;await transaction(async db=>{db.run('UPDATE foods SET archived=1,archived_at=? WHERE food_id=?',[new Date().toISOString(),f.food_id]);db.run('DELETE FROM favorite_foods WHERE food_id=?',[f.food_id])});if(selected?.food_id===f.food_id)setSelected(null);setToast(`${f.name} archived. History preserved.`);setLocalTick(x=>x+1);setTimeout(()=>setToast(''),2200)}
     async function archiveRecipe(r){if(!confirm(`Archive ${r.recipe_name}?\n\nIt will be removed from future recipe selections. Historical meals will remain unchanged. You can restore it later from Settings → Archived Items.`))return;await run('UPDATE recipes SET archived=1,archived_at=? WHERE recipe_id=? OR recipe_name=?',[new Date().toISOString(),r.recipe_id,r.recipe_name]);setToast(`${r.recipe_name} archived. History preserved.`);setLocalTick(x=>x+1);setTimeout(()=>setToast(''),2200)}
     function calculated(){if(!selected)return {known:false};const baseAmount=convertAmount(amount,selectedUnit,selected.unit);if(baseAmount==null)return {known:false,conversionError:true};return {...nutritionFor(selected,baseAmount,selected.unit),baseAmount}}
     async function save(asPlan=false){
      setError('');if(!selected||!Number(amount)||Number(amount)<=0){setError('Enter a quantity greater than zero.');return}const calc=calculated();if(calc.conversionError){setError(`Cannot safely convert ${selectedUnit} to ${selected.unit}. Choose a compatible unit.`);return}
      const consumed=whenMode==='now'?new Date():new Date(pastDateTime);if(Number.isNaN(consumed.getTime())){setError('Choose a valid date and time.');return}if(!asPlan&&consumed.getTime()>Date.now()+60000){setError('Consumption time cannot be in the future.');return}
      const n=calc;setSaving(true);try{if(asPlan){await transaction(async db=>{insertRecord(db,'planned_meals',{planned_at:consumed.toISOString(),planned_local_date:localDateKey(consumed),meal_type:meal,food_id:selected.food_id,food_name:selected.name,amount:Number(amount),unit:selectedUnit,...nutrientSnapshot(n),notes,status:'planned',created_at:new Date().toISOString(),updated_at:new Date().toISOString(),pantry_id:selected.pantry_id||null,source_type:selected.pantry_id?'pantry':'food',nutrition_source:selected.nutrition_source||'food_database',nutrition_confidence:selected.nutrition_confidence??null,nutrition_completeness_json:selected.nutrition_completeness_json||null})});localStorage.setItem('fizz-meal-added','1');refresh();done();return}
       const duplicate=query(`SELECT id FROM meals WHERE food_id=? AND amount=? AND unit=? AND ABS(strftime('%s',eaten_at)-strftime('%s',?))<=20 LIMIT 1`,[selected.food_id,Number(amount),selectedUnit,consumed.toISOString()])[0];if(duplicate&&!confirm('This looks like a duplicate tap. Log it again?'))return;
       await transaction(async db=>{let pantryDelta=0,pantryOpenedChanged=0;if(selected.pantry_id){const current=Number(selected.pantry_quantity)||0,inventoryUnit=selected.pantry_unit||selected.unit;const converted=convertAmount(amount,selectedUnit,inventoryUnit);if(converted!=null){pantryDelta=converted;if(pantryDelta>current&&!confirm(`Only ${current} ${inventoryUnit} remain. Log anyway?`))throw new Error('Meal logging cancelled.');db.run('UPDATE pantry SET quantity=COALESCE(quantity,0)-? WHERE pantry_id=?',[pantryDelta,selected.pantry_id])}else if(isPackageUnit(inventoryUnit)){const pantryRow=db.query('SELECT opened FROM pantry WHERE pantry_id=? LIMIT 1',[selected.pantry_id])[0];pantryOpenedChanged=pantryRow?.opened==='Yes'?0:1;db.run("UPDATE pantry SET opened='Yes' WHERE pantry_id=?",[selected.pantry_id])}}
        insertRecord(db,'meals',{eaten_at:consumed.toISOString(),created_at:new Date().toISOString(),updated_at:new Date().toISOString(),consumed_local_date:localDateKey(consumed),timezone_offset_minutes:-consumed.getTimezoneOffset(),meal_type:meal,food_id:selected.food_id,food_name:selected.name,amount:Number(amount),unit:selectedUnit,...nutrientSnapshot(n),notes,nutrition_known:n.known?1:0,nutrition_source:selected.nutrition_source||'food_database',nutrition_confidence:selected.nutrition_confidence??null,nutrition_completeness_json:selected.nutrition_completeness_json||null,pantry_id:selected.pantry_id||null,pantry_delta:pantryDelta,pantry_opened_changed:pantryOpenedChanged})});localStorage.setItem('fizz-meal-added','1');refresh();done()
      }catch(err){setError(err instanceof Error?err.message:String(err))}finally{setSaving(false)}}
     async function saveLogOnce(event){
      event.preventDefault();setLogOnceError('');const form=new FormData(event.currentTarget),name=String(form.get('name')||'').trim(),qty=Number(form.get('amount')),unit=String(form.get('unit')||'serving').trim()||'serving',mealType=String(form.get('meal_type')||'Meal'),note=String(form.get('notes')||'').trim(),mode=String(form.get('when_mode')||'now'),dateValue=String(form.get('past_datetime')||'');
      if(!name){setLogOnceError('Enter a food or meal name.');return}if(!qty||qty<=0){setLogOnceError('Enter a quantity greater than zero.');return}
      const consumed=mode==='past'?new Date(dateValue):new Date();if(Number.isNaN(consumed.getTime())){setLogOnceError('Choose a valid date and time.');return}if(consumed.getTime()>Date.now()+60000){setLogOnceError('Consumption time cannot be in the future.');return}
      const nutrient=name=>{const raw=String(form.get(name)||'').trim();return raw===''?null:Number(raw)};const nutrition=Object.fromEntries(NUTRIENT_KEYS.map(key=>[key,nutrient(key)]));
      if(Object.values(nutrition).some(value=>value!=null&&(!Number.isFinite(value)||value<0))){setLogOnceError('Nutrition values must be zero or greater.');return}
      const known=Object.values(nutrition).some(value=>value!=null),created=new Date().toISOString(),sourceRecordId=`one-time-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8)}`;setLogOnceSaving(true);
      try{await transaction(async db=>insertRecord(db,'meals',{eaten_at:consumed.toISOString(),created_at:created,updated_at:created,consumed_local_date:localDateKey(consumed),timezone_offset_minutes:-consumed.getTimezoneOffset(),meal_type:mealType,food_id:null,food_name:name,amount:qty,unit,...nutrition,notes:note,nutrition_known:known?1:0,nutrition_source:'one_time_manual',nutrition_completeness_json:JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries(NUTRIENT_KEYS.map(k=>[k,nutrition[k]===null?'unknown':'known']))),source:'one_time',source_record_id:sourceRecordId}));localStorage.setItem('fizz-meal-added','1');setShowLogOnce(false);setToast(`${name} logged once.`);refresh();setLocalTick(x=>x+1);setTimeout(()=>setToast(''),2200)}catch(err){setLogOnceError(err instanceof Error?err.message:String(err))}finally{setLogOnceSaving(false)}
     }
     const n=calculated();
     return <><div className="food-library-page"><div className="standard-page-head meals-library-head"><button type="button" onClick={onBack} aria-label="Close Meals and return to Food"><X/></button><h2>Meals</h2><button type="button" onClick={()=>setMealEditor({})} aria-label="Create new meal"><Plus/></button></div>
     <div className="add-food-actions compact-library-actions"><button type="button" onClick={()=>navigate('food-intelligence')}><ChefHat/><span>What Should I Eat?</span></button>{view==='meals'?<button type="button" onClick={()=>setMealEditor({})}><Plus/><span>New Meal</span></button>:view==='recipes'?<button type="button" onClick={()=>setShowRecipeCreate(true)}><Plus/><span>New Recipe</span></button>:<button type="button" onClick={()=>setAiExchange({operation:'create_food'})}><Plus/><span>New Food</span></button>}<button type="button" onClick={()=>setAiExchange({operation:'log_once_meal'})}><Zap/><span>Log Once</span></button></div>
     <div className="discovery-tabs">{[['all','All'],['recent','Recent'],['favorites','Favorites'],['recipes','Recipes'],['meals','Meals']].map(([id,label])=><button key={id} className={view===id?'active':''} onClick={()=>{setView(id);setQ('');setSelected(null)}}>{id==='recent'&&<Clock3/>}{id==='favorites'&&<Star/>}{id==='pantry'&&<Box/>}{id==='recipes'&&<ChefHat/>}{id==='meals'&&<UtensilsCrossed/>}<span>{label}</span></button>)}</div>
     <label className="search"><Search/><input value={q} onChange={e=>setQ(e.target.value)} placeholder={`Search ${view==='all'?'foods':view}…`}/></label>
     <div className="list foods" key={`${view}-${q}-${localTick}`}>
      {view==='meals'&&mealDefs.map(m=><SwipeArchiveCard key={m.meal_id} label={m.title} onOpen={()=>setMealEditor(m)} onArchive={()=>{}} onQuickLog={()=>setMealLog(m)}><div className="item select meal-definition-card"><span className="meal-category-icon">{mealCategoryIcon(m.category)}</span><div><b>{m.title}</b><span>{m.category} · {Math.round(finite(m.calories))} kcal · {Math.round(finite(m.protein))}g protein</span></div><button className="nutrition-inspect-button" onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();setMealEditor(m)}}><Pencil/></button></div></SwipeArchiveCard>)}
      {view!=='meals'&&recipes.map(r=><SwipeArchiveCard key={`recipe-${r.recipe_id||r.recipe_name}`} label={r.recipe_name} onOpen={()=>setRecipeDetail({type:'recipe',recipe_id:r.recipe_id})} onArchive={()=>archiveRecipe(r)} onQuickLog={()=>setQuickItem({type:'recipe',item:r})}><div className="item select"><div><b>{r.recipe_name}</b><span>{r.ingredient_count} ingredients{r.last_used?` · used ${new Date(r.last_used).toLocaleDateString()}`:''}</span></div><div className="food-actions"><em>Recipe</em><button type="button" aria-label={favoriteRecipeIds.has(r.recipe_id)?'Remove recipe from favorites':'Add recipe to favorites'} className={'favorite '+(favoriteRecipeIds.has(r.recipe_id)?'on':'')} onPointerDown={e=>e.stopPropagation()} onClick={e=>toggleRecipeFavorite(e,r)}><Star fill={favoriteRecipeIds.has(r.recipe_id)?'currentColor':'none'}/></button></div></div></SwipeArchiveCard>)}
      {view!=='meals'&&view!=='recipes'&&foods.map(f=><SwipeArchiveCard key={`food-${f.food_id}`} label={f.name} onOpen={()=>setRecipeDetail({type:'food',...f})} onArchive={()=>archiveFood(f)} onQuickLog={()=>setQuickItem({type:'food',item:f})}><div className={'item select '+(selected?.food_id===f.food_id?'chosen':'')}><div><b>{f.name}</b><span>{f.category} · {f.default_serving} {f.unit}{view==='pantry'&&f.pantry_quantity!=null?` · ${f.pantry_quantity} ${f.pantry_unit||''} on hand`:''}</span></div><div className="food-actions"><em>{Number(f.nutrition_known)===1?`${Math.round(Number(f.calories)||0)} kcal`:'Needs nutrition'}</em><button type="button" className="nutrition-inspect-button" aria-label={`View and edit nutrition for ${f.name}`} onPointerDown={e=>e.stopPropagation()} onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();setNutritionFood(f)}}><Pencil/></button><button type="button" aria-label={favoriteIds.has(f.food_id)?'Remove from favorites':'Add to favorites'} className={'favorite '+(favoriteIds.has(f.food_id)?'on':'')} onPointerDown={e=>e.stopPropagation()} onClick={e=>toggleFavorite(e,f)}><Star fill={favoriteIds.has(f.food_id)?'currentColor':'none'}/></button></div></div></SwipeArchiveCard>)}
      {view==='meals'&&!mealDefs.length&&<div className="empty">No meals defined yet. Tap New Meal to create one from foods and recipes.</div>}
      {view==='recipes'&&!recipes.length&&<div className="empty">No recipes found.</div>}
      {view!=='meals'&&view!=='recipes'&&!foods.length&&!recipes.length&&<div className="empty">No {view==='all'?'foods or recipes':view} found.</div>}
     </div></div>
     {selected&&<div className="modal-backdrop entry-modal" onClick={()=>setSelected(null)}><div className="panel meal-entry fixed-editor" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><h3>{selected.name}</h3><button type="button" aria-label="Close food editor" onClick={()=>setSelected(null)}><X/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Meal type<select value={meal} onChange={e=>setMeal(e.target.value)}><option>Breakfast</option><option>Lunch</option><option>Dinner</option><option>Snack</option><option>Meal</option></select></label><label>Quantity<div className="amount unit-amount"><input autoFocus type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.1" value={amount} onChange={e=>setAmount(e.target.value)}/><select aria-label="Serving unit" value={selectedUnit} onChange={e=>setSelectedUnit(e.target.value)}>{unitOptions(selected.unit).map(u=><option key={u} value={u}>{u}</option>)}</select></div></label><div className="nutrition-preview">{n.conversionError?<><b>Unit conversion unavailable</b><span>Choose a compatible unit.</span></>:n.known?<><b>{Math.round(n.calories)} kcal</b><span>{Math.round(n.protein)}g protein · {Math.round(n.carbs)}g carbs · {Math.round(n.fat)}g fat · {Math.round(n.fiber)}g fiber · {Math.round((n.saturated_fat||0)*10)/10}g sat fat</span><div className="macro-impact"><small>Projected today</small><span>Calories {Math.round(finite(todayTotals.calories)+n.calories)} / {Math.round(targets.calories?.target||0)}</span><span>Protein {Math.round(finite(todayTotals.protein)+n.protein)} / {Math.round(targets.protein?.target||0)}g</span><span>Carbs {Math.round(finite(todayTotals.carbs)+n.carbs)} / {Math.round(targets.carbs?.target||0)}g</span><span>Fat {Math.round(finite(todayTotals.fat)+n.fat)} / {Math.round(targets.fat?.target||0)}g</span></div></>:<><b>Needs nutrition</b><span>This food has no verified nutrition profile yet.</span></>}</div><fieldset className="when-picker"><legend>Consumed</legend><label className={whenMode==='now'?'selected':''}><input type="radio" name="when" checked={whenMode==='now'} onChange={()=>setWhenMode('now')}/><div><b>Now</b><span>Use the current device date and time</span></div></label><label className={whenMode==='past'?'selected':''}><input type="radio" name="when" checked={whenMode==='past'} onChange={()=>setWhenMode('past')}/><div><b>Past date and time</b><span>Log something consumed earlier</span></div></label>{whenMode==='past'&&<input className="datetime" type="datetime-local" value={pastDateTime} max={toDateTimeLocal()} onChange={e=>setPastDateTime(e.target.value)}/>}</fieldset><label>Notes<input value={notes} onChange={e=>setNotes(e.target.value)} placeholder="Optional"/></label>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}</div><div className="editor-actions">{entryDestination==='planned'?<><button className="secondary" disabled={saving} onClick={()=>save(false)}>Consume now</button><button className="primary" disabled={saving} onClick={()=>save(true)}>{saving?'Saving…':'Add proposed meal'}</button></>:<><button className="secondary" disabled={saving} onClick={()=>save(true)}>Plan meal</button><button className="primary" disabled={saving} onClick={()=>save(false)}>{saving?'Saving…':'Log food'}</button></>}</div></div></div>}
     {showLogOnce&&<div className="modal-backdrop entry-modal" onClick={()=>setShowLogOnce(false)}><form className="panel meal-entry fixed-editor log-once-editor" onSubmit={saveLogOnce} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><div><small>FH-1259 · ONE-TIME FOOD</small><h3>Log Once</h3></div><button type="button" aria-label="Close Log Once editor" onClick={()=>setShowLogOnce(false)}><X/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Food or meal name<input name="name" autoFocus required placeholder="Example: Birthday cake"/></label><div className="amount unit-amount"><label>Quantity<input name="amount" type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0.1" step="0.1" defaultValue="1" required/></label><label>Unit<input name="unit" defaultValue="serving" required/></label></div><label>Meal type<select name="meal_type" defaultValue="Meal"><option>Breakfast</option><option>Lunch</option><option>Dinner</option><option>Snack</option><option>Meal</option></select></label><fieldset className="log-once-nutrition"><legend>Nutrition for this logged amount</legend><div className="nutrition-form-grid">{NUTRIENTS.map(n=><label key={n.key}>{n.label} ({n.unit})<input name={n.key} type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="any" placeholder="Unknown"/></label>)}</div><small>Blank means unknown. Zero means the value is known to be zero.</small></fieldset><fieldset className="when-picker"><legend>Consumed</legend><label className="selected"><input type="radio" name="when_mode" value="now" defaultChecked/><div><b>Now</b><span>Use the current device date and time</span></div></label><label><input type="radio" name="when_mode" value="past"/><div><b>Past date and time</b><span>Enter the time below</span></div></label><input className="datetime" name="past_datetime" type="datetime-local" defaultValue={toDateTimeLocal()} max={toDateTimeLocal()}/></fieldset><label>Notes<textarea name="notes" placeholder="Optional context, preparation, or source"/></label><section className="log-once-boundary"><b>Logged only to your history</b><span>This will not create a Food Database item, Recipe, or Pantry record.</span></section>{logOnceError&&<div className="inline-error">{logOnceError}</div>}</div><div className="editor-actions"><button type="button" className="secondary" disabled={logOnceSaving} onClick={()=>setShowLogOnce(false)}>Cancel</button><button className="primary" disabled={logOnceSaving}>{logOnceSaving?'Saving…':'Log Once'}</button></div></form></div>}
     {aiExchange&&<AIExchangeWorkspace operation={aiExchange.operation} onClose={()=>setAiExchange(null)} onApplied={()=>{setAiExchange(null);setLocalTick(x=>x+1);refresh();setToast(aiExchange.operation==='create_food'?'Food created.':'Meal logged once.')}}/>}
     {nutritionFood&&<NutritionEditor food={nutritionFood} onClose={()=>setNutritionFood(null)} onSaved={()=>{setNutritionFood(null);setLocalTick(x=>x+1);refresh();setToast('Nutrition updated')}}/>}
     {recipeDetail&&<FoodRecipeDetails item={recipeDetail} onClose={()=>setRecipeDetail(null)} onSaved={()=>{refresh();setLocalTick(x=>x+1)}}/>}{quickItem&&<div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={()=>setQuickItem(null)}><div className="panel quick-log-sheet" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head"><div><small>QUICK LOG</small><h3>{quickItem.item.name||quickItem.item.recipe_name}</h3></div><button aria-label="Cancel quick log" onClick={()=>setQuickItem(null)}><X/></button></div><p>How would you like to use this {quickItem.type}?</p><button className="action" onClick={()=>{if(quickItem.type==='food'){chooseFood(quickItem.item,'planned');setQuickItem(null)}else{setRecipeDetail({type:'recipe',recipe_id:quickItem.item.recipe_id,destination:'planned'});setQuickItem(null)}}}><Clock3/><div><b>Add as proposed meal</b><span>Open the item and plan it for later</span></div></button><button className="action" onClick={()=>{if(quickItem.type==='food'){chooseFood(quickItem.item,'consumed');setQuickItem(null)}else{setRecipeDetail({type:'recipe',recipe_id:quickItem.item.recipe_id,destination:'consumed'});setQuickItem(null)}}}><Check/><div><b>Add as consumed meal</b><span>Open the item and log it now</span></div></button><button className="secondary" onClick={()=>setQuickItem(null)}>Cancel</button></div></div>}{mealEditor&&<MealDefinitionEditor meal={mealEditor.meal_id?mealEditor:null} onClose={()=>setMealEditor(null)} onSaved={()=>{setMealEditor(null);setLocalTick(x=>x+1);refresh();setView('meals')}}/>}{mealLog&&<UniversalLogPanel item={mealLog} sourceType="meal" onClose={()=>setMealLog(null)} onSaved={()=>{setMealLog(null);refresh();done()}}/>}{showRecipeCreate&&<RecipeCreateEditor foods={query(`SELECT * FROM foods WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE`)} onClose={()=>setShowRecipeCreate(false)} onSaved={(recipeName)=>{setShowRecipeCreate(false);setView('recipes');setQ('');setToast(`${recipeName} created.`);setLocalTick(x=>x+1);refresh();setTimeout(()=>setToast(''),2200)}}/>}{toast&&<div className="success-toast">{toast}</div>}</>
    }
    
    function FoodIntelligencePage({tick,onBack,onLogFood}){
     const [selected,setSelected]=useState(null);
     const items=optionalQuery(`SELECT p.*,f.default_serving,f.calories,f.protein,f.carbs,f.fiber,f.fat,f.saturated_fat,f.sodium,f.category AS food_category FROM pantry p LEFT JOIN foods f ON UPPER(f.food_id)=UPPER(p.food_id) ORDER BY p.item LIMIT 1000`);
     const events=optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM pantry_events ORDER BY event_at DESC LIMIT 1000');
     const planned=optionalQuery("SELECT * FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' ORDER BY planned_at LIMIT 250");
     const history=optionalQuery("SELECT pantry_id,food_id,amount AS quantity,eaten_at AS event_at FROM meals WHERE pantry_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY eaten_at DESC LIMIT 1000");
     const intel=buildPantryIntelligence({items:items.map(r=>({...r,category:r.category||r.food_category})),events,plannedMeals:planned,history,currentLocation:'All'});
     const active=intel.items.filter(i=>i.available);
     const known=(item,key)=>item[key]!==null&&item[key]!==undefined&&item[key]!==''&&Number.isFinite(Number(item[key]));
     const component=(key,test,description)=>{const eligible=active.filter(test),missing=Math.max(0,active.length-eligible.length);return {key,label:key[0].toUpperCase()+key.slice(1),value:active.length?Math.round(eligible.length/active.length*100):null,missing,description}};
     const components=[
      component('freshness',i=>i.freshness?.status!=='unknown','Foods with a recorded or derived freshness window.'),
      {key:'variety',label:'Variety',value:active.length?Math.min(100,new Set(active.map(i=>i.category).filter(Boolean)).size*14):null,missing:active.filter(i=>!i.category).length,description:'Category variety across foods currently available.'},
      component('protein',i=>known(i,'protein'),'Foods with known protein values.'),
      component('fiber',i=>known(i,'fiber'),'Foods with known fiber values.'),
      component('waste',i=>i.freshness?.status!=='unknown','Coverage needed to assess use-soon and waste pressure.')
     ];
     const calculated=components.filter(c=>c.value!=null&&c.missing===0);
     const readiness=active.length&&calculated.length>=3?Math.round(components.filter(c=>c.value!=null).reduce((a,c)=>a+c.value,0)/components.filter(c=>c.value!=null).length):null;
     const missingNutrition=active.filter(i=>!known(i,'calories')&&!known(i,'protein')&&!known(i,'fiber')).length;
     const missingFreshness=active.filter(i=>i.freshness?.status==='unknown').length;
     const recommendation=intel.recommendations.slice(0,5),useSoon=intel.wasteRisks.slice(0,5);
     const open=r=>setSelected(r);
     return <><PageShell eyebrow="FOOD INTELLIGENCE" title="What Should I Eat?" description="Choose using nutrition fit, foods on hand, and what should be used soon." onBack={onBack}>
      <button className="pantry-health-card tappable" onClick={()=>{}}><div className="pantry-score"><strong>{readiness??'—'}</strong><span>Food Readiness</span></div><div><h2>{readiness==null?'Incomplete':readiness>=75?'Ready for strong choices':readiness>=50?'Usable with gaps':'Needs attention'}</h2><p>{active.length} foods available · {missingNutrition} missing nutrition · {missingFreshness} missing freshness</p><small>Calculated from foods currently available to eat.</small></div></button>
      <section className="food-readiness-diagnostics"><h2>Readiness diagnostics</h2>{components.map(c=><article key={c.key}><div><small>{c.label}</small><b>{c.value==null?'Unavailable':`${c.value}% coverage`}</b><span>{c.description}</span></div><em>{c.missing?`${c.missing} missing`:'Complete'}</em></article>)}</section>
      <section className="pantry-intel-list"><h2>Chef’s Recommendations</h2>{recommendation.length?recommendation.map((r,i)=><article className="tappable" key={r.pantry_id||i} onClick={()=>open(r)}><b>#{i+1}</b><div><strong>{r.item}</strong><span>{r.opportunity.label}</span><small>{Math.round(r.remainingServings*10)/10} servings · {r.freshness.quality}</small></div><ChevronRight/></article>):<div className="empty">No qualifying recommendation is available.</div>}</section>
      <section className="pantry-intel-list"><h2>Use Soon</h2>{useSoon.length?useSoon.map(r=><article className="tappable" key={r.pantry_id} onClick={()=>open(r)}><AlertTriangle/><div><strong>{r.item}</strong><span>{r.waste.reasons.join(' · ')||'Use soon'}</span><small>Risk {r.waste.score}%</small></div><ChevronRight/></article>):<div className="empty">No foods currently require urgent use.</div>}</section>
     </PageShell>{selected&&<div className="decision-page"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>AVAILABLE FOOD</small><h2>{selected.item}</h2></div><button onClick={()=>setSelected(null)}><X/></button></header><section className="decision-block"><p>{selected.quantity??'Unknown'} {selected.unit||''} on hand · {selected.location||'Location unknown'} · {selected.freshness?.quality||'Freshness unknown'}</p></section><button className="primary" onClick={()=>{const food=resolvePantryFood(selected);if(food)onLogFood({...food,pantry_id:selected.pantry_id,pantry_quantity:selected.quantity,pantry_unit:selected.unit})}}>Use this food</button></div></div>}</>
    }
    
    function PantryItemEditor({item,locations,onClose,onSaved}){
     const [saving,setSaving]=useState(false),[error,setError]=useState('');
     const optionalNumber=value=>{const text=String(value??'').trim();if(!text)return null;const number=Number(text);return Number.isFinite(number)?number:null};
     const initialPackageCount=optionalNumber(item.package_count);
     const initialContainerSize=optionalNumber(item.container_size);
     const initialUnopened=optionalNumber(item.unopened_packages);
     const initialPartial=optionalNumber(item.partial_package_quantity);
     const hasPackageStructure=[initialPackageCount,initialContainerSize,initialUnopened,initialPartial].some(value=>value!==null)||Boolean(String(item.package_type||item.container_unit||'').trim());
     async function save(event){
      event.preventDefault();setError('');
      const form=new FormData(event.currentTarget);
      const enteredQuantity=optionalNumber(form.get('quantity'));
      const packageCount=optionalNumber(form.get('package_count'));
      const containerSize=optionalNumber(form.get('container_size'));
      const unopenedPackages=optionalNumber(form.get('unopened_packages'));
      const partialPackageQuantity=optionalNumber(form.get('partial_package_quantity'));
      const packageType=String(form.get('package_type')||'').trim()||null;
      const containerUnit=String(form.get('container_unit')||'').trim()||null;
      const hasAnyPackageDetail=[packageCount,containerSize,unopenedPackages,partialPackageQuantity].some(value=>value!==null)||Boolean(packageType||containerUnit);
      const canCalculateTotal=packageCount!==null&&packageCount>0&&containerSize!==null&&containerSize>0;
      if(hasAnyPackageDetail&&!canCalculateTotal){setError('Enter both packages on hand and size per package, or clear all package details.');return}
      if(canCalculateTotal&&unopenedPackages!==null&&unopenedPackages>packageCount){setError('Unopened packages cannot exceed packages on hand.');return}
      const effectiveUnopened=canCalculateTotal?(unopenedPackages??packageCount):null;
      const effectivePartial=canCalculateTotal?(partialPackageQuantity??0):null;
      const quantity=canCalculateTotal?Math.max(0,effectiveUnopened*containerSize+effectivePartial):enteredQuantity;
      if(quantity===null||quantity<0){setError('Enter a valid total quantity, or complete the package details.');return}
      setSaving(true);
      try{
       const now=new Date().toISOString();
       const savedUnit=(canCalculateTotal?containerUnit:String(form.get('unit')||'').trim())||item.unit||'item';
       await transaction(async db=>{
        db.run(`UPDATE pantry SET item=?,brand=?,quantity=?,unit=?,location=?,opened=?,purchase_date=?,expiration=?,notes=?,on_hand=?,verified_at=?,quantity_accuracy='verified',package_count=?,package_type=?,container_size=?,container_unit=?,unopened_packages=?,partial_package_quantity=?,freshness_status=? WHERE pantry_id=?`,[
         form.get('item'),form.get('brand')||null,quantity,savedUnit,form.get('location')||'Home',form.get('opened')||'No',form.get('purchase_date')||null,form.get('expiration')||null,form.get('notes')||null,quantity>0?'Yes':'No',now,
         canCalculateTotal?packageCount:null,canCalculateTotal?(packageType||'package'):null,canCalculateTotal?containerSize:null,canCalculateTotal?(containerUnit||savedUnit):null,canCalculateTotal?effectiveUnopened:null,canCalculateTotal?effectivePartial:null,form.get('freshness_status')||null,item.pantry_id
        ]);
        const verified=db.query('SELECT * FROM pantry WHERE pantry_id=? LIMIT 1',[item.pantry_id])[0];
        if(!verified)throw new Error('Pantry item could not be reloaded after saving.');
        const expected={package_count:canCalculateTotal?packageCount:null,container_size:canCalculateTotal?containerSize:null,unopened_packages:canCalculateTotal?effectiveUnopened:null,partial_package_quantity:canCalculateTotal?effectivePartial:null};
        for(const [key,value] of Object.entries(expected)){const actual=optionalNumber(verified[key]);if(value===null?actual!==null:actual!==value)throw new Error(`Pantry ${key.replaceAll('_',' ')} did not save correctly.`)}
        db.run('INSERT INTO pantry_events(pantry_id,event_type,quantity,unit,notes,event_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)',[item.pantry_id,'verify',quantity,savedUnit,'Pantry item edited and verified',now]);
       });
       const saved=query('SELECT * FROM pantry WHERE pantry_id=? LIMIT 1',[item.pantry_id])[0];
       if(!saved)throw new Error('Pantry item was saved but could not be reloaded.');
       onSaved?.(saved);
      }catch(err){setError(err instanceof Error?err.message:String(err))}finally{setSaving(false)}
     }
     return <div className="modal-backdrop pantry-editor-layer" onClick={onClose}><form className="panel fixed-editor pantry-manual-editor" onSubmit={save} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel"><X/></button><div><small>PANTRY ITEM</small><h3>{item.item}</h3><em>Inventory details</em></div><button type="submit" className="header-icon-action save-action" disabled={saving} aria-label="Save pantry item"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll">
      <label>Food name<input name="item" defaultValue={item.item} required/></label>
      <label>Brand<input name="brand" defaultValue={item.brand||''}/></label>
      <section className="decision-block pantry-package-editor"><h3>Package inventory</h3><p>Track both the number of packages and the amount in each package. Total quantity is calculated automatically when package details are provided.</p>
       <div className="amount"><label>Packages on hand<input name="package_count" type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.1" defaultValue={hasPackageStructure&&Number.isFinite(initialPackageCount)?initialPackageCount:''}/></label><label>Package type<input name="package_type" placeholder="bottle, box, bag…" defaultValue={item.package_type||''}/></label></div>
       <div className="amount"><label>Size per package<input name="container_size" type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.1" defaultValue={Number.isFinite(initialContainerSize)?initialContainerSize:''}/></label><label>Package unit<input name="container_unit" defaultValue={item.container_unit||item.unit||'item'}/></label></div>
       <div className="amount"><label>Unopened packages<input name="unopened_packages" type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.1" defaultValue={Number.isFinite(initialUnopened)?initialUnopened:''}/></label><label>Amount remaining in open package<input name="partial_package_quantity" type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.1" defaultValue={Number.isFinite(initialPartial)?initialPartial:''}/></label></div>
      </section>
      <div className="amount"><label>Total quantity on hand<input name="quantity" type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.1" defaultValue={item.quantity??0}/></label><label>Total unit<input name="unit" defaultValue={item.unit||'item'}/></label></div>
      <label>Storage location<select name="location" defaultValue={item.location||'Home'}>{locations.map(l=><option key={l.location_id}>{l.name}</option>)}</select></label>
      <label>Package state<select name="opened" defaultValue={item.opened||'No'}><option>No</option><option>Yes</option></select></label>
      <label>Freshness<select name="freshness_status" defaultValue={item.freshness_status||item.freshness_observation||''}><option value="">Not selected</option><option value="fresh">Fresh</option><option value="use_soon">Use soon</option><option value="past_best_quality">Past best quality</option><option value="discard">Discard</option></select></label>
      <label>Purchase / prepared date<input name="purchase_date" type="date" defaultValue={item.purchase_date||item.prepared_at?.slice?.(0,10)||''}/></label>
      <label>Expiration / best-by<input name="expiration" type="date" defaultValue={item.expiration||''}/></label>
      <label>Notes<textarea name="notes" defaultValue={item.notes||''}/></label>
      <section className="decision-block"><h3>Verification</h3><p>Saving verifies the quantity and records today as the verification date.</p></section>
      {error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}
     </div></form></div>
    }
    
    function pantryMissingEvidence(item){
     const missing=[];
     if(!(Number(item.quantity)>=0))missing.push('Quantity on hand is not recorded');
     if(!item.verified_at)missing.push('Quantity has not been verified');
     if(!item.expiration)missing.push('Expiration or best-by date is not recorded');
     if(!(item.freshness_status||item.freshness_observation||item.freshness?.quality&&item.freshness.quality!=='unknown'))missing.push('Freshness is not selected');
     if(!item.location)missing.push('Storage location is not confirmed');
     if(!item.package_count&&['bottle','box','bag','can','carton','package','pack','container','jar','tub'].includes(String(item.package_type||item.unit||'').toLowerCase()))missing.push('Package count is not recorded');
     return missing;
    }
    
    function Pantry({onLogFood,tick}){
     const attentionIds=useMemo(()=>{try{return JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('fizz-pantry-attention')||'[]').map(String)}catch{return []}},[]);
     const [q,setQ]=useState(''),[view,setView]=useState(attentionIds.length?'attention':'stock'),[localTick,setLocalTick]=useState(0),[currentLocation,setCurrentLocation]=useState('All'),[showScore,setShowScore]=useState(false),[showManual,setShowManual]=useState(false),[showSearch,setShowSearch]=useState(false),[selectedPantry,setSelectedPantry]=useState(null),[scoreItem,setScoreItem]=useState(null);
     const allRows=query(`SELECT p.*,f.default_serving,f.unit AS food_unit,f.nutrition_known,f.nutrition_completeness_json,f.calories,f.protein,f.carbs,f.fiber,f.fat,f.saturated_fat,f.trans_fat,f.cholesterol,f.sodium,f.total_sugar,f.added_sugar,f.category AS food_category,(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(m.amount),0) FROM meals m WHERE m.pantry_id=p.pantry_id AND COALESCE(m.pantry_opened_changed,0)=1) AS package_consumed,(SELECT m.unit FROM meals m WHERE m.pantry_id=p.pantry_id AND COALESCE(m.pantry_opened_changed,0)=1 ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS consumption_unit FROM pantry p LEFT JOIN foods f ON UPPER(f.food_id)=UPPER(p.food_id) ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.on_hand='Yes' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,p.item LIMIT 1000`);
     const events=query('SELECT * FROM pantry_events ORDER BY event_at DESC LIMIT 1000');
     const planned=query("SELECT * FROM planned_meals WHERE status='planned' ORDER BY planned_at LIMIT 250");
     const history=query("SELECT pantry_id,food_id,amount AS quantity,eaten_at AS event_at FROM meals WHERE pantry_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY eaten_at DESC LIMIT 1000");
     const locations=query("SELECT * FROM pantry_locations WHERE active=1 ORDER BY sort_order,name");
     const browsingLocations=locations.filter(location=>String(location.name||'').trim().toLowerCase()!=='home');
     const locationRows=filterPantryInventory(allRows,{search:'',location:currentLocation,locations});
     const rows=view==='attention'?locationRows.filter(r=>attentionIds.includes(String(r.pantry_id||r.id))):locationRows;
     const intel=buildPantryIntelligence({items:rows.map(r=>({...r,category:r.category||r.food_category})),events,plannedMeals:planned,history,currentLocation});
     const searchRows=filterPantryInventory(allRows,{search:q,location:currentLocation,locations});
     const searchIntel=buildPantryIntelligence({items:searchRows.map(r=>({...r,category:r.category||r.food_category})),events,plannedMeals:planned,history,currentLocation});
     async function setLocation(name){setCurrentLocation(name);await run("UPDATE pantry_locations SET is_current=CASE WHEN name=? THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,updated_at=?",[name,new Date().toISOString()])}
     async function saveManual(e){e.preventDefault();const f=new FormData(e.currentTarget),name=String(f.get('name')||'').trim();if(!name)return;const id=`manual-${Date.now()}`,iso=new Date().toISOString(),foodId=`food-${Date.now()}`;await transaction(db=>{db.run('INSERT INTO foods(food_id,name,category,default_serving,unit,nutrition_known,notes) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[foodId,name,f.get('category')||'Food',Number(f.get('serving'))||1,f.get('unit')||'item',0,'Manual pantry creation']);db.run('INSERT INTO pantry(pantry_id,item,food_id,brand,on_hand,quantity,unit,location,status,purchase_date,expiration,notes,verified_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[id,name,foodId,f.get('brand')||null,'Yes',Number(f.get('quantity'))||1,f.get('unit')||'item',f.get('location')||manualLocation,'Active',f.get('purchase_date')||null,f.get('expiration')||null,f.get('notes')||null,iso])});setShowManual(false);setLocalTick(x=>x+1)}
