     const score=intel.health,verified=intel.items.filter(i=>i.confidence>=75).length,lower=intel.items.filter(i=>i.waste.score>=55).slice(0,3),improve=intel.items.filter(i=>i.opportunity.score>=55).slice(0,3),activeCount=intel.items.filter(i=>i.available).length,missingNutrition=intel.items.filter(i=>i.available&&!(Number(i.protein)>0||Number(i.fiber)>0||Number(i.calories)>0)).length;
     const manualLocation=currentLocation!=='All'?currentLocation:(locations.find(l=>l.name==='Home')?.name||locations[0]?.name||'Home');
     const findPantryRecord=r=>intel.items.find(i=>String(i.pantry_id||i.id)===String(r.pantry_id||r.id))||intel.items.find(i=>r.food_id&&String(i.food_id).toUpperCase()===String(r.food_id).toUpperCase())||intel.items.find(i=>String(i.item).toLowerCase()===String(r.item).toLowerCase())||r;
     const openRecord=r=>setSelectedPantry(findPantryRecord(r));
     const InventoryCard=({r})=>{const completion=nutritionCompletion({...r,unit:r.food_unit||r.unit});return <div className={'item pantry-item pantry-smart-item '+(!completion.complete?'needs-data-card':'')} key={r.id||r.pantry_id}><button type="button" className="pantry-open" onClick={()=>openRecord(r)}><div><b>{r.item}</b><span>{r.brand}{r.location?' · '+r.location:''}{r.opened==='Yes'?' · Open':''} · {r.freshness?.quality||'unknown'}</span></div><em>{r.quantity??''} {r.unit}</em></button><button className={'verify-chip '+(!completion.complete?'missing-data':'')} onClick={()=>setScoreItem(r)} aria-label={completion.complete?(r.confidence>0?`Inventory confidence ${r.confidence}%`:'Nutrition complete'):`Nutrition incomplete: ${completion.missing.map(x=>x.label).join(', ')}`}>{completion.complete?(r.confidence>0?<>{r.confidence>=75?<Check/>:<ShieldCheck/>}{r.confidence}%</>:<Check/>):<Database/>}</button></div>}
     return <><div className="standard-page-head pantry-page-head"><span></span><h2>Pantry</h2><button type="button" onClick={()=>setShowManual(true)} aria-label="Add pantry item"><Plus/></button></div><header className="pantry-summary-header"><small>PANTRY INVENTORY</small><h1>Inventory control</h1><p>{rows.length} matching items · {currentLocation} · Choose a view below</p></header>
     <button className="pantry-health-card tappable" onClick={()=>setShowScore(true)}><div className="pantry-score"><strong>{score.score==null?'—':score.score}</strong><span>Pantry Health Score</span></div><div><h2>{score.label}</h2><p>{score.reason||'Freshness, nutrition, variety, waste risk, and inventory confidence.'}</p><small>{activeCount} in stock · Tap for details</small></div></button>
     <div className="pantry-toolbar"><label className="location-picker">Current location<select value={currentLocation} onChange={e=>setLocation(e.target.value)}><option value="All">All</option>{browsingLocations.map(l=><option key={l.location_id}>{l.name}</option>)}</select></label></div>
     {attentionIds.length>0&&<section className="attention-context"><b>Pantry attention</b><span>{attentionIds.length} items produced the Home dashboard alert.</span></section>}<div className="pantry-intel-tabs">{[...(attentionIds.length?[['attention',`Attention (${attentionIds.length})`]]:[]),['stock','In Stock'],['restock','Restock'],['out','Out of Stock'],['shopping','Shopping']].map(([id,label])=><button key={id} className={view===id?'active':''} onClick={()=>setView(id)}>{label}</button>)}</div>
     <button className="pantry-search-launch" type="button" onClick={()=>{setQ('');setShowSearch(true)}}><Search/><span><b>Search pantry</b><small>Find any inventory record</small></span><ChevronRight/></button>
     {view==='attention'&&<section className="pantry-intel-list attention-list"><h2>Needs attention today</h2>{rows.map(r=><article className="tappable" key={r.pantry_id||r.id} onClick={()=>openRecord(r)}><AlertTriangle/><div><strong>{r.item}</strong><span>{r.expiration?`Expires ${new Date(`${r.expiration}T12:00:00`).toLocaleDateString()}`:'Inventory attention'}</span><small>{r.quantity??''} {r.unit||''} on hand</small></div><ChevronRight/></article>)}{!rows.length&&<div className="empty">Those items are no longer in the current pantry view.</div>}</section>}
     {view==='stock'&&<div className="list pantry-filter-results" id="pantry-inventory">{intel.items.filter(r=>r.available).map(r=><InventoryCard key={r.id||r.pantry_id} r={r}/>)}</div>}
     {view==='restock'&&<section className="pantry-intel-list"><h2>Smart restock</h2>{intel.restock.map(r=><article className="tappable" key={r.id||r.pantry_id} onClick={()=>openRecord(r)}><Clock3/><div><strong>{r.item}</strong><span>{r.forecast.daysRemaining} days remaining</span><small>{r.forecast.remainingAfterPlan} servings after planned meals</small></div><ChevronRight/></article>)}{!intel.restock.length&&<div className="empty">Nothing is projected to run out this week.</div>}</section>}
     {view==='shopping'&&<section className="pantry-intel-list"><h2>Optimized shopping list</h2>{intel.shopping.map(r=><article className="tappable" key={r.id||r.pantry_id||r.item} onClick={()=>openRecord(r)}><Package/><div><strong>{r.item}</strong><span>Buy {r.buy} {r.unit}</span><small>{r.reason}</small></div><ChevronRight/></article>)}{!intel.shopping.length&&<div className="empty">Current inventory covers planned demand.</div>}</section>}
     {view==='out'&&<section className="pantry-intel-list"><h2>Out of stock</h2>{intel.outOfStock.length?<div className="list pantry-filter-results">{intel.outOfStock.map(r=><InventoryCard key={r.id||r.pantry_id} r={r}/>)}</div>:<div className="empty"><b>No out-of-stock foods.</b><span>Every tracked pantry item currently has quantity remaining.</span></div>}</section>}
     {showSearch&&<div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner pantry-search-page"><header className="decision-detail-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={()=>setShowSearch(false)} aria-label="Close pantry search"><X/></button><div><small>PANTRY INVENTORY</small><h2>Search Pantry</h2></div><span/></header><label className="search pantry-search"><Search/><input autoFocus value={q} onChange={e=>setQ(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search pantry…"/></label><p className="search-result-count">{searchRows.length} matching record{searchRows.length===1?'':'s'} · {currentLocation}</p><div className="list pantry-search-results">{searchIntel.items.map(r=><InventoryCard key={r.id||r.pantry_id} r={r}/>)}</div>{!searchRows.length&&<div className="empty">No pantry items match this search.</div>}</div></div>}
     {showScore&&<div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><div><small>PANTRY INTELLIGENCE</small><h2>Pantry Health Score</h2></div><button onClick={()=>setShowScore(false)} aria-label="Close"><X/></button></header><section className="pantry-score-detail"><strong>{score.score==null?'—':score.score}</strong><h3>{score.label}</h3><p>Calculated from the exact inventory currently displayed for {currentLocation}.</p></section><div className="pantry-component-grid">{Object.entries(score.components).map(([k,v])=><section key={k}><small>{k.replaceAll('_',' ')}</small><b>{v==null?'Not available':v}</b><p>{k==='freshness'?'Higher when foods are within recorded freshness windows.':k==='waste'?'Higher when fewer foods are at risk of spoilage.':k==='confidence'?'Based on verification recency and quantity quality.':`Contribution from ${k} across displayed foods.`}</p></section>)}</div><section className="decision-block"><h3>Inventory evidence</h3><p>{verified} verified · {activeCount} in stock · {intel.outOfStock.length} out of stock · {missingNutrition} missing nutrition · calculated {new Date().toLocaleString()}</p>{improve.length>0&&<p><b>Improving:</b> {improve.map(i=>i.item).join(', ')}</p>}{lower.length>0&&<p><b>Needs attention:</b> {lower.map(i=>i.item).join(', ')}</p>}</section><button className="primary" onClick={()=>setShowScore(false)}>Back to Pantry</button></div></div>}
     {scoreItem&&<div className="decision-page" role="dialog" aria-modal="true"><div className="decision-page-inner"><header className="decision-detail-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={()=>setScoreItem(null)} aria-label="Close"><X/></button><div><small>PANTRY ITEM</small><h2>{scoreItem.item}</h2></div><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();setSelectedPantry(scoreItem)}} aria-label="Edit pantry item"><Pencil/></button></header>{(()=>{const missing=pantryMissingEvidence(scoreItem);return <><section className="pantry-score-detail"><strong>{scoreItem.confidence>0?`${scoreItem.confidence}%`:'—'}</strong><h3>{missing.length?'Complete missing details':'Inventory confidence'}</h3><p>{missing.length?`Confidence is reduced because ${missing.length} inventory detail${missing.length===1?' is':'s are'} missing.`:'Confidence is based on quantity, verification recency, package structure, freshness, and inventory events.'}</p></section>{missing.length>0&&<section className="decision-block missing-evidence-list"><h3>Information needed</h3><ul>{missing.map(reason=><li key={reason}>{reason}</li>)}</ul><button className="primary" onClick={()=>setSelectedPantry(scoreItem)}>Complete missing details</button></section>}</>} )()}<div className="pantry-component-grid"><section><small>Quantity</small><b>{scoreItem.quantity??'Unknown'} {scoreItem.unit||''}</b></section><section><small>Packages</small><b>{scoreItem.package_count??'Not recorded'} {scoreItem.package_type||''}</b></section><section><small>Verified</small><b>{scoreItem.verified_at?new Date(scoreItem.verified_at).toLocaleDateString():'Not verified'}</b></section><section><small>Freshness</small><b>{scoreItem.freshness_status||scoreItem.freshness?.quality||'Not selected'}</b></section><section><small>Expiration</small><b>{scoreItem.expiration||'Not recorded'}</b></section></div></div></div>} {selectedPantry&&<PantryItemEditor item={selectedPantry} locations={locations} onClose={()=>setSelectedPantry(null)} onSaved={(updated)=>{setSelectedPantry(null);setScoreItem(current=>current?{...current,...updated}:current);setLocalTick(x=>x+1)}}/>}
     {showManual&&<div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={()=>setShowManual(false)}><form className="panel fixed-editor pantry-manual-editor" onSubmit={saveManual} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button type="button" className="header-icon-action" onClick={()=>setShowManual(false)} aria-label="Cancel"><X/></button><div><small>PANTRY</small><h3>Add food manually</h3></div><button type="submit" className="header-icon-action save-action" aria-label="Save pantry item"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Food name<input name="name" autoFocus required/></label><label>Brand<input name="brand"/></label><label>Category<input name="category"/></label><div className="amount"><label>Quantity<input name="quantity" type="number" inputMode="decimal" step="0.1" defaultValue="1"/></label><label>Unit<input name="unit" defaultValue="item"/></label></div><label>Storage location<select name="location" defaultValue={manualLocation}>{locations.map(l=><option key={l.location_id}>{l.name}</option>)}</select></label><label>Purchase date<input name="purchase_date" type="date"/></label><label>Expiration / best-by<input name="expiration" type="date"/></label><label>Notes<textarea name="notes"/></label></div></form></div>}</>}
    
    
    function AIExchangeWorkspace({operation,onClose,onApplied}){
     const [evidenceType,setEvidenceType]=useState('food_photo'),[request,setRequest]=useState(null),[preview,setPreview]=useState(null),[message,setMessage]=useState(''),[busy,setBusy]=useState(false);
     const buildRequest=()=>operation==='create_food'?buildNewFoodExchange({evidenceType}):buildLogOnceExchange();
     async function copyRequest(){const next=buildRequest();setRequest(next);setPreview(null);try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(next,null,2));setMessage('Request copied. Open ChatGPT, attach the photos or description, then copy its JSON response and return here.')}catch{setMessage('Clipboard access was blocked. Try again from Safari or the installed app.')}}
     async function readClipboard(){setMessage('');try{const raw=await navigator.clipboard.readText(),payload=validateUniversalExchange(JSON.parse(normalizeUniversalJson(raw)));if(payload.operation!==operation)throw new Error('The clipboard response belongs to a different Fizz Health request.');if(request&&payload.request_id!==request.request_id)throw new Error('The clipboard response does not match this request.');setPreview(payload);setMessage('Response validated. Review before accepting.')}catch(error){setPreview(null);setMessage(`Clipboard does not contain a valid response: ${error.message}`)}}
     async function apply(){if(!preview)return;setMessage('Saving changes…');setBusy(true);try{const now=new Date().toISOString(),confidence=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Number(preview.analysis?.confidence)||0)),quality=String(preview.analysis?.evidence_quality||'visual_estimate');if(operation==='create_food'){const proposed=foodProposal(preview);if(!String(proposed.name||'').trim())throw new Error('The proposed food has no name.');const foodId=`F${Date.now()}`;const completeness=JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries(NUTRIENT_KEYS.map(k=>[k,proposed[k]==null?'unknown':'known'])));await transaction(async db=>insertRecord(db,'foods',{food_id:foodId,name:proposed.name,brand:proposed.brand,category:proposed.category||'Food',default_serving:Number(proposed.default_serving)||1,unit:proposed.unit||'serving',...nutrientSnapshot(proposed),nutrition_known:NUTRIENT_KEYS.some(k=>proposed[k]!=null)?1:0,nutrition_source:quality,nutrition_confidence:confidence,nutrition_completeness_json:completeness,serving_description:proposed.serving_description,servings_per_container:proposed.servings_per_container,ingredients:proposed.ingredients,allergens:proposed.allergens,barcode:proposed.barcode,package_quantity:proposed.package_quantity,expiration_date:proposed.expiration_date,expiration_date_type:proposed.expiration_date_type,preparation_instructions:proposed.preparation_instructions,notes:proposed.notes,created_at:now,updated_at:now}));}
     else {const proposed=mealProposal(preview);if(!String(proposed.name||'').trim())throw new Error('The proposed meal has no name.');const completeness=JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries(NUTRIENT_KEYS.map(k=>[k,proposed[k]==null?'unknown':'known'])));await transaction(async db=>insertRecord(db,'meals',{eaten_at:now,created_at:now,updated_at:now,consumed_local_date:today(),timezone_offset_minutes:-new Date().getTimezoneOffset(),meal_type:proposed.meal_type||'Meal',food_id:null,food_name:proposed.name,amount:proposed.amount||1,unit:proposed.unit||'serving',...nutrientSnapshot(proposed),notes:[proposed.portion_description,proposed.notes].filter(Boolean).join(' · ')||null,nutrition_known:NUTRIENT_KEYS.some(k=>proposed[k]!=null)?1:0,nutrition_source:quality,nutrition_confidence:confidence,nutrition_completeness_json:completeness,source:'one_time_ai',source_record_id:`one-time-ai-${Date.now()}`}));localStorage.setItem('fizz-meal-added','1');}
     onApplied?.();}catch(error){setMessage(`Import failed: ${error.message}`)}finally{setBusy(false)}}
     const proposed=preview?(operation==='create_food'?foodProposal(preview):mealProposal(preview)):null;
     if(preview)return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-review"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={()=>setPreview(null)} aria-label="Reject"><X/></button><div><small>{operation==='create_food'?'REVIEW NEW FOOD':'REVIEW MEAL ESTIMATE'}</small><h3>{proposed?.name||'Untitled'}</h3><em>{Math.round(Number(preview.analysis?.confidence)||0)}% confidence · {String(preview.analysis?.evidence_quality||'estimated').replaceAll('_',' ')}</em></div><button className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={apply} disabled={busy} aria-label="Accept">{busy?'…':<Check/>}</button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><section className="enrichment-confidence"><b>{operation==='create_food'?'Creates a reusable food':'Logs one meal event only'}</b><span>{operation==='create_food'?'No pantry item or meal will be created.':'This will not create a Food Database item, Recipe, Pantry record, or restaurant item.'}</span></section><div className="change-list"><article><b>Serving</b><div><strong>{proposed?.amount||proposed?.default_serving||1} {proposed?.unit||'serving'}</strong></div></article>{NUTRIENTS.filter(n=>proposed?.[n.key]!=null).map(n=><article key={n.key}><b>{n.label}</b><div><strong>{proposed[n.key]} {n.unit}</strong></div></article>)}</div>{preview.analysis?.portion_assumptions?.length>0&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Portion assumptions</h3><p>{preview.analysis.portion_assumptions.join(' · ')}</p></section>}{preview.analysis?.evidence_notes?.length>0&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Evidence</h3><p>{evidenceText(preview.analysis.evidence_notes)}</p></section>}<section className="decision-block"><h3>Storage</h3><p>The reviewed nutrition and lightweight provenance will be stored. Photos and exchange JSON will not be retained.</p></section>{message&&<div className="status error">{message}</div>}</div></div></div>;
     return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-workspace"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close"><X/></button><div><small>AI EXCHANGE</small><h3>{operation==='create_food'?'New Food':'Log Once'}</h3><em>One workspace · reviewed import</em></div><button className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={readClipboard} aria-label="Read ChatGPT response"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll">{operation==='create_food'&&<section className="enrichment-step"><small>SOURCE</small><h3>How are you creating this food?</h3><div className="ai-source-options">{[['package_photos','Package photos'],['food_photo','Food photo'],['text_description','Text description']].map(([id,label])=><button key={id} className={evidenceType===id?'active':''} onClick={()=>{setEvidenceType(id);setRequest(null)}}>{label}</button>)}</div></section>}<section className="enrichment-step"><small>STEP 1</small><h3>Copy the request</h3><p>{operation==='create_food'?'Paste it into ChatGPT and attach the package, food photo, or description.':'Paste it into ChatGPT and attach the meal photo. Record a food or meal without saving it to Foods, Recipes, or Pantry. Restaurant meals are saved as one-time meal events unless you create a reusable food separately.'}</p><button className="primary" onClick={copyRequest}><ClipboardCopy/> Copy Request</button></section><section className="enrichment-step"><small>STEP 2</small><h3>Return with the response</h3><p>Copy ChatGPT’s completed JSON, return to Fizz Health, and paste the response from the clipboard.</p><button className="secondary clipboard-response-button" onClick={readClipboard}><ClipboardCopy/> Paste Response</button></section>{message&&<div className={`status ${message.startsWith('Clipboard does not')?'error':''}`}>{message}</div>}</div></div></div>;
    }
    
    function evidenceText(value){
     if(value==null)return '';
     if(typeof value==='string'||typeof value==='number')return String(value);
     if(Array.isArray(value))return value.map(evidenceText).filter(Boolean).join(' · ');
     if(typeof value==='object')return String(value.note||value.description||value.label||value.type||value.source||value.text||Object.values(value).map(evidenceText).filter(Boolean).join(': '));
     return String(value);
    }
    
    function FoodEnrichmentWorkspace({food,onClose,onApplied}){
     const [response,setResponse]=useState(''),[preview,setPreview]=useState(null),[message,setMessage]=useState(''),[busy,setBusy]=useState(false);
     const request=useMemo(()=>buildFoodEnrichmentExchange(food),[food]);
     async function copyRequest(){
      try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(request,null,2));setMessage('AI request copied. Paste it into ChatGPT and attach every useful product photo.')}catch{setMessage('Clipboard access was blocked. Try again from Safari or the installed app.')}
     }
     async function pasteResponse(){try{const parsed=parseExchangeJson(await navigator.clipboard.readText()),payload=validateUniversalExchange(parsed.payload),normalized=parsed.normalized;if(String(payload.target.id)!==String(food.food_id))throw new Error('The returned food target does not match this record.');setResponse(normalized);setPreview(payload);setMessage('Response validated. Review all proposed changes before importing.')}catch(error){setPreview(null);setMessage(error instanceof Error?`Validation failed: ${error.message}`:'Clipboard access was blocked. Tap the field and use iOS Paste.')}}
     function review(){try{const parsed=parseExchangeJson(response),payload=validateUniversalExchange(parsed.payload),normalized=parsed.normalized;if(String(payload.target.id)!==String(food.food_id))throw new Error('The returned food target does not match this record.');setResponse(normalized);setPreview(payload);setMessage('Response validated. Review all proposed changes before importing.')}catch(error){setPreview(null);setMessage(`Validation failed: ${error.message}`)}}
     async function apply(){if(!preview)return;setMessage('Saving changes…');setBusy(true);try{
      const proposed=foodProposal(preview),changes=changedFoodFields(food,preview),now=new Date().toISOString(),todayKey=today();let todayUpdated=0,plannedUpdated=0;
      if(preview.analysis?.identity_match===false)throw new Error('The photographed product does not match the selected food. Import blocked.');
      await transaction(async db=>{
       const exists=db.query('SELECT food_id FROM foods WHERE food_id=?',[food.food_id])[0];if(!exists)throw new Error('The existing food record no longer exists. No new food was created.');
       const foodCols=new Set(db.query('PRAGMA table_info(foods)').map(x=>x.name));
       const allowed=Object.keys(proposed).filter(k=>foodCols.has(k)&&proposed[k]!==null&&proposed[k]!==undefined&&proposed[k]!=='');
       const nutritionKeys=NUTRIENT_KEYS.filter(k=>allowed.includes(k));
       const completeness={};for(const key of NUTRIENT_KEYS)completeness[key]=(proposed[key]??food[key])==null?'unknown':'known';
       const assignments=allowed.map(k=>`${k}=?`),params=allowed.map(k=>normalizeSqlValue(proposed[k],k));
       if(foodCols.has('nutrition_known')){assignments.push('nutrition_known=?');params.push(nutritionCompletion({...food,...proposed}).complete?1:0)}
       if(foodCols.has('nutrition_source')){assignments.push('nutrition_source=?');params.push('package_label_ai_reviewed')}
       if(foodCols.has('nutrition_confidence')){assignments.push('nutrition_confidence=?');params.push(Number(preview.analysis?.confidence)||0)}
       if(foodCols.has('nutrition_completeness_json')){assignments.push('nutrition_completeness_json=?');params.push(JSON.stringify(completeness))}
       if(foodCols.has('updated_at')){assignments.push('updated_at=?');params.push(now)}
       if(assignments.length){params.push(food.food_id);db.run(`UPDATE foods SET ${assignments.join(',')} WHERE food_id=?`,params)}
       const serving=Number(proposed.default_serving??food.default_serving)||1;
       for(const table of ['meals','planned_meals']){
        const cols=new Set(db.query(`PRAGMA table_info(${table})`).map(x=>x.name));const updateKeys=nutritionKeys.filter(k=>cols.has(k));if(!updateKeys.length)continue;
        const where=table==='meals'?"UPPER(food_id)=UPPER(?) AND (consumed_local_date=? OR (consumed_local_date IS NULL AND substr(eaten_at,1,10)=?))":"UPPER(food_id)=UPPER(?) AND status='planned'";
        const whereParams=table==='meals'?[food.food_id,todayKey,todayKey]:[food.food_id];
        const count=Number(db.query(`SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM ${table} WHERE ${where}`,whereParams)[0]?.count||0);
        const setSql=updateKeys.map(k=>`${k}=?*amount/?`),setParams=[];for(const k of updateKeys)setParams.push(proposed[k],serving);
        if(cols.has('nutrition_known')){setSql.push('nutrition_known=1')}
        if(cols.has('nutrition_source')){setSql.push("nutrition_source='package_label_ai_reviewed'")}
        if(cols.has('nutrition_confidence')){setSql.push('nutrition_confidence=?');setParams.push(Number(preview.analysis?.confidence)||0)}
        if(cols.has('nutrition_completeness_json')){setSql.push('nutrition_completeness_json=?');setParams.push(JSON.stringify(completeness))}
        if(cols.has('updated_at')){setSql.push('updated_at=?');setParams.push(now)}
        db.run(`UPDATE ${table} SET ${setSql.join(',')} WHERE ${where}`,[...setParams,...whereParams]);if(table==='meals')todayUpdated=count;else plannedUpdated=count;
       }
       const affectedRecipes=db.query(`SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(recipe_id,''),recipe_name) recipe_id FROM recipes WHERE UPPER(ingredient_id)=UPPER(?) OR LOWER(ingredient_name)=LOWER(?)`,[food.food_id,food.name]);
       for(const recipe of affectedRecipes){const snap=recipeSnapshotFrom((sql,params)=>db.query(sql,params),recipe.recipe_id);if(!snap)continue;for(const table of ['meals','planned_meals']){const cols=new Set(db.query(`PRAGMA table_info(${table})`).map(x=>x.name));const updateKeys=NUTRIENT_KEYS.filter(k=>cols.has(k));const where=table==='meals'?"food_id=? AND (consumed_local_date=? OR (consumed_local_date IS NULL AND substr(eaten_at,1,10)=?))":"food_id=? AND status='planned'";const whereParams=table==='meals'?[`recipe:${snap.recipe_id}`,todayKey,todayKey]:[`recipe:${snap.recipe_id}`];const setSql=updateKeys.map(k=>`${k}=?*amount`),setParams=updateKeys.map(k=>snap.nutrition[k]);if(cols.has('nutrition_known'))setSql.push(`nutrition_known=${snap.nutrition_known?1:0}`);if(cols.has('nutrition_source'))setSql.push("nutrition_source='recipe_snapshot'");if(cols.has('updated_at')){setSql.push('updated_at=?');setParams.push(now)}db.run(`UPDATE ${table} SET ${setSql.join(',')} WHERE ${where}`,[...setParams,...whereParams]);}}
       db.run(`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO ai_exchange_sessions(request_id,operation,target_type,target_id,status,request_json,response_json,approved_payload_json,confidence,identity_match,evidence_notes_json,created_at,reviewed_at,applied_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[preview.request_id,preview.operation,'food',food.food_id,'approved',JSON.stringify(request),JSON.stringify(preview),JSON.stringify(proposed),Number(preview.analysis?.confidence)||0,preview.analysis?.identity_match===false?0:1,JSON.stringify(preview.analysis?.evidence_notes||[]),now,now,now]);
       for(const c of changes)db.run('INSERT INTO ai_exchange_changes(request_id,field_key,old_value,new_value,applied,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)',[preview.request_id,c.key,auditValue(c.current),auditValue(c.proposed),1,now]);
      });
      setMessage(`Food updated. ${todayUpdated} consumed meal(s) today and ${plannedUpdated} planned meal(s) recalculated. Historical meals were preserved.`);setTimeout(()=>onApplied?.(),900);
     }catch(error){setMessage(`Import failed: ${error.message}`)}finally{setBusy(false)}}
     const changes=preview?changedFoodFields(food,preview):[];
     if(preview)return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-review"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={()=>setPreview(null)} aria-label="Reject update"><X/></button><div><small>REVIEW FOOD UPDATE</small><h3>{food.name}</h3><em>{changes.length} proposed change{changes.length===1?'':'s'} · all or nothing</em></div><button type="button" className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={apply} disabled={busy} aria-label="Approve update">{busy?'…':<Check/>}</button></div>{message&&<div role="status" aria-live="assertive" className={`status enrichment-sticky-status ${message.startsWith('Import failed')?'error':''}`}>{message}</div>}<div className="editor-scroll"><section className="enrichment-confidence"><b>{Math.round(Number(preview.analysis?.confidence)||0)}% confidence</b><span>{preview.analysis?.identity_match===false?'Product mismatch — import blocked':'Existing food · no new record will be created'}</span></section>{changes.length?<div className="change-list">{changes.map(c=><article key={c.key}><b>{c.label}</b><div><span>{c.current??'Unknown'}</span><ChevronRight/><strong>{c.proposed}</strong></div></article>)}</div>:<div className="empty">No supported changes were returned.</div>}{preview.analysis?.evidence_notes?.length>0&&<section className="decision-block"><h3>Evidence</h3><p>{evidenceText(preview.analysis.evidence_notes)}</p></section>}<section className="decision-block"><h3>After approval</h3><p>Today’s linked consumed and planned meals will be recalculated. Historical meals remain unchanged.</p></section></div></div></div>;
     return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-workspace"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose} aria-label="Close food enrichment"><X/></button><div><small>AI EXCHANGE</small><h3>{food.name}</h3><em>Existing record · import cannot create a new food</em></div><button className="header-icon-action save-action" onClick={review} disabled={!response} aria-label="Review response"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><section className="enrichment-step"><small>STEP 1</small><h3>Copy the request</h3><p>Paste it into ChatGPT and attach all useful product photos.</p><button className="primary" onClick={copyRequest}><ClipboardCopy/> Copy Request</button></section><section className="enrichment-step"><small>STEP 2</small><h3>Return with the response</h3><p>Copy ChatGPT’s completed JSON, return to Fizz Health, and paste the response from the clipboard.</p><button className="secondary clipboard-response-button" onClick={pasteResponse}><ClipboardCopy/> Paste Response</button></section>{message&&<div className={`status ${message.startsWith('Validation failed')?'error':''}`}>{message}</div>}</div></div></div>;
    }
    
    function NutritionEditor({food,onClose,onSaved}){
     const fields=NUTRIENTS;
     const makeForm=source=>Object.fromEntries([...fields.map(n=>[n.key,source[n.key]??'']),['default_serving',source.default_serving??1],['unit',source.unit||'serving'],['nutrition_source',source.nutrition_source||'manual'],['nutrition_confidence',source.nutrition_confidence??100]]);
     const [currentFood,setCurrentFood]=useState(food),[form,setForm]=useState(makeForm(food)),[error,setError]=useState(''),[saving,setSaving]=useState(false),[status,setStatus]=useState(''),[enrichmentOpen,setEnrichmentOpen]=useState(false);
     const dirty=JSON.stringify(form)!==JSON.stringify(makeForm(currentFood));
     function closeEditor(){if(saving)return;if(dirty&&!window.confirm('Discard unsaved nutrition changes?'))return;onClose()}
     const set=(k,v)=>setForm(f=>({...f,[k]:v}));
     const markZero=k=>set(k,'0'); const markUnknown=k=>set(k,'');
     async function save(){
      const serving=Number(form.default_serving);if(!serving||serving<=0){setError('Enter a valid serving size.');return}
      const values=Object.fromEntries(fields.map(n=>[n.key,form[n.key]===''?null:Number(form[n.key])]));
      if(Object.values(values).some(v=>v!==null&&(!Number.isFinite(v)||v<0))){setError('Nutrition values must be zero or greater.');return}
      const completeness=Object.fromEntries(fields.map(n=>[n.key,values[n.key]===null?'unknown':'known'])),known=nutritionCompletion({...currentFood,...values,default_serving:serving,unit:form.unit}).complete?1:0,now=new Date().toISOString(),todayKey=today();
      setSaving(true);setError('');setStatus('');
      try{
       let plannedUpdated=0,todayUpdated=0;
       await transaction(async db=>{
        const foodCols=new Set(db.query('PRAGMA table_info(foods)').map(x=>x.name));
        const foodFields=fields.filter(n=>foodCols.has(n.key));
        const assignments=[...foodFields.map(n=>`${n.key}=?`),'default_serving=?','unit=?','nutrition_known=?','nutrition_source=?','nutrition_confidence=?','nutrition_completeness_json=?'];
        const params=[...foodFields.map(n=>values[n.key]),serving,form.unit,known,form.nutrition_source||'manual',Number(form.nutrition_confidence)||0,JSON.stringify(completeness)];
        if(foodCols.has('updated_at')){assignments.push('updated_at=?');params.push(now)}
        params.push(food.food_id);
        db.run(`UPDATE foods SET ${assignments.join(',')} WHERE food_id=?`,params);
        for(const table of ['meals','planned_meals']){
         const cols=new Set(db.query(`PRAGMA table_info(${table})`).map(x=>x.name)),nutrientFields=fields.filter(n=>cols.has(n.key));if(!nutrientFields.length)continue;
         const sql=nutrientFields.map(n=>`${n.key}=CASE WHEN ? IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ?*amount/? END`).join(',');
         const updateParams=[];for(const n of nutrientFields)updateParams.push(values[n.key],values[n.key],serving);
         const where=table==='meals'?"UPPER(food_id)=UPPER(?) AND (consumed_local_date=? OR (consumed_local_date IS NULL AND substr(eaten_at,1,10)=?))":"UPPER(food_id)=UPPER(?) AND status='planned'";
         const count=db.query(`SELECT COUNT(*) count FROM ${table} WHERE ${where}`,table==='meals'?[currentFood.food_id,todayKey,todayKey]:[currentFood.food_id])[0]?.count||0;
         const extras=[];if(cols.has('nutrition_known'))extras.push('nutrition_known=?');if(cols.has('nutrition_source'))extras.push('nutrition_source=?');if(cols.has('nutrition_confidence'))extras.push('nutrition_confidence=?');if(cols.has('nutrition_completeness_json'))extras.push('nutrition_completeness_json=?');if(cols.has('updated_at'))extras.push('updated_at=?');
         const extraParams=[];if(cols.has('nutrition_known'))extraParams.push(known);if(cols.has('nutrition_source'))extraParams.push(form.nutrition_source||'manual');if(cols.has('nutrition_confidence'))extraParams.push(Number(form.nutrition_confidence)||0);if(cols.has('nutrition_completeness_json'))extraParams.push(JSON.stringify(completeness));if(cols.has('updated_at'))extraParams.push(now);
         db.run(`UPDATE ${table} SET ${[sql,...extras].join(',')} WHERE ${where}`,[...updateParams,...extraParams,...(table==='meals'?[food.food_id,todayKey,todayKey]:[food.food_id])]);
         if(table==='meals')todayUpdated=Number(count);else plannedUpdated=Number(count);
        }
       });
       setCurrentFood(previous=>({...previous,...values,default_serving:serving,unit:form.unit,nutrition_source:form.nutrition_source||'manual',nutrition_confidence:Number(form.nutrition_confidence)||0,nutrition_known:known,nutrition_completeness_json:JSON.stringify(completeness)}));setStatus(`Nutrition updated. ${plannedUpdated} planned and ${todayUpdated} consumed today recalculated.`);setSaving(false);
       setTimeout(()=>onSaved?.({plannedUpdated,todayUpdated}),700);
      }catch(e){setError(e.message||String(e));setSaving(false)}
     }
     const knownCount=fields.filter(n=>form[n.key]!==''&&form[n.key]!=null).length;
     const completion=nutritionCompletion({...currentFood,...Object.fromEntries(fields.map(n=>[n.key,form[n.key]===''?null:Number(form[n.key])])),default_serving:Number(form.default_serving),unit:form.unit});
     return <div className="modal-backdrop nutrition-modal"><div className="panel nutrition-editor fixed-editor"><div className="edit-head sticky-head nutrition-editor-head"><button className="header-icon-action cancel-action" aria-label="Cancel nutrition changes" onClick={closeEditor} disabled={saving}><X/></button><div><small>FULL NUTRITION RECORD</small><h3>{currentFood.name}</h3><div className="nutrition-basis-summary"><b>{form.default_serving || '?'} {form.unit || 'serving'}</b><span>Nutrition values shown per serving basis</span><em>{knownCount} of {fields.length} nutrients complete</em></div></div><div className="nutrition-head-actions"><button className="header-icon-action" aria-label="Enrich this food" onClick={()=>setEnrichmentOpen(true)} disabled={saving}><Pencil/></button><button className="header-icon-action save-action" aria-label="Save nutrition" onClick={save} disabled={saving||!dirty}>{saving?'…':<Check/>}</button></div></div><div className="nutrition-scroll"><section className={completion.complete?"nutrition-completion complete":"nutrition-completion incomplete"}><div><small>NUTRITION STATUS</small><h3>{completion.complete?"Nutrition data complete":`${completion.missing.length} required field${completion.missing.length===1?"":"s"} missing`}</h3><p>{completion.complete?"This food satisfies the Pantry nutrition requirement.":"Complete the fields below or use the enrichment Pencil."}</p></div>{!completion.complete&&<ul>{completion.missing.map(field=><li key={field.key}>{field.label}</li>)}</ul>}</section><section className="nutrition-editor-meta"><label>Serving size<input type="number" min="0.1" step="0.1" value={form.default_serving} onChange={e=>set('default_serving',e.target.value)}/></label><label>Serving unit<input value={form.unit} onChange={e=>set('unit',e.target.value)}/></label><label>Nutrition source<input value={form.nutrition_source} onChange={e=>set('nutrition_source',e.target.value)} placeholder="label, USDA, restaurant, estimate…"/></label><label>Confidence (%)<input type="number" min="0" max="100" value={form.nutrition_confidence} onChange={e=>set('nutrition_confidence',e.target.value)}/></label></section><div className="nutrition-form-grid">{fields.map(n=><label key={n.key}>{n.label} ({n.unit})<div className="review-field"><input type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="any" value={form[n.key]} placeholder="Unknown" onChange={e=>set(n.key,e.target.value)}/><button type="button" className={String(form[n.key])==='0'?'na active':'na'} onClick={()=>markZero(n.key)} aria-label={`Mark ${n.label} as verified zero`}>0</button><button type="button" className={form[n.key]===''?'na active':'na'} onClick={()=>markUnknown(n.key)} aria-label={`Mark ${n.label} as unknown`}>?</button></div><small className="nutrient-source-line">{form[n.key]===''?'Missing':form.nutrition_source||'Manual'} · {form[n.key]===''?'Unknown':'Entered value'}</small></label>)}</div>{error&&<div className="inline-error">{error}</div>}{status&&<div className="status">{status}</div>}<small className="editor-note">Blank means Unknown. Use 0 only for a verified zero. Saving refreshes matching planned meals and today’s consumed meals; prior days remain historical snapshots.</small></div></div>{enrichmentOpen&&<FoodEnrichmentWorkspace food={{...currentFood,...Object.fromEntries(fields.map(n=>[n.key,form[n.key]===''?null:Number(form[n.key])])),default_serving:Number(form.default_serving)||currentFood.default_serving,unit:form.unit,nutrition_source:form.nutrition_source,nutrition_confidence:Number(form.nutrition_confidence)||0}} onClose={()=>setEnrichmentOpen(false)} onApplied={()=>{const fresh=optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM foods WHERE food_id=? LIMIT 1',[currentFood.food_id])[0];if(fresh){setCurrentFood(fresh);setForm(makeForm(fresh));setStatus('Enrichment applied. Review the updated nutrition record below.')}setEnrichmentOpen(false);onSaved?.()}}/>}</div>
    }
    
    const EXCHANGE_VERSION=1;
    function exchangeInstructions(requestType){return {
     recipient:'AI assistant with access to attached product, nutrition-label, menu, barcode, or meal photos',
     purpose:requestType,
     rules:[
      'Return ONLY one valid JSON object. Do not add markdown, commentary, or code fences.',
      'Preserve format, schema_version, request_type, request_id, and existing non-null verified values.',
      'Populate only fields supported by visible evidence. Never invent a value.',
      'Use null when information is not visible or cannot be determined reliably. Use numeric 0 only when the source explicitly shows zero.',
      'Keep all field names exactly as supplied. Field order does not matter.',
      'Use grams for macronutrients, milligrams for sodium/cholesterol, and calories as kcal.',
      'Include confidence from 0 to 1 and short evidence notes for populated records.'
     ]
    }}
    function productExchange(food={}){return {format:'fizz-health-exchange',schema_version:EXCHANGE_VERSION,request_type:'product_enrichment',request_id:`product-${food.food_id||'new'}-${Date.now()}`,instructions:exchangeInstructions('Enrich this food/product record from the attached package, UPC, ingredients, and Nutrition Facts photos.'),record:{food_id:food.food_id||null,product:{name:food.name||null,brand:food.brand||null,category:food.category||null,upc:null},serving:{amount:food.default_serving??null,unit:food.unit||null,description:null,servings_per_container:null},nutrition:{calories:food.calories??null,protein_g:food.protein??null,carbohydrate_g:food.carbs??null,fiber_g:food.fiber??null,total_fat_g:food.fat??null,saturated_fat_g:food.saturated_fat??null,sodium_mg:food.sodium??null,potassium_mg:food.potassium??null,total_sugars_g:null,added_sugars_g:null,cholesterol_mg:food.cholesterol??null,trans_fat_g:food.trans_fat??null,monounsaturated_fat_g:food.monounsaturated_fat??null,polyunsaturated_fat_g:food.polyunsaturated_fat??null,omega_3_g:food.omega_3??null,calcium_mg:food.calcium??null,iron_mg:food.iron??null,magnesium_mg:food.magnesium??null,vitamin_d_mcg:food.vitamin_d??null,vitamin_c_mg:food.vitamin_c??null,alcohol_g:food.alcohol??null,caffeine_mg:food.caffeine??null},ingredients:null,allergens:[],notes:food.notes||null},response_requirements:{return_full_record:true,unknown_value:null,do_not_overwrite_non_null_verified_values:true}}}
    function restaurantMenuExchange(restaurant={}){return {format:'fizz-health-exchange',schema_version:EXCHANGE_VERSION,request_type:'restaurant_menu_enrichment',request_id:`restaurant-${restaurant.restaurant_id||'new'}-${Date.now()}`,instructions:exchangeInstructions('Read the attached restaurant menu photos. Extract menu items, classify them, identify likely preparation and ingredients, and estimate nutrition only when evidence supports a reasonable estimate.'),restaurant:{restaurant_id:restaurant.restaurant_id||null,name:restaurant.name||null,location:restaurant.location||null,best_choices:restaurant.best_choices||null,occasional_treats:restaurant.occasional_treats||null,avoid_limit:restaurant.avoid_limit||null},menu_items:[],menu_item_schema:{meal_name:null,category:null,serving_description:null,nutrition:{calories:null,protein_g:null,carbohydrate_g:null,fiber_g:null,total_fat_g:null,saturated_fat_g:null,trans_fat_g:null,cholesterol_mg:null,sodium_mg:null,potassium_mg:null,total_sugars_g:null,added_sugars_g:null,monounsaturated_fat_g:null,polyunsaturated_fat_g:null,omega_3_g:null,calcium_mg:null,iron_mg:null,magnesium_mg:null,vitamin_d_mcg:null,vitamin_c_mg:null,alcohol_g:null,caffeine_mg:null},ingredients:[],preparation:null,recommendation_tier:null,price:{amount:null,currency:'USD',observed_date:null,meal_period:null},confidence:null,evidence_notes:null}}}
    function restaurantMealExchange(restaurant={}){return {format:'fizz-health-exchange',schema_version:EXCHANGE_VERSION,request_type:'restaurant_meal_analysis',request_id:`meal-${restaurant.restaurant_id||'unknown'}-${Date.now()}`,instructions:exchangeInstructions('Analyze the attached menu entry and/or meal photo. Estimate the actual portion and nutrition. Return a single meal record suitable for review before saving.'),restaurant:{restaurant_id:restaurant.restaurant_id||null,name:restaurant.name||null,location:restaurant.location||null},destination:'planned',meal:{meal_name:null,category:null,serving_description:null,nutrition:{calories:null,protein_g:null,carbohydrate_g:null,fiber_g:null,total_fat_g:null,saturated_fat_g:null,trans_fat_g:null,cholesterol_mg:null,sodium_mg:null,potassium_mg:null,total_sugars_g:null,added_sugars_g:null,monounsaturated_fat_g:null,polyunsaturated_fat_g:null,omega_3_g:null,calcium_mg:null,iron_mg:null,magnesium_mg:null,vitamin_d_mcg:null,vitamin_c_mg:null,alcohol_g:null,caffeine_mg:null},price:{amount:null,currency:'USD',observed_date:null,meal_period:null},confidence:null,assumptions:[],evidence_notes:null}}}
    function validateExchange(payload){
     if(!payload||payload.format!=='fizz-health-exchange')throw new Error('Not a Fizz Health exchange record.');
     if(Number(payload.schema_version)!==EXCHANGE_VERSION)throw new Error(`Unsupported exchange schema version ${payload.schema_version}.`);
     if(!['product_enrichment','restaurant_menu_enrichment','restaurant_meal_analysis'].includes(payload.request_type))throw new Error('Unsupported request_type.');
     return payload;
    }
    function normalizeExchangeJson(raw){
     let text=String(raw||'').trim();
     text=text.replace(/[“”„‟]/g,'"').replace(/[‘’]/g,"'").replace(/[​-‍﻿]/g,'').replace(/ /g,' ');
     text=text.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i,'').replace(/\s*```$/,'').trim();
     const first=text.indexOf('{'),last=text.lastIndexOf('}');
     if(first>=0&&last>first)text=text.slice(first,last+1);
     return text;
    }
    function jsonErrorMessage(error,text){
     const msg=String(error?.message||error);const m=msg.match(/position\s+(\d+)/i);if(!m)return msg;
     const pos=Number(m[1]),before=text.slice(0,pos),line=before.split('\n').length,column=pos-(before.lastIndexOf('\n')+1)+1;
     return `${msg} (line ${line}, column ${column})`;
    }
    function AIExchange({onApplied}){
     const foods=query('SELECT * FROM foods ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE');
     const restaurants=query('SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=0 ORDER BY name COLLATE NOCASE');
     const [type,setType]=useState('product_enrichment'),[foodId,setFoodId]=useState(foods[0]?.food_id||''),[restaurantId,setRestaurantId]=useState(restaurants[0]?.restaurant_id||''),[request,setRequest]=useState(''),[response,setResponse]=useState(''),[preview,setPreview]=useState(null),[message,setMessage]=useState(''),[normalized,setNormalized]=useState(false);
     const food=foods.find(x=>x.food_id===foodId)||{};const restaurant=restaurants.find(x=>x.restaurant_id===restaurantId)||{};
     function generate(){const payload=type==='product_enrichment'?productExchange(food):type==='restaurant_menu_enrichment'?restaurantMenuExchange(restaurant):restaurantMealExchange(restaurant);setRequest(JSON.stringify(payload,null,2));setResponse('');setPreview(null);setNormalized(false);setMessage('Request JSON created. Copy it into ChatGPT and attach photos.')}
     async function copy(){const text=request||JSON.stringify(type==='product_enrichment'?productExchange(food):type==='restaurant_menu_enrichment'?restaurantMenuExchange(restaurant):restaurantMealExchange(restaurant),null,2);if(!request)setRequest(text);await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);setMessage('Request JSON copied.')}
     async function paste(){try{const text=await navigator.clipboard.readText();setResponse(text);setPreview(null);setMessage('Clipboard pasted. Tap Validate & review.')}catch(e){setMessage('Clipboard access was blocked. Tap inside the field and use iOS Paste.') }}
     function clear(){if((preview||response.trim())&&!window.confirm('Clear this AI response and its review state?'))return;setResponse('');setPreview(null);setNormalized(false);setMessage('AI response cleared.')}
     function review(){const cleaned=normalizeExchangeJson(response);try{const parsed=validateExchange(JSON.parse(cleaned));setResponse(cleaned);setPreview(parsed);setNormalized(cleaned!==response);setMessage(cleaned!==response?'Smart quotes or clipboard formatting were corrected. JSON validated.':'JSON validated. Review the summary, then apply.')}catch(e){setMessage(`Validation failed: ${jsonErrorMessage(e,cleaned)}`);setPreview(null)}}
     async function apply(){if(!preview)return;const now=new Date().toISOString();
      await transaction(async db=>{
       if(preview.request_type==='product_enrichment'){
        const r=preview.record||{},n=r.nutrition||{},sv=r.serving||{},prod=r.product||{};const id=r.food_id||foodId||`FOOD-AI-${Date.now()}`;
        const known=[n.calories,n.protein_g,n.carbohydrate_g,n.fiber_g,n.total_fat_g].some(v=>v!=null);
        db.run(`INSERT INTO foods(food_id,name,category,default_serving,unit,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,sodium,potassium,notes,nutrition_known) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?) ON CONFLICT(food_id) DO UPDATE SET name=COALESCE(excluded.name,foods.name),category=COALESCE(excluded.category,foods.category),default_serving=COALESCE(excluded.default_serving,foods.default_serving),unit=COALESCE(excluded.unit,foods.unit),calories=COALESCE(excluded.calories,foods.calories),protein=COALESCE(excluded.protein,foods.protein),carbs=COALESCE(excluded.carbs,foods.carbs),fiber=COALESCE(excluded.fiber,foods.fiber),fat=COALESCE(excluded.fat,foods.fat),saturated_fat=COALESCE(excluded.saturated_fat,foods.saturated_fat),sodium=COALESCE(excluded.sodium,foods.sodium),potassium=COALESCE(excluded.potassium,foods.potassium),notes=COALESCE(excluded.notes,foods.notes),nutrition_known=MAX(foods.nutrition_known,excluded.nutrition_known)`,[id,prod.name||null,prod.category||null,sv.amount??null,sv.unit||null,n.calories??null,n.protein_g??null,n.carbohydrate_g??null,n.fiber_g??null,n.total_fat_g??null,n.saturated_fat_g??null,n.sodium_mg??null,n.potassium_mg??null,`${r.notes||''} | AI exchange ${now}`,known?1:0]);
        if(known)db.run(`UPDATE meals SET calories=COALESCE((SELECT calories*meals.amount/NULLIF(default_serving,0) FROM foods WHERE food_id=?),calories),protein=COALESCE((SELECT protein*meals.amount/NULLIF(default_serving,0) FROM foods WHERE food_id=?),protein),carbs=COALESCE((SELECT carbs*meals.amount/NULLIF(default_serving,0) FROM foods WHERE food_id=?),carbs),fiber=COALESCE((SELECT fiber*meals.amount/NULLIF(default_serving,0) FROM foods WHERE food_id=?),fiber),fat=COALESCE((SELECT fat*meals.amount/NULLIF(default_serving,0) FROM foods WHERE food_id=?),fat),saturated_fat=COALESCE((SELECT saturated_fat*meals.amount/NULLIF(default_serving,0) FROM foods WHERE food_id=?),saturated_fat),nutrition_known=1,updated_at=? WHERE UPPER(food_id)=UPPER(?)`,[id,id,id,id,id,id,now,id]);
       } else {
        const items=preview.request_type==='restaurant_menu_enrichment'?(preview.menu_items||[]):[preview.meal||{}];const rest=preview.restaurant||restaurant;let menuVersion=Number(restaurant.current_menu_version||0);
        if(preview.request_type==='restaurant_menu_enrichment'){
          menuVersion+=1;db.run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET active=0,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=? AND COALESCE(active,1)=1',[now,rest.restaurant_id||restaurantId]);db.run('UPDATE restaurants SET current_menu_version=?,archived=0,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?',[menuVersion,now,rest.restaurant_id||restaurantId]);
        } else if(!menuVersion)menuVersion=1;
        for(const item of items){if(!item.meal_name)continue;const n=item.nutrition||{},price=typeof item.price==='number'?{amount:item.price}:item.price||{};
          db.run(`INSERT INTO restaurant_meals(restaurant_id,restaurant_name,meal_name,category,serving_description,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,sodium,notes,nutrition_known,source,confidence,created_at,updated_at,menu_version,active,price,currency,price_observed_date,meal_period,ingredients_json,preparation,recommendation_tier) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[rest.restaurant_id||restaurantId,rest.name||restaurant.name,item.meal_name,item.category||null,item.serving_description||null,n.calories??null,n.protein_g??null,n.carbohydrate_g??null,n.fiber_g??null,n.total_fat_g??null,n.saturated_fat_g??null,n.sodium_mg??null,item.evidence_notes||item.assumptions?.join('; ')||null,n.calories!=null?1:0,'ai_exchange',item.confidence??null,now,now,menuVersion,1,price.amount??null,price.currency||'USD',price.observed_date||null,price.meal_period||null,JSON.stringify(item.ingredients||[]),item.preparation||null,item.recommendation_tier||null]);
          const inserted=db.query('SELECT last_insert_rowid() id')[0]?.id;
          if(preview.request_type==='restaurant_meal_analysis'&&preview.destination==='planned')db.run(`INSERT INTO planned_meals(planned_at,planned_local_date,meal_type,food_name,amount,unit,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,notes,status,created_at,updated_at,source_type,restaurant_name,restaurant_meal_id,menu_price) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[now,today(),'Dinner',item.meal_name,1,'serving',n.calories||0,n.protein_g||0,n.carbohydrate_g||0,n.fiber_g||0,n.total_fat_g||0,n.saturated_fat_g||0,item.evidence_notes||'AI meal estimate','planned',now,now,'restaurant',rest.name||restaurant.name,inserted||null,price.amount??null]);
        }
       }
       db.run('INSERT INTO ai_exchange_history(exchange_type,record_key,direction,status,payload,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)',[preview.request_type,preview.request_id||'', 'import','approved',JSON.stringify(preview),now]);
      });setMessage('AI exchange applied successfully.');setPreview(null);setResponse('');setNormalized(false);onApplied()}
     return <section className="ai-exchange"><div className="audit-head"><div><span>AI Exchange</span><b>Copy JSON → ChatGPT + photos → paste JSON</b></div><strong>FH-X v1</strong></div><label>Request type<select value={type} onChange={e=>{setType(e.target.value);setRequest('');setPreview(null)}}><option value="product_enrichment">Product enrichment</option><option value="restaurant_menu_enrichment">Restaurant menu replacement</option><option value="restaurant_meal_analysis">Restaurant meal photo</option></select></label>{type==='product_enrichment'?<label>Food<select value={foodId} onChange={e=>setFoodId(e.target.value)}>{foods.map(f=><option key={f.food_id} value={f.food_id}>{f.name}</option>)}</select></label>:<label>Restaurant<select value={restaurantId} onChange={e=>setRestaurantId(e.target.value)}>{restaurants.map(r=><option key={r.restaurant_id} value={r.restaurant_id}>{r.name}</option>)}</select></label>}<div className="exchange-actions"><button onClick={generate}><FileJson/> Create JSON</button><button onClick={copy}><ClipboardCopy/> Copy JSON</button></div>{request&&<textarea className="json-box" value={request} readOnly/>}<label>Paste enriched JSON<textarea className="json-box response" value={response} onChange={e=>{setResponse(e.target.value);setPreview(null)}} placeholder="Paste JSON returned by ChatGPT here…"/></label><div className="exchange-actions"><button onClick={paste}>Paste from Clipboard</button><button className="secondary" onClick={clear} disabled={!response&&!preview}>Clear</button><button onClick={review} disabled={!response}>Validate & review</button>{preview&&<button className="primary" onClick={apply}><Check/> Apply</button>}</div>{preview&&<div className="exchange-preview"><b>Validated {preview.request_type.replaceAll('_',' ')}</b><span>{preview.request_type==='product_enrichment'?(preview.record?.product?.name||'New product'):`${preview.restaurant?.name||restaurant.name} · ${(preview.menu_items||[preview.meal]).filter(Boolean).length} item(s)`}</span>{preview.request_type==='restaurant_menu_enrichment'&&<em>This will replace the restaurant’s current active menu.</em>}</div>}{normalized&&<div className="exchange-message ok">Clipboard punctuation normalized automatically.</div>}{message&&<div className="exchange-message">{message}</div>}</section>
    }
    function restaurantScore(meal){return restaurantDecision(meal).score}
    function RestaurantExchangeWorkspace({restaurant,meal,operation,onClose,onApplied}){
     const [response,setResponse]=useState(''),[status,setStatus]=useState(''),[busy,setBusy]=useState(false),[preview,setPreview]=useState(null),[applied,setApplied]=useState(null);
     const targetId=meal?.id||restaurant?.restaurant_id||null;
     const request=useMemo(()=>JSON.stringify({format:'fizz-health-exchange',schema_version:3,request_type:'universal_exchange',request_id:`restaurant-${operation}-${Date.now()}`,operation,target:{type:meal?'restaurant_menu_item':'restaurant',id:targetId,create_if_missing:operation==='create_restaurant'},instructions:{purpose:operation==='replace_menu'?'Replace or enrich this restaurant menu from attached evidence.':operation==='append_menu_items'?'Add or update menu items without removing existing items.':operation==='enrich_menu_item'?'Enrich this specific restaurant menu item from attached evidence.':'Create and enrich this restaurant profile and menu from attached evidence.',rules:['Return exactly one raw JSON object and nothing else.','Use only the ASCII double quotation mark U+0022 (") for every JSON key and string delimiter. Never use curly or typographic quotation marks.','Do not add markdown, commentary, labels, or code fences.','Preserve format, schema_version, request_type, request_id, operation, and target exactly.','For restaurant menus, return proposed_record.menu.sections, with each section containing an items array.','Return arrays as JSON arrays and objects as JSON objects. Do not encode arrays or objects as strings, including fields whose names end in _json.','Use null for unknown values. Do not substitute zero for unknown nutrition.','Do not embed or return photos, PDFs, or binary data.','Include confidence and concise evidence notes.','Before returning, verify that the response can be parsed by JSON.parse without repair.']},existing_record:{restaurant,menu_item:meal||null},proposed_record:operation==='enrich_menu_item'?{menu:{sections:[{name:meal?.category||'Menu',items:[{...meal,ingredients_json:(()=>{try{return JSON.parse(meal?.ingredients_json||'null')}catch{return meal?.ingredients_json||null}})()}]}]}}:{restaurant:{name:restaurant?.name||null,cuisine:restaurant?.cuisine||null,website:restaurant?.website||null,phone:restaurant?.phone||null,address:restaurant?.address||null,price_level:restaurant?.price_level||null,notes:restaurant?.notes||null},menu:{sections:[{name:null,items:[]}]}},analysis:{},review:{requires_user_approval:true}},null,2),[restaurant,meal,operation,targetId]);
     function inspect(text){
      const parsed=parseExchangeJson(text);validateRestaurantExchange(parsed.payload,{operation,targetId});
      const items=restaurantMenuItems(parsed.payload),proposed=parsed.payload.proposed_record||parsed.payload.proposed||{};
      const sections=[...new Set(items.map(x=>x.category).filter(Boolean))];
      setResponse(parsed.normalized);setPreview({payload:parsed.payload,items,sections,restaurant:proposed.restaurant||null,repaired:parsed.repaired});
      setStatus(parsed.repaired?`JSON syntax repaired automatically${parsed.repairs?.length?`: ${parsed.repairs.join(', ')}`:''}. Schema verified. Review the import below.`:'JSON parsed and exchange schema verified. Review the import below.');
     }
     async function copy(){try{await navigator.clipboard.writeText(request);setStatus('Request copied. Add the menu photos in ChatGPT, then paste the completed JSON response here.')}catch{setStatus('Clipboard access was blocked. Press and hold the request text below to copy it manually.')}}
     async function paste(){try{const text=await navigator.clipboard.readText();inspect(text)}catch(error){setPreview(null);setStatus(error.message||'Clipboard does not contain valid JSON.')}}
     function review(){try{inspect(response)}catch(error){setPreview(null);setStatus(error.message)}}
     async function apply(){
      if(!preview){review();return}
      setBusy(true);setStatus('Importing menu…');
      try{
       const payload=preview.payload,proposed=payload.proposed_record||payload.proposed||payload,now=new Date().toISOString();
       if(operation==='replace_menu'||operation==='append_menu_items'){
        const items=restaurantMenuItems(payload);if(!items.length)throw new Error('No menu items were returned.');
        const profile=proposed.restaurant||{};
        await transaction(async db=>{
         if(operation==='replace_menu')db.run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET active=0,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?',[now,restaurant.restaurant_id]);
         if(Object.keys(profile).length)db.run(`UPDATE restaurants SET name=COALESCE(?,name),cuisine=COALESCE(?,cuisine),website=COALESCE(?,website),phone=COALESCE(?,phone),address=COALESCE(?,address),price_level=COALESCE(?,price_level),notes=COALESCE(?,notes),updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?`,[profile.name??null,profile.cuisine??null,profile.website??null,profile.phone??null,profile.address??null,profile.price_level??null,profile.notes??null,now,restaurant.restaurant_id]);
         for(const item of items){
          const values=[profile.name||restaurant.name,item.meal_name,item.category||null,item.serving_description||null,item.calories??null,item.protein??null,item.carbs??null,item.fiber??null,item.fat??null,item.saturated_fat??null,item.sodium??null,item.notes||item.evidence_notes||null,item.calories!=null?1:0,'ai_exchange',Number(item.confidence)>1?Number(item.confidence)/100:Number(item.confidence)||null,now,1,JSON.stringify(item.ingredients||item.ingredients_json||[]),item.preparation||null,item.confidence_basis||item.evidence_level||item.evidence_type||'menu_description',item.price??null,item.currency||'USD'];
          const exact=item.id?db.query('SELECT id FROM restaurant_meals WHERE id=? AND restaurant_id=?',[item.id,restaurant.restaurant_id])[0]:null;
          const identity=exact||db.query(`SELECT id FROM restaurant_meals WHERE restaurant_id=? AND lower(trim(meal_name))=lower(trim(?)) AND lower(trim(COALESCE(category,'')))=lower(trim(COALESCE(?,''))) ORDER BY active DESC,id DESC LIMIT 1`,[restaurant.restaurant_id,item.meal_name,item.category||null])[0];
          if(operation==='append_menu_items'&&identity)db.run(`UPDATE restaurant_meals SET restaurant_name=?,meal_name=?,category=?,serving_description=?,calories=?,protein=?,carbs=?,fiber=?,fat=?,saturated_fat=?,sodium=?,notes=?,nutrition_known=?,source=?,confidence=?,updated_at=?,active=?,ingredients_json=?,preparation=?,confidence_basis=?,price=?,currency=? WHERE id=?`,[...values,identity.id]);
          else db.run(`INSERT INTO restaurant_meals(restaurant_id,restaurant_name,meal_name,category,serving_description,calories,protein,carbs,fiber,fat,saturated_fat,sodium,notes,nutrition_known,source,confidence,created_at,updated_at,active,ingredients_json,preparation,confidence_basis,price,currency) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)`,[restaurant.restaurant_id,...values.slice(0,16),now,...values.slice(16)]);
         }
         db.run('INSERT INTO ai_exchange_history(exchange_type,record_key,direction,status,payload,created_at) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)',['restaurant_menu_enrichment',payload.request_id||'', 'import','approved',JSON.stringify(payload),now]);
        });
        setApplied({count:items.length,sections:preview.sections.length});
       }else if(operation==='enrich_menu_item'){
        const raw=(proposed.menu_item||restaurantMenuItems(payload)[0]||proposed),item=serializeJsonBackedFields(raw),nutrition=item.nutrition||{};
        const mapped={...item,meal_name:item.meal_name||item.name||meal.meal_name,category:item.category??meal.category,serving_description:item.serving_description??item.serving??item.description??meal.serving_description,calories:item.calories??nutrition.calories??meal.calories,protein:item.protein??nutrition.protein_g??meal.protein,carbs:item.carbs??nutrition.carbohydrate_g??meal.carbs,fiber:item.fiber??nutrition.fiber_g??meal.fiber,fat:item.fat??nutrition.total_fat_g??meal.fat,saturated_fat:item.saturated_fat??nutrition.saturated_fat_g??meal.saturated_fat,sodium:item.sodium??nutrition.sodium_mg??meal.sodium,notes:item.notes??item.evidence_notes??meal.notes,nutrition_known:(item.calories??nutrition.calories??meal.calories)!=null?1:0,source:'ai_exchange',confidence:Number(item.confidence)>1?Number(item.confidence)/100:Number(item.confidence)||meal.confidence,ingredients_json:item.ingredients_json??(item.ingredients?JSON.stringify(item.ingredients):meal.ingredients_json),preparation:item.preparation??meal.preparation,confidence_basis:item.confidence_basis||item.evidence_level||item.evidence_type||meal.confidence_basis||'restaurant_estimate',price:typeof item.price==='object'?item.price?.amount:item.price??meal.price,updated_at:now};
        const cols=new Set(query('PRAGMA table_info(restaurant_meals)').map(x=>x.name)),entries=Object.entries(mapped).filter(([key,value])=>cols.has(key)&&key!=='id'&&value!==undefined),assignments=entries.map(([key])=>`${key}=?`),values=entries.map(([,value])=>value);
        await run(`UPDATE restaurant_meals SET ${assignments.join(',')} WHERE id=?`,[...values,meal.id]);
        setApplied({count:1,sections:1});
       }
       setStatus('Import completed successfully.');onApplied?.();
      }catch(error){setStatus(`Import failed: ${error.message}`)}finally{setBusy(false)}
     }
     if(applied)return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-workspace exchange-success"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><div><small>AI EXCHANGE</small><h3>Import complete</h3></div><span/></div><div className="exchange-success-body"><ShieldCheck/><h2>Menu imported</h2><p>{applied.count} menu item{applied.count===1?'':'s'} across {applied.sections} section{applied.sections===1?'':'s'} were saved for {restaurant.name}.</p><button className="primary" onClick={onClose}>Done</button></div></div></div>;
     return <div className="modal-backdrop enrichment-modal"><div className="panel fixed-editor enrichment-workspace"><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button className="header-icon-action" onClick={onClose}><X/></button><div><small>AI EXCHANGE</small><h3>{operation==='replace_menu'?'Replace menu':operation==='append_menu_items'?'Add/update menu items':operation==='enrich_menu_item'?'Improve menu item':'New restaurant'}</h3></div><button className="header-icon-action" disabled={!preview||busy} onClick={apply} aria-label="Apply validated import"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll exchange-workspace-scroll"><section className="exchange-step"><small>STEP 1</small><h3>Copy the request</h3><button className="primary" onClick={copy}><ClipboardCopy/> Copy request</button><details><summary>View request JSON</summary><textarea className="json-box" value={request} readOnly/></details></section><section className="exchange-step"><small>STEP 2</small><h3>Paste the response</h3><button className="secondary" onClick={paste}><ClipboardCopy/> Paste from clipboard</button><textarea className="json-box response" value={response} onChange={e=>{setResponse(e.target.value);setPreview(null);setStatus('')}} placeholder="Paste the JSON returned by ChatGPT here…"/><button onClick={review} disabled={!response}>Validate & review</button></section>{preview&&<section className="exchange-review"><div className="exchange-review-head"><ShieldCheck/><div><small>VALIDATED IMPORT</small><h3>{preview.restaurant?.name||restaurant.name}</h3></div></div><div className="exchange-review-stats"><div><b>{preview.items.length}</b><span>menu items</span></div><div><b>{preview.sections.length}</b><span>sections</span></div></div>{operation==='replace_menu'&&<p className="exchange-warning"><AlertTriangle/> This replaces the current active menu. Existing historical records remain preserved.</p>}{operation==='append_menu_items'&&<p className="exchange-append-note"><ShieldCheck/> Existing menu items remain active. Matching names and sections will be updated; new items will be added.</p>}<div className="exchange-section-list">{preview.sections.map(section=><div key={section}><b>{section}</b><span>{preview.items.filter(item=>item.category===section).length} items</span></div>)}</div><details><summary>Preview imported items</summary><ol>{preview.items.slice(0,20).map((item,index)=><li key={`${item.meal_name}-${index}`}><b>{item.meal_name}</b><span>{item.category||'Uncategorized'}{item.price!=null?` · $${Number(item.price).toFixed(2)}`:''}</span></li>)}</ol>{preview.items.length>20&&<p>Plus {preview.items.length-20} more items.</p>}</details><button className="primary exchange-apply" disabled={busy} onClick={apply}><Check/> {busy?'Importing…':`Import ${preview.items.length} item${preview.items.length===1?'':'s'}`}</button></section>}{status&&<p className={`capture-message ${preview?'ok':''}`}>{status}</p>}</div></div></div>
    }
    const RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES=['Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner','Any','Snack','Appetizer','Side','Dessert','Beverage','Condiment'];
    function restaurantMealRoles(meal){
     let roles=[];try{const parsed=JSON.parse(meal.eligible_categories_json||'[]');if(Array.isArray(parsed))roles=parsed}catch{}
     const primary=meal.primary_category||meal.meal_period||'';
     if(primary&&!roles.includes(primary))roles.unshift(primary);
     if(!roles.length){const category=String(meal.category||'').toLowerCase();if(category.includes('breakfast'))roles=['Breakfast'];else if(/coffee|drink|beverage|margarita|cocktail|juice|smoothie/.test(category+' '+String(meal.meal_name||'').toLowerCase()))roles=['Beverage'];else roles=['Any']}
     return [...new Set(roles.filter(role=>RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES.includes(role)))];
    }
    function restaurantMealEligibleFor(meal,slot){const roles=restaurantMealRoles(meal);return roles.includes(slot)||(roles.includes('Any')&&['Breakfast','Lunch','Dinner'].includes(slot))}
    function RestaurantMealClassificationEditor({meal,onClose,onSaved}){
     const current=restaurantMealRoles(meal),[primary,setPrimary]=useState(meal.primary_category||current[0]||'Any'),[eligible,setEligible]=useState(current),[favorite,setFavorite]=useState(Number(meal.favorite)===1),[active,setActive]=useState(Number(meal.active)!==0),[price,setPrice]=useState(meal.price??'');
     function toggle(role){setEligible(rows=>rows.includes(role)?rows.filter(x=>x!==role):[...rows,role])}
     async function save(){const roles=[...new Set([primary,...eligible])];await run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET primary_category=?,eligible_categories_json=?,meal_period=?,favorite=?,active=?,price=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?',[primary,JSON.stringify(roles),primary,favorite?1:0,active?1:0,price===''?null:Number(price),new Date().toISOString(),meal.id]);onSaved?.();onClose()}
     return <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={onClose}><div className="panel fixed-editor restaurant-classification-editor" onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}><div className="edit-head sticky-head"><button onClick={onClose} aria-label="Cancel"><X/></button><div><small>RESTAURANT MEAL</small><h3>Classify {meal.meal_name}</h3></div><button onClick={save} aria-label="Save classification"><Check/></button></div><div className="editor-scroll"><label>Primary category<select value={primary} onChange={e=>{setPrimary(e.target.value);setEligible(rows=>rows.includes(e.target.value)?rows:[...rows,e.target.value])}}>{RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES.map(role=><option key={role}>{role}</option>)}</select></label><fieldset className="restaurant-role-picker"><legend>Eligible categories</legend><p>Choose every place this item can appear in Restaurant Intelligence and Meal Planning.</p><div>{RESTAURANT_MEAL_CATEGORIES.map(role=><button type="button" key={role} className={eligible.includes(role)?'active':''} onClick={()=>toggle(role)}>{eligible.includes(role)?<Check/>:<Plus/>}{role}</button>)}</div></fieldset><label>Price<input type="number" inputMode="decimal" min="0" step="0.01" value={price} onChange={e=>setPrice(e.target.value)}/></label><label className="check-row"><input type="checkbox" checked={favorite} onChange={e=>setFavorite(e.target.checked)}/> Starred favorite</label><label className="check-row"><input type="checkbox" checked={active} onChange={e=>setActive(e.target.checked)}/> Active menu item</label></div></div></div>
    }
    function restaurantDishDescription(meal){
     const candidates=[meal.serving_description,meal.preparation,meal.notes];
     return candidates.map(value=>String(value||'').trim()).find(value=>value&&!/estimated from|confidence|nutrition/i.test(value))||'Dish description not yet available.';
    }
    function restaurantRankReason(meal,decision,rank){
     const positives=[...(decision.positive||[])],negatives=[...(decision.negative||[])];
     const factors=[...(decision.factors||[])].sort((a,b)=>Math.abs(Number(b.impact)||0)-Math.abs(Number(a.impact)||0));
     const best=factors.find(f=>Number(f.impact)>0),worst=factors.find(f=>Number(f.impact)<0);
     const protein=Number(meal.protein)||0,sat=Number(meal.saturated_fat)||0,chol=Number(meal.cholesterol)||0,cal=Number(meal.calories)||0;
     if(!positives.length&&protein>=25)positives.push('strong protein');
     if(!negatives.length&&sat>=8)negatives.push('high saturated fat');
     if(!negatives.length&&chol>=250)negatives.push('high cholesterol');
     if(!negatives.length&&cal>=700)negatives.push('high calories');
     const strength=positives[0]||best?.label;const tradeoff=negatives[0]||worst?.label;
     if(strength&&tradeoff)return `${strength.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+strength.slice(1)}, but ${tradeoff.charAt(0).toLowerCase()+tradeoff.slice(1)} keeps it from ranking higher.`;
     if(strength)return `${strength.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+strength.slice(1)} supports its #${rank} ranking today.`;
     if(tradeoff)return `${tradeoff.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+tradeoff.slice(1)} is the main reason it ranks #${rank}.`;
     return `Ranked #${rank} from today's calorie, protein, fiber, saturated-fat, and confidence factors.`;
    }
    function nutrientStatus(type,value){
     const v=Number(value)||0;
     if(type==='protein')return v>=30?['Excellent','good']:v>=20?['Good','good']:v>=10?['Fair','moderate']:['Low','warning'];
     if(type==='sat')return v<=3?['Low','good']:v<=7?['Moderate','moderate']:['High','danger'];
     return v<=100?['Low','good']:v<=250?['Moderate','moderate']:['High','danger'];
    }
    function RestaurantMetric({type,label,value,unit}){const [status,tone]=nutrientStatus(type,value);return <div className={`restaurant-metric ${tone}`}><span>{label}</span><strong>{Math.round(Number(value)||0)}{unit}</strong><em>{status}</em></div>}
    function RestaurantSwipeCard({meal,decision,rank,onOpen,onExplain,onFavorite,onEnrich,onRetire,onLog}){
     const [startX,setStartX]=useState(null),[dx,setDx]=useState(0);function end(){if(dx>70)onLog();else if(dx<-70)onRetire();setStartX(null);setDx(0)}
     const confidence=decision.confidence?.score??Math.round((meal.confidence||0)*100),description=restaurantDishDescription(meal),reason=restaurantRankReason(meal,decision,rank);
     const swipeOffset=Math.max(-90,Math.min(90,dx));
     const swipeStyle={transform:'translateX('+swipeOffset+'px)'};
     return <article className={`restaurant-rank-card restaurant-decision-card restaurant-decision-card-final ${rank===1?'winner':''}`} onTouchStart={e=>setStartX(e.touches[0].clientX)} onTouchMove={e=>startX!=null&&setDx(e.touches[0].clientX-startX)} onTouchEnd={end} style={swipeStyle}>
      <div className="restaurant-card-content">
       <div className="restaurant-card-topline"><em className="restaurant-rank-circle">#{rank}</em><span className={`restaurant-price-badge ${meal.price==null?'unknown':''}`}>{meal.price==null?'Price unknown':`${meal.currency&&meal.currency!=='USD'?meal.currency+' ': '$'}${Number(meal.price).toFixed(2)}`}</span><button className={`favorite-star ${Number(meal.favorite)===1?'active':''}`} onClick={onFavorite} aria-label="Toggle favorite"><Star fill={Number(meal.favorite)===1?'currentColor':'none'}/></button><button className="item-pencil" onClick={onEnrich} aria-label="Improve menu item"><Pencil/></button></div>
       <button className="restaurant-card-main" onClick={onOpen}><b>{meal.meal_name}</b><span>{meal.primary_category||meal.meal_period||meal.category||'Meal'} · {Math.round(meal.calories||0)} kcal · {Math.round(meal.protein||0)}g prot</span><p>{description}</p><small><strong>WHY IT RANKS #{rank}</strong>{reason}</small></button>
      </div>
      <aside className="restaurant-card-metrics" aria-label="Confidence and goal metrics"><button className="score-circle" onClick={onExplain} aria-label={`Explain ${confidence} percent confidence`}><span>{confidence}%</span></button><RestaurantMetric type="protein" label="Prot" value={meal.protein} unit="g"/><RestaurantMetric type="sat" label="Sat Fat" value={meal.saturated_fat} unit="g"/><RestaurantMetric type="chol" label="Chol" value={meal.cholesterol} unit="mg"/></aside>
     </article>
    }
    function Restaurants({refresh,done}){
     const [selectedId,setSelectedId]=useState(null),[showArchived,setShowArchived]=useState(false),[revision,setRevision]=useState(0),[editingProfile,setEditingProfile]=useState(false),[creating,setCreating]=useState(false),[selectedMeal,setSelectedMeal]=useState(null),[decisionMeal,setDecisionMeal]=useState(null),[classifyMeal,setClassifyMeal]=useState(null),[menuFilter,setMenuFilter]=useState('All'),[exchange,setExchange]=useState(null);
     const restaurants=optionalQuery(`SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE COALESCE(archived,0)=? ORDER BY COALESCE(favorite,0) DESC,name COLLATE NOCASE`,[showArchived?1:0]);const selected=selectedId?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE restaurant_id=?',[selectedId])[0]:null;const meals=selected?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM restaurant_meals WHERE restaurant_id=? AND COALESCE(active,1)=1 ORDER BY favorite DESC,meal_name COLLATE NOCASE',[selected.restaurant_id]):[];const visits=selected?optionalQuery('SELECT * FROM restaurant_visits WHERE restaurant_id=? ORDER BY visited_at DESC',[selected.restaurant_id]):[];const totals=getTodayTotals();let ranked=[];if(selected){try{const visible=menuFilter==='Favorites'?meals.filter(m=>Number(m.favorite)===1):menuFilter==='All'?meals:meals.filter(m=>restaurantMealEligibleFor(m,menuFilter));ranked=rankRestaurantMenu({meals:visible,totals,targets:getTargets(),limit:null})}catch(error){console.error(error)}}const profile=selected?restaurantProfileSummary({restaurant:selected,visits,meals}):null;
     async function favoriteMeal(e,meal){e.stopPropagation();await run('UPDATE restaurant_meals SET favorite=?,updated_at=? WHERE id=?',[Number(meal.favorite)===1?0:1,new Date().toISOString(),meal.id]);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     async function favoriteRestaurant(){await run('UPDATE restaurants SET favorite=?,status=?,updated_at=? WHERE restaurant_id=?',[profile.favorite?0:1,profile.favorite?'Saved':'Favorite',new Date().toISOString(),selected.restaurant_id]);setRevision(x=>x+1)}
     async function saveProfile(e){e.preventDefault();const f=new FormData(e.currentTarget),now=new Date().toISOString();if(creating){const id=`R${Date.now()}`;await run('INSERT INTO restaurants(restaurant_id,name,location,status,notes,updated_at,cuisine,website,phone,address,price_level,archived,favorite) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)',[id,f.get('name'),'','Active',f.get('notes'),now,f.get('cuisine'),f.get('website'),f.get('phone'),f.get('address'),f.get('price_level'),0,0]);setCreating(false);setSelectedId(id);setExchange({operation:'replace_menu',restaurant:{restaurant_id:id,name:f.get('name'),cuisine:f.get('cuisine'),website:f.get('website'),phone:f.get('phone'),address:f.get('address'),price_level:f.get('price_level'),notes:f.get('notes')}})}else{await run('UPDATE restaurants SET name=?,cuisine=?,website=?,phone=?,address=?,price_level=?,notes=?,updated_at=?
